<h2>Source code snippets</h2>
<h3><code>170_oh-my-claudecode/README.md</code></h3>
<h2>Quick Start</h2>
<p><strong>Step 1: Install</strong></p>
<p>Marketplace/plugin install (recommended for most Claude Code users).
These are Claude Code slash commands — enter them <strong>one at a time</strong> (pasting both lines at once will fail):</p>
<pre><code class="language-bash">/plugin marketplace add https://github.com/Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-claudecode
</code></pre>
<p>Then:</p>
<pre><code class="language-bash">/plugin install oh-my-claudecode
</code></pre>
<p>If you prefer the npm CLI/runtime path instead of the marketplace flow:</p>
<pre><code class="language-bash">npm i -g oh-my-claude-sisyphus@latest
</code></pre>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>Known npm warning:</strong> npm may print <code>deprecated prebuild-install@7.1.3</code> during the CLI install.
This currently comes from the upstream <code>better-sqlite3</code> native-addon dependency
(<code>better-sqlite3 -> prebuild-install</code>); <code>prebuild-install@7.1.3</code> is still the latest
published version, so there is no safe repo-side dependency bump or override to remove
the warning yet. The warning is tracked in <a href="https://github.com/Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-claudecode/issues/2913">#2913</a>
and does not by itself mean the OMC CLI install failed.</p>
</blockquote>
<p><strong>Step 2: Setup</strong></p>
<pre><code class="language-bash">

<h3><code>000/03_overview_canonical_map.md</code></h3>
<h1>Overview Canonical Map</h1>
<p>This map resolves the apparent duplication between <code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/</code> and <code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/</code> without deleting or moving files.</p>
<h2>Canonical Rule</h2>
<ul>
<li><code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/</code> is the root overview index and short-entry reading spine.</li>
<li><code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/</code> is the deep overview source set.</li>
<li>If the same filename exists in both folders and content differs, keep both:
<ul>
<li>read <code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/&#x3C;name></code> first for orientation,</li>
<li>read <code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/&#x3C;name></code> for detailed analysis.</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>If content is identical, treat <code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/&#x3C;name></code> as the navigation copy and <code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/&#x3C;name></code> as the deep-overview location until a later link audit decides whether deduplication is safe.</li>
</ul>

<h3><code>000/00_harness-index.md</code> (excerpt)</h3>
<h1>Harness Source Index</h1>
<p>This file is the non-conflicting <code>000/</code> index for source-repository harnesses.</p>
<p>The canonical deep overview files stay under /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/.
Files in /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000 named <code>00_harness-index_*</code> are short routing/index notes only. They intentionally avoid the canonical <code>00_&#x3C;prefix>_overview.md</code> basename so wiki/backlink indexers do not see two files with the same <code>00_*_overview</code> identity.</p>
<h2>Routing</h2>

<h3><code>000/03_overview_canonical_map.md</code></h3>
<h1>Overview Canonical Map</h1>
<p>This map resolves the apparent duplication between <code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/</code> and <code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/</code> without deleting or moving files.</p>
<h2>Canonical Rule</h2>
<ul>
<li><code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/</code> is the root overview index and short-entry reading spine.</li>
<li><code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/</code> is the deep overview source set.</li>
<li>If the same filename exists in both folders and content differs, keep both:
<ul>
<li>read <code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/&#x3C;name></code> first for orientation,</li>
<li>read <code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/&#x3C;name></code> for detailed analysis.</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>If content is identical, treat <code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/&#x3C;name></code> as the navigation copy and <code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/&#x3C;name></code> as the deep-overview location until a later link audit decides whether deduplication is safe.</li>
</ul>

<h2>Quick Start</h2>
<p><strong>Step 1: Install</strong></p>
<p>Marketplace/plugin install (recommended for most Claude Code users).
These are Claude Code slash commands — enter them <strong>one at a time</strong> (pasting both lines at once will fail):</p>
<pre><code class="language-bash">/plugin marketplace add https://github.com/Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-claudecode
</code></pre>
<p>Then:</p>
<pre><code class="language-bash">/plugin install oh-my-claudecode
</code></pre>
<p>If you prefer the npm CLI/runtime path instead of the marketplace flow:</p>
<pre><code class="language-bash">npm i -g oh-my-claude-sisyphus@latest
</code></pre>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>Known npm warning:</strong> npm may print <code>deprecated prebuild-install@7.1.3</code> during the CLI install.
This currently comes from the upstream <code>better-sqlite3</code> native-addon dependency
(<code>better-sqlite3 -> prebuild-install</code>); <code>prebuild-install@7.1.3</code> is still the latest
published version, so there is no safe repo-side dependency bump or override to remove
the warning yet. The warning is tracked in <a href="https://github.com/Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-claudecode/issues/2913">#2913</a>
and does not by itself mean the OMC CLI install failed.</p>
</blockquote>
<p><strong>Step 2: Setup</strong></p>

(<code>better-sqlite3 -> prebuild-install</code>); <code>prebuild-install@7.1.3</code> is still the latest

<pre><code>
Your Claude Just Have been Steroided.

  

---

## Why oh-my-claudecode?

- **Zero configuration required** - Works out of the box with intelligent defaults
- **Team-first orchestration** - Team is the canonical multi-agent surface
- **Natural language interface** - No commands to memorize, just describe what you want
- **Automatic parallelization** - Complex tasks distributed across specialized agents
- **Persistent execution** - Won't give up until the job is verified complete
- **Cost optimization** - Smart model routing saves 30-50% on tokens
- **Learn from experience** - Automatically extracts and reuses problem-solving patterns
- **Real-time visibility** - HUD statusline shows what's happening under the hood

---

## Features

### Orchestration Modes

Multiple strategies for different use cases — from Team-backed orchestration to token-efficient refactoring. [Learn more →](https://yeachan-heo.github.io/oh-my-claudecode-website/docs/#execution-modes)

| Mode                        | What it is                                                                              | Use For                                                                 |
| --------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Team (recommended)**      | Canonical staged pipeline (`team-plan → team-prd → team-exec → team-verify → team-fix`) | Coordinated Claude agents on a shared task list                         |
| **omc team (CLI)**          | tmux CLI workers — real `claude`/`codex`/`gemini` processes in split-panes              | Codex/Gemini CLI tasks; on-demand spawn, die when done                  |
| **ccg**                     | Tri-model advisors via `/ask codex` + `/ask gemini`, Claude synthesizes                 | Mixed backend+UI work needing both Codex and Gemini                     |
| **Autopilot**               | Autonomous execution (single lead agent)                                                | End-to-end feature work with minimal ceremony                           |
| **Ultrawork**               | Maximum parallelism (non-team)                                                          | Burst parallel fixes/refactors where Team isn't needed                  |
| **Ralph**                   | Persistent mode with verify/fix loops                                                   | Tasks that must complete fully (no silent partials)                     |
| **UltraQA**                 | QA cycling until tests/build/lint/typecheck goals pass                                  | Quality gates that need repeat diagnose/fix cycles                      |
| **Claude Code `/goal`**     | Native Claude Code cross-turn goal loop                                                 | One measurable session completion condition; not an OMC evidence ledger |
| **Artifact-only Ultragoal** | Durable goal/checkpoint/evidence artifacts without starting a loop                      | Handoffs, audits, or unavailable/conflicting loop runtimes              |
| **Pipeline**                | Sequential, staged processing                                                           | Multi-step transformations with strict ordering                         |
| **Ultrapilot (legacy)**     | Deprecated compatibility mode (autopilot pipeline alias)                                | Existing workflows and older docs                                       |

### Goal Workflow Guidance

Use only one primary loop authority in a session. Claude Code `/goal` is useful for a native cross-turn completion condition, while Ralph owns single-agent verified completion, Team owns parallel staged execution, and UltraQA owns repeated quality-gate cycling. Artifact-only Ultragoal is the safe fallback when you need durable goal artifacts and evidence without starting another loop.

For `/goal` behavior, rely on Claude Code/Anthropic sources: the [Claud

## Korean corpus (reference)

</code></pre>

</blockquote>
<p>If you experience issues after updating, clear the old plugin cache:</p>
<pre><code class="language-bash">/omc-doctor
</code></pre>

<li><strong>Learn from experience</strong> - Automatically extracts and reuses problem-solving patterns</li>
<li><strong>Real-time visibility</strong> - HUD statusline shows what's happening under the hood</li>

| **Ultrawork**               | Maximum parallelism (non-team)                                                          | Burst parallel fixes/refactors where Team isn't needed                  |
| **Ralph**                   | Persistent mode with verify/fix loops                                                   | Tasks that must complete fully (no silent partials)                     |
| **UltraQA**                 | QA cycling until tests/build/lint/typecheck goals pass                                  | Quality gates that need repeat diagnose/fix cycles                      |
| **Claude Code `/goal`**     | Native Claude Code cross-turn goal loop                                                 | One measurable session completion condition; not an OMC evidence ledger |
| **Artifact-only Ultragoal** | Durable goal/checkpoint/evidence artifacts without starting a loop                      | Handoffs, audits, or unavailable/conflicting loop runtimes              |
| **Pipeline**                | Sequential, staged processing                                                           | Multi-step transformations with strict ordering                         |
| **Ultrapilot (legacy)**     | Deprecated compatibility mode (autopilot pipeline alias)                                | Existing workflows and older docs                                       |

### Goal Workflow Guidance

Use only one primary loop authority in a session. Claude Code `/goal` is useful for a native cross-turn completion condition, while Ralph owns single-agent verified completion, Team owns parallel staged execution, and UltraQA owns repeated quality-gate cycling. Artifact-only Ultragoal is the safe fallback when you need durable goal artifacts and evidence without starting another loop.

For `/goal` behavior, rely on Claude Code/Anthropic sources: the [Claude Code `/goal` docs](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/goal) and [Anthropic Claude Code changelog](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/anthropics/claude-code/main/CHANGELOG.md). Do **not** claim the `/goal` evaluator independently runs commands or reads files; surface test output, diffs, and review evidence in the conversation before treating a goal as proven.

### Intelligent Orchestration

- **19 specialized agents** (with tier variants) for architecture, research, design, testing, data science
- **Smart model routing** - Haiku for simple tasks, Opus for complex reasoning
- **Automatic delegation** - Right agent for the job, every time
- **[Model × Agent Compatibility Matrix](docs/agents/model-compatibility.md)** - Which model to pair with each agent, with premium/balanced/budget presets

### Developer Experience

- **Magic keywords** - `ralph`, `ulw`, `ralplan`; Team stays explicit via `/team`
- **HUD statusline** - Real-time orchestration metrics in your status bar
  - If you launch Claude Code directly with `claude --plugin-dir ` (bypassing the `omc` shim), export `OMC_PLUGIN_ROOT=` in your shell so the HUD bundle resolves to the same checkout as the plugin loader. See the [Plugin directory flags secti

## Features

### Orchestration Modes

Multiple strategies for different use cases — from Team-backed orchestration to token-efficient refactoring. [Learn more →](https://yeachan-heo.github.io/oh-my-claudecode-website/docs/#execution-modes)

| Mode                        | What it is                                                                              | Use For                                                                 |
| --------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Team (recommended)**      | Canonical staged pipeline (`team-plan → team-prd → team-exec → team-verify → team-fix`) | Coordinated Claude agents on a shared task list                         |
| **omc team (CLI)**          | tmux CLI workers — real `claude`/`codex`/`gemini` processes in split-panes              | Codex/Gemini CLI tasks; on-demand spawn, die when done                  |
| **ccg**                     | Tri-model advisors via `/ask codex` + `/ask gemini`, Claude synthesizes                 | Mixed backend+UI work needing both Codex and Gemini                     |
| **Autopilot**               | Autonomous execution (single lead agent)                                                | End-to-end feature work with minimal ceremony                           |
| **Ultrawork**               | Maximum parallelism (non-team)                                                          | Burst parallel fixes/refactors where Team isn't needed                  |
| **Ralph**                   | Persistent mode with verify/fix loops                                                   | Tasks that must complete fully (no silent partials)                     |
| **UltraQA**                 | QA cycling until tests/build/lint/typecheck goals pass                                  | Quality gates that need repeat diagnose/fix cycles                      |
| **Claude Code `/goal`**     | Native Claude Code cross-turn goal loop                                                 | One measurable session completion condition; not an OMC evidence ledger |
| **Artifact-only Ultragoal** | Durable goal/checkpoint/evidence artifacts without starting a loop                      | Handoffs, audits, or unavailable/conflicting loop runtimes              |
| **Pipeline**                | Sequential, staged processing                                                           | Multi-step transformations with strict ordering                         |
| **Ultrapilot (legacy)**     | Deprecated compatibility mode (autopilot pipeline alias)                                | Existing workflows and older docs                                       |

### Goal Workflow Guidance

Use only one primary loop authority in a session. Claude Code `/goal` is useful for a native cross-turn completion condition, while Ralph owns single-agent verified completion, Team owns parallel staged execution, and UltraQA owns repeated quality-gate cycling. Artifact-only Ultragoal is the safe fallback when you need durable goal artifacts and evidence without starting another loop.

For `/goal` behavior, rely on Claude Code/Anthropic sources: the [Claude Code `/goal` docs](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/goal) and [Anthropic Claude Code changelog](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/anthropics/claude-code/main/CHANGELOG.md). Do **not** claim the `/goal` evaluator independently runs commands or reads files; surface test output, diffs, and review evidence in the conversation before treating a goal as proven.

---

## Why oh-my-claudecode?

- **Zero configuration required** - Works out of the box with intelligent defaults
- **Team-first orchestration** - Team is the canonical multi-agent surface
- **Natural language interface** - No commands to memorize, just describe what you want
- **Automatic parallelization** - Complex tasks distributed across specialized agents
- **Persistent execution** - Won't give up until the job is verified complete
- **Cost optimization** - Smart model routing saves 30-50% on tokens
- **Learn from experience** - Automatically extracts and reuses problem-solving patterns
- **Real-time visibility** - HUD statusline shows what's happening under the hood

---

38:T309d,<h2>Overview</h2>
<p><strong>Overview §1</strong> — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:</p>
<ul>
<li>OMC는 npm 패키지가 아니라 Claude Code 플러그인 매니페스트로 설치된다. <code>.claude-plugin/plugin.json</code>이 진입점이며 세 종류의 확장을 선언한다:</li>
<li>.claude-plugin/plugin.json:</li>
<li>"skills":     ["./skills/ai-slop-cleaner/", ... 38개 디렉토리]</li>
<li>"mcpServers": "./.mcp.json"      → MCP 서버 등록</li>
<li>"commands":   "./commands/"      → 슬래시 명령 등록</li>
<li>hooks/hooks.json (별도)            → 라이프사이클 Hook 등록</li>
<li>agents/*.md (자동 발견)            → 서브에이전트 정의</li>
<li><code>.claude-plugin/marketplace.json</code>은 마켓플레이스 카탈로그 엔트리로, OMC를 "Claude Code native multi-agent orchestration - 28 agents, 32 skills"로 소개한다(README는 ~19 agents/~36 skills로 셈, 버전별 변동).</li>
<li>바닐라 Claude Code 대비 OMC가 <strong>추가</strong>하는 것은 전적으로 이 플러그인 표면(skills/commands/hooks/MCP/agents)이다. 모델 호출, 인증, Messages API 스트리밍, 권한 모드, Tengu 보안 체인 등 코어 루프는 호스트인 Claude Code 것을 그대로 쓴다([[00_cc_overview]] §3, §5, §6).</li>
<li><code>src/</code>(TypeScript)는 esbuild 스크립트(<code>scripts/build-*.mjs</code>)로 번들되어 <code>bridge/</code>와 <code>dist/</code>에 떨어진다. <code>bridge/</code>의 주요 산출물:</li>
<li>| 파일 | 줄 수 | 역할 |</li>
<li>| <code>bridge/mcp-server.cjs</code> | 28,673 | <code>t</code> MCP 서버 — 상태/메모리/노트패드/LSP/AST/python/wiki/skills 도구 |</li>
</ul>

<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h2>1. Plugin structure and startup</h2>
<h2>1. Plugin structure and startup</h2>
<h3>1.1 OMC as a Claude Code plugin</h3>
<p>OMC is installed as a Claude Code plugin manifest, not as an npm package. <code>.claude-plugin/plugin.json</code> is the entry point and declares three kinds of extensions:</p>
<pre><code>.claude-plugin/plugin.json:
  "skills":     ["./skills/ai-slop-cleaner/", ... 38개 디렉토리]
  "mcpServers": "./.mcp.json"      → MCP 서버 등록
  "commands":   "./commands/"      → 슬래시 명령 등록
hooks/hooks.json (별도)            → 라이프사이클 Hook 등록
agents/*.md (자동 발견)            → 서브에이전트 정의
</code></pre>
<p><code>.claude-plugin/marketplace.json</code> is a marketplace catalog entry that introduces OMC as "Claude Code native multi-agent orchestration - 28 agents, 32 skills" (README counts as ~19 agents/~36 skills, varies by version).</p>
<p>What OMC <strong>adds</strong> over vanilla Claude Code is entirely this plugin surface (skills/commands/hooks/MCP/agents). The core loop, including model call, authentication, Messages API streaming, authorization mode, and Tengu security chain, uses Claude Code as the host ([[00_cc_overview]] §3, §5, §6).</p>
<h3>1.2 Build output (bridge/, dist/)</h3>
<p><code>src/</code> (TypeScript) is bundled with esbuild scripts (<code>scripts/build-*.mjs</code>) and dropped into <code>bridge/</code> and <code>dist/</code>. The main output of <code>bridge/</code>:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>file</th>
<th align="right">number of lines</th>
<th>Role</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>bridge/mcp-server.cjs</code></td>
<td align="right">28,673</td>
<td><code>t</code> MCP Server — status/memory/notepad/LSP/AST/python/wiki/skills tools</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>bridge/team-mcp.cjs</code></td>
<td align="right">19,882</td>
<td><code>team</code> MCP server — <code>omc_run_team_start/status/wait/cleanup</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>bridge/cli.cjs</code></td>
<td align="right">93,572</td>
<td><code>omc</code> CLI (ask/team/setup, etc.)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>bridge/runtime-cli.cjs</code></td>
<td align="right">9,447</td>
<td>team worker runtime bootstrap</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>bridge/team-bridge.cjs</code>, <code>team.js</code></td>
<td align="right">2,304 / 11,650</td>
<td>team dispatch/panel management</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>bridge/gyoshu_bridge.py</code></td>
<td align="right">1,171</td>
<td>Auxiliary Python Bridge</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p><code>.mcp.json</code> directly registers only one stdio MCP server named <code>t</code> (<code>node ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/bridge/mcp-server.cjs</code>). The team MCP server is started dynamically at runtime.</p>
<h3>1.3 Kill switch and environment variables</h3>
<p>According to <code>CLAUDE.md</code>, you can turn off the entire OMC with <code>DISABLE_OMC</code> and specific Hooks with <code>OMC_SKIP_HOOKS</code> (comma separated). <code>OMC_SECURITY=strict</code> turns on the hard upper limit on persistent loops (default 200 iterations) (<code>scripts/persistent-mode.mjs:getHardMaxIterations</code>).</p>
<h3>1.4 Overall structure at a glance</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    subgraph Host["Claude Code 코어 (호스트)"]
        Loop["에이전트 루프 / Messages API / 권한·Tengu 보안"]
    end
    subgraph OMC["OMC 플러그인 (확장점)"]
        Agents["agents/*.md (19 서브에이전트)"]
        Skills["skills/*/SKILL.md (~38) + commands/*.md (디스패처)"]
        Hooks["hooks.json (10 라이프사이클 Hook)"]
        TMcp["t MCP (state/notepad/memory/LSP/AST/python/wiki)"]
        TeamMcp["team MCP (tmux 워커)"]
    end
    subgraph Persist["영속 계층 .omc/"]
        State["state/ (모드 상태)"]
        Mem["project-memory.json / notepad.md / wiki"]
        Plans["plans/ research/ ultragoal/ledger.jsonl"]
        WT["team/{team}/worktrees/{worker}"]
    end
    Loop -->|Task| Agents
    Loop -->|슬래시/키워드| Skills
    Loop -->|tool_use| TMcp
    Loop --> Hooks
    Skills -->|/team| TeamMcp
    Hooks -->|state_write / 복원 / block| State
    TMcp --> Mem
    TMcp --> Plans
    TeamMcp --> WT
    Hooks -->|Stop decision:block| Loop
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>Korean corpus (reference)</h2>
<blockquote>
<p>Verbatim KO corpus <code>000_overview/00_omc_overview.md</code> for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.</p>

<h2>1. 플러그인 구조와 기동</h2>
<h2>1. 플러그인 구조와 기동</h2>
<h3>1.1 Claude Code 플러그인으로서의 OMC</h3>
<p>OMC는 npm 패키지가 아니라 Claude Code 플러그인 매니페스트로 설치된다. <code>.claude-plugin/plugin.json</code>이 진입점이며 세 종류의 확장을 선언한다:</p>
<pre><code>.claude-plugin/plugin.json:
  "skills":     ["./skills/ai-slop-cleaner/", ... 38개 디렉토리]
  "mcpServers": "./.mcp.json"      → MCP 서버 등록
  "commands":   "./commands/"      → 슬래시 명령 등록
hooks/hooks.json (별도)            → 라이프사이클 Hook 등록
agents/*.md (자동 발견)            → 서브에이전트 정의
</code></pre>
<p><code>.claude-plugin/marketplace.json</code>은 마켓플레이스 카탈로그 엔트리로, OMC를 "Claude Code native multi-agent orchestration - 28 agents, 32 skills"로 소개한다(README는 ~19 agents/~36 skills로 셈, 버전별 변동).</p>
<p>바닐라 Claude Code 대비 OMC가 <strong>추가</strong>하는 것은 전적으로 이 플러그인 표면(skills/commands/hooks/MCP/agents)이다. 모델 호출, 인증, Messages API 스트리밍, 권한 모드, Tengu 보안 체인 등 코어 루프는 호스트인 Claude Code 것을 그대로 쓴다([[00_cc_overview]] §3, §5, §6).</p>
<h3>1.2 빌드 산출물(bridge/, dist/)</h3>
<p><code>src/</code>(TypeScript)는 esbuild 스크립트(<code>scripts/build-*.mjs</code>)로 번들되어 <code>bridge/</code>와 <code>dist/</code>에 떨어진다. <code>bridge/</code>의 주요 산출물:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>파일</th>
<th align="right">줄 수</th>
<th>역할</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>bridge/mcp-server.cjs</code></td>
<td align="right">28,673</td>
<td><code>t</code> MCP 서버 — 상태/메모리/노트패드/LSP/AST/python/wiki/skills 도구</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>bridge/team-mcp.cjs</code></td>
<td align="right">19,882</td>
<td><code>team</code> MCP 서버 — <code>omc_run_team_start/status/wait/cleanup</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>bridge/cli.cjs</code></td>
<td align="right">93,572</td>
<td><code>omc</code> CLI(ask/team/setup 등)</td>

<td><code>bridge/runtime-cli.cjs</code></td>

<td>team 디스패치/패널 관리</td>
</tr>

<td><code>bridge/gyoshu_bridge.py</code></td>
<td align="right">1,171</td>
<td>보조 파이썬 브리지</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p><code>.mcp.json</code>은 <code>t</code>라는 단 하나의 stdio MCP 서버만 직접 등록한다(<code>node ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/bridge/mcp-server.cjs</code>). team MCP 서버는 런타임에서 동적으로 기동된다.</p>
<h3>1.3 킬 스위치와 환경변수</h3>
<p><code>CLAUDE.md</code>에 따르면 <code>DISABLE_OMC</code>로 OMC 전체를, <code>OMC_SKIP_HOOKS</code>(콤마 구분)로 특정 Hook을 끌 수 있다. <code>OMC_SECURITY=strict</code>는 영속 루프의 하드 상한(기본 200 iteration)을 켠다(<code>scripts/persistent-mode.mjs:getHardMaxIterations</code>).</p>
<h3>1.4 전체 구조 한눈에</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD

    end
    subgraph OMC["OMC 플러그인 (확장점)"]
        Agents["agents/*.md (19 서브에이전트)"]
        Skills["skills/*/SKILL.md (~38) + commands/*.md (디스패처)"]
        Hooks["hooks.json (10 라이프사이클 Hook)"]
        TMcp["t MCP (state/notepad/memory/LSP/AST/python/wiki)"]
        TeamMcp["team MCP (tmux 워커)"]
    end
    subgraph Persist["영속 계층 .omc/"]
        State["state/ (모드 상태)"]
        Mem["project-memory.json / notepad.md / wiki"]
        Plans["plans/ research/ ultragoal/ledger.jsonl"]
        WT["team/{team}/worktrees/{worker}"]
    end
    Loop -->|Task| Agents
    Loop -->|슬래시/키워드| Skills
    Loop -->|tool_use| TMcp
    Loop --> Hooks
    Skills -->|/team| TeamMcp
    Hooks -->|state_write / 복원 / block| State

39:T2c22,<h2>Overview</h2>
<p><strong>Overview §2</strong> — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:</p>
<ul>
<li>바닐라 Claude Code의 프롬프트 조립([[00_cc_overview]] §2)에서 OMC가 채워 넣는 것은 <strong>CLAUDE.md(프로젝트 지시) 계층</strong>이다. OMC 설치 시 마커로 감싼 블록이 <code>CLAUDE.md</code>에 주입된다:</li>
<li></li>
<li></li>
<li>...</li>
<li></li>
<li>이 블록은 마커 경계(<code>OMC:START</code>/<code>OMC:END</code>)를 가져 비파괴적으로 갱신·제거된다. 핵심 섹션:</li>
<li><code>&#x3C;delegation_rules></code>: 멀티파일 변경·리팩터·디버깅·리뷰·계획·리서치·검증은 <strong>위임</strong>, 사소한 작업은 직접 처리. 코드는 <code>executor</code>(복잡하면 <code>model=opus</code>)로, 불확실한 SDK 사용은 <code>document-specialist</code>로 라우팅.</li>
<li><code>&#x3C;model_routing></code>: <code>haiku</code>(빠른 조회) / <code>sonnet</code>(표준) / <code>opus</code>(아키텍처·심층). <code>~/.claude/**</code>, <code>.omc/**</code>, <code>.claude/**</code>, <code>CLAUDE.md</code>, <code>AGENTS.md</code>는 직접 쓰기 허용.</li>
<li><code>&#x3C;agent_catalog></code>: 19개 에이전트와 기본 모델 티어를 나열(접두사 <code>oh-my-claudecode:</code>).</li>
<li><code>&#x3C;tools></code>: OMC 전용 MCP 도구군 목록(상태/팀/노트패드/프로젝트메모리/코드인텔).</li>
<li><code>&#x3C;verification></code> / <code>&#x3C;execution_protocols></code>: 완료 주장 전 검증, 작성·검토 패스 분리, 같은 컨텍스트에서 자기 승인 금지.</li>
<li><code>&#x3C;commit_protocol></code>: git trailer(<code>Constraint:</code>/<code>Rejected:</code>/<code>Directive:</code>/<code>Confidence:</code>/<code>Scope-risk:</code>/<code>Not-tested:</code>)로 결정 맥락 보존.</li>
</ul>

<h2>Source code snippets</h2>

&#x3C;!-- OMC:VERSION:4.9.1 -->
# oh-my-claudecode - Intelligent Multi-Agent Orchestration
...
&#x3C;!-- OMC:END -->
</code></pre>

<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h2>2. System prompt injection (CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md)</h2>
<h2>2. System prompt injection (CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md)</h2>
<h3>2.1 Operating protocols instilled by OMC</h3>
<p>In vanilla Claude Code's prompt assembly ([[00_cc_overview]] §2), what the OMC fills in is the <strong>CLAUDE.md (project instruction) layer</strong>. When installing OMC, a marker-wrapped block is injected into <code>CLAUDE.md</code>:</p>
<pre><code>&#x3C;!-- OMC:START -->
&#x3C;!-- OMC:VERSION:4.9.1 -->
# oh-my-claudecode - Intelligent Multi-Agent Orchestration
...
&#x3C;!-- OMC:END -->
</code></pre>
<p>This block has marker boundaries (<code>OMC:START</code>/<code>OMC:END</code>) and can be updated/removed non-destructively. Key sections:</p>
<ul>
<li><code>&#x3C;delegation_rules></code>: <strong>Delegate</strong> multi-file changes, refactors, debugging, reviews, planning, research, and verification, and handle minor tasks yourself. Route code to <code>executor</code> (if complex, <code>model=opus</code>), and unclear SDK usage to <code>document-specialist</code>.</li>
<li><code>&#x3C;model_routing></code>: <code>haiku</code> (fast lookup) / <code>sonnet</code> (standard) / <code>opus</code> (architecture/deep). <code>~/.claude/**</code>, <code>.omc/**</code>, <code>.claude/**</code>, <code>CLAUDE.md</code>, and <code>AGENTS.md</code> allow direct writing.</li>
<li><code>&#x3C;agent_catalog></code>: Lists the 19 agents and their base model tiers (prefixed with <code>oh-my-claudecode:</code>).</li>
<li><code>&#x3C;tools></code>: List of OMC-specific MCP tools (status/team/notepad/project memory/code intel).</li>
<li><code>&#x3C;verification></code> / <code>&#x3C;execution_protocols></code>: Verification before completion assertion, separate creation and review passes, no self-acknowledgment in the same context.</li>
<li><code>&#x3C;commit_protocol></code>: Preserve decision context with git trailer(<code>Constraint:</code>/<code>Rejected:</code>/<code>Directive:</code>/<code>Confidence:</code>/<code>Scope-risk:</code>/<code>Not-tested:</code>).</li>
</ul>
<p><code>AGENTS.md</code> (20KB) is a longer canonical guidance schema that defines a contract where runtime hooks add overlays to marker boundaries (<code>&#x3C;!-- OMX:RUNTIME:START --></code>, <code>&#x3C;!-- OMX:TEAM:WORKER:START --></code>).</p>
<h3>2.2 system-reminder injection channel</h3>
<p>OMC injects the <code>&#x3C;system-reminder></code> tag into the conversation as a Hook output (<code>&#x3C;hooks_and_context></code> in <code>CLAUDE.md</code>). Promised pattern:</p>
<ul>
<li><code>hook success: Success</code> → progress signal</li>
<li><code>[MAGIC KEYWORD: ...]</code> → Skill call trigger</li>
<li><code>The boulder never stops</code> → ralph/ultrawork persistent mode active sign</li>
<li><code>&#x3C;remember></code> (7 days) / <code>&#x3C;remember priority></code> (permanent) → Permanent memory marker</li>
</ul>
<h3>2.3 Configuration Layer (<code>omc.jsonc</code>)</h3>
<p>OMC places its own JSONC settings (<code>src/config/loader.ts</code>) separately from vanilla Claude Code's <code>settings.json</code> layer 4 ([[00_cc_overview]] §1.3):</p>
<pre><code>user:    {configDir}/claude-omc/config.jsonc
project: {cwd}/.claude/omc.jsonc      ← project가 user를 오버라이드
</code></pre>
<p>Main Key:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong><code>team.roleRouting</code></strong>: Specify provider/model for each canonical role. Example: <code>critic</code> is codex, <code>reviewer</code> (normalized to →code-reviewer) is gemini. <code>orchestrator</code> is always pinned by claude and only <code>model</code> is adjustable (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW tier or model ID). For unknown roles or incorrect providers, the loader issues a verification warning. <code>/team</code> Applies at runtime when spawning workers.</li>
<li><strong><code>companyContext.tool</code></strong>: In-house context MCP tool to be called in autopilot Phase 0, etc. Action on failure: <code>companyContext.onError</code>(<code>warn</code> default / <code>silent</code> / <code>fail</code>).</li>
<li><strong><code>security.hardMaxIterations</code></strong>: persistent loop hard upper limit (§7.1).</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<h2>Korean corpus (reference)</h2>
<blockquote>
<p>Verbatim KO corpus <code>000_overview/00_omc_overview.md</code> for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.</p>
</blockquote>
<h2>2. 시스템 프롬프트 주입 (CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md)</h2>
<h2>2. 시스템 프롬프트 주입 (CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md)</h2>
<h3>2.1 OMC가 주입하는 운영 규약</h3>
<p>바닐라 Claude Code의 프롬프트 조립([[00_cc_overview]] §2)에서 OMC가 채워 넣는 것은 <strong>CLAUDE.md(프로젝트 지시) 계층</strong>이다. OMC 설치 시 마커로 감싼 블록이 <code>CLAUDE.md</code>에 주입된다:</p>
<pre><code>&#x3C;!-- OMC:START -->
&#x3C;!-- OMC:VERSION:4.9.1 -->
# oh-my-claudecode - Intelligent Multi-Agent Orchestration
...
&#x3C;!-- OMC:END -->
</code></pre>
<p>이 블록은 마커 경계(<code>OMC:START</code>/<code>OMC:END</code>)를 가져 비파괴적으로 갱신·제거된다. 핵심 섹션:</p>
<ul>
<li><code>&#x3C;delegation_rules></code>: 멀티파일 변경·리팩터·디버깅·리뷰·계획·리서치·검증은 <strong>위임</strong>, 사소한 작업은 직접 처리. 코드는 <code>executor</code>(복잡하면 <code>model=opus</code>)로, 불확실한 SDK 사용은 <code>document-specialist</code>로 라우팅.</li>
<li><code>&#x3C;model_routing></code>: <code>haiku</code>(빠른 조회) / <code>sonnet</code>(표준) / <code>opus</code>(아키텍처·심층). <code>~/.claude/**</code>, <code>.omc/**</code>, <code>.claude/**</code>, <code>CLAUDE.md</code>, <code>AGENTS.md</code>는 직접 쓰기 허용.</li>
<li><code>&#x3C;agent_catalog></code>: 19개 에이전트와 기본 모델 티어를 나열(접두사 <code>oh-my-claudecode:</code>).</li>
<li><code>&#x3C;tools></code>: OMC 전용 MCP 도구군 목록(상태/팀/노트패드/프로젝트메모리/코드인텔).</li>
<li><code>&#x3C;verification></code> / <code>&#x3C;execution_protocols></code>: 완료 주장 전 검증, 작성·검토 패스 분리, 같은 컨텍스트에서 자기 승인 금지.</li>
<li><code>&#x3C;commit_protocol></code>: git trailer(<code>Constraint:</code>/<code>Rejected:</code>/<code>Directive:</code>/<code>Confidence:</code>/<code>Scope-risk:</code>/<code>Not-tested:</code>)로 결정 맥락 보존.</li>
</ul>
<p><code>AGENTS.md</code>(20KB)는 더 긴 정본 가이던스 스키마로, 런타임 Hook이 마커 경계(<code>&#x3C;!-- OMX:RUNTIME:START --></code>, <code>&#x3C;!-- OMX:TEAM:WORKER:START --></code>)에 오버레이를 덧붙이는 계약을 정의한다.</p>
<h3>2.2 system-reminder 주입 채널</h3>
<p>OMC는 Hook 출력으로 <code>&#x3C;system-reminder></code> 태그를 대화에 주입한다(<code>CLAUDE.md</code>의 <code>&#x3C;hooks_and_context></code>). 약속된 패턴:</p>
<ul>
<li><code>hook success: Success</code> → 진행 신호</li>
<li><code>[MAGIC KEYWORD: ...]</code> → 스킬 호출 트리거</li>
<li><code>The boulder never stops</code> → ralph/ultrawork 영속 모드 활성 표지</li>
<li><code>&#x3C;remember></code>(7일) / <code>&#x3C;remember priority></code>(영구) → 영속 메모리 표지</li>
</ul>
<h3>2.3 설정 계층 (<code>omc.jsonc</code>)</h3>
<p>OMC는 바닐라 Claude Code의 <code>settings.json</code> 4계층([[00_cc_overview]] §1.3)과 별개로 자체 JSONC 설정을 둔다(<code>src/config/loader.ts</code>):</p>
<pre><code>user:    {configDir}/claude-omc/config.jsonc
project: {cwd}/.claude/omc.jsonc      ← project가 user를 오버라이드
</code></pre>
<p>주요 키:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong><code>team.roleRouting</code></strong>: 정본 역할(canonical role)별로 provider/model을 지정. 예: <code>critic</code>은 codex, <code>reviewer</code>(→code-reviewer로 정규화)는 gemini. <code>orchestrator</code>는 항상 claude로 핀 고정되고 <code>model</code>만 조정 가능(HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW 티어 또는 모델 ID). 알 수 없는 역할·잘못된 provider는 로더가 검증 경고를 낸다. <code>/team</code> 워커 스폰 시 런타임에 적용.</li>
<li><strong><code>companyContext.tool</code></strong>: autopilot Phase 0 등에서 호출할 사내 컨텍스트 MCP 도구. 실패 시 동작은 <code>companyContext.onError</code>(<code>warn</code> 기본 / <code>silent</code> / <code>fail</code>).</li>
<li><strong><code>security.hardMaxIterations</code></strong>: 영속 루프 하드 상한(§7.1).</li>
</ul>
<hr>
16:["$","$L30","07-overview-02",{"id":"07-overview-02","order":8,"tier":"developer","title":"Overview §2","description":"000_overview/00_omc_overview.md","lang":"en","badge":"DEV","children":["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$39"}}]}]
3a:T3f62,<h2>Overview</h2>
<p><strong>Overview §3</strong> — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:</p>
<ul>
<li>각 에이전트는 <code>agents/&#x3C;name>.md</code>의 YAML frontmatter(<code>name</code>, <code>description</code>, <code>model</code>, <code>level</code>, 선택적 <code>disallowedTools</code>)와 <code>&#x3C;Agent_Prompt></code> 본문으로 정의된다. Claude Code의 서브에이전트(Task) 메커니즘([[00_cc_overview]] §6.2)으로 격리 컨텍스트에서 실행된다. 다수의 읽기 전용 에이전트는 `disallowedT</li>
<li>| 에이전트 | 모델 | level | 쓰기 | 역할(요지) |</li>
<li>| <code>explore</code> | haiku | 3 | ❌ | 코드베이스 검색 — "X는 어디 있나/Y를 담은 파일/Z↔W 연결" |</li>
<li>| <code>analyst</code> | opus | 3 | ❌ | 계획 전 요구사항 분석, 수용 기준·갭·엣지케이스 도출 |</li>
<li>| <code>planner</code> | opus | 4 | ✅ | 인터뷰 기반 작업 계획 작성 → <code>.omc/plans/*.md</code> |</li>
<li>| <code>architect</code> | opus | 3 | ❌ | 읽기 전용 아키텍처·버그 진단(file:line 근거 필수) |</li>
<li>| <code>critic</code> | opus | 3 | ❌ | 최종 품질 게이트 — 계획/코드의 결함·갭 적발 |</li>
<li>| <code>debugger</code> | sonnet | 3 | ✅ | 근본원인 분석, 회귀 격리, 빌드/컴파일 오류 최소 수정 |</li>
<li>| <code>executor</code> | sonnet | 2 | ✅ | 사양대로 구현(멀티파일 end-to-end). 기본 구현 일꾼 |</li>
<li>| <code>verifier</code> | sonnet | 3 | ✅ | 완료 주장에 신선한 증거 요구, 수용 기준 검증 |</li>
<li>| <code>tracer</code> | sonnet | 3 | ✅ | 증거 기반 인과 추적, 경쟁 가설·다음 프로브 추천 |</li>
<li>| <code>security-reviewer</code> | opus | 3 | ❌ | OWASP Top10·시크릿·미검증 입력 취약점 탐지 |</li>
</ul>

<h2>Source code snippets</h2>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-text">&#x3C;Role>            책임 + 비책임(analyst/planner/critic/executor와의 경계)
&#x3C;Why_This_Matters>  "코드 안 읽은 아키텍처 조언은 추측" — 규칙의 근거
&#x3C;Success_Criteria>  모든 발견은 file:line 인용, 근본원인 식별, 구체적 권고
&#x3C;Constraints>      READ-ONLY(Write/Edit 차단), 안 읽은 코드 판단 금지, 핸드오프 대상 명시
&#x3C;Investigation_Protocol>
   1) 컨텍스트 먼저(Glob 구조맵 + Grep/Read, 병렬 실행) — MANDATORY
   2) 디버깅: 에러 전문 읽기 → git log/blame → 동작/고장 델타 비교
   3) 가설을 더 파기 전에 문서화
   4) 가설 ↔ 실제 코드 교차검증, 모든 주장에 file:line
   7) 3-failure circuit breaker: 3회 이상 수정 실패 시 변형 시도 대신 아키텍처를 의심
&#x3C;Tool_Usage>       lsp_diagnostics / lsp_diagnostics_directory / ast_grep_search 활용 지시
</code></pre>
<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h2>3. Agent catalog (agents/)</h2>
<h2>3. Agent catalog (agents/)</h2>
<p>Each agent is defined by a YAML frontmatter (<code>name</code>, <code>description</code>, <code>model</code>, <code>level</code>, optional <code>disallowedTools</code>) in <code>agents/&#x3C;name>.md</code> and a <code>&#x3C;Agent_Prompt></code> body. It is executed in an isolated context with Claude Code's subagent (Task) mechanism ([[00_cc_overview]] §6.2). Many read-only agents have their write permissions revoked with <code>disallowedTools: Write, Edit</code>.</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>agent</th>
<th>model</th>
<th align="center">level</th>
<th align="center">writing</th>
<th>Role (Gist)</th>
</tr>
</thead>

<td align="center">❌</td>
<td>Codebase Search — "Where is X/file containing Y/Z↔W connection"</td>
</tr>

</tr>

</table>
<p>Each prompt follows the same framework: <code>&#x3C;Role></code> (responsibility + specified boundary as “what you are not doing”) → <code>&#x3C;Why_This_Matters></code> → <code>&#x3C;Success_Criteria></code>. The <code>executor</code>·<code>git-master</code> prompt specifies that it forces the subagent to execute directly without spawning another subagent via the <strong>Worker Preamble Protocol</strong> (<code>wrapWithPreamble()</code> in <code>src/agents/preamble.ts</code>).</p>
<h3>3.1 Dissecting the agent prompt (architect example)</h3>
<p>As an example, <code>agents/architect.md</code> shows that the OMC agent prompt contains not just a simple role statement, but also an <strong>execution protocol</strong>:</p>
<pre><code>&#x3C;Role>            책임 + 비책임(analyst/planner/critic/executor와의 경계)
&#x3C;Why_This_Matters>  "코드 안 읽은 아키텍처 조언은 추측" — 규칙의 근거
&#x3C;Success_Criteria>  모든 발견은 file:line 인용, 근본원인 식별, 구체적 권고
&#x3C;Constraints>      READ-ONLY(Write/Edit 차단), 안 읽은 코드 판단 금지, 핸드오프 대상 명시
&#x3C;Investigation_Protocol>
   1) 컨텍스트 먼저(Glob 구조맵 + Grep/Read, 병렬 실행) — MANDATORY
   2) 디버깅: 에러 전문 읽기 → git log/blame → 동작/고장 델타 비교
   3) 가설을 더 파기 전에 문서화
   4) 가설 ↔ 실제 코드 교차검증, 모든 주장에 file:line
   7) 3-failure circuit breaker: 3회 이상 수정 실패 시 변형 시도 대신 아키텍처를 의심
&#x3C;Tool_Usage>       lsp_diagnostics / lsp_diagnostics_directory / ast_grep_search 활용 지시
</code></pre>
<p>The read-only agent (architect/analyst/critic/explore/code-reviewer/security-reviewer/document-specialist/scientist) is <strong>actually deprived of writing tools at the host level</strong> with the <code>&#x3C;Constraints></code> text in the prompt as well as the frontmatter <code>disallowedTools: Write, Edit</code> — a double seal of conventions and permissions.</p>
<hr>
<h2>Korean corpus (reference)</h2>
<blockquote>
<p>Verbatim KO corpus <code>000_overview/00_omc_overview.md</code> for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.</p>
</blockquote>
<h2>3. 에이전트 카탈로그 (agents/)</h2>
<h2>3. 에이전트 카탈로그 (agents/)</h2>
<p>각 에이전트는 <code>agents/&#x3C;name>.md</code>의 YAML frontmatter(<code>name</code>, <code>description</code>, <code>model</code>, <code>level</code>, 선택적 <code>disallowedTools</code>)와 <code>&#x3C;Agent_Prompt></code> 본문으로 정의된다. Claude Code의 서브에이전트(Task) 메커니즘([[00_cc_overview]] §6.2)으로 격리 컨텍스트에서 실행된다. 다수의 읽기 전용 에이전트는 <code>disallowedTools: Write, Edit</code>로 쓰기 권한을 박탈당한다.</p>

</tr>
</thead>

<td><code>writer</code></td>
<td>haiku</td>
<td align="center">2</td>
<td align="center">✅</td>
<td>README/API 문서/주석(검증된 예제만)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>scientist</code></td>
<td>sonnet</td>
<td align="center">3</td>
<td align="center">❌</td>
<td>Python 기반 데이터 분석·통계·시각화·리포트</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>document-specialist</code></td>
<td>sonnet</td>
<td align="center">2</td>
<td align="center">❌</td>
<td>외부/리포 문서·API 레퍼런스 조사(인용 필수)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>git-master</code></td>
<td>sonnet</td>
<td align="center">3</td>
<td align="center">✅</td>
<td>원자적 커밋 분할, 스타일 매칭 메시지, 안전 rebase</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>각 프롬프트는 동일 골격을 따른다: <code>&#x3C;Role></code>(책임 + "당신이 하지 않는 일"로 경계 명시) → <code>&#x3C;Why_This_Matters></code> → <code>&#x3C;Success_Criteria></code>. <code>executor</code>·<code>git-master</code> 프롬프트는 <strong>Worker Preamble Protocol</strong>(<code>src/agents/preamble.ts</code>의 <code>wrapWithPreamble()</code>)을 통해 서브에이전트가 또 다른 서브에이전트를 스폰하지 않고 직접 실행하도록 강제한다고 명시한다.</p>
<h3>3.1 에이전트 프롬프트 해부 (architect 예)</h3>
<p><code>agents/architect.md</code>를 표본으로 보면 OMC 에이전트 프롬프트가 단순 역할 문장이 아니라 <strong>실행 프로토콜</strong>까지 담는다:</p>
<pre><code>&#x3C;Role>            책임 + 비책임(analyst/planner/critic/executor와의 경계)
&#x3C;Why_This_Matters>  "코드 안 읽은 아키텍처 조언은 추측" — 규칙의 근거
&#x3C;Success_Criteria>  모든 발견은 file:line 인용, 근본원인 식별, 구체적 권고
&#x3C;Constraints>      READ-ONLY(Write/Edit 차단), 안 읽은 코드 판단 금지, 핸드오프 대상 명시
&#x3C;Investigation_Protocol>
   1) 컨텍스트 먼저(Glob 구조맵 + Grep/Read, 병렬 실행) — MANDATORY
   2) 디버깅: 에러 전문 읽기 → git log/blame → 동작/고장 델타 비교
   3) 가설을 더 파기 전에 문서화
   4) 가설 ↔ 실제 코드 교차검증, 모든 주장에 file:line
   7) 3-failure circuit breaker: 3회 이상 수정 실패 시 변형 시도 대신 아키텍처를 의심
&#x3C;Tool_Usage>       lsp_diagnostics / lsp_diagnostics_directory / ast_grep_search 활용 지시
</code></pre>
<p>읽기 전용 에이전트(architect/analyst/critic/explore/code-reviewer/security-reviewer/document-specialist/scientist)는 프롬프트의 <code>&#x3C;Constraints></code> 텍스트뿐 아니라 frontmatter <code>disallowedTools: Write, Edit</code>로 <strong>호스트 레벨에서 실제로 쓰기 도구가 박탈</strong>된다 — 규약과 권한의 이중 봉인.</p>
<hr>

3b:T3c67,<h2>Overview</h2>
<p><strong>Overview §4</strong> — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:</p>
<ul>
<li><code>commands/*.md</code>는 거의 모두 <strong>얇은 디스패처</strong>다. 예: <code>commands/ccg.md</code>는 "전체 스킬 설명을 매 세션 프롬프트에 싣지 않기 위한 호환 명령"으로, <code>skills/ccg/SKILL.md</code>를 읽어 <code>$ARGUMENTS</code>로 그대로 따르라고 지시한다. 즉 명령은 슬래시 노출용 진입점이고 실제 행동은 스킬 SKILL.md에 있다(컨텍스트 절약 패턴).</li>
<li>스킬은 <code>level</code> 프론트매터로 무게를 표시한다(낮을수록 가벼움). 주요 스킬:</li>
<li>| 스킬 | level | 분류 | 역할(요지) |</li>
<li>| <code>autopilot</code> | 4 | 영속 모드 | 아이디어→동작 코드 완전 자율 실행(ralph 포함) |</li>
<li>| <code>ralph</code> | 4 | 영속 모드 | 작업 완료까지 자기 참조 루프 + 검증 리뷰어 |</li>
<li>| <code>ultrawork</code> | 4 | 실행 컴포넌트 | 고처리량 병렬 실행 엔진(영속성 없음, ralph가 얹음) |</li>
<li>| <code>ultragoal</code> | 3 | 영속 모드 | <code>.omc/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl</code> 기반 내구성 다중 목표 |</li>
<li>| <code>team</code> | 4 | 멀티 워커 | N개 협응 에이전트, 공유 task 리스트(Claude 네이티브 teams) |</li>
<li>| <code>omc-teams</code> | 4 | 멀티 워커 | tmux 패널의 claude/codex/gemini CLI 워커 런타임 |</li>
<li>| <code>ralplan</code> | 4 | 게이팅 | 모호한 ralph/autopilot/team 요청을 합의 계획으로 게이트 |</li>
<li>| <code>plan</code> | 4 | 계획 | 인터뷰 옵션 포함 전략 계획 |</li>
<li>| <code>ultraqa</code> | 3 | 검증 루프 | 테스트→검증→수정 반복 |</li>
</ul>

<h2>Quick Start</h2>
<p><strong>Step 1: Install</strong></p>
<p>Marketplace/plugin install (recommended for most Claude Code users).
These are Claude Code slash commands — enter them <strong>one at a time</strong> (pasting both lines at once will fail):</p>
<pre><code class="language-bash">/plugin marketplace add https://github.com/Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-claudecode
</code></pre>
<p>Then:</p>
<pre><code class="language-bash">/plugin install oh-my-claudecode
</code></pre>
<p>If you prefer the npm CLI/runtime path instead of the marketplace flow:</p>
<pre><code class="language-bash">npm i -g oh-my-claude-sisyphus@latest
</code></pre>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>Known npm warning:</strong> npm may print <code>deprecated prebuild-install@7.1.3</code> during the CLI install.
This currently comes from the upstream <code>better-sqlite3</code> native-addon dependency
(<code>better-sqlite3 -> prebuild-install</code>); <code>prebuild-install@7.1.3</code> is still the latest
published version, so there is no safe repo-side dependency bump or override to remove
the warning yet. The warning is tracked in <a href="https://github.com/Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-claudecode/issues/2913">#2913</a>
and does not by itself mean the OMC CLI install failed.</p>
</blockquote>
<p><strong>Step 2: Setup</strong></p>
<pre><code class="language-bash">

## Main analysis

## 4. Skills and commands (skills/, commands/)

## 4. Skills and commands (skills/, commands/)

### 4.1 Command = Skill Dispatcher

`commands/*.md` are almost all **thin dispatchers**. Example: `commands/ccg.md` is a "compatible command for not loading the entire skill description at the prompt in every session", which instructs `skills/ccg/SKILL.md` to be read and followed as `$ARGUMENTS`. That is, the command is the entry point for slash exposure, and the actual action is in skill SKILL.md (context-saving pattern).

### 4.2 Skill classification

Skills display their weight using the `level` front matter (the lower the weight, the lighter it is). Main skills:

| Skill | level | Category | Role (Gist) |
| --- | :---: | --- | --- |
| `autopilot` | 4 | persistent mode | Idea→Action Code fully autonomous execution (including Ralph) |
| `ralph` | 4 | persistent mode | Self-referencing loop until task completion + verification reviewer |
| `ultrawork` | 4 | Execution component | High-throughput parallel execution engine (no persistence, contributed by ralph) |
| `ultragoal` | 3 | persistent mode | `.omc/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl` based durable multi-goal |
| `team` | 4 | multi worker | N cooperative agents, shared task list (Claude native teams) |
| `omc-teams` | 4 | multi worker | claude/codex/gemini CLI worker runtime in tmux panel |
| `ralplan` | 4 | Gating | Gate ambiguous ralph/autopilot/team request into consensus plan |
| `plan` | 4 | planning | Strategic Plan with Interview Option |
| `ultraqa` | 3 | verification loop | Test → Verify → Edit Repeat |
| `autoresearch` | 4 | Research Loop | Evaluator Contract Based Single Mission Improvement Loop |
| `sciomc` | 4 | analysis | Parallel scientist agent orchestration (AUTO mode) |
| `self-improve` | 4 | Evolution | Improved autonomous code based on tournament selection |
| `deep-interview` | 3 | Required tablets | Mathematical Ambiguity Gating Socratic Interview |
| `deep-dive` | — | pipeline | trace → deep-interview step 2 |
| `trace` | 2 | tracking | Competitive Tracer Hypothesis Orchestration |
| `ai-slop-cleaner` | 3 | Summary | Regression Safe Delete First Slop Cleaning |
| `ccg` | 5 | External AI | Claude–Codex–Gemini 3-Model Consensus (§5 below) |
| `ask` | — | External AI | `omc ask &#x3C;claude\|codex\|gemini>` advisor routing |
| `wiki` | — | memory | markdown knowledge base accumulated between sessions |
| `remember` / `writer-memory` | —/7 | memory | Project memory/notepad persistence, character/scene tracking for writers |
| `learner` / `skillify` | 7/— | meta | Extract reused skills from conversations |
| `deepinit` | 4 | reset | Documenting the hierarchical AGENTS.md codebase |
| `setup`/`omc-setup`/`omc-doctor`/`mcp-setup`/`hud`/`configure-notifications`/`cancel`/`release`/`verify`/`project-session-manager`/`skill`/`visual-verdict`/`external-context` | 2~4 | utility | Installation · Diagnosis · MCP · HUD · Notification · Cancellation · Release · Verification · Session · Skill Management · Visual QA · External Context |

### 4.3 Composition relations in persistent mode (ultrawork ⊂ ralph ⊂ autopilot)

The three permanent skills have a **layered composition** relationship (as specified by `&#x3C;Do_Not_Use_When>` in each SKILL.md):

- **`ultrawork`** (component): Provides parallel execution + model routing only. No persistence, verification loops, or long-term state. Launch independent tasks simultaneously (30 seconds+ tasks with `run_in_background: true`).
- **`ralph`**(= ultrawork + persistence + PRD): PRD driven persistence loop. Auto-scaffold `prd.json` on startup (session scope `.omc/state/sessions/{sessionId}/prd.json`), repeat until all user stories `passes: true` + **reviewer verified**. Completion Reviewer selected with `--critic=architect|critic|codex` (default architect). By default, perform a deslop pass after completion (turn off with `--no-deslop`). Progress/learning is accumulated in `progress.txt`.
- **`autopilot`**(= ralph + full life cycle): Phase 0 expansion → Phase 1 planning → Phase 2 parallel implementation → Phase 4 QA cycle → Multi-perspective verification. The QA cycle lasts up to 5 times, and if the same error persists 3 times, it is stopped and reported. If there is a ralplan consensus plan (`.omc/plans/ralplan-*.md`) or deep-interview specification (`.omc/specs/deep-interview-*.md`), the previous phase is skipped (to prevent duplicate work). When entering Phase 0, if `companyContext.tool` is set, the corresponding MCP tool is called for advisory purposes (`.claude/omc.jsonc`).

Thanks to this composition, `ralph`/`autopilot` and `ultrawork` are mutually exclusive (§9).

### 4.4 Keyword automatic trigger

The `UserPromptSubmit` Hook executes two scripts sequentially.

1. **`keyword-detector.mjs`**: Detects magic keywords in user input and calls the corresponding skill (in order of priority): `cancelomc/stopomc` → `ralph` → `autopilot` → `ultrawork/ulw` → `ccg` → `ralplan` → `deep interview` → `ai-slop-cleaner`(`deslop`/`anti-slop`) → `tdd` → `code review` → `security review` → `ultrathink` → `deepsearch` → `analyze`. **team is not subject to automatic triggering** and must be launched only with explicit `/team` (`keyword-detector.mjs` comment).
2. **`skill-injector.mjs`**: Injects **learning skill** (learner/skillify output) matching the prompt trigger into the context. A recursive search looks at three locations — user (`~/.claude/skills/omc-learned`), global (`~/.omc/skills`), and project (`.omc/skills`). Maximum of 5 per session (`MAX_SKILLS_PER_SESSION`), with a context limit of 3000 characters. `UserPromptSubmit` pops up as a new Node process every turn, preventing reinjection of the same skill with **file-based session dedup** rather than in-memory (issue #2577). If possible, use compiled `dist/hooks/skill-bridge.cjs`, otherwise fall back to inline.

---

## Korean corpus (reference)

> Verbatim KO corpus `000_overview/00_omc_overview.md` for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.

## 4. 스킬과 명령 (skills/, commands/)

## 4. 스킬과 명령 (skills/, commands/)

### 4.1 명령 = 스킬 디스패처

`commands/*.md`는 거의 모두 **얇은 디스패처**다. 예: `commands/ccg.md`는 "전체 스킬 설명을 매 세션 프롬프트에 싣지 않기 위한 호환 명령"으로, `skills/ccg/SKILL.md`를 읽어 `$ARGUMENTS`로 그대로 따르라고 지시한다. 즉 명령은 슬래시 노출용 진입점이고 실제 행동은 스킬 SKILL.md에 있다(컨텍스트 절약 패턴).

### 4.2 스킬 분류

스킬은 `level` 프론트매터로 무게를 표시한다(낮을수록 가벼움). 주요 스킬:

| 스킬 | level | 분류 | 역할(요지) |
| --- | :---: | --- | --- |
| `autopilot` | 4 | 영속 모드 | 아이디어→동작 코드 완전 자율 실행(ralph 포함) |
| `ralph` | 4 | 영속 모드 | 작업 완료까지 자기 참조 루프 + 검증 리뷰어 |
| `ultrawork` | 4 | 실행 컴포넌트 | 고처리량 병렬 실행 엔진(영속성 없음, ralph가 얹음) |
| `ultragoal` | 3 | 영속 모드 | `.omc/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl` 기반 내구성 다중 목표 |
| `team` | 4 | 멀티 워커 | N개 협응 에이전트, 공유 task 리스트(Claude 네이티브 teams) |
| `omc-teams` | 4 | 멀티 워커 | tmux 패널의 claude/codex/gemini CLI 워커 런타임 |
| `ralplan` | 4 | 게이팅 | 모호한 ralph/autopilot/team 요청을 합의 계획으로 게이트 |
| `plan` | 4 | 계획 | 인터뷰 옵션 포함 전략 계획 |
| `ultraqa` | 3 | 검증 루프 | 테스트→검증→수정 반복 |
| `autoresearch` | 4 | 리서치 루프 | 평가자 계약 기반 단일 미션 개선 루프 |
| `sciomc` | 4 | 분석 | 병렬 scientist 에이전트 오케스트레이션(AUTO 모드) |
| `self-improve` | 4 | 진화 | 토너먼트 선택 기반 자율 코드 개선 |
| `deep-interview` | 3 | 요구 정제 | 수학적 모호성 게이팅 소크라테스식 인터뷰 |
| `deep-dive` | — | 파이프라인 | trace → deep-interview 2단계 |
| `trace` | 2 | 추적 | 경쟁 tracer 가설 오케스트레이션 |
| `ai-slop-cleaner` | 3 | 정리 | 회귀 안전 삭제 우선 슬롭 청소 |
| `ccg` | 5 | 외부 AI | Claude–Codex–Gemini 3모델 합의(아래 §5) |
| `ask` | — | 외부 AI | `omc ask &#x3C;claude\|codex\|gemini>` 어드바이저 라우팅 |
| `wiki` | — | 메모리 | 세션 간 누적되는 markdown 지식 베이스 |
| `remember` / `writer-memory` | —/7 | 메모리 | 프로젝트 메모리/노트패드 영속, 작가용 캐릭터/씬 추적 |
| `learner` / `skillify` | 7/— | 메타 | 대화에서 재사용 스킬 추출 |
| `deepinit` | 4 | 초기화 | 계층적 AGENTS.md 코드베이스 문서화 |
| `setup`/`omc-setup`/`omc-doctor`/`mcp-setup`/`hud`/`configure-notifications`/`cancel`/`release`/`verify`/`project-session-manager`/`skill`/`visual-verdict`/`external-context` | 2~4 | 유틸 | 설치·진단·MCP·HUD·알림·취소·릴리스·검증·세션·스킬관리·시각QA·외부컨텍스트 |

### 4.3 영속 모드의 합성 관계 (ultrawork ⊂ ralph ⊂ autopilot)

세 영속 스킬은 **층상 합성** 관계다(각 SKILL.md의 `&#x3C;Do_Not_Use_When>`이 명시):

- **`ultrawork`**(컴포넌트): 병렬 실행 + 모델 라우팅만 제공. 영속성·검증 루프·장기 상태는 없음. 독립 작업을 동시 발사(`run_in_background: true`로 30초+ 작업).
- **`ralph`**(= ultrawork + 영속 + PRD): PRD 구동 영속 루프. 시작 시 `prd.json`을 자동 스캐폴드(세션 스코프 `.omc/state/sessions/{sessionId}/prd.json`)하고, 모든 user story가 `passes: true` + **리뷰어 검증**될 때까지 반복. 완료 리뷰어는 `--critic=architect|critic|codex`로 선택(기본 architect). 기본적으로 완료 후 deslop 패스 수행(`--no-deslop`로 끔). 진행/학습은 `progress.txt`에 누적.
- **`autopilot`**(= ralph + 전체 라이프사이클): Phase 0 확장 → Phase 1 계획 → Phase 2 병렬 구현 → Phase 4 QA 사이클 → 다관점 검증. QA 사이클은 최대 5회, 동일 에러가 3회 지속되면 중단·보고. ralplan 합의 계획(`.omc/plans/ralplan-*.md`)이나 deep-interview 스펙(`.omc/specs/deep-interview-*.md`)이 있으면 앞 Phase를 건너뜀(중복 작업 방지). Phase 0 진입 시 `companyContext.tool`이 설정돼 있으면 해당 MCP 도구를 자문용으로 호출(`.claude/omc.jsonc`).

이 합성 덕분에 `ralph`/`autopilot`과 `ultrawork`은 상호 배제 대상이다(§9).

### 4.4 키워드 자동 트리거

`UserPromptSubmit` Hook은 두 스크립트를 순차 실행한다.

1. **`keyword-detector.mjs`**: 사용자 입력에서 매직 키워드를 탐지해 해당 스킬을 호출(우선순위 순): `cancelomc/stopomc` → `ralph` → `autopilot` → `ultrawork/ulw` → `ccg` → `ralplan` → `deep interview` → `ai-slop-cleaner`(`deslop`/`anti-slop`) → `tdd` → `code review` → `security review` → `ultrathink` → `deepsearch` → `analyze`. **team은 자동 트리거 대상이 아니며** 반드시 명시적 `/team`으로만 기동된다(`keyword-detector.mjs` 주석).
2. **`skill-injector.mjs`**: 프롬프트 트리거에 맞는 **학습 스킬**(learner/skillify 산출물)을 컨텍스트에 주입. 재귀 탐색으로 세 위치를 본다 — 유저(`~/.claude/skills/omc-learned`), 글로벌(`~/.omc/skills`), 프로젝트(`.omc/skills`). 세션당 최대 5개(`MAX_SKILLS_PER_SESSION`), 컨텍스트 3000자 상한. `UserPromptSubmit`은 매 턴 새 Node 프로세스로 뜨므로 인메모리가 아닌 **파일 기반 세션 dedup**으로 같은 스킬 재주입을 막는다(issue #2577). 가능하면 컴파일된 `dist/hooks/skill-bridge.cjs`를 쓰고, 없으면 인라인 폴백.

---
</code></pre>
18:["$","$L30","07-overview-04",{"id":"07-overview-04","order":10,"tier":"developer","title":"Overview §4","description":"000_overview/00_omc_overview.md","lang":"en","badge":"DEV","children":["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$3b"}}]}]
3c:T11ac,<h2>Overview</h2>
<p><strong>Overview §5</strong> — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong><code>omc ask &#x3C;claude|codex|gemini> "..."</code></strong>(<code>skills/ask/SKILL.md</code>): 단일 어드바이저 라우팅. 결과를 ask 아티팩트로 영속. 원시 CLI 조립을 금지하고 <code>omc ask</code>만 쓰도록 강제.</li>
<li><strong><code>/ccg</code></strong>(<code>skills/ccg/SKILL.md</code>, level 5): <code>/ask codex</code> + <code>/ask gemini</code>를 병렬로 던지고 Claude가 두 출력을 종합. tmux 워커 없이 빠른 다관점. Codex CLI(<code>@openai/codex</code>), Gemini CLI(<code>@google/gemini-cli</code>) 필요, 한쪽 부재 시 가용한 쪽만 사용.</li>
<li><strong><code>/team N:codex|gemini "..."</code></strong> / <strong><code>/omc-teams</code></strong>: tmux 패널에서 실제 CLI 프로세스를 워커로 띄움(아래 §6).</li>
</ul>

<h3><code>170_oh-my-claudecode/README.md</code></h3>
<h2>Quick Start</h2>
<p><strong>Step 1: Install</strong></p>
<p>Marketplace/plugin install (recommended for most Claude Code users).
These are Claude Code slash commands — enter them <strong>one at a time</strong> (pasting both lines at once will fail):</p>
<pre><code class="language-bash">/plugin marketplace add https://github.com/Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-claudecode
</code></pre>
<p>Then:</p>
<pre><code class="language-bash">/plugin install oh-my-claudecode
</code></pre>
<p>If you prefer the npm CLI/runtime path instead of the marketplace flow:</p>
<pre><code class="language-bash">npm i -g oh-my-claude-sisyphus@latest
</code></pre>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>Known npm warning:</strong> npm may print <code>deprecated prebuild-install@7.1.3</code> during the CLI install.
This currently comes from the upstream <code>better-sqlite3</code> native-addon dependency
(<code>better-sqlite3 -> prebuild-install</code>); <code>prebuild-install@7.1.3</code> is still the latest
published version, so there is no safe repo-side dependency bump or override to remove
the warning yet. The warning is tracked in <a href="https://github.com/Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-claudecode/issues/2913">#2913</a>
and does not by itself mean the OMC CLI install failed.</p>
</blockquote>
<p><strong>Step 2: Setup</strong></p>
<pre><code class="language-bash">

## Main analysis

## 5. External AI integration (ask / ccg / team CLI worker)

## 5. External AI integration (ask / ccg / team CLI worker)

OMC has three paths leading to Claude et al.'s model. All call a locally installed **CLI** (not a direct API key):

- **`omc ask &#x3C;claude|codex|gemini> "..."`**(`skills/ask/SKILL.md`): Single advisor routing. Perpetuates the result as a ask artifact. Prevent native CLI assembly and force use of only `omc ask`.
- **`/ccg`**(`skills/ccg/SKILL.md`, level 5): Throw `/ask codex` + `/ask gemini` in parallel and Claude synthesizes the two outputs. Fast multi-perspective without tmux workers. Requires Codex CLI (`@openai/codex`) and Gemini CLI (`@google/gemini-cli`); if one side is absent, only the available side is used.
- **`/team N:codex|gemini "..."`** / **`/omc-teams`**: Launch the actual CLI process as a worker from the tmux panel (§6 below).

---

## Korean corpus (reference)

> Verbatim KO corpus `000_overview/00_omc_overview.md` for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.

## 5. 외부 AI 연동 (ask / ccg / team CLI 워커)

## 5. 외부 AI 연동 (ask / ccg / team CLI 워커)

OMC는 Claude 외 모델을 끌어들이는 세 경로를 둔다. 모두 로컬에 설치된 **CLI**를 호출한다(API 키 직결 아님):

- **`omc ask &#x3C;claude|codex|gemini> "..."`**(`skills/ask/SKILL.md`): 단일 어드바이저 라우팅. 결과를 ask 아티팩트로 영속. 원시 CLI 조립을 금지하고 `omc ask`만 쓰도록 강제.
- **`/ccg`**(`skills/ccg/SKILL.md`, level 5): `/ask codex` + `/ask gemini`를 병렬로 던지고 Claude가 두 출력을 종합. tmux 워커 없이 빠른 다관점. Codex CLI(`@openai/codex`), Gemini CLI(`@google/gemini-cli`) 필요, 한쪽 부재 시 가용한 쪽만 사용.
- **`/team N:codex|gemini "..."`** / **`/omc-teams`**: tmux 패널에서 실제 CLI 프로세스를 워커로 띄움(아래 §6).

---
</code></pre>
19:["$","$L30","07-overview-05",{"id":"07-overview-05","order":11,"tier":"developer","title":"Overview §5","description":"000_overview/00_omc_overview.md","lang":"en","badge":"DEV","children":["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$3c"}}]}]
3d:T3c66,<h2>Overview</h2>
<p><strong>Overview §6</strong> — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:</p>
<ul>
<li><code>team</code> 스킬은 <strong>Claude Code 네이티브 teams</strong> 도구(<code>TeamCreate</code>/<code>TeamDelete</code>/<code>SendMessage</code>/<code>TaskCreate</code>/<code>TaskList</code>/<code>TaskGet</code>/<code>TaskUpdate</code>) 위에서 동작하며, OMC는 <code>src/team/</code>(~60개 모듈)에서 워커 격리·스케일링·머지·하트비트 등 런타임을 보강한다.</li>
<li><code>CLAUDE.md</code>의 <code>&#x3C;team_pipeline></code>: <code>team-plan → team-prd → team-exec → team-verify → team-fix</code>(루프). fix 루프는 최대 시도 횟수로 바운드되며, <code>team ralph</code>가 양쪽을 연결한다. <code>src/team/stage-router.ts</code>/<code>phase-controller.ts</code>/<code>followup-planner.ts</code>가 단계를 라우팅한다.</li>
<li>핵심은 <strong>단계별로 다른 전문 에이전트</strong>가 투입된다는 점이다(<code>skills/team/SKILL.md</code> Stage Agent Routing). 사용자의 <code>N:agent-type</code> 파라미터는 <strong>team-exec 단계 워커 타입만</strong> 덮어쓰고, 나머지 단계는 리드가 단계 적합 전문가를 고른다:</li>
<li>| team-plan | <code>explore</code>(haiku), <code>planner</code>(opus) | <code>analyst</code>, <code>architect</code>(opus) | 요구 불명확→analyst, 경계 복잡→architect |</li>
<li>| team-prd | <code>analyst</code>(opus) | <code>critic</code>(opus) | 스코프 도전→critic |</li>
<li>| team-exec | <code>executor</code>(sonnet) | <code>executor</code>(opus), <code>debugger</code>, <code>designer</code>, <code>writer</code>, <code>test-engineer</code> | 서브태스크 유형 매칭 |</li>
<li>| team-verify | <code>verifier</code>(sonnet) | <code>test-engineer</code>, <code>security-reviewer</code>, <code>code-reviewer</code>(opus) | 인증/암호→security-reviewer, >20파일→code-reviewer |</li>
<li>| team-fix | <code>executor</code>(sonnet) | <code>debugger</code>, <code>executor</code>(opus) | 타입/빌드 오류→debugger |</li>
<li>라우팅 규칙: (1) 단계 에이전트는 리드가 선택, (2) tmux CLI 워커는 <strong>one-shot</strong>이라 팀 통신에 참여하지 않음, (3) 비용 모드 다운그레이드 시 opus→sonnet→haiku 하향(단 team-verify는 최소 sonnet), (4) 보안 민감/대규모 변경은 team-verify에 security-reviewer+code-reviewer(opus) 강제. <code>team ralph</code>는 이 파이프라인 전체</li>
<li><code>src/team/unified-team.ts</code>는 두 종류 워커를 단일 뷰로 병합한다:</li>
<li><strong>claude-native</strong>: <code>~/.claude/teams/&#x3C;team>/config.json</code>에 멤버로 등록된 Claude 서브에이전트.</li>
<li><strong>mcp(tmux)</strong>: <code>src/team/tmux-session.ts</code>가 <code>omc-team-{team}-{worker}</code> 이름의 tmux 세션으로 띄우는 외부 CLI 워커(codex/gemini 포함). <code>team-mcp.cjs</code>의 <code>omc_run_team_start/status/wait/cleanup</code>로 제어.</li>
</ul>

<h2>Source code snippets</h2>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    User["사용자: /team 3:executor '...'"] --> Lead["TEAM LEAD (오케스트레이터)"]
    Lead -->|TeamCreate| Reg["teams/&#x26;lt;team&#x26;gt;/config.json"]
    Lead -->|explore/architect| Decomp["작업 분해 → 서브태스크"]
    Decomp -->|TaskCreate xN| Tasks["task #1..#N (의존성)"]
    Lead -->|Task spawn| W1["worker-1 (worktree+branch)"]
    Lead -->|Task spawn| W2["worker-2 (worktree+branch)"]
    Lead -->|tmux start| WC["codex/gemini CLI 워커 (tmux pane)"]
    W1 -->|SendMessage / outbox| Lead
    W2 -->|SendMessage / outbox| Lead
    WC -->|outbox-reader| Lead
    Lead -->|Monitor: TaskList 폴링| Tasks
    Lead -->|merge-coordinator| Merge["worktree 머지"]
    Lead -->|team-verify → team-fix loop| Verify["검증/수정 루프 (bounded)"]
</code></pre>
<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h2>6. Team orchestration (team mode)</h2>
<h2>6. Team orchestration (team mode)</h2>
<p>The <code>team</code> skill runs on <strong>Claude Code native teams</strong> tools (<code>TeamCreate</code>/<code>TeamDelete</code>/<code>SendMessage</code>/<code>TaskCreate</code>/<code>TaskList</code>/<code>TaskGet</code>/<code>TaskUpdate</code>), and the OMC augments the runtime with worker isolation, scaling, merge, and heartbeat in <code>src/team/</code> (~60 modules).</p>
<h3>6.1 team-plan → team-exec pipeline</h3>
<p><code>&#x3C;team_pipeline></code> in <code>CLAUDE.md</code>: <code>team-plan → team-prd → team-exec → team-verify → team-fix</code> (loop). The fix loop is bound to the maximum number of attempts, and <code>team ralph</code> connects both sides. <code>src/team/stage-router.ts</code>/<code>phase-controller.ts</code>/<code>followup-planner.ts</code> routes stages.</p>
<p>The key is that <strong>different professional agents</strong> are deployed at each stage (<code>skills/team/SKILL.md</code> Stage Agent Routing). Your <code>N:agent-type</code> parameter overrides the <strong>team-exec stage worker type</strong> only, and for the remaining stages the lead selects the appropriate expert for the stage:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>steps</th>
<th>Required Agent</th>
<th>selection agent</th>
<th>Selection criteria</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>team-plan</td>
<td><code>explore</code>(haiku), <code>planner</code>(opus)</td>
<td><code>analyst</code>, <code>architect</code>(opus)</td>
<td>Unclear requirements→analyst, complex boundaries→architect</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>team-prd</td>
<td><code>analyst</code>(opus)</td>
<td><code>critic</code>(opus)</td>
<td>Scope challenge →critic</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>team-exec</td>
<td><code>executor</code>(sonnet)</td>
<td><code>executor</code>(opus), <code>debugger</code>, <code>designer</code>, <code>writer</code>, <code>test-engineer</code></td>
<td>Subtask type matching</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>team-verify</td>
<td><code>verifier</code>(sonnet)</td>
<td><code>test-engineer</code>, <code>security-reviewer</code>, <code>code-reviewer</code>(opus)</td>
<td>Authentication/password→security-reviewer, >20file→code-reviewer</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>team-fix</td>
<td><code>executor</code>(sonnet)</td>
<td><code>debugger</code>, <code>executor</code>(opus)</td>
<td>Type/Build Error→debugger</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>Routing rules: (1) step agent is selected by lead, (2) tmux CLI worker is <strong>one-shot</strong> and does not participate in team communication, (3) when downgrading cost mode, opus→sonnet→haiku is lowered (but team-verify is at least sonnet), (4) security-sensitive/large-scale changes force security-reviewer+code-reviewer(opus) on team-verify. <code>team ralph</code> wraps this entire pipeline in a ralph persistent loop and retries until architect verification passes.</p>
<h3>6.2 Isolation from worker backend</h3>
<p><code>src/team/unified-team.ts</code> merges two types of workers into a single view:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>claude-native</strong>: Claude subagent registered as a member in <code>~/.claude/teams/&#x3C;team>/config.json</code>.</li>
<li><strong>mcp(tmux)</strong>: External CLI worker (with codex/gemini) launched by <code>src/team/tmux-session.ts</code> as a tmux session named <code>omc-team-{team}-{worker}</code>. Controlled by <code>omc_run_team_start/status/wait/cleanup</code> in <code>team-mcp.cjs</code>.</li>
</ul>
<p>To prevent worker-specific file conflicts, <code>src/team/git-worktree.ts</code> is isolated as a git worktree: path <code>{repoRoot}/.omc/team/{team}/worktrees/{worker}</code>, branch <code>omc-team/{team}/{worker}</code>. Cleanup is a conservative policy that does not forcibly delete dirty worktrees. Merges are coordinated by <code>merge-coordinator.ts</code>/<code>merge-orchestrator.ts</code>.</p>
<h3>6.3 Communication/Survivability</h3>
<p><code>src/team/</code> contains <code>inbox-outbox.ts</code>, <code>message-router.ts</code>, <code>leader-inbox.ts</code>, <code>conflict-mailbox.ts</code> (messaging), <code>heartbeat.ts</code>/<code>worker-health.ts</code>/<code>worker-restart.ts</code> (survivability), There are <code>dispatch-queue.ts</code>/<code>scaling.ts</code>/<code>allocation-policy.ts</code> (distribution), <code>governance.ts</code>/<code>audit-log.ts</code>/<code>sentinel-gate.ts</code> (governance). The lead automatically receives <code>SendMessage</code> in the Monitor loop and polls for progress with <code>TaskList</code> (<code>skills/team/SKILL.md</code> Architecture).</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    User["사용자: /team 3:executor '...'"] --> Lead["TEAM LEAD (오케스트레이터)"]
    Lead -->|TeamCreate| Reg["teams/&#x26;lt;team&#x26;gt;/config.json"]
    Lead -->|explore/architect| Decomp["작업 분해 → 서브태스크"]
    Decomp -->|TaskCreate xN| Tasks["task #1..#N (의존성)"]
    Lead -->|Task spawn| W1["worker-1 (worktree+branch)"]
    Lead -->|Task spawn| W2["worker-2 (worktree+branch)"]
    Lead -->|tmux start| WC["codex/gemini CLI 워커 (tmux pane)"]
    W1 -->|SendMessage / outbox| Lead
    W2 -->|SendMessage / outbox| Lead
    WC -->|outbox-reader| Lead
    Lead -->|Monitor: TaskList 폴링| Tasks
    Lead -->|merge-coordinator| Merge["worktree 머지"]
    Lead -->|team-verify → team-fix loop| Verify["검증/수정 루프 (bounded)"]
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>Korean corpus (reference)</h2>
<blockquote>
<p>Verbatim KO corpus <code>000_overview/00_omc_overview.md</code> for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.</p>

<h2>6. 팀 오케스트레이션 (team mode)</h2>
<h2>6. 팀 오케스트레이션 (team mode)</h2>
<p><code>team</code> 스킬은 <strong>Claude Code 네이티브 teams</strong> 도구(<code>TeamCreate</code>/<code>TeamDelete</code>/<code>SendMessage</code>/<code>TaskCreate</code>/<code>TaskList</code>/<code>TaskGet</code>/<code>TaskUpdate</code>) 위에서 동작하며, OMC는 <code>src/team/</code>(~60개 모듈)에서 워커 격리·스케일링·머지·하트비트 등 런타임을 보강한다.</p>
<h3>6.1 team-plan → team-exec 파이프라인</h3>
<p><code>CLAUDE.md</code>의 <code>&#x3C;team_pipeline></code>: <code>team-plan → team-prd → team-exec → team-verify → team-fix</code>(루프). fix 루프는 최대 시도 횟수로 바운드되며, <code>team ralph</code>가 양쪽을 연결한다. <code>src/team/stage-router.ts</code>/<code>phase-controller.ts</code>/<code>followup-planner.ts</code>가 단계를 라우팅한다.</p>
<p>핵심은 <strong>단계별로 다른 전문 에이전트</strong>가 투입된다는 점이다(<code>skills/team/SKILL.md</code> Stage Agent Routing). 사용자의 <code>N:agent-type</code> 파라미터는 <strong>team-exec 단계 워커 타입만</strong> 덮어쓰고, 나머지 단계는 리드가 단계 적합 전문가를 고른다:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>단계</th>
<th>필수 에이전트</th>
<th>선택 에이전트</th>
<th>선택 기준</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>team-plan</td>
<td><code>explore</code>(haiku), <code>planner</code>(opus)</td>
<td><code>analyst</code>, <code>architect</code>(opus)</td>
<td>요구 불명확→analyst, 경계 복잡→architect</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>team-prd</td>
<td><code>analyst</code>(opus)</td>
<td><code>critic</code>(opus)</td>
<td>스코프 도전→critic</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>team-exec</td>
<td><code>executor</code>(sonnet)</td>
<td><code>executor</code>(opus), <code>debugger</code>, <code>designer</code>, <code>writer</code>, <code>test-engineer</code></td>
<td>서브태스크 유형 매칭</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>team-verify</td>
<td><code>verifier</code>(sonnet)</td>
<td><code>test-engineer</code>, <code>security-reviewer</code>, <code>code-reviewer</code>(opus)</td>
<td>인증/암호→security-reviewer, >20파일→code-reviewer</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>team-fix</td>
<td><code>executor</code>(sonnet)</td>
<td><code>debugger</code>, <code>executor</code>(opus)</td>
<td>타입/빌드 오류→debugger</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>라우팅 규칙: (1) 단계 에이전트는 리드가 선택, (2) tmux CLI 워커는 <strong>one-shot</strong>이라 팀 통신에 참여하지 않음, (3) 비용 모드 다운그레이드 시 opus→sonnet→haiku 하향(단 team-verify는 최소 sonnet), (4) 보안 민감/대규모 변경은 team-verify에 security-reviewer+code-reviewer(opus) 강제. <code>team ralph</code>는 이 파이프라인 전체를 ralph 영속 루프로 감싸 architect 검증 통과까지 재시도한다.</p>
<h3>6.2 워커 백엔드와 격리</h3>
<p><code>src/team/unified-team.ts</code>는 두 종류 워커를 단일 뷰로 병합한다:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>claude-native</strong>: <code>~/.claude/teams/&#x3C;team>/config.json</code>에 멤버로 등록된 Claude 서브에이전트.</li>
<li><strong>mcp(tmux)</strong>: <code>src/team/tmux-session.ts</code>가 <code>omc-team-{team}-{worker}</code> 이름의 tmux 세션으로 띄우는 외부 CLI 워커(codex/gemini 포함). <code>team-mcp.cjs</code>의 <code>omc_run_team_start/status/wait/cleanup</code>로 제어.</li>
</ul>
<p>워커별 파일 충돌을 막기 위해 <code>src/team/git-worktree.ts</code>가 git worktree로 격리한다: 경로 <code>{repoRoot}/.omc/team/{team}/worktrees/{worker}</code>, 브랜치 <code>omc-team/{team}/{worker}</code>. 정리는 dirty worktree를 강제 삭제하지 않는 보수적 정책이다. 머지는 <code>merge-coordinator.ts</code>/<code>merge-orchestrator.ts</code>가 조율한다.</p>
<h3>6.3 통신·생존성</h3>
<p><code>src/team/</code>에는 <code>inbox-outbox.ts</code>, <code>message-router.ts</code>, <code>leader-inbox.ts</code>, <code>conflict-mailbox.ts</code>(메시징), <code>heartbeat.ts</code>/<code>worker-health.ts</code>/<code>worker-restart.ts</code>(생존성), <code>dispatch-queue.ts</code>/<code>scaling.ts</code>/<code>allocation-policy.ts</code>(분배), <code>governance.ts</code>/<code>audit-log.ts</code>/<code>sentinel-gate.ts</code>(거버넌스)가 있다. 리드는 Monitor 루프에서 <code>SendMessage</code>를 자동 수신하고 <code>TaskList</code>로 진행을 폴링한다(<code>skills/team/SKILL.md</code> Architecture).</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    User["사용자: /team 3:executor '...'"] --> Lead["TEAM LEAD (오케스트레이터)"]
    Lead -->|TeamCreate| Reg["teams/&#x26;lt;team&#x26;gt;/config.json"]
    Lead -->|explore/architect| Decomp["작업 분해 → 서브태스크"]
    Decomp -->|TaskCreate xN| Tasks["task #1..#N (의존성)"]
    Lead -->|Task spawn| W1["worker-1 (worktree+branch)"]
    Lead -->|Task spawn| W2["worker-2 (worktree+branch)"]
    Lead -->|tmux start| WC["codex/gemini CLI 워커 (tmux pane)"]
    W1 -->|SendMessage / outbox| Lead
    W2 -->|SendMessage / outbox| Lead
    WC -->|outbox-reader| Lead
    Lead -->|Monitor: TaskList 폴링| Tasks
    Lead -->|merge-coordinator| Merge["worktree 머지"]
    Lead -->|team-verify → team-fix loop| Verify["검증/수정 루프 (bounded)"]
</code></pre>
<hr>

<li>| <code>PreCompact</code> | <code>pre-compact.mjs</code>, <code>project-memory-precompact.mjs</code>, <code>wiki-pre-compact.mjs</code> | 압축 전 메모리/wiki 체크포인트 |</li>

<li>| <code>SessionEnd</code> | <code>session-end.mjs</code>, <code>wiki-session-end.mjs</code> | 세션 요약/정리 |</li>

<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h2>7. Hook life cycle (the core of turn-surviving execution)</h2>
<h2>7. Hook life cycle (the core of turn-surviving execution)</h2>
<p><code>hooks/hooks.json</code> hooks an OMC script to Claude Code's Hook system ([[00_cc_overview]] §4). All Hooks run <code>scripts/*.mjs</code> through the <code>scripts/run.cjs</code> launcher.</p>

<tr>
<td><code>SessionStart</code></td>
<td><code>session-start.mjs</code>, <code>project-memory-session.mjs</code>, <code>wiki-session-start.mjs</code> (+ <code>init</code>/<code>maintenance</code> matcher)</td>
<td>persistent mode state restoration, project memory/wiki context injection</td>
</tr>

    Stop->>Disk: 모드 상태 읽기
    alt 작업 미완 &#x26; 컨텍스트/인증 정상

        CC->>CC: 턴 재진입(다음 iteration)

<h3>7.1 Stop Hook = Loop that passes turns</h3>
<p>OMC's autonomy (ralph/autopilot/ultragoal, etc.) is implemented entirely through the <strong>Stop Hook's <code>decision: "block"</code></strong> mechanism. <code>scripts/persistent-mode.mjs</code> reads the mode state from <code>.omc/state/</code> when the turn is about to end, and if the task is incomplete, prints the following to stdout, preventing Claude Code from ending the turn and prompting him again immediately:</p>
<pre><code class="language-js">console.log(JSON.stringify({
  decision: "block",
  reason: `[RALPH LOOP - ITERATION ${iteration+1}/${maxIter}] Work is NOT done. Continue working.
When FULLY complete (after Architect verification), run /oh-my-claudecode:cancel ...
Task: ${ralph.state.prompt}`
}));
</code></pre>
<p>Detailed safety devices:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>Context/authentication failure is never blocked</strong>: If stop_reason is a context limit·401/403·OAuth expiration, pass it as <code>{continue:true, suppressOutput:true}</code> to preserve the reauthentication/compression flow (<code>persistent-mode.mjs:896~</code>).</li>
<li><strong>iteration counter</strong>: +10 extension when <code>max_iterations</code> is reached (<code>[RALPH LOOP - EXTENDED]</code>), auto-disable mode when hard upper limit of <code>OMC_SECURITY=strict</code> is reached (default 200).</li>
<li><strong>Defense stale state</strong>: Ignore states that are older than 2 hours to avoid blocking new sessions. Prevent contamination of other projects/sessions by checking <code>isStateForCurrentProject</code>/<code>session_id</code> match.</li>
<li><strong>Last tool error guidance</strong>: Read the last tool failure with <code>readLastToolError</code> and inject it before the retry reason.</li>
</ul>
<p>Supported modes (as commented): <code>ralph, ultragoal, autopilot, ultrapilot, swarm, ultrawork, ultraqa, pipeline, team</code>. Each mode has its own reason template (e.g. ultragoal forces the <code>.omc/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl</code> checkpoint with <code>[ULTRAGOAL #n/max]</code>), and is evaluated in priority order.</p>
<p>This is the most essential ability that OMC adds to vanilla Claude Code — vanilla ends a turn if <code>stop_reason=end_turn</code>, but OMC <strong>restarts itself across turn boundaries</strong> while the disk state is "incomplete".</p>
<hr>
<h2>Korean corpus (reference)</h2>
<blockquote>
<p>Verbatim KO corpus <code>000_overview/00_omc_overview.md</code> for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.</p>
</blockquote>
<h2>7. Hook 라이프사이클 (turn-surviving 실행의 핵심)</h2>

        PTU-->>Disk: 프로젝트 메모리·규칙 갱신
    end
    CC->>Stop: stop_reason=end_turn
    Stop->>Disk: 모드 상태 읽기
    alt 작업 미완 &#x26; 컨텍스트/인증 정상
        Stop-->>CC: {decision:"block", reason:"[RALPH LOOP ...] continue"}
        CC->>CC: 턴 재진입(다음 iteration)
    else 컨텍스트한계/401/완료
        Stop-->>CC: {continue:true, suppressOutput:true}
        CC-->>U: 턴 종료
    end
</code></pre>
<h3>7.1 Stop Hook = 턴을 넘기는 루프</h3>
<p>OMC의 자율성(ralph/autopilot/ultragoal 등)은 전적으로 <strong>Stop Hook의 <code>decision: "block"</code></strong> 메커니즘으로 구현된다. <code>scripts/persistent-mode.mjs</code>는 턴이 끝나려 할 때 <code>.omc/state/</code>의 모드 상태를 읽고, 작업이 미완이면 stdout으로 다음을 출력해 Claude Code가 턴을 종료하지 못하게 막고 즉시 재프롬프트한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-js">console.log(JSON.stringify({
  decision: "block",
  reason: `[RALPH LOOP - ITERATION ${iteration+1}/${maxIter}] Work is NOT done. Continue working.
When FULLY complete (after Architect verification), run /oh-my-claudecode:cancel ...
Task: ${ralph.state.prompt}`
}));
</code></pre>
<p>세부 안전장치:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>컨텍스트/인증 실패는 절대 차단하지 않음</strong>: stop_reason이 컨텍스트 한계·401/403·OAuth 만료면 <code>{continue:true, suppressOutput:true}</code>로 통과시켜 재인증/압축 흐름을 보존(<code>persistent-mode.mjs:896~</code>).</li>
<li><strong>iteration 카운터</strong>: <code>max_iterations</code> 도달 시 +10 확장(<code>[RALPH LOOP - EXTENDED]</code>), <code>OMC_SECURITY=strict</code>의 하드 상한(기본 200) 도달 시 모드 자동 비활성화.</li>
<li><strong>stale 상태 방어</strong>: 2시간 이상 된 상태는 새 세션을 막지 않도록 무시. <code>isStateForCurrentProject</code>/<code>session_id</code> 일치 검사로 다른 프로젝트·세션 오염 방지.</li>
<li><strong>직전 도구 오류 가이던스</strong>: <code>readLastToolError</code>로 마지막 도구 실패를 읽어 재시도 reason 앞에 주입.</li>
</ul>
<p>지원 모드(주석 기준): <code>ralph, ultragoal, autopilot, ultrapilot, swarm, ultrawork, ultraqa, pipeline, team</code>. 각 모드는 자체 reason 템플릿을 갖고(예: ultragoal은 <code>[ULTRAGOAL #n/max]</code>로 <code>.omc/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl</code> 체크포인트를 강제), 우선순위 순으로 평가된다.</p>
<p>이것이 OMC가 바닐라 Claude Code에 더하는 가장 본질적인 능력이다 — 바닐라는 <code>stop_reason=end_turn</code>이면 턴을 끝내지만, OMC는 디스크 상태가 "미완"인 동안 <strong>턴 경계를 넘어 스스로를 재기동</strong>한다.</p>
<hr>

<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h2>8. State/memory persistence (<code>t</code> MCP server + <code>.omc/</code>)</h2>
<h2>8. State/memory persistence (<code>t</code> MCP server + <code>.omc/</code>)</h2>
<h3>8.1 <code>t</code> MCP Server Tool</h3>
<p>A family of tools exposed by <code>bridge/mcp-server.cjs</code> (source <code>src/tools/*.ts</code>). OMC-only surface layered on top of vanilla Claude Code tools ([[00_cc_overview]] §3):</p>
<table>

<th>Source</th>
</tr>
