<p>호스트에서 보이는 풀네임은 전부 <code>mcp__t__&#x3C;name></code> 형태다(<code>mcp__t__ast_grep_search</code> 등).</p>
<hr>
<h2>3. 코드 인텔리전스: LSP가 더하는 것</h2>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>신뢰도: ◆◆◆ 확정</strong> — <code>src/tools/lsp-tools.ts</code>(도구 12종), <code>src/tools/lsp/servers.ts</code>(언어서버 매핑).</p>
</blockquote>
<p>바닐라 Claude Code는 <code>Grep</code>(ripgrep)·<code>Glob</code>로 <strong>텍스트 매칭</strong> 검색만 한다([[03_cc_tool]] §2). omc의 <code>t</code> 서버는 그 위에 <strong>언어서버 프로토콜(LSP)</strong> 기반 의미 검색을 얹는다. <code>lsp-tools.ts</code>가 12개 도구를 정의:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>탐색</strong>: <code>lsp_goto_definition</code>(정의로 점프), <code>lsp_find_references</code>(역참조 전수), <code>lsp_hover</code>(타입·시그니처), <code>lsp_document_symbols</code>/<code>lsp_workspace_symbols</code>(심볼 목록).</li>
<li><strong>진단</strong>: <code>lsp_diagnostics</code>(파일 단위 타입·컴파일 오류), <code>lsp_diagnostics_directory</code>(디렉터리 일괄) — <code>verifier</code>/<code>debugger</code> 에이전트가 "신선한 증거"로 쓰는 핵심.</li>
<li><strong>리팩터</strong>: <code>lsp_prepare_rename</code>/<code>lsp_rename</code>(심볼 안전 리네임), <code>lsp_code_actions</code>/<code>lsp_code_action_resolve</code>(quick-fix).</li>
<li><strong>메타</strong>: <code>lsp_servers</code>(어떤 언어서버가 살아있는지).</li>
</ul>
<h3>3.1 언어서버 매핑 (16종)</h3>
<p><code>src/tools/lsp/servers.ts</code>의 <code>LSP_SERVERS</code> 맵이 언어별 외부 LSP 바이너리를 등록한다(발췌):</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>언어</th>
<th>바이너리(command)</th>
<th>설치 힌트</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>typescript/js</td>
<td><code>typescript-language-server</code></td>
<td><code>npm i -g typescript-language-server typescript</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>python</td>
<td><code>ty</code></td>
<td>(Astral ty 서버)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>rust</td>
<td><code>rust-analyzer</code></td>
<td><code>rustup component add rust-analyzer</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>go</td>
<td><code>gopls</code></td>
<td><code>go install golang.org/x/tools/gopls@latest</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>c/cpp</td>
<td><code>clangd</code></td>
<td>LLVM 패키지</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>java</td>
<td><code>jdtls</code></td>
<td>Eclipse JDT</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>json/html/css</td>
<td><code>vscode-*-language-server</code></td>
<td>—</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>vue</td>
<td><code>vue-language-server</code>(Volar)</td>
<td>—</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>yaml/php/ruby/lua/kotlin/elixir/csharp/dart/swift/verilog</td>
<td><code>yaml-language-server</code>/<code>intelephense</code>/<code>solargraph</code>/<code>lua-language-server</code>/<code>kotlin-lsp</code>/<code>elixir-ls</code>/<code>omnisharp</code>/<code>dart</code>/<code>sourcekit-lsp</code>/<code>verible-verilog-ls</code></td>
<td>각 생태계</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p><code>commandExists()</code>로 바이너리 존재를 검사하고, 없으면 진단 도구가 설치 힌트를 반환한다(graceful degradation). 언어서버는 자식 프로세스로 spawn되므로, MCP 서버 종료 시 <code>gracefulShutdown()</code>이 <code>disconnectAllLsp()</code>로 명시 정리한다 — 미정리 시 <code>jdtls</code> 같은 LSP가 고아 프로세스로 남는 이슈(#768)를 방지(<code>standalone-server.ts:81~104</code>).</p>
<h3>3.2 진단 도구의 동작</h3>
<p><code>lsp_diagnostics</code>는 <code>severity</code>(error/warning/info/hint)로 필터링하며, 언어서버가 <strong>pull diagnostics를 지원하면 <code>pullDiagnostics()</code></strong>, 아니면 <strong><code>waitForDiagnostics()</code>(30초 타임아웃) 후 push 캐시</strong>를 읽는 이중 경로다(<code>lsp-tools.ts:222~</code>). LSP severity 정수(error=1…hint=4)로 매핑해 필터한다. 컴파일러를 직접 돌리지 않고 타입 오류를 얻으므로(<em>"without running the compiler"</em>) verifier가 빠르게 "신선한 증거"를 수집할 수 있다. <code>lsp_servers</code>는 알려진 언어서버와 설치 상태를 한 번에 보여줘 어떤 도구가 실제 가용한지 모델이 사전 판단하게 한다.</p>
<p>architect·debugger·verifier 에이전트 프롬프트의 <code>&#x3C;Tool_Usage></code>가 이 LSP 도구들을 명시 호출하도록 지시한다 — 텍스트 grep으로는 못 잡는 타입 오류·심볼 관계를 정확히 다룬다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>4. AST 검색·치환 (<code>ast-tools.ts</code>)</h2>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>신뢰도: ◆◆◆ 확정</strong> — <code>src/tools/ast-tools.ts</code> 전체 분석.</p>
</blockquote>
<p><code>ast_grep_search</code>/<code>ast_grep_replace</code>는 <code>@ast-grep/napi</code>로 <strong>구문트리 패턴 매칭</strong>을 한다(25+ 언어, <code>SUPPORTED_LANGUAGES</code> 17종 직접 enum). 메타변수 문법:</p>
<ul>
<li><code>$NAME</code> — 단일 AST 노드, <code>$$$ARGS</code> — 다중 노드.</li>
<li>예: <code>function $NAME($$$ARGS)</code>(함수 선언 전수), <code>console.log($MSG)</code>, <code>$X === null</code>, <code>import $$$IMPORTS from '$MODULE'</code>.</li>
</ul>
<p><code>ast_grep_replace</code>는 패턴에서 캡처한 메타변수를 치환식에 재삽입하며, <strong><code>dryRun=true</code>가 기본값</strong>이라 미리보기만 한다(<code>dryRun:false</code>로 실제 쓰기). 치환은 파일별로 edit을 모아 <strong>오프셋 역순 정렬 후 적용</strong>해 인덱스 밀림을 방지(<code>ast-tools.ts:571</code>). 캡처 텍스트의 <code>$</code>는 <code>replaceAll</code>의 특수패턴(<code>$&#x26;</code>,<code>$$</code>)으로 오해석되지 않도록 이스케이프(<code>ast-tools.ts:550</code>).</p>
<h3>4.1 가용성·경로 게이팅</h3>
<p><code>@ast-grep/napi</code>는 플러그인 번들 컨텍스트에서 전역 설치 + <code>NODE_PATH</code>로 해소되므로, <code>createRequire()</code>(CJS) → 실패 시 dynamic <code>import()</code>(ESM) 순으로 로드한다(<code>getSgModule()</code>). 모듈 부재 시 크래시 대신 설치 힌트를 반환하는 <strong>graceful degradation</strong> 계약이 명시돼 있다(<code>tool-registry.ts</code> 주석, <code>ast-tools.ts:29~50</code>).</p>
<p>경로 제한: <code>validateToolPath()</code>가 입력 경로를 <code>getWorktreeRoot()</code> 경계 안으로 검증한다 — 단 <strong><code>OMC_RESTRICT_TOOL_PATHS=true</code>(또는 <code>OMC_SECURITY=strict</code>)일 때만</strong> 활성(<code>isToolPathRestricted()</code>, <code>security-config.ts</code>). 기본은 off라 비활성. 경계 밖이면 <code>Path restricted: ... is outside the project root</code> 에러.</p>
<hr>
<h2>5. python_repl (<code>python-repl/tool.ts</code>)</h2>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>신뢰도: ◆◆◆ 확정</strong> — <code>src/tools/python-repl/tool.ts</code>.</p>
</blockquote>
<pre><code>name: 'python_repl'
description: 영속 Python REPL. 같은 세션 내 변수·상태 유지.
actions: execute / interrupt / reset / get_state
지원: pandas, numpy, matplotlib
</code></pre>
<p>세션 단위로 상태가 지속되는 영속 인터프리터다(scientist 에이전트의 데이터 분석 백엔드). 핸들러는 출력을 <code>{ content:[{type:'text', text}] }</code>로 래핑한다 — <code>tool-registry.ts</code>가 <code>index.js</code>가 아니라 <code>tool.js</code>에서 임포트하는 이유가 이 래핑된 핸들러 때문이라고 주석에 명시(원시 핸들러는 문자열만 반환). 백엔드 브리지 세션은 MCP 종료 시 <code>cleanupOwnedBridgeSessions()</code>로 정리.</p>
<hr>
<h2>5b. 상태·메모리 도구의 런타임 의미</h2>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>신뢰도: ◆◆◆ 확정</strong> — <code>src/tools/{state,notepad,memory,shared-memory,wiki}-tools.ts</code>.</p>
</blockquote>
<p><code>t</code> 서버의 비코드 도구들은 [[03_cc_tool]]에 없는 <strong>세션·압축을 가로지르는 영속 상태 표면</strong>을 더한다. 런타임 특성:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>모드 상태(<code>state_*</code>)</strong>: <code>EXECUTION_MODES</code>(autopilot/901_autoresearch/team/ralph/ultrawork/ultraqa/deep-interview/self-improve) + 상태 전용(ralplan/omc-teams/skill-active)을 일급으로 다룬다(<code>state-tools.ts:43,54</code>). 쓰기는 <code>atomicWriteJsonSync()</code>(원자적 쓰기)로 동시성 안전을 확보. <code>state_write</code>는 <code>session_id</code>를 받으면 <code>.omc/state/sessions/{sid}/</code>로 격리하고, 없으면 레거시 공유 경로에 쓰며 *"WARNING: No session_id ... may leak across parallel sessions"*를 반환한다(<code>state-tools.ts:727</code>). 즉 병렬 세션 오염 방지가 인터페이스에 노출돼 있다. <code>state_read</code>(읽기, <code>readOnlyHint:true</code>)는 session_id 없으면 모든 세션 + 레거시를 집계하며 완료-세션 고아 상태 파일을 발견해 <code>state_clear</code> 안내까지 출력한다.</li>
<li><strong>노트패드(<code>notepad_*</code>)</strong>: 세 영역으로 분리 — <strong>priority</strong>(세션 시작마다 항상 로드, 500자 권장, <code>write_priority</code>는 교체), <strong>working</strong>(타임스탬프 + 7일 자동 prune), <strong>manual</strong>(자동 prune 안 됨). <code>notepad_prune</code>이 N일 경과 working 엔트리를 정리, <code>notepad_stats</code>로 크기·엔트리 수·최고령 엔트리를 조회.</li>
<li><strong>프로젝트/공유 메모리</strong>: <code>project_memory_*</code>는 노트·디렉티브를 프로젝트 단위로 누적. <code>shared_memory_*</code>는 <strong>에이전트 간 핸드오프</strong>용 KV로, 네임스페이스(세션 그룹/파이프라인 런)와 선택적 TTL(자동 만료)을 지원하고 <code>shared_memory_cleanup</code>이 만료분을 청소.</li>
<li><strong>wiki(<code>wiki_*</code>)</strong>: 세션 간 누적 markdown 지식 베이스. <code>wiki_ingest</code>는 append 전략(절대 교체 안 함)으로 여러 페이지를 cross-reference하며 갱신, <code>wiki_query</code>는 <strong>벡터 임베딩 없이</strong> 키워드/태그 raw 매칭만 반환하고 답 합성·인용은 모델이 한다(<em>"NO vector embeddings"</em> 명시), <code>wiki_lint</code>는 고아 페이지·broken cross-reference·oversized·구조 모순을 진단.</li>
</ul>
<p>이 도구들의 디스크 레이아웃(<code>.omc/state/</code>, <code>notepad.md</code>, <code>project-memory.json</code>, wiki)과 3계층(턴/세션/압축) 복원은 [[00_omc_overview]] §8에서 다룬다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>6. <code>team</code> MCP 서버 (<code>bridge/team-mcp.cjs</code>)</h2>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>신뢰도: ◆◆◇ 높음</strong> — <code>src/mcp/team-server.ts</code>(현 상태: CLI 마이그레이션) + <code>bridge/team-mcp.cjs</code> 번들에서 라이브 핸들러 확인.</p>
</blockquote>
<p><code>team</code> 서버는 <code>.mcp.json</code>에 <strong>직접 등록되지 않는다</strong> — <code>t</code> 서버만 정적 등록되고, <code>team</code> 서버는 런타임에 별도로 기동된다(<code>tool-registry.ts</code> 주석: <em>"Team runtime tools ... live in the separate 'team' MCP server (bridge/team-mcp.cjs)"</em>). 서버 정체성은 <code>{ name: 'team', version: '1.0.0' }</code>(<code>team-server.ts:614</code>, 번들 <code>name:"team"</code> 확인).</p>
<h3>6.1 도구 4종</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>도구</th>
<th>인풋 스키마</th>
<th>역할</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>omc_run_team_start</code></td>
<td><code>teamName</code>, <code>agentTypes[]</code>("claude"|"codex"|"gemini"), <code>tasks[]</code>(<code>{subject,description}</code>), <code>cwd</code>, <code>newWindow?</code></td>
<td>tmux 워커 팀 기동, <code>jobId</code> 반환</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>omc_run_team_status</code></td>
<td><code>job_id</code></td>
<td>잡 진행 폴링</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>omc_run_team_wait</code></td>
<td><code>job_id</code>, <code>timeout_ms?</code>(기본 300k, 최대 3.6M), <code>nudge_delay_ms?</code>, <code>nudge_max_count?</code>, <code>nudge_message?</code></td>
<td>완료 대기 + 유휴 패널 nudge</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>omc_run_team_cleanup</code></td>
<td><code>job_id</code>, <code>grace_ms?</code>(기본 10k)</td>
<td>패널 강제종료 전 grace</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>워커는 <strong>tmux 패널의 외부 CLI 프로세스</strong>(codex/gemini/claude)다. <code>omc_run_team_start</code>는 <code>{ jobId, pid }</code>만 즉시 반환하고 <code>omc_run_team_status</code>로 폴링하는 <strong>비동기 잡 모델</strong>이다(<code>team-server.ts:338</code>). <code>omc_run_team_wait</code>는 워커가 30초+ 유휴면 <em>"Continue working ... report concrete progress (not ACK-only)"</em> 메시지로 nudge하고, 최대 nudge 횟수 도달 또는 타임아웃 시 *"workers are still running; call omc_run_team_wait again ... or omc_run_team_cleanup"*를 반환한다 — <strong>워커를 죽이지 않고 폴링을 반복</strong>하는 설계(<code>team-server.ts:448</code>).</p>
<h3>6.2 현 상태: MCP → CLI 마이그레이션</h3>
<p><code>src/mcp/team-server.ts</code>의 <code>TOOLS</code> 정의는 4개 도구를 모두 **<code>[DEPRECATED]</code>**로 표기하고 <em>"use <code>omc team start</code>"</em> 등 CLI 경로로 안내한다(<code>team-server.ts:547~612</code>). 단, <code>CallToolRequest</code> 핸들러는 라이브 핸들러(<code>handleStart</code>/<code>handleStatus</code>/<code>handleWait</code>/<code>handleCleanup</code>)를 <strong>먼저 디스패치</strong>하고, 그 아래의 deprecation 가드는 향후 도구 리네임 대비 안전망으로만 둔다(<code>team-server.ts:622~636</code>). 즉 도구는 여전히 동작하되 1급 인터페이스는 <code>omc team *</code> CLI(<code>bridge/cli.cjs</code>)로 이동 중이다. 워커 멤버십은 <code>.omc/state/team-mcp-workers.json</code>에 shadow 등록된다(<code>src/team/team-registration.ts:27,73</code>).</p>
<h3>6.3 워커 물리 격리 (worktree + tmux)</h3>
<p><code>team</code> 도구는 워커를 <strong>파일시스템·프로세스 단위로 격리</strong>한다 — Task 서브에이전트가 같은 작업트리를 공유하는 것과 대비된다:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>git worktree</strong>(<code>src/team/git-worktree.ts</code>): 워커별 경로 <code>{repoRoot}/.omc/team/{team}/worktrees/{worker}</code>, 브랜치 <code>omc-team/{team}/{worker}</code>(<code>getWorktreePath</code>/<code>getBranchName</code>). 정리는 보수적이다 — 깨끗한 worktree만 재사용하고, <strong>dirty worktree는 절대 force-remove하지 않는다</strong>(작업 손실 방지). worktree 인벤토리는 <code>.omc/state/team/{team}/worktrees.json</code>에 기록.</li>
<li><strong>tmux 세션</strong>(<code>src/team/tmux-session.ts</code>): 세션명 <code>omc-team-{team}-{worker}</code>(<code>TMUX_SESSION_PREFIX='omc-team'</code>). 모드는 <code>split-pane</code>/<code>dedicated-window</code>/<code>detached-session</code> 3종. 워커 패널은 bash로 뜨고(Windows에서도 Unix-like), <code>capture-pane</code>으로 산출을 수집한다 — 이것이 <code>omc_run_team_status</code>/<code>wait</code>가 워커 진행을 읽는 채널.</li>
</ul>
<p>따라서 codex/gemini/claude CLI 워커는 각자 격리된 worktree에서 병렬 작업하고, 머지 단계에서만 통합된다 — 도구 레이어 관점에서 omc team은 "여러 외부 CLI 프로세스를 tmux+worktree로 오케스트레이션하는 MCP"다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>7. 도구 게이팅: 훅 계층</h2>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>신뢰도: ◆◆◇ 높음</strong> — <code>hooks/hooks.json</code>, <code>scripts/pre-tool-enforcer.mjs</code>, <code>src/hooks/permission-handler/index.ts</code>.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>omc는 내장·MCP 도구의 <strong>권한·실행을 호스트 훅 스크립트로 게이팅</strong>한다([[03_cc_tool]]의 PreToolUse/PermissionRequest 훅 위에 얹음). <code>hooks/hooks.json</code>이 거는 도구 관련 훅:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>훅</th>
<th>스크립트</th>
<th>도구 게이팅 역할</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>PreToolUse</code>(<code>*</code>)</td>
<td><code>pre-tool-enforcer.mjs</code></td>
<td>도구 실행 직전 리마인더 주입 + 모드별/모델별 <code>deny</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>PermissionRequest</code>(<code>Bash</code>)</td>
<td><code>permission-handler.mjs</code></td>
<td>안전 Bash 명령 자동 승인</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>PostToolUse</code>(<code>*</code>)</td>
<td><code>post-tool-verifier.mjs</code>, <code>project-memory-posttool.mjs</code>, <code>post-tool-rules-injector.mjs</code></td>
<td>결과 검증·메모리 갱신·규칙 재주입</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>PostToolUseFailure</code></td>
<td><code>post-tool-use-failure.mjs</code></td>
<td>도구 실패 기록(재시도 가이던스)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>7.1 PreToolUse 강제 (<code>pre-tool-enforcer.mjs</code>)</h3>
<p>이름은 "enforcer"지만 대부분은 <strong>컨텍스트 리마인더 주입기</strong>다(매 도구 실행 전 "Spawning agent: executor (sonnet)", "Active agents: N" 등 메타데이터를 stdout으로 주입). 그러나 실제 <strong><code>deny</code> 게이팅</strong>도 한다:</p>
<ol>
<li><strong>ultragoal 모드 게이팅</strong>: <code>evaluateUltragoalPreToolEnforcement()</code>가 deny 사유를 반환하면 <code>permissionDecision:'deny'</code>로 차단(<code>pre-tool-enforcer.mjs:1080~</code>).</li>
<li><strong>Task/Agent 모델 검증</strong>: <code>forceInherit</code>(Bedrock/Vertex/CC Switch 등) 환경에서 <code>Task</code>/<code>Agent</code>가 무효 모델 파라미터(tier 별칭 <code>sonnet</code>/<code>opus</code>/<code>haiku</code> 또는 <code>[1m]</code> 접미사)를 쓰면 <code>deny</code>하고 <code>OMC_SUBAGENT_MODEL</code>로 안내(이슈 #1135/#1868). 유효한 provider-specific 모델 ID는 허용.</li>
<li><strong>팀 라우팅 강제</strong>: 팀이 active인데 일반 서브에이전트를 스폰하면 <code>[TEAM ROUTING REQUIRED]</code> 리다이렉트 메시지로 <code>Task(team_name=..., name="worker-N")</code> 사용을 유도(<code>pre-tool-enforcer.mjs:779</code>).</li>
<li><strong>스킬 상태 활성화</strong>: <code>Skill</code> 도구 호출 시 <code>skill-active-state.json</code>을 써서 Stop 훅이 스킬 실행 중 조기 종료를 막게 한다(이슈 #1033, <code>pre-tool-enforcer.mjs:1058</code>).</li>
</ol>
<p>훅은 절대 도구를 막다 죽지 않는다 — 파싱 실패·예외는 모두 <code>{continue:true}</code> 폴백으로 통과시킨다(개방 실패).</p>
<h3>7.2 PermissionRequest 자동 승인 (<code>permission-handler</code>)</h3>
<p><code>src/hooks/permission-handler/index.ts</code>의 <code>processPermissionRequest()</code>는 <strong><code>Bash</code> 도구만</strong> 처리한다(다른 도구는 <code>{continue:true}</code>로 패스). 안전 명령이면 <code>decision.behavior:'allow'</code>를 반환해 사용자 승인 프롬프트를 건너뛴다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// permission-handler/index.ts:33 — 자동승인 화이트리스트
const SAFE_PATTERNS = [
  /^git (status|diff|log|branch|show|fetch)/,
  /^npm run (lint|build|check|typecheck)/,
  /^pnpm (lint|build|check|typecheck|...)/,
  /^tsc( |$)/, /^gh (issue|pr) (view|list|status)\b/,
  /^eslint /, /^prettier /, /^cargo (check|clippy|build)/, /^ls( |$)/,
  // REMOVED: cat, head, tail — 임의 파일 읽기 차단
];
</code></pre>
<p>안전장치: 셸 메타문자(<code>DANGEROUS_SHELL_CHARS = /[;&#x26;|</code>$()&#x3C;>...]/<code>)가 있으면 자동승인하지 않아 명령 체이닝·인젝션을 차단(이슈 #146). 단 </code>git commit<code>/</code>git tag<code>의 heredoc은 </code>SAFE_HEREDOC_PATTERNS<code>로 첫 줄만 매칭해 허용하되 본문이 </code>settings.local.json<code>에 저장되지 않게 한다(이슈 #608). 사용자가 </code>Bash<code>를 명시적 </code>ask<code> 규칙에 넣었으면(</code>hasClaudePermissionAsk`) 자동승인하지 않는다.</p>
<p>이로써 omc는 [[03_cc_tool]]의 "Bash는 별도 권한 체크" 동작을, <strong>읽기전용·검증 명령에 한해 자동승인</strong>하는 방향으로 완화한다 — ralph/autopilot 같은 영속 루프가 매 lint/typecheck마다 멈추지 않게 하는 게 목적.</p>
<hr>
<h2>8. omc 도구의 디스패치 경로</h2>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>신뢰도: ◆◆◇ 높음</strong> — 호스트 디스패치([[03_cc_tool]]) + omc 서버 핸들러 종합.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>omc 도구가 호출되는 전 경로를 한 줄로 꿰면:</p>
<ol>
<li>모델이 <code>mcp__t__lsp_diagnostics</code> 같은 <code>tool_use</code> 블록 생성.</li>
<li>호스트가 <code>lV()</code>로 <code>{serverName:"t", toolName:"lsp_diagnostics"}</code> 파싱([[03_cc_tool]] §6).</li>
<li>호스트가 <code>PreToolUse</code> 훅 실행 → <code>pre-tool-enforcer.mjs</code>(리마인더 주입, deny 가능).</li>
<li>MCP 도구는 <code>qb1()</code> 필터를 항상 통과, 권한은 MCP <code>annotations</code>(readOnly/destructive)에 따라 UI 처리. Bash라면 <code>PermissionRequest</code> 훅 → <code>permission-handler</code>가 자동승인 판정.</li>
<li>호스트가 stdio로 <code>t</code> 서버에 <code>CallToolRequest</code> 전송 → <code>standalone-server.ts</code>가 <code>allTools.find(name)</code> → 핸들러 실행.</li>
<li>결과 <code>{content:[{type:'text'}], isError}</code> 반환 → 호스트가 <code>PostToolUse</code> 훅(<code>post-tool-verifier</code>/<code>project-memory-posttool</code>/<code>post-tool-rules-injector</code>) 실행 → <code>tool_result</code>로 모델에 반환.</li>
</ol>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant M as 모델
    participant H as Claude Code 코어
    participant PE as pre-tool-enforcer (PreToolUse)
    participant PH as permission-handler (PermissionRequest)
    participant T as t MCP (mcp-server.cjs)
    participant PT as post-tool-* (PostToolUse)

    M->>H: tool_use mcp__t__lsp_diagnostics
    H->>PE: PreToolUse
    alt 모드/모델 위반
        PE-->>H: permissionDecision:'deny'
        H-->>M: tool_result (거부 + 사유)
    else 통과(+리마인더 주입)
        PE-->>H: continue (+reminder)
        Note over H,PH: Bash면 PermissionRequest→자동승인 판정
        H->>T: CallToolRequest
        T->>T: allTools.find → handler (LSP spawn / ast-grep / state I/O)
        T-->>H: {content, isError}
        H->>PT: PostToolUse (verify/memory/rules)
        H-->>M: tool_result
    end
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>8b. OMC_SECURITY: 도구 표면 전체 게이팅</h2>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>신뢰도: ◆◆◆ 확정</strong> — <code>src/lib/security-config.ts</code>.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>omc는 도구 런타임 전반을 한 스위치로 잠그는 <code>SecurityConfig</code>를 둔다(우선순위: 설정 파일 > <code>OMC_SECURITY</code> env > 기본). <code>OMC_SECURITY=strict</code>면 <code>STRICT_OVERRIDES</code>가 적용되어 도구 레이어가 일제히 보수화된다:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>키</th>
<th align="center">기본</th>
<th align="center">strict</th>
<th>효과</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>restrictToolPaths</code></td>
<td align="center">false</td>
<td align="center"><strong>true</strong></td>
<td><code>ast_grep_search/replace</code> 경로를 프로젝트 루트 안으로 제한(§4.1)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>pythonSandbox</code></td>
<td align="center">false</td>
<td align="center"><strong>true</strong></td>
<td><code>python_repl</code>의 위험 모듈·빌트인 차단</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>disableProjectSkills</code></td>
<td align="center">false</td>
<td align="center"><strong>true</strong></td>
<td>프로젝트 <code>.omc/skills/</code> 로딩(<code>load_omc_skills_local</code>) 차단</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>disableRemoteMcp</code></td>
<td align="center">false</td>
<td align="center"><strong>true</strong></td>
<td>원격 MCP(Exa, Context7) 비활성</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>disableExternalLLM</code></td>
<td align="center">false</td>
<td align="center"><strong>true</strong></td>
<td>team 모드의 codex/gemini 외부 LLM 워커 차단</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>hardMaxIterations</code></td>
<td align="center">500</td>
<td align="center"><strong>200</strong></td>
<td>영속 루프 하드 상한(Stop 훅, [[00_omc_overview]] §7.1)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>disableAutoUpdate</code></td>
<td align="center">false</td>
<td align="center"><strong>true</strong></td>
<td>무성 자동업데이트 차단</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>설정 파일은 프로젝트(<code>.claude/omc.jsonc</code>) → 유저(<code>{configDir}/claude-omc/config.jsonc</code>) 순으로 <code>security</code> 섹션을 읽어 strict/기본 위에 개별 오버라이드한다. 즉 도구별 게이팅(AST 경로·python 샌드박스·외부 워커)이 <strong>하나의 보안 정책 표면</strong>으로 통합돼 있다 — cli-jaw가 직원 도구 권한을 정책 단위로 일괄 토글할 때 참고할 만한 구조.</p>
<hr>
<h2>9. 스킬 (~36) — 도구 아님, 디스패처</h2>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>신뢰도: ◆◆◇ 높음</strong> — <code>skills/*/SKILL.md</code>(39 디렉터리), <code>skills-tools.ts</code>, <code>commands/*.md</code>.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>스킬은 호스트의 <code>Skill</code> 도구로 호출되는 <strong>프롬프트 묶음</strong>이지 MCP 도구가 아니다(현재 <code>skills/</code> 디렉터리 39개). omc는 토큰 절약을 위해 두 층으로 구성한다:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>commands/*.md = 얇은 디스패처</strong>: 전체 스킬 설명을 매 세션 프롬프트에 싣지 않고, 슬래시 진입점만 노출한 뒤 해당 <code>SKILL.md</code>를 지연 로드.</li>
<li><strong><code>t</code> 서버의 스킬 도구 3종</strong>: <code>list_omc_skills</code>(목록), <code>load_omc_skills_global</code>(<code>~/.omc/skills</code>), <code>load_omc_skills_local</code>(<code>.omc/skills</code>) — learner/skillify가 추출한 <strong>학습 스킬</strong>을 런타임에 로드(<code>skills-tools.ts</code>). <code>UserPromptSubmit</code> 훅의 <code>skill-injector.mjs</code>가 트리거 매칭 시 컨텍스트에 주입(세션당 최대 5개).</li>
</ul>
<p>스킬 자체의 오케스트레이션(autopilot/ralph/team 등)·키워드 자동 트리거·Stop 훅 영속 루프는 [[00_omc_overview]] §4·§7에서 다룬다. 여기서는 "스킬이 도구 표면이 아니라, <code>t</code> MCP의 스킬 로더 도구 3종과 <code>Skill</code> 호스트 도구로 연결된다"는 점만 짚는다.</p>
<hr>

<hr>
<h2>cli-jaw 비교 시사점</h2>
<ul>
<li>
<p><strong>MCP를 호스트에 주입 가능 vs 불가능</strong>: omc는 자신이 도는 Claude Code 호스트에 <code>t</code>·<code>team</code> 두 MCP 서버를 플러그인 매니페스트(<code>.mcp.json</code>)로 <strong>중앙 주입</strong>한다 — 모든 세션이 LSP/AST/python/state 도구를 자동으로 얻는다. 반면 cli-jaw는 직원(employee)에게 MCP 서버를 중앙에서 일괄 주입할 수단이 없다(각 직원은 자기 도구 카탈로그를 따로 가짐). cli-jaw가 직원 공통 도구 표면을 표준화하려면, omc의 "플러그인 레벨 단일 MCP 등록 + 짧은 서버명(<code>t</code>)으로 토큰 절감" 패턴이 직접 참고 모델이 된다.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>의미 기반 코드 검색의 부재 보완</strong>: omc가 더하는 본질은 LSP(정의/참조/진단/rename) + AST grep으로, [[03_cc_tool]]·cli-jaw가 공통으로 의존하는 grep(텍스트) 검색의 약점(타입 오류·심볼 관계를 못 잡음)을 메운다. cli-jaw가 <code>ToolSearch</code> 지연 로딩으로 도구 <em>발견</em>을 최적화한다면, omc는 도구 <em>능력</em>(의미 인텔)을 한 MCP에 응집해 끌어올린다 — 둘은 직교하므로 cli-jaw가 <code>lsp_diagnostics</code>류 의미 도구를 MCP로 흡수하면 검증(verify) 스킬의 "신선한 증거" 수집이 강해진다.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>권한 게이팅을 훅으로 외부화</strong>: omc는 도구 권한을 코어 cq9/lq9 이분법에 손대지 않고 <strong>PreToolUse/PermissionRequest 훅 스크립트</strong>로 게이팅한다 — 안전 Bash(lint/typecheck/git status) 자동승인, ultragoal·팀 모드 위반 deny, Task 모델 검증을 전부 훅 레벨에서 한다. cli-jaw도 권한을 하니스/모델 변경 없이 훅으로 외부화하면 "읽기전용 명령 자동 통과 + 위험 명령 차단" 정책을 코드 변경 없이 운영할 수 있다(특히 메타문자/heredoc 가드는 그대로 차용 가능).</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>워커에 이종 CLI 모델 + 비동기 잡 폴링</strong>: omc team MCP는 워커를 claude뿐 아니라 codex/gemini CLI로 띄우고(<code>agentTypes</code>), <code>start→status→wait(nudge)→cleanup</code>의 <strong>워커를 죽이지 않는 비동기 잡 폴링</strong>을 제공한다. cli-jaw가 이종 모델 직원 풀과 "절대 죽이지 말고 폴링"(MEMORY: use poll for waiting) 원칙을 코드 워커에 적용할 때, omc의 nudge/grace/job_id 모델이 청사진이 된다 — 단 omc는 tmux+git worktree로 워커를 물리 격리하므로, cli-jaw가 논리적 직원 디스패치에 머문다면 병렬 파일 충돌 안전성에서 차이가 난다.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<p>이전 문서: [[03_cc_tool]]
관련 문서: [[00_omc_overview]]</p>

<h2>변경 기록</h2>
<ul>
<li>2026-05-29: omc 툴 런타임을 소스 기반으로 작성. 베이스 도구 = [[03_cc_tool]]임을 전제로, omc가 더하는 <code>t</code> MCP(LSP 12 + AST 2 + python_repl + state/notepad/memory/wiki/skills/trace, <code>tool-registry.ts</code> 집계)·<code>team</code> MCP(<code>omc_run_team_*</code> 4도구, tmux+worktree 이종 CLI 워커, CLI 마이그레이션 상태)와 훅 기반 게이팅(pre-tool-enforcer deny, permission-handler Bash 자동승인 화이트리스트/메타문자 가드), 디스패치 경로, 스킬-도구 연결을 정리하고 cli-jaw 비교 4항목을 포함.</li>
</ul>

46:T149a6,<h2>Overview</h2>
<p><strong>Axis 04: Skill system</strong> — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:</p>
<ul>
<li>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>170_oh-my-claudecode/</code> — skills installed to Claude Code.</p>
</blockquote>
</li>
<li>
<blockquote>
<p>이 문서는 <code>Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-claudecode</code>(OMC) v4.14.4 플러그인의 <strong>스킬 시스템</strong> 차원을 소스 기반으로 분석한다. 분석 축은 (1) 스킬 정의/로딩/실행, (2) 스킬 디스커버리, (3) 스킬–MCP 결합, (4) 스킬 우선순위 경로, (5) 프론트매터 계약이다. 비교 기준선은 바닐라 Claude Code 스킬 시스템([[04_cc_skill]])이며, OMC가 호스트에 위임하는 부분과</p>
</blockquote>
</li>
<li>
<blockquote>
</blockquote>
</li>
<li>
<blockquote>
<p>근거 경로: <code>.claude-plugin/plugin.json</code>, <code>.mcp.json</code>, <code>commands/*.md</code>, <code>skills/*/SKILL.md</code>, <code>hooks/hooks.json</code>, <code>scripts/keyword-detector.mjs</code>, <code>scripts/skill-injector.mjs</code>, <code>src/tools/skills-tools.ts</code>, `src/hooks/learner/{loader,finder,parse</p>
</blockquote>
</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<ul>
<li>OMC의 가장 중요한 구조적 사실은 <strong>두 개의 완전히 분리된 스킬 트랙</strong>이 공존한다는 점이다. 바닐라 Claude Code([[04_cc_skill]])는 스킬과 slash command를 단일 <code>loadedFrom</code> 분류 체계(<code>bundled</code>/<code>skills</code>/<code>commands_DEPRECATED</code>/<code>plugin</code>)로 통합한 <strong>하나의 memoized 로더</strong>로 관리하지만, OMC는 그렇지 않다.</li>
<li>| <strong>A. 번들 스킬</strong> (39개) | 플러그인 기능 스킬 | <strong>호스트(Claude Code)</strong> 가 <code>plugin.json</code>의 <code>skills[]</code>로 로드 | <code>skills/&#x3C;name>/SKILL.md</code> | CC 표준 + OMC 확장(<code>level</code>/<code>pipeline</code>/<code>handoff</code>) | 호스트 Skill 도구 + <code>/command</code> + 키워드 Hook |</li>
<li>| <strong>B. 학습 스킬</strong> (learned/runtime) | 세션에서 추출한 재사용 워크플로 | <strong>OMC 자체</strong> (<code>src/hooks/learner/</code>) | <code>.omc/skills/</code>, <code>~/.omc/skills/</code>, <code>~/.claude/skills/omc-learned/</code> | OMC 독자 스키마(<code>id</code>/<code>triggers</code>/<code>quality</code>/<code>usageCount</code>) | <code>skill-injector.mjs</code> Hook +</li>
<li>트랙 A는 <strong>호스트 위임</strong>이다. OMC는 <code>plugin.json</code>에 39개 디렉토리를 선언만 하고, SKILL.md 스캐닝·팩토리·조건부 활성화·Skill 도구 노출은 전부 Claude Code 코어가 처리한다([[04_cc_skill]] §스킬 로딩 파이프라인). 트랙 B는 <strong>OMC가 직접 구현한 독자 시스템</strong>으로, <code>learner</code> 디렉토리 전체(finder/parser/loader)와 `skill-injector.</li>
<li>graph TD</li>
<li>subgraph TrackA["트랙 A: 번들 스킬 (호스트 위임)"]</li>
<li>PJ["plugin.json skills[39]"] --> CCLoader["Claude Code SKILL.md 스캐너(04_cc_skill 참조)"]</li>
</ul>
<h2>Topics covered</h2>
<ul>
<li>
<ol start="0">
<li>한눈에: OMC 스킬은 "이중 트랙"이다</li>
</ol>
</li>
<li>
<ol>
<li>트랙 A — 번들 스킬: 호스트 위임의 표면</li>
</ol>
</li>
<li>1.1 plugin.json의 선언적 등록</li>
<li>1.2 <code>commands/*.md</code> = Context 절약형 얇은 디스패처</li>
<li>Dispatch</li>
<li>1.3 번들 SKILL.md 프론트매터 계약</li>
<li>1.4 의도적 부재 — 조건부 활성화/fork/model 오버라이드</li>
<li>
<ol start="2">
<li>번들 스킬 카탈로그 (level 기준)</li>
</ol>
</li>
<li>
<ol start="3">
<li>트랙 B — 학습 스킬: OMC 자체 디스커버리/로딩 엔진</li>
</ol>
</li>
<li>3.1 디스커버리 — 3-소스 재귀 탐색 (<code>finder.ts</code>)</li>
<li>3.2 파싱 — 자체 YAML 파서 + 필수 필드 검증 (<code>parser.ts</code>)</li>
<li>3.3 로딩 — project>user 우선순위 dedup (<code>loader.ts</code>)</li>
<li>3.4 학습 스킬 프론트매터 계약 (<code>types.ts</code> — 번들 스킬과 완전히 다른 스키마)</li>
<li>3.5 매칭 스코어링 (<code>loader.ts:findMatchingSkills</code>)</li>
</ul>

# OMC ccg
This compatibility command keeps `/oh-my-claudecode:ccg` available without
loading the full `ccg` skill description in every Claude Code session.
## Dispatch

3. user:    ~/.omc/skills/                     ← scope: "user" (신규 선호 위치)

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-ts">// loader.ts (발췌)
const skill = {
  ...,
  contentHash: createContentHash(content),   // SHA-256 앞 16자
  priority: candidate.scope === 'project' ? 1 : 0,
};
const existing = seenIds.get(skillId);
if (!existing || skill.priority > existing.priority) seenIds.set(skillId, skill);
// 반환: priority 내림차순 (project 먼저)
</code></pre>

tag 포함 매칭:     +5
+ (매칭 있을 때만) quality/20 부스트, min(usageCount,10) 부스트
→ score>0 필터 → 내림차순 정렬 → limit개

<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h1>oh-my-claudecode (omc) skill system</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>Analysis Snapshot</strong>: <code>170_oh-my-claudecode/</code> — skills installed to Claude Code.</p>
</blockquote>
<blockquote>
<p>This document analyzes the <strong>Skill System</strong> dimension of the <code>Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-claudecode</code> (OMC) v4.14.4 plugin based on the source. The analysis axes are (1) skill definition/loading/execution, (2) skill discovery, (3) skill-MCP combination, (4) skill priority path, and (5) frontmatter contract. The baseline for comparison is the vanilla Claude Code skill system ([[04_cc_skill]]), which clearly distinguishes between the parts that the OMC delegates to the host and the parts it adds itself. For higher-level operating context, see [[00_omc_overview]] §4·§8.1.</p>
<p>Base path: <code>.claude-plugin/plugin.json</code>, <code>.mcp.json</code>, <code>commands/*.md</code>, <code>skills/*/SKILL.md</code>, <code>hooks/hooks.json</code>, <code>scripts/keyword-detector.mjs</code>, <code>scripts/skill-injector.mjs</code>, <code>src/tools/skills-tools.ts</code>, <code>src/hooks/learner/{loader,finder,parser,constants,types}.ts</code>.</p>
</blockquote>
<hr>
<h2>0. At a glance: OMC skills are “dual track”</h2>
<p>The most important structural fact of OMC is the coexistence of <strong>two completely separate skill tracks</strong>. Vanilla Claude Code ([[04_cc_skill]]) manages skills and slash commands into <strong>one memoized loader</strong> that consolidates skills and slash commands into a single <code>loadedFrom</code> taxonomy (<code>bundled</code>/<code>skills</code>/<code>commands_DEPRECATED</code>/<code>plugin</code>), but OMC does not.</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>track</th>
<th>congestion</th>
<th>loading subject</th>
<th>definition location</th>
<th>Frontmatter Schema</th>
<th>Discovery</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><strong>A. Bundle Skill</strong> (39)</td>
<td>Plugin function skills</td>
<td><strong>Host (Claude Code)</strong> loaded into <code>skills[]</code> of <code>plugin.json</code></td>
<td><code>skills/&#x3C;name>/SKILL.md</code></td>
<td>CC standard + OMC extensions (<code>level</code>/<code>pipeline</code>/<code>handoff</code>)</td>
<td>Host Skill Tool + <code>/command</code> + Keyword Hook</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>B. Learning Skills</strong> (learned/runtime)</td>
<td>Reuse workflow extracted from session</td>
<td><strong>OMC itself</strong> (<code>src/hooks/learner/</code>)</td>
<td><code>.omc/skills/</code>, <code>~/.omc/skills/</code>, <code>~/.claude/skills/omc-learned/</code></td>
<td>OMC reader schema(<code>id</code>/<code>triggers</code>/<code>quality</code>/<code>usageCount</code>)</td>
<td><code>skill-injector.mjs</code> Hook + <code>t</code> MCP Tool</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>Track A is <strong>host delegated</strong>. OMC only declares 39 directories in <code>plugin.json</code>, and SKILL.md scanning, factory, conditional activation, and skill tool exposure are all handled by the Claude Code core ([[04_cc_skill]] §Skill loading pipeline). Track B is <strong>OMC's own proprietary system</strong>, supported by the entire <code>learner</code> directory (finder/parser/loader), <code>skill-injector.mjs</code> Hook, and <code>t</code> MCP.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    subgraph TrackA["트랙 A: 번들 스킬 (호스트 위임)"]
        PJ["plugin.json skills[39]"] --> CCLoader["Claude Code SKILL.md 스캐너&#x3C;br/>(04_cc_skill 참조)"]
        CCLoader --> CCTool["호스트 Skill 도구 / /command"]
        CMD["commands/*.md (얇은 디스패처)"] --> CCTool
    end
    subgraph Inject["키워드 자동 라우팅 (UserPromptSubmit Hook)"]
        KW["keyword-detector.mjs&#x3C;br/>매직 키워드 → [MAGIC KEYWORD]"]
        SI["skill-injector.mjs&#x3C;br/>학습 스킬 디스크립터 주입"]
    end
    subgraph TrackB["트랙 B: 학습 스킬 (OMC 자체 구현)"]
        FIND["finder.ts: 3-소스 재귀 탐색"]
        PARSE["parser.ts: 자체 YAML + 필수필드 검증"]
        LOAD["loader.ts: project>user 우선순위 dedup"]
        MCP["t MCP: list/load_local/load_global"]
        FIND --> PARSE --> LOAD --> MCP
    end
    User["사용자 프롬프트"] --> KW
    User --> SI
    KW -->|읽어라| CCTool
    SI -->|디스크립터만| LOAD
    Skillify["skillify/learner 스킬"] -->|.md 작성| FIND
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>1. Track A — Bundle Skill: Surface of Host Delegation</h2>
<h3>1.1 Declarative registration in plugin.json</h3>
<p>OMC <strong>does not reimplement</strong> the skill loader. <code>.claude-plugin/plugin.json</code> simply declares the 39 skill directories as an array:</p>
<pre><code class="language-json">// .claude-plugin/plugin.json
"skills": [
  "./skills/ai-slop-cleaner/", "./skills/ask/", "./skills/autopilot/",
  ... 39개 디렉토리 ...
  "./skills/wiki/", "./skills/writer-memory/"
],
"mcpServers": "./.mcp.json",
"commands": "./commands/"
</code></pre>
<p>From this point on, SKILL.md's scanning, parsing, factory, <code>Skill</code> tool exposure, and <code>/command</code> registration are all up to the host, Claude Code. That is, the <code>bootstrapFunction006</code> (SKILL.md scanner), <code>bootstrapFunction005</code> (factory), <code>loadedFrom: "plugin"</code> classification, and model exposure filtering analyzed in [[04_cc_skill]] are <strong>applied to the OMC bundle skill as is</strong>. There is no code in the OMC side source to read SKILL.md and create a command object (Track B's learning skill loader is separate — §3).</p>
<h3>1.2 <code>commands/*.md</code> = Context-saving thin dispatcher</h3>
<p>Almost all of the 27 <code>.md</code>s in the <code>commands/</code> directory are <strong>one-line body dispatchers</strong>. The core intent is "not to load the entire skill description into the prompt every session" — this is an <strong>explicit lazy loading</strong> pattern, as opposed to [[04_cc_skill]]'s <code>prompt</code> type command, which injects the SKILL.md body verbatim:</p>
<pre><code class="language-markdown">&#x3C;!-- commands/ccg.md -->
---
description: ""
---
# OMC ccg
This compatibility command keeps `/oh-my-claudecode:ccg` available without
loading the full `ccg` skill description in every Claude Code session.
## Dispatch
1. Read the full bundled skill instructions ...: `skills/ccg/SKILL.md`.
2. Follow that SKILL.md exactly, treating the user's arguments as:
   $ARGUMENTS
</code></pre>
<p>The command is just an entry point for slash exposure, the actual action is in SKILL.md and <strong>only read at the time of the call</strong>. <code>description: Leave blank as ""</code> to prevent the host from adding a description to the prompt, and the body instructs the model to "read SKILL.md if necessary." This is a different solution to the same problem (non-prompt) as cli-jaw's <code>ToolSearch</code> delayed schema loading (§7).</p>
<h3>1.3 Bundle SKILL.md Front Matter Contract</h3>
<p>Frequency of examining all 39 bundled SKILL.md frontmatter fields (source: <code>skills/*/SKILL.md</code>):</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>field</th>
<th align="right">Appearance</th>
<th>Host (CC) recognition?</th>
<th>Meaning</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>name</code></td>
<td align="right">39</td>
<td>✅ ([[04_cc_skill]])</td>
<td>display name</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>description</code></td>
<td align="right">39</td>
<td>✅</td>
<td>Skill description (basis for automatic model call)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>level</code></td>
<td align="right">31</td>
<td>❌ <strong>OMC only</strong></td>
<td>Skill weight (1=light ~ 7=self-improvement). Ignored by the host, it only has meaning according to OMC regulations</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>argument-hint</code></td>
<td align="right">18</td>
<td>✅</td>
<td>argument hint</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>aliases</code></td>
<td align="right">5</td>
<td>✅</td>
<td>aliases (e.g. <code>aliases: [learner]</code> in <code>skillify</code>)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>triggers</code></td>
<td align="right">3</td>
<td>❌ <strong>OMC only</strong></td>
<td>Array of OMC keywords/injection triggers (<code>wiki</code>/<code>deep-dive</code>, etc.)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>pipeline</code></td>
<td align="right">3</td>
<td>❌ <strong>OMC only</strong></td>
<td>Multi-level skill chain definition (§5.3)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>handoff</code> / <code>handoff-policy</code></td>
<td align="right">3 / 2</td>
<td>❌ <strong>OMC only</strong></td>
<td>Stage Deliverable Path + Handover Policy</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>next-skill</code> / <code>next-skill-args</code></td>
<td align="right">1 / 1</td>
<td>❌ <strong>OMC only</strong></td>
<td>Next skill/factor designation</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>user-invocable</code></td>
<td align="right">1</td>
<td>✅</td>
<td><code>omc-reference</code> only <code>false</code> (model only, /command hidden)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>scope</code> / <code>role</code> / <code>agent</code></td>
<td align="right">1 each</td>
<td>part</td>
<td>secondary meta</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p><strong>Key observation</strong>: The powerful frontmatter fields of vanilla CC skills — <code>allowed-tools</code>, <code>paths</code> (conditional activation), <code>context: fork</code>, <code>disable-model-invocation</code>, <code>model</code>, <code>version</code>, <code>when_to_use</code>, <code>hooks</code>, <code>effort</code> — do not appear in <strong>bundle SKILL.md at all</strong> (verified by <code>grep -lE '^allowed-tools:|^paths:|^context:|...' skills/*/SKILL.md</code> → NONE). OMC <strong>does</strong> use CC's rich skill frontmatter capabilities, and instead adds orchestration metadata like <code>level</code>/<code>pipeline</code>/<code>handoff</code> as its own conventions. Permission control (read-only, etc.) is handled not by skills, but by <strong>agent frontmatter's <code>disallowedTools</code></strong> ([[00_omc_overview]] §3).</p>
<h3>1.4 Intentional absence — conditional activation/fork/model overrides</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>CC skill function ([[04_cc_skill]])</th>
<th>OMC Bundle Skills</th>
<th>Substitution/Delegation</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>paths</code> glob conditional activation</td>
<td><strong>Absence</strong></td>
<td>Dynamic Triggering with Keyword Hook (<code>keyword-detector.mjs</code>) (§5)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>context: fork</code> Run separate agent</td>
<td><strong>Absence</strong></td>
<td>Isolate with Task subagent + team MCP ([[00_omc_overview]] §3·§6)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>frontmatter <code>model</code>/<code>effort</code> override</td>
<td><strong>Absence</strong></td>
<td><code>&#x3C;model_routing></code> protocol + <code>model</code> tier per agent ([[00_omc_overview]] §2·§3)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>allowed-tools</code> automatic approval</td>
<td><strong>Absence</strong></td>
<td><code>PreToolUse</code>/<code>PermissionRequest</code> Hook([[00_omc_overview]] §7)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>${CLAUDE_SKILL_DIR}</code> variable substitution</td>
<td>Host Delegation</td>
<td>Processed by host CC (OMC not implemented)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>This is a direct result of the design in which the OMC delegates the skill system itself to the host, and only places <strong>orchestration semantics</strong> (level/pipeline/keywords) on top of it.</p>
<hr>

<p>Particularly important at the level of the skill system are the three types of meta skills (<code>skill</code>/<code>skillify</code>/<code>learner</code>)**, which are the creation and management interface for track B (learning skills) (§3.4, §4).</p>
<hr>
<h2>3. Track B — Learning Skills: OMC’s Own Discovery/Loading Engine</h2>
<p>Unlike bundled skills, <strong>learned skills are a system that OMC directly implements from start to finish</strong>. The finder → parser → loader pipeline in <code>src/hooks/learner/</code> is the key.</p>
<h3>3.1 Discovery — 3-source recursive search (<code>finder.ts</code>)</h3>
<p><code>findSkillFiles(projectRoot)</code> recursively scans directories in priority order (<code>src/hooks/learner/finder.ts:60~</code>, upper depth limit <code>MAX_RECURSION_DEPTH=10</code>):</p>
<pre><code>1. project: {projectRoot}/.omc/skills/        ← scope: "project" (우선)
2. project: {projectRoot}/.agents/skills/     ← scope: "project" (읽기전용 호환 소스)
3. user:    ~/.omc/skills/                     ← scope: "user" (신규 선호 위치)
4. user:    {CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR|~/.claude}/skills/omc-learned/  ← scope: "user" (레거시)
</code></pre>
<p>(Source: <code>PROJECT_SKILLS_SUBDIR</code>/<code>PROJECT_AGENT_SKILLS_SUBDIR</code>/<code>GLOBAL_SKILLS_DIR</code>/<code>USER_SKILLS_DIR</code> in <code>constants.ts</code>)</p>
<p>The security measures are impressive — <code>finder.ts</code> <strong>blocks symbolic link escapes</strong> (<code>isWithinBoundary()</code> + <code>safeRealpathSync()</code>, <code>finder.ts:50~</code>). If the realpath is outside the source directory boundary, it is excluded from the candidates and dedup uses the realpath standard (<code>seenRealPaths</code>). This is a similar motivation to inode deduplication in [[04_cc_skill]], but the OMC places <strong>path traversal security</strong> as a primary concern (also rejecting <code>..</code> in <code>validateProjectRoot</code> in <code>skills-tools.ts</code> + verifying cwd/HOME boundaries).</p>
<h3>3.2 Parsing — Own YAML parser + required field validation (<code>parser.ts</code>)</h3>
<p>OMC does not use an external YAML library and parses directly with <code>parseYamlMetadata()</code> (<code>parser.ts:74~</code>). Validation Rules:</p>
<ul>
<li>If there is no frontmatter (<code>^---\n...\n---</code>), <code>valid: false</code>("Missing YAML frontmatter").</li>
<li>If <code>id</code> is not present, it is derived from <code>name</code> (<code>lowercase letter + space→'-' + alphanumeric characters only</code>).</li>
<li>Default value for <code>'manual'</code> if <code>source</code> is missing.</li>
<li><strong>Required fields</strong>: <code>name</code>, <code>description</code>, <code>triggers</code> (must not be empty). If at least one is missing, <code>valid: false</code> → the loader skips.</li>
</ul>
<h3>3.3 Loading — project>user priority dedup (<code>loader.ts</code>)</h3>
<p><code>loadAllSkills(projectRoot)</code> identifies the candidate by its SHA-256 content hash, and if it has the same <code>id</code>, the project overrides the user(<code>loader.ts:25~</code>):</p>
<pre><code class="language-ts">// loader.ts (발췌)
const skill = {
  ...,
  contentHash: createContentHash(content),   // SHA-256 앞 16자
  priority: candidate.scope === 'project' ? 1 : 0,
};
const existing = seenIds.get(skillId);
if (!existing || skill.priority > existing.priority) seenIds.set(skillId, skill);
// 반환: priority 내림차순 (project 먼저)
</code></pre>
<p>This solves the same type of problem (resolving duplicate skills) as [[04_cc_skill]]'s "deep directory priority" / <code>loadedFrom</code> priority with OMC-style 2-tier scope priority (<code>project=1 > user=0</code>).</p>
<h3>3.4 Learning skill frontmatter contract (<code>types.ts</code> — completely different schema from bundle skill)</h3>
<p>The <code>SkillMetadata</code> interface (source: <code>src/hooks/learner/types.ts</code>) is <strong>separate</strong> from the SKILL.md contract in track A:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>field</th>
<th>Type</th>
<th align="center">Required</th>
<th>Meaning</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>id</code></td>
<td>string</td>
<td align="center">(Derived)</td>
<td>Unique identifier. If not present, create from <code>name</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>name</code></td>
<td>string</td>
<td align="center">✅</td>
<td>human-readable name</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>description</code></td>
<td>string</td>
<td align="center">✅</td>
<td>Skill Description</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>triggers</code></td>
<td>string[]</td>
<td align="center">✅</td>
<td><strong>Injection trigger keyword</strong> (key to matching)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>source</code></td>
<td><code>'extracted'|'promoted'|'manual'</code></td>
<td align="center">(basic manual)</td>
<td>Source</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>createdAt</code></td>
<td>string</td>
<td align="center"></td>
<td>creation time</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>sessionId</code></td>
<td>string</td>
<td align="center"></td>
<td>Extraction Source Session</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>quality</code></td>
<td>number(0-100)</td>
<td align="center"></td>
<td>Quality Score. Automatically inject only <code>MIN_QUALITY_SCORE=50</code> or higher</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>usageCount</code></td>
<td>number</td>
<td align="center"></td>
<td>Number of successful applications (score boost)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>tags</code></td>
<td>string[]</td>
<td align="center"></td>
<td>Classification tags (auxiliary matching)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>matching</code></td>
<td><code>'exact'|'fuzzy'</code></td>
<td align="center"></td>
<td>trigger matching strategy</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>model</code> / <code>agent</code></td>
<td>string</td>
<td align="center"></td>
<td>Execution model/agent hint</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>Interestingly, the learning skill <strong>supports</strong> the <code>model</code>/<code>agent</code> hints that the bundled skill does not — however, this is OMC's own metadata unrelated to the CC's <code>model</code> field recognized by the host skill tool.</p>
<h3>3.5 Matching Scoring (<code>loader.ts:findMatchingSkills</code>)</h3>
<p>The learning skill is activated by <strong>keyword scoring</strong> rather than paths glob (<code>loader.ts:84~</code>):</p>
<pre><code>trigger 포함 매칭: +10  (필수 매칭 신호)
tag 포함 매칭:     +5
+ (매칭 있을 때만) quality/20 부스트, min(usageCount,10) 부스트
→ score>0 필터 → 내림차순 정렬 → limit개
</code></pre>
<p>This is <strong>probabilistic/rank-based</strong> activation in contrast to CC's deterministic glob matching ([[04_cc_skill]]'s <code>ignore().add(paths)</code>).</p>
<hr>
<h2>4. Learning skill injection path (<code>skill-injector.mjs</code> Hook)</h2>
<p>The path through which the learning skill actually enters the context is the second script <code>skill-injector.mjs</code> of the <code>UserPromptSubmit</code> Hook (<code>hooks/hooks.json</code> verification: <code>keyword-detector.mjs</code> timeout 5s → <code>skill-injector.mjs</code> timeout 3s sequential execution).</p>
<h3>4.1 Inject only descriptor (body on disk)</h3>
<p>The core design is to not inject the skill body, only the descriptor (metadata + path + summary) (<code>skill-injector.mjs:formatSkillDescriptor</code>):</p>
<pre><code>### &#x3C;name> (&#x3C;scope>)
&#x3C;skill-metadata>{"path","triggers","score","scope"}&#x3C;/skill-metadata>
Summary: &#x3C;첫 유효 라인, 240자>
Load instructions: if this skill is needed, read &#x3C;path> and follow the full instructions there.
</code></pre>
<p>The whole thing is wrapped in a <code>&#x3C;mnemosyne></code> tag and given a context budget:</p>
<ul>
<li><code>MAX_LEARNED_SKILL_DESCRIPTOR_CHARS = 1000</code> (1 descriptor)</li>
<li><code>MAX_LEARNED_SKILLS_CONTEXT_CHARS = 3000</code> (full injection)</li>
<li><code>MAX_SKILLS_PER_SESSION = 5</code> (per session)</li>
</ul>
<p>If the budget is exceeded, it is cut to "[Additional learned skills omitted ...]". This is a learning skill version of the same philosophy as the thin dispatcher in §1.2 — <strong>"descriptor to prompt, body to disk"</strong> —.</p>
<h3>4.2 File-based session dedup (issue #2577)</h3>
<p>The <code>UserPromptSubmit</code> Hook pops up <strong>as a new Node process</strong> every turn. Therefore, the in-memory map always had a bug where empty skills were re-injected every turn. OMC solves this with <strong>file-based session state</strong> (<code>skill-injector.mjs:readFallbackState/writeFallbackState</code>):</p>
<pre><code>{cwd}/.omc/state/skill-sessions-fallback.json
  → { sessions: { [sessionId]: { injectedPaths:[...], timestamp } } }
  → TTL 1시간(FALLBACK_SESSION_TTL_MS), 만료 세션 prune
  → 이미 주입된 path는 alreadyInjected로 스킵
</code></pre>
<h3>4.3 Bridge/Fallback Dual Path</h3>
<p>If possible, use the compiled bundle <code>dist/hooks/skill-bridge.cjs</code> (recursive discovery + persistent session cache), if not (<code>first run before build</code>), use an inline fallback (<code>findMatchingSkillsFallback</code>, <strong>non-recursive</strong> + JSON file dedup). Even the fallback path has <code>realpathSync</code> dedup and prompt injection protection.</p>
<hr>
<h2>5. Skill Priority Path — Three Activation Channels</h2>
<p>There are three paths to activate OMC bundle skills, and their priorities/nature are different.</p>
<h3>5.1 Keyword automatic triggering (<code>keyword-detector.mjs</code>)</h3>
<p>The first script of the <code>UserPromptSubmit</code> Hook detects the magic keyword and injects the <code>[MAGIC KEYWORD: NAME]</code> message. <strong>The priority array is hardcoded</strong> (<code>keyword-detector.mjs:1030</code>):</p>
<pre><code class="language-js">const priorityOrder = ['cancel','ralph','ultragoal','autopilot','ultrawork',
  'ccg','ralplan','deep-interview','ai-slop-cleaner','tdd','code-review',
  'security-review','ultrathink','deepsearch','analyze'];
</code></pre>
<p><code>cancel</code> is the highest (ensuring loop escape), followed by persistent modes. <strong><code>team</code> is removed from automatic triggers</strong> and is only launched with an explicit <code>/team</code> (<code>keyword-detector.mjs:1028</code> comment). The injected message is not the body, but rather a routing instruction to "read" (<code>keyword-detector.mjs:959~</code>):</p>
<pre><code>[MAGIC KEYWORD: RALPH]
Preferred invocation: /oh-my-claudecode:ralph &#x3C;args>
Read fallback: open skills/ralph/SKILL.md and follow its SKILL.md instructions.
IMPORTANT: Start the ralph workflow immediately. ...
</code></pre>
<p>Misfire prevention is sophisticated — <code>hasActivationIntentNearKeyword</code> (use/run/start/enable... verb near), ignores keywords in quotes, and triggers only after removing system echo block (re-paste <code>[MAGIC KEYWORD:...]</code>) (<code>keyword-detector.mjs:580~660</code>).</p>
<h3>5.2 Explicit call vs model automatic call</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Channel</th>
<th>Entry point</th>
<th>Priority Personality</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><strong>User Specified</strong></td>
<td><code>/oh-my-claudecode:&#x3C;skill></code> (commands/*.md dispatcher)</td>
<td>The strongest. Keywords Bypass gating</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Keyword Auto</strong></td>
<td><code>keyword-detector.mjs</code> → <code>[MAGIC KEYWORD]</code></td>
<td>priorityOrder array order + verification of activation intent</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Model Auto (Skill Tool)</strong></td>
<td>Host CC exposes <code>description</code> based ([[04_cc_skill]])</td>
<td>OMC non-intervention (host delegation)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Learning Skills Infusion</strong></td>
<td><code>skill-injector.mjs</code> → <code>&#x3C;mnemosyne></code> descriptor</td>
<td>score>0, 5 per session</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>5.3 Pipeline chain (<code>pipeline</code>/<code>next-skill</code>/<code>handoff</code>)</h3>
<p>OMC-specific multi-level priority paths are represented by the frontmatter <code>pipeline</code> array. <code>deep-dive</code> samples:</p>
<pre><code class="language-yaml"># skills/deep-dive/SKILL.md
pipeline: [deep-dive, plan, autopilot]
next-skill: plan
next-skill-args: --consensus --direct
handoff: .omc/specs/deep-dive-{slug}.md
</code></pre>
<p>One skill leaves behind output (the <code>handoff</code> path) and passes control to the <code>next-skill</code>. The autopilot skips the preceding phase if this output (<code>.omc/specs/...</code>/<code>.omc/plans/ralplan-*</code>) is present ([[00_omc_overview]] §4.3). This is a <strong>inter-skill state transfer priority</strong> mechanism that does not exist in CC.</p>
<hr>
<h2>6. Skill-MCP Combination</h2>
<p>In OMC, the combination of skills and MCP is two-way.</p>
<h3>6.1 Single <code>t</code> MCP server</h3>
<p><code>.mcp.json</code> registers only one stdio server:</p>
<pre><code class="language-json">{ "mcpServers": { "t": { "command": "node",
  "args": ["${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/bridge/mcp-server.cjs"] } } }
</code></pre>
<p>The <code>team</code> MCP supports runtime dynamic startup ([[00_omc_overview]] §1.2). Unlike [[04_cc_skill]]'s <code>loadedFrom: "mcp"</code> command (a slash command provided by the MCP server), OMC's <code>t</code> exposes a <strong>tool, not a command</strong> — rather than the MCP <em>providing</em> the skill, the skill <em>consumes</em> the MCP tool.</p>
<h3>6.2 Three types of MCP tools that deal with skills (<code>skills-tools.ts</code>)</h3>
<p>The <code>t</code> MCP server exposes <strong>the tool itself</strong> for querying learning skills** (source: <code>src/tools/skills-tools.ts</code>):</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>tools</th>
<th>Action</th>
<th>Security</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>list_omc_skills</code></td>
<td>project + user List all learning skill metas (project takes priority)</td>
<td><code>validateProjectRoot</code>(<code>..</code> rejected, cwd/HOME boundary)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>load_omc_skills_local</code></td>
<td><code>.omc/skills/</code> (project scope) only</td>
<td>Same</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>load_omc_skills_global</code></td>
<td><code>~/.omc/skills/</code> + <code>~/.claude/skills/omc-learned/</code> (user scope)</td>
<td>(no arguments)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>These tools call <code>loadAllSkills()</code> from §3 verbatim — <strong>that is, track B's discovery engine is shared by both Hook (injection) and MCP (query)</strong>. The output is meta (<code>id</code>/<code>name</code>/<code>description</code>/<code>triggers</code>/<code>tags</code>/<code>scope</code>/<code>path</code>) rather than the body, which instructs the model to read the path when necessary (same philosophy as §4.1).</p>
<h3>6.3 Other <code>t</code> MCP tools consumed by skills</h3>
<p>The bundled skill body calls non-skill tools in <code>t</code> MCP ([[00_omc_overview]] §8.1): <code>wiki</code>/<code>remember</code> skill → <code>wiki_*</code>/<code>project_memory_*</code>/<code>notepad_*</code>, <code>ralph</code>/<code>autopilot</code> → <code>state_read/write</code>, <code>trace</code> → <code>trace_summary</code>, architect/verifier family → <code>lsp_*</code>/<code>ast_grep_*</code>. A skill is a code of conduct (prompt), and an MCP tool is the persistence/code intel surface on which that code operates.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant U as 사용자
    participant CC as Claude Code 코어
    participant UPS as UserPromptSubmit Hook
    participant KW as keyword-detector.mjs
    participant SI as skill-injector.mjs
    participant Loader as learner/loader.ts
    participant T as t MCP 서버
    participant FS as .omc/skills + SKILL.md

    U->>CC: "ralph로 X 끝까지 해줘"
    CC->>UPS: Hook 발화
    UPS->>KW: (timeout 5s)
    KW->>KW: 활성화 의도 검증 + priorityOrder
    KW-->>CC: [MAGIC KEYWORD: RALPH] "read skills/ralph/SKILL.md"
    UPS->>SI: (timeout 3s)
    SI->>Loader: matchSkillsForInjection(prompt)
    Loader->>FS: 3-소스 재귀 탐색 + trigger 스코어
    Loader-->>SI: 매칭 학습 스킬(≤5)
    SI->>FS: skill-sessions-fallback.json (dedup)
    SI-->>CC: &#x3C;mnemosyne> 디스크립터(≤3000자)
    CC->>FS: skills/ralph/SKILL.md 읽기
    CC->>T: state_write(ralph active) / lsp_diagnostics ...
    T-->>CC: 상태/진단 결과
    Note over CC,FS: 본문은 디스크에, 디스크립터/메타만 프롬프트에
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>7. OMC skill system compared to vanilla Claude Code (Summary)</h2>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>dimension</th>
<th>Vanilla Claude Code ([[04_cc_skill]])</th>
<th>OMC</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><strong>Loader</strong></td>
<td>Single memoized loader chain, integrating 4 types of <code>loadedFrom</code></td>
<td>Track A=host delegated, track B=own <code>learner/</code> loader (separate)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>bundle frontmatter</strong></td>
<td>Supports all <code>allowed-tools</code>/<code>paths</code>/<code>context</code>/<code>model</code>/<code>effort</code>/<code>hooks</code></td>
<td><strong>0 of them used</strong>; Instead, add <code>level</code>/<code>pipeline</code>/<code>handoff</code> itself</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Conditional Activation</strong></td>
<td><code>paths</code> glob + .gitignore matching (deterministic)</td>
<td>Keyword scoring + activation intent verification (ranking based)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Dynamic Discovery</strong></td>
<td>Automatically detect <code>.claude/skills/</code> when manipulating files</td>
<td>Learning Skill 3-Source Recursion + Blocking Symbolic Link Escape</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Context Saving</strong></td>
<td>(none, body injection)</td>
<td>thin dispatcher + <code>&#x3C;mnemosyne></code> descriptor (body is disk)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>MCP Combined</strong></td>
<td>MCP provides slash command (<code>loadedFrom:mcp</code>)</td>
<td><code>t</code> MCP provides skill <em>query tool</em> + skill consumes tool</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Skill Creation</strong></td>
<td>User Manual</td>
<td>Session → skill extraction with <code>skillify</code>/<code>learner</code>, CRUD with <code>skill</code> metaskill</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Permissions</strong></td>
<td>Skill <code>allowed-tools</code> source-specific verification</td>
<td>Non-skill <strong>Agent <code>disallowedTools</code></strong> + PreToolUse Hook</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Telemetry</strong></td>
<td>5 <code>tengu_*</code> events</td>
<td>(No skill-only telemetry; host delegation)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>In short, the OMC delegates the skill loading mechanism itself to the host (track A) and tops it with (a) context-saving lazy loading (dispatcher/descriptor), (b) self-learning-skill discovery/injection engine (track B), and (c) orchestration metadata (level/pipeline/handoff/keyword priority).</p>
<hr>
<h2>8. Implications of cli-jaw comparison</h2>
<ul>
<li>
<p><strong>Convergence of lazy loading patterns</strong>: cli-jaw fetches the tool schema into <code>ToolSearch</code> on demand, OMC has (a) <code>commands/*.md</code> thin dispatcher reading SKILL.md at call time, and (b) <code>skill-injector</code> injects only <code>&#x3C;mnemosyne></code> descriptor (3000 character budget) instead of body. All three are variations of the same problem called “prompt failure.” In cli-jaw multi-CLI dispatch, the design of advertising each CLI's skill/command catalog as <strong>descriptor+path</strong> instead of the full body and loading the body at the time of selection can be borrowed directly from OMC.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>Dual Track (Static vs. Learning) Separation</strong>: OMC separates “static skills distributed by plugins (track A)” and “learning skills extracted and accumulated at runtime (track B)” into completely different schemas/loaders/injection paths. When cli-jaw promotes PABCD workflow output or channel-specific repetitive patterns to reuse skills, OMC's <code>id/triggers/quality/usageCount</code> schema + <code>project>user</code> priority dedup + trigger scoring is the blueprint for the file-memory based learning layer.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>Discovery's Security Boundary</strong>: OMC finder places blocking symbolic link escapes (<code>isWithinBoundary</code>), realpath dedup, denying path traversal (<code>validateProjectRoot</code>, cwd/HOME boundaries), and stripping role boundary tags (<code>&#x3C;system></code>, etc.) as a first-level concern. cli-jaw, which loads external skills/commands through multi-CLI/multi-channel, can prevent prompt injection and path escape by applying this “descriptor sanitize + path boundary verification” model.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>Clear demarcation of host delegation</strong>: OMC fully delegates the skill <em>loading mechanism</em> to the host (CC) and only adds <em>orchestration semantics</em> (level/pipeline/handoff/keyword priority arrangement) — does not reimplement the core. As cli-jaw is a meta-harness, it maps directly to a division of labor model that respects the native skill loader of each child CLI and standardizes only the dispatch priority (corresponding to OMC's hard-coded <code>priorityOrder</code>) and cross-channel handover (corresponding to <code>handoff</code>/<code>next-skill</code>) on top of it.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr>

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Area</th>
<th>Snapshot</th>
<th>Current</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>Skill format</td>
<td>SKILL.md conventions cited in-body</td>
<td>Marketplace/bundled skill sets evolve per release</td>
</tr>
<tr>

</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h2>Change history</h2>
<ul>
<li>2026-05-29: Created OMC v4.14.4 skill system dimensions. Dual track (bundle = host delegation / learning = self-implementation) structure, plugin.json declarative registration, commands/*.md thin dispatcher, bundle SKILL.md frontmatter exhaustive investigation (level/pipeline/handoff is for OMC only, allowed-tools/paths/context/model is absent = intentional host delegation), learning skill discovery (finder.ts 3-source recursion + symbolic link escape) blocking), parsing (parser.ts required field), loading (loader.ts project>user dedup), matching (trigger scoring), injection (skill-injector.mjs  descriptor + file-based session dedup), skill-MCP combination (t MCP's list/load_local/load_global tool + loadAllSkills shared), priority 3 channels (keyword priorityOrder/specified) Includes 4 items: call/model auto) and pipeline/next-skill/handoff chain, summary table compared to CC, and cli-jaw comparison implications.</li>
</ul>
<h2>Korean corpus (reference)</h2>
<blockquote>
<p>Verbatim KO corpus <code>004_skill-system/04_omc_skill.md</code> for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.</p>
</blockquote>
<h1>oh-my-claudecode (omc) 스킬 시스템</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>170_oh-my-claudecode/</code> — skills installed to Claude Code.</p>
</blockquote>
<blockquote>
<p>이 문서는 <code>Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-claudecode</code>(OMC) v4.14.4 플러그인의 <strong>스킬 시스템</strong> 차원을 소스 기반으로 분석한다. 분석 축은 (1) 스킬 정의/로딩/실행, (2) 스킬 디스커버리, (3) 스킬–MCP 결합, (4) 스킬 우선순위 경로, (5) 프론트매터 계약이다. 비교 기준선은 바닐라 Claude Code 스킬 시스템([[04_cc_skill]])이며, OMC가 호스트에 위임하는 부분과 자체 추가하는 부분을 명확히 구분한다. 상위 동작 맥락은 [[00_omc_overview]] §4·§8.1을 참조.</p>
<p>근거 경로: <code>.claude-plugin/plugin.json</code>, <code>.mcp.json</code>, <code>commands/*.md</code>, <code>skills/*/SKILL.md</code>, <code>hooks/hooks.json</code>, <code>scripts/keyword-detector.mjs</code>, <code>scripts/skill-injector.mjs</code>, <code>src/tools/skills-tools.ts</code>, <code>src/hooks/learner/{loader,finder,parser,constants,types}.ts</code>.</p>
</blockquote>
<hr>
<h2>0. 한눈에: OMC 스킬은 "이중 트랙"이다</h2>
<p>OMC의 가장 중요한 구조적 사실은 <strong>두 개의 완전히 분리된 스킬 트랙</strong>이 공존한다는 점이다. 바닐라 Claude Code([[04_cc_skill]])는 스킬과 slash command를 단일 <code>loadedFrom</code> 분류 체계(<code>bundled</code>/<code>skills</code>/<code>commands_DEPRECATED</code>/<code>plugin</code>)로 통합한 <strong>하나의 memoized 로더</strong>로 관리하지만, OMC는 그렇지 않다.</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>트랙</th>
<th>정체</th>
<th>로딩 주체</th>
<th>정의 위치</th>
<th>프론트매터 스키마</th>
<th>디스커버리</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><strong>A. 번들 스킬</strong> (39개)</td>
<td>플러그인 기능 스킬</td>
<td><strong>호스트(Claude Code)</strong> 가 <code>plugin.json</code>의 <code>skills[]</code>로 로드</td>
<td><code>skills/&#x3C;name>/SKILL.md</code></td>
<td>CC 표준 + OMC 확장(<code>level</code>/<code>pipeline</code>/<code>handoff</code>)</td>
<td>호스트 Skill 도구 + <code>/command</code> + 키워드 Hook</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>B. 학습 스킬</strong> (learned/runtime)</td>
<td>세션에서 추출한 재사용 워크플로</td>
<td><strong>OMC 자체</strong> (<code>src/hooks/learner/</code>)</td>
<td><code>.omc/skills/</code>, <code>~/.omc/skills/</code>, <code>~/.claude/skills/omc-learned/</code></td>
<td>OMC 독자 스키마(<code>id</code>/<code>triggers</code>/<code>quality</code>/<code>usageCount</code>)</td>
<td><code>skill-injector.mjs</code> Hook + <code>t</code> MCP 도구</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>트랙 A는 <strong>호스트 위임</strong>이다. OMC는 <code>plugin.json</code>에 39개 디렉토리를 선언만 하고, SKILL.md 스캐닝·팩토리·조건부 활성화·Skill 도구 노출은 전부 Claude Code 코어가 처리한다([[04_cc_skill]] §스킬 로딩 파이프라인). 트랙 B는 <strong>OMC가 직접 구현한 독자 시스템</strong>으로, <code>learner</code> 디렉토리 전체(finder/parser/loader)와 <code>skill-injector.mjs</code> Hook, <code>t</code> MCP의 3개 스킬 도구가 이를 떠받친다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    subgraph TrackA["트랙 A: 번들 스킬 (호스트 위임)"]
        PJ["plugin.json skills[39]"] --> CCLoader["Claude Code SKILL.md 스캐너&#x3C;br/>(04_cc_skill 참조)"]
        CCLoader --> CCTool["호스트 Skill 도구 / /command"]
        CMD["commands/*.md (얇은 디스패처)"] --> CCTool
    end
    subgraph Inject["키워드 자동 라우팅 (UserPromptSubmit Hook)"]
        KW["keyword-detector.mjs&#x3C;br/>매직 키워드 → [MAGIC KEYWORD]"]
        SI["skill-injector.mjs&#x3C;br/>학습 스킬 디스크립터 주입"]
    end
    subgraph TrackB["트랙 B: 학습 스킬 (OMC 자체 구현)"]
        FIND["finder.ts: 3-소스 재귀 탐색"]
        PARSE["parser.ts: 자체 YAML + 필수필드 검증"]
        LOAD["loader.ts: project>user 우선순위 dedup"]
        MCP["t MCP: list/load_local/load_global"]
        FIND --> PARSE --> LOAD --> MCP
    end
    User["사용자 프롬프트"] --> KW
    User --> SI
    KW -->|읽어라| CCTool
    SI -->|디스크립터만| LOAD
    Skillify["skillify/learner 스킬"] -->|.md 작성| FIND
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>1. 트랙 A — 번들 스킬: 호스트 위임의 표면</h2>
<h3>1.1 plugin.json의 선언적 등록</h3>
<p>OMC는 스킬 로더를 <strong>재구현하지 않는다</strong>. <code>.claude-plugin/plugin.json</code>이 39개 스킬 디렉토리를 배열로 선언할 뿐이다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-json">// .claude-plugin/plugin.json
"skills": [
  "./skills/ai-slop-cleaner/", "./skills/ask/", "./skills/autopilot/",
  ... 39개 디렉토리 ...
  "./skills/wiki/", "./skills/writer-memory/"
],
"mcpServers": "./.mcp.json",
"commands": "./commands/"
</code></pre>
<p>이 시점부터 SKILL.md의 스캔·파싱·팩토리·<code>Skill</code> 도구 노출·<code>/command</code> 등록은 모두 호스트인 Claude Code 몫이다. 즉 [[04_cc_skill]]에서 분석한 <code>bootstrapFunction006</code>(SKILL.md 스캐너), <code>bootstrapFunction005</code>(팩토리), <code>loadedFrom: "plugin"</code> 분류, 모델 노출 필터링이 <strong>그대로 OMC 번들 스킬에 적용된다</strong>. OMC 측 소스에는 SKILL.md를 읽어 커맨드 객체로 만드는 코드가 존재하지 않는다(트랙 B의 학습 스킬 로더는 별개 — §3).</p>
<h3>1.2 <code>commands/*.md</code> = 컨텍스트 절약형 얇은 디스패처</h3>
<p><code>commands/</code> 디렉토리의 27개 <code>.md</code>는 거의 전부 <strong>본문 1줄짜리 디스패처</strong>다. 핵심 의도는 "전체 스킬 설명을 매 세션 프롬프트에 싣지 않기"다 — 이는 [[04_cc_skill]]의 <code>prompt</code> 타입 커맨드가 SKILL.md 본문을 그대로 주입하는 것과 대비되는, <strong>명시적 지연 로딩</strong> 패턴이다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-markdown">&#x3C;!-- commands/ccg.md -->
---
description: ""
---
# OMC ccg
This compatibility command keeps `/oh-my-claudecode:ccg` available without
loading the full `ccg` skill description in every Claude Code session.
## Dispatch
1. Read the full bundled skill instructions ...: `skills/ccg/SKILL.md`.
2. Follow that SKILL.md exactly, treating the user's arguments as:
   $ARGUMENTS
</code></pre>
<p>명령은 슬래시 노출용 진입점일 뿐이고, 실제 행동은 SKILL.md에 있으며 <strong>호출 시점에야 읽힌다</strong>. <code>description: ""</code>로 비워 호스트가 프롬프트에 설명을 싣지 않게 하고, 본문이 모델에게 "필요하면 SKILL.md를 읽어라"고 지시한다. cli-jaw의 <code>ToolSearch</code> 지연 스키마 로딩과 동일 문제(프롬프트 비대화)에 대한 다른 해법이다(§7).</p>
<h3>1.3 번들 SKILL.md 프론트매터 계약</h3>
<p>39개 번들 SKILL.md의 프론트매터 필드를 전수 조사한 빈도(소스: <code>skills/*/SKILL.md</code>):</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>필드</th>
<th align="right">출현</th>
<th>호스트(CC) 인식?</th>
<th>의미</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>name</code></td>
<td align="right">39</td>
<td>✅ ([[04_cc_skill]])</td>
<td>표시 이름</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>description</code></td>
<td align="right">39</td>
<td>✅</td>
<td>스킬 설명(모델 자동 호출 근거)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>level</code></td>
<td align="right">31</td>
<td>❌ <strong>OMC 전용</strong></td>
<td>스킬 무게(1=경량 ~ 7=자기개선). 호스트가 무시, OMC 규약상 의미만 가짐</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>argument-hint</code></td>
<td align="right">18</td>
<td>✅</td>
<td>인자 힌트</td>
</tr>
<tr>

<td align="right">5</td>
<td>✅</td>
<td>별칭 (예: <code>skillify</code>의 <code>aliases: [learner]</code>)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>triggers</code></td>
<td align="right">3</td>
<td>❌ <strong>OMC 전용</strong></td>
<td>OMC 키워드/주입 트리거 배열(<code>wiki</code>/<code>deep-dive</code> 등)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>pipeline</code></td>
<td align="right">3</td>
<td>❌ <strong>OMC 전용</strong></td>
<td>다단계 스킬 체인 정의(§5.3)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>handoff</code> / <code>handoff-policy</code></td>
<td align="right">3 / 2</td>
<td>❌ <strong>OMC 전용</strong></td>
<td>단계 산출물 경로 + 이양 정책</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>next-skill</code> / <code>next-skill-args</code></td>
<td align="right">1 / 1</td>
<td>❌ <strong>OMC 전용</strong></td>
<td>다음 스킬·인자 지정</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>user-invocable</code></td>
<td align="right">1</td>
<td>✅</td>
<td><code>omc-reference</code>만 <code>false</code>(모델 전용, /command 숨김)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>scope</code> / <code>role</code> / <code>agent</code></td>
<td align="right">각 1</td>
<td>부분</td>
<td>보조 메타</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p><strong>핵심 관찰</strong>: 바닐라 CC 스킬의 강력한 frontmatter 필드들 — <code>allowed-tools</code>, <code>paths</code>(조건부 활성화), <code>context: fork</code>, <code>disable-model-invocation</code>, <code>model</code>, <code>version</code>, <code>when_to_use</code>, <code>hooks</code>, <code>effort</code> — 은 <strong>번들 SKILL.md에 단 하나도 등장하지 않는다</strong>(검증: <code>grep -lE '^allowed-tools:|^paths:|^context:|...' skills/*/SKILL.md</code> → NONE). OMC는 CC의 풍부한 스킬 frontmatter 능력을 <strong>사용하지 않고</strong>, 대신 <code>level</code>/<code>pipeline</code>/<code>handoff</code> 같은 오케스트레이션 메타데이터를 자체 규약으로 얹는다. 권한 제어(읽기전용 등)는 스킬이 아니라 **에이전트 frontmatter의 <code>disallowedTools</code>**로 처리한다([[00_omc_overview]] §3).</p>
<h3>1.4 의도적 부재 — 조건부 활성화/fork/model 오버라이드</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>CC 스킬 기능([[04_cc_skill]])</th>
<th>OMC 번들 스킬</th>
<th>대체/위임</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>paths</code> glob 조건부 활성화</td>
<td><strong>부재</strong></td>
<td>키워드 Hook(<code>keyword-detector.mjs</code>)으로 동적 트리거(§5)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>context: fork</code> 별도 에이전트 실행</td>
<td><strong>부재</strong></td>
<td>Task 서브에이전트 + team MCP로 격리([[00_omc_overview]] §3·§6)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>frontmatter <code>model</code>/<code>effort</code> 오버라이드</td>
<td><strong>부재</strong></td>
<td><code>&#x3C;model_routing></code> 규약 + 에이전트별 <code>model</code> 티어([[00_omc_overview]] §2·§3)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>allowed-tools</code> 자동승인</td>
<td><strong>부재</strong></td>
<td><code>PreToolUse</code>/<code>PermissionRequest</code> Hook([[00_omc_overview]] §7)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>${CLAUDE_SKILL_DIR}</code> 변수 치환</td>
<td>호스트 위임</td>
<td>호스트 CC가 처리(OMC 미구현)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>이는 OMC가 스킬 시스템 자체를 호스트에 위임하고, 자신은 그 위에 <strong>오케스트레이션 시맨틱</strong>(레벨/파이프라인/키워드)만 얹는 설계의 직접적 귀결이다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>2. 번들 스킬 카탈로그 (level 기준)</h2>
<p><code>level</code> 프론트매터로 분류한 주요 번들 스킬(39개 중 발췌, 소스: 각 <code>SKILL.md</code>):</p>
<table>
