</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p><code>config-stop-callback &#x3C;type></code>이 <code>file/telegram/discord/slack</code>을 받는다는 점(<code>:251-252</code>)이 핵심이다 — 즉 CLI는 <strong>알림 게이트웨이(§4)의 설정 진입점</strong>이기도 하다.</p>
<h3>3.2 HUD = statusline 클라이언트 표면</h3>
<p><code>src/hud/index.ts</code>는 <code>#!/usr/bin/env node</code> 실행 파일로, <strong>Claude Code statusline 명령</strong>으로 등록되어 호스트가 넘기는 <strong>stdin JSON</strong>을 받아 한 줄 상태표시줄을 렌더한다(<code>src/hud/index.ts:1-7</code> 주석: "Statusline command that visualizes oh-my-claudecode state. Receives stdin JSON from Claude Code and outputs formatted statusline"). <code>src/hud/stdin.ts</code>의 <code>readStdin</code>/<code>getContextPercent</code>/<code>getModelId</code>/<code>getRateLimitsFromStdin</code>이 호스트 페이로드를 파싱하고, <code>src/hud/omc-state.ts</code>가 <code>.omc/</code>의 ralph/ultrawork/prd/autopilot 상태를 읽어 진행도를 그린다.</p>
<p>HUD는 <strong>단방향(호스트→OMC) stdin 표면</strong>이다. 양방향 제어 채널이 아니라, [[06_cc_surface]]의 "stdin/stdout이 유일한 접근면"을 statusline 슬롯에서 재활용한 읽기 표면이다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>4. 클라이언트 표면 ③ 원격 채널 게이트웨이 (알림 + 양방향 회신)</h2>
<p>OMC가 호스트에 더하는 가장 독특한 표면이다. [[06_cc_surface]] §5.5는 Claude Code의 <code>CONTINUITY_REMOTE_CONTROL</code>을 "실험적·미완성"으로 평가했는데, OMC는 <strong>완성된 형태의 원격 알림 + 회신 주입</strong>을 자체 구현한다. 단 이것은 에이전트를 직접 조종하는 RPC가 아니라, <strong>tmux 페인에 텍스트를 흘려넣는 채팅 채널 브리지</strong>다.</p>
<h3>4.1 아웃바운드: notifications/dispatcher</h3>
<p><code>src/notifications/dispatcher.ts</code>(주석 <code>:4</code>: "Discord, Telegram, Slack, webhook")가 알림을 외부 채널로 보낸다. URL/대상 검증을 엄격히 한다:</p>
<ul>
<li>Discord webhook은 <code>discord.com</code>/<code>discordapp.com</code> HTTPS만 허용(<code>validateDiscordUrl</code>, <code>:83-86</code>), Discord Bot API 경로는 token+channelId 분리(<code>:191-209</code>).</li>
<li>Slack webhook은 <code>hooks.slack.com</code>(또는 그 서브도메인) HTTPS만 허용(<code>validateSlackUrl</code>, <code>:111-117</code>).</li>
<li>제네릭 webhook은 HTTPS 강제(<code>:125</code>).</li>
</ul>
<p>발화 시점은 stop hook 콜백(<code>omc config-stop-callback</code>)·알림 프로파일(<code>config-notify-profile</code>)로 연결되어, "턴 종료/완료/대기" 같은 라이프사이클 이벤트를 사용자 채널로 푸시한다.</p>
<h3>4.2 인바운드: reply-listener 데몬</h3>
<p><code>src/notifications/reply-listener.ts</code>는 <strong>양방향 채널</strong>을 완성하는 백그라운드 데몬이다(주석 <code>:1-17</code>):</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>Slack</strong>: <code>src/notifications/slack-socket.ts</code>의 Socket Mode 클라이언트를 통해 WebSocket으로 메시지를 받는다. 프로토콜은 <code>apps.connections.open</code>(app-level token)으로 WSS URL 획득 → WebSocket 연결 → envelope 수신·ack → 지수 백오프 재연결(<code>slack-socket.ts:1-26</code>). Node 20+ 내장 WebSocket을 써서 무거운 SDK 의존을 피한다.</li>
<li><strong>Discord/Telegram</strong>: HTTPS 폴링.</li>
<li>수신 메시지는 2단계 살균(<code>sanitizeReplyInput</code> + <code>sanitizeForTmux</code>) 후, <code>session-registry.ts</code>로 메시지ID↔tmux 페인ID를 매핑해(<code>lookupByMessageId</code>) 해당 페인이 비어있는지 확인하고 <code>sendToPane()</code>로 회신 텍스트를 주입한다.</li>
</ul>
<p>보안 장치가 두텁다(<code>reply-listener.ts:1-17</code>, <code>session-registry.ts</code>): 상태/PID/로그 파일 0600 권한, 토큰은 환경변수가 아닌 상태 파일에 저장, 설정된 user ID(Discord)/chat ID(Telegram)만 주입 허용, Slack HMAC-SHA256 서명 + 5분 타임스탬프 리플레이 방지(<code>slack-socket.ts</code>의 <code>MAX_TIMESTAMP_AGE_SECONDS = 300</code>), 레이트 리밋. 즉 "원격에서 에이전트에 한 줄 답을 보낸다"는 작은 표면조차 인증·살균·리플레이 방어로 봉인한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant CC as Claude Code (tmux pane)
    participant Disp as dispatcher.ts
    participant Chan as Slack/Discord/Telegram
    participant User as 사용자(모바일)
    participant RL as reply-listener 데몬
    participant Reg as session-registry.ts

    CC->>Disp: stop hook 콜백(완료/대기 이벤트)
    Disp->>Chan: outbound 알림 (HTTPS/webhook)
    Disp->>Reg: messageId ↔ paneId 매핑 기록
    Chan-->>User: 알림 표시
    User-->>Chan: 채널에 회신 텍스트
    Chan-->>RL: Socket Mode(WS) / polling 수신
    RL->>RL: 인증(userId/chatId, HMAC) + 2단계 살균
    RL->>Reg: lookupByMessageId → paneId
    RL->>CC: sendToPane() 텍스트 주입
</code></pre>
<h3>4.3 auto-resume 데몬</h3>
<p><code>src/features/rate-limit-wait/daemon.ts</code>는 레이트리밋을 모니터하다가 리셋되면 <strong>블록된 Claude Code 세션을 tmux에서 자동 재개</strong>하는 데몬이다(<code>:1-13</code>, <code>scanForBlockedPanes</code>/<code>sendResumeSequence</code>). <code>omc wait</code>/<code>omc daemon</code>/<code>omc detect</code>(§3.1)가 이를 제어한다. 이 역시 wire protocol이 아니라 <strong>tmux 페인 키 입력 시뮬레이션</strong> 기반의 "외부에서 호스트를 깨우는" 표면이다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>5. 세션 표면</h2>
<h3>5.1 OMC는 호스트의 세션 영속을 읽는다(쓰지 않는다)</h3>
<p>OMC는 자체 대화 세션 스토어를 만들지 않는다. [[06_cc_surface]] §2.3의 <code>~/.claude/projects/{hash}/*.jsonl</code> 트랜스크립트를 <strong>읽기 전용으로 소비</strong>한다:</p>
<ul>
<li><code>src/features/session-history-search/index.ts</code>가 <code>~/.claude/projects/{encodeProjectPath(root)}</code>의 <code>.jsonl</code>/<code>.json</code>을 <code>project-transcript</code>로, 레거시 <code>~/.claude/transcripts</code>를 <code>legacy-transcript</code>로, OMC 자체 <code>agent-replay-*.jsonl</code>을 <code>omc-session-replay</code>로 스캔한다(<code>:119</code>·<code>:155-193</code>·<code>:350</code>).</li>
<li>이를 <code>src/tools/session-history-tools.ts</code>의 <code>session_search</code> MCP 도구가 노출한다 — "Search prior local session history and transcript artifacts. Returns structured JSON with session ids, timestamps, source paths, and matching excerpts"(<code>session-history-tools.ts:23</code>). <code>query/limit/sessionId/since/project(=all 가능)/caseSensitive/contextChars</code> 파라미터를 받는다.</li>
<li>CLI에서는 <code>omc session search</code>(§3.1, <code>src/cli/index.ts:1138</code>)로 같은 기능을 제공한다.</li>
</ul>
<h3>5.2 OMC 고유 세션 상태는 <code>.omc/</code>에 격리</h3>
<p>호스트 대화 세션과 별개로, OMC의 "실행 세션 상태"는 <code>.omc/state/sessions/{sessionId}/</code>에 격리된다([[00_omc_overview]] §8.2). <code>src/tools/resume-session.ts</code>는 호스트의 Task 도구를 확장할 수 없기 때문에(주석 <code>:6-8</code>: "Claude Code's native Task tool cannot be extended"), <strong>백그라운드 에이전트 세션의 컨텍스트를 꺼내 다음 Task 위임용 continuation 프롬프트로 재조립</strong>하는 우회 표면이다(<code>ResumeSessionInput</code>/<code>ResumeSessionOutput</code>). 즉 OMC의 "세션 재개"는 호스트의 세션 객체를 잇는 것이 아니라, <strong>자체 상태에서 프롬프트를 합성해 새 위임을 만드는</strong> 방식이다.</p>
<h3>5.3 세션 표면 요약: 3계층 분리</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>계층</th>
<th>소유자</th>
<th>위치</th>
<th>OMC의 접근</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>대화 트랜스크립트</td>
<td>호스트(Claude Code)</td>
<td><code>~/.claude/projects/{hash}/*.jsonl</code></td>
<td>읽기 전용(session_search/resume)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>실행 모드 세션 상태</td>
<td>OMC</td>
<td><code>.omc/state/sessions/{sessionId}/</code></td>
<td>읽기·쓰기(atomic+lock)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>채널↔페인 매핑 세션</td>
<td>OMC</td>
<td>global OMC state(JSONL, 0600)</td>
<td>reply-listener 전용</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>호스트가 대화 영속을 책임지므로([[06_cc_surface]] §2.3), OMC는 세션 <strong>서버</strong>를 둘 이유가 없다. 다중 디바이스 동기화·세션 서버는 호스트와 마찬가지로 부재하며, 원격 접근은 §4의 채널 브리지로 대체된다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>6. 의도적 부재 정리</h2>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>표면</th>
<th>상태</th>
<th>이유 / 위임처</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>라이브 제어 wire protocol(JSON-RPC/RPC)</td>
<td><strong>부재</strong></td>
<td>호스트 CLI가 stdin/stdout 단일 접근면([[06_cc_surface]] §1). 직접 만들면 호스트 인증·보안 중복</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>HTTP/SSE/WS 에이전트 서버</td>
<td><strong>부재</strong></td>
<td>MCP는 전부 stdio(<code>standalone-server.ts:112</code>, <code>team-server.ts:645</code>). 인바운드 리스너는 알림 채널뿐</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>웹 UI</td>
<td><strong>부재</strong></td>
<td><code>.html</code>/<code>react-dom</code>/webview 0건. 표면이 터미널·채널로 수렴</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>VS Code / JetBrains 확장</td>
<td><strong>부재</strong></td>
<td><code>vscode</code>/<code>jetbrains</code> 코드 매치 0건. IDE 통합은 호스트의 thin-wrapper에 위임([[06_cc_surface]] §5.4)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>자체 대화 세션 서버</td>
<td><strong>부재</strong></td>
<td>호스트 <code>~/.claude/projects/*.jsonl</code>을 읽기로 소비(§5.1)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>SDK(프로그래매틱)</strong></td>
<td><strong>존재(고유)</strong></td>
<td><code>createOmcSession</code> over Claude Agent SDK — 호스트엔 없는 표면(§2)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>MCP 서버(stdio)</strong></td>
<td><strong>존재</strong></td>
<td><code>t</code>/team/in-process 3종, 전부 stdio(§1.2)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>원격 채널 게이트웨이</strong></td>
<td><strong>존재(고유)</strong></td>
<td>Discord/Telegram/Slack + 양방향 reply-listener(§4)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>HUD statusline 표면</strong></td>
<td><strong>존재</strong></td>
<td>호스트 stdin JSON 소비(§3.2)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>OMC의 표면 철학은 <strong>"새 서버를 세우지 않고, 호스트가 이미 여는 구멍(stdio MCP, statusline stdin, Task 위임, tmux 페인)에 표면을 끼워 넣는다"</strong> 로 요약된다. 라이브 제어가 필요할 때조차 RPC 대신 tmux 페인 주입(§4.2)을 택한 점이 일관된 설계 신호다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>7. 호스트(Claude Code) 대비 표면 델타</h2>
<table>

<tr>
<td>앱-서버 프로토콜</td>
<td>없음(CLI 단일 프로세스)</td>

</tr>
<tr>
<td>SDK</td>
<td><strong>없음</strong>(subprocess만)</td>

<td>호스트=MCP 클라이언트</td>

<tr>

</tr>

<tr>

<td>(호스트 기본)</td>

</tr>
<tr>
<td>auto-resume</td>
<td>없음</td>
<td>rate-limit 데몬으로 블록 세션 재개(§4.3)</td>
</tr>

</table>

<h2>8. 재사용 seam</h2>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>seam</th>
<th>소스</th>
<th>이유</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>createOmcSession</code> 빌더</td>
<td><code>src/index.ts</code></td>
<td>호스트 SDK 위에 프롬프트·에이전트·MCP·툴 정책을 조립하는 깔끔한 어댑터 패턴</td>
</tr>

<td><code>src/mcp/standalone-server.ts</code></td>

<hr>
<h2>9. 결합 리스크</h2>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>리스크</th>
<th>설명</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>호스트 종속</td>
<td>라이브 제어·인증·스트리밍이 전부 호스트 것이라, 호스트 API 변경(예: statusline stdin 스키마, Task 비확장성) 시 표면이 깨진다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>stdio 단일 전송</td>
<td>원격/네트워크 MCP가 불가 — 모든 도구 서버가 같은 머신 자식 프로세스여야 함</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>tmux 결합</td>
<td>reply-listener·auto-resume·team이 tmux 페인 주입에 의존 → tmux 없는 환경(순수 IDE/CI)에서 원격·재개 표면 작동 불가</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>채널 보안 표면</td>
<td>외부 채팅에서 페인에 텍스트를 주입하므로, 살균·인증·리플레이 방어가 한 군데라도 뚫리면 명령 주입 위험</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>SDK ↔ 플러그인 이중성</td>
<td>동일 동작이 SDK 경로(in-process MCP)와 플러그인 경로(stdio bridge)로 갈라져, 표면별 동작 일관성 유지 비용 발생</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>세션 서버 부재</td>
<td>다중 디바이스 동기화·중앙 세션 서버가 없어, 협업은 git worktree+채널 알림으로만 가능</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<hr>
<h2>10. 핵심 파일 목록</h2>
<h3>앱-서버 / MCP</h3>
<ul>
<li><code>.mcp.json</code> — <code>t</code> stdio 서버 등록</li>
<li><code>src/mcp/standalone-server.ts</code> — <code>t</code> 서버(stdio), <code>bridge/mcp-server.cjs</code>로 번들</li>
<li><code>src/mcp/team-server.ts</code> — team 서버(stdio), <code>bridge/team-mcp.cjs</code></li>
<li><code>src/mcp/omc-tools-server.ts</code> — in-process MCP(<code>createSdkMcpServer</code>)</li>
<li><code>src/mcp/servers.ts</code> — 외부 MCP(exa/context7/playwright/...) 설정 조립</li>
</ul>
<h3>SDK / CLI / HUD</h3>
<ul>
<li><code>src/index.ts</code> — <code>createOmcSession</code> 등 라이브러리 export (<code>package.json</code> main/exports)</li>
<li><code>src/cli/index.ts</code> — <code>omc</code> CLI(launch/ask/config/install/wait/session/teleport...)</li>
<li><code>src/hud/index.ts</code>, <code>src/hud/stdin.ts</code> — statusline 클라이언트 표면</li>
</ul>
<h3>원격 채널 게이트웨이</h3>
<ul>
<li><code>src/notifications/dispatcher.ts</code> — 아웃바운드(Discord/Telegram/Slack/webhook)</li>
<li><code>src/notifications/slack-socket.ts</code> — Slack Socket Mode WS 클라이언트</li>
<li><code>src/notifications/reply-listener.ts</code> — 인바운드 회신 데몬 → tmux 주입</li>
<li><code>src/notifications/session-registry.ts</code> — messageId↔paneId 매핑</li>
<li><code>src/features/rate-limit-wait/daemon.ts</code> — auto-resume 데몬</li>
</ul>
<h3>세션</h3>
<ul>
<li><code>src/features/session-history-search/index.ts</code> — 호스트 트랜스크립트 스캔</li>
<li><code>src/tools/session-history-tools.ts</code> — <code>session_search</code> MCP 도구</li>
<li><code>src/tools/resume-session.ts</code> — 세션 continuation 프롬프트 합성</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<h2>cli-jaw 비교 시사점</h2>
<ul>
<li><strong>앱-서버 부재의 대칭점</strong>: OMC는 라이브 제어 wire protocol을 호스트에 위임하고 자기 표면을 전부 stdio MCP·statusline stdin·tmux 페인 같은 "호스트가 이미 연 구멍"에 끼운다. cli-jaw는 멀티-CLI 디스패치 메타-하니스로서 여러 CLI를 묶는 <strong>상위 디스패처</strong>인데, OMC의 "서버를 세우지 않고 호스트 라이프사이클 슬롯에 표면을 끼우는" 패턴은 cli-jaw가 각 하위 CLI에 침습 없이 붙을 때(서버 신설 대신 stdio/statusline/tmux 활용) 직접 참고할 만한 최소-결합 전략이다.</li>
<li><strong>양방향 채널 게이트웨이 vs 멀티채널</strong>: cli-jaw의 multi-channel(텔레그램 등 다채널 입출력)과 OMC의 dispatcher+reply-listener는 같은 문제를 푼다 — "원격에서 에이전트에 한 줄 명령/회신을 흘려넣기". 다만 OMC는 이를 <strong>RPC가 아니라 tmux 페인 주입 + messageId↔paneId 세션 레지스트리 + HMAC/리플레이/살균</strong>으로 구현한다. cli-jaw가 채널→실행 매핑을 안전하게 영속·인증할 때 <code>session-registry.ts</code>(JSONL+lock+0600)와 2단계 살균은 그대로 차용 가능한 청사진이다.</li>
<li><strong>세션 표면 = 파일 메모리의 친척</strong>: OMC는 세션 서버 없이 호스트 트랜스크립트(<code>~/.claude/projects/*.jsonl</code>)를 <strong>읽기 어댑터</strong>(session_search)로 질의하고 자체 실행 상태는 <code>.omc/</code>에 둔다. cli-jaw의 file memory 설계와 철학이 같다 — 중앙 DB/세션 서버 대신 파일을 단일 소스로 삼고 구조화 질의를 얹는다. "호스트 영속을 읽고, 자기 상태만 쓰는" 분리는 cli-jaw가 하위 CLI들의 이력을 침습 없이 통합 검색할 때 유효한 모델이다.</li>
<li><strong>SDK 표면 + PABCD</strong>: OMC의 <code>createOmcSession</code>은 systemPrompt·agents·MCP·tool 정책을 한 번에 조립해 호스트 SDK에 펼치는 "config builder"다. cli-jaw의 PABCD(Plan-Act-Build-Check-Deliver) 단계별 에이전트/도구 구성을 프로그래매틱하게 직조할 때, OMC처럼 <strong>단계별 옵션 묶음을 빌더로 합성해 하위 CLI(또는 SDK)에 주입</strong>하는 패턴은 디스패치 로직과 실행 표면을 깔끔히 분리하는 참고 설계가 된다.</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<h2>snapshot_to_current 델타</h2>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>

<td>APIs/flags evolve per release — re-verify on upgrade</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Host delegation</td>
<td>Documented in this checkout</td>
<td>Binary-only drift for closed-source CLIs</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h2>변경 기록</h2>
<ul>
<li>2026-05-29: OMC v4.14.4의 앱-서버/클라이언트/세션 표면을 소스 기반으로 분석. 라이브 제어 wire protocol·웹 UI·IDE 확장·자체 세션 서버의 의도적 부재(호스트 위임)를 근거(<code>standalone-server.ts:112</code>, <code>team-server.ts:645</code>, grep 0건)와 함께 정리. 호스트엔 없는 OMC 고유 표면 3종 — SDK(<code>createOmcSession</code> over Claude Agent SDK), stdio MCP 서버(t/team/in-process), 원격 채널 게이트웨이(Discord/Telegram/Slack + 양방향 reply-listener + auto-resume 데몬) — 을 파일·라인 인용으로 문서화. 세션 표면 3계층 분리(호스트 트랜스크립트 읽기 / <code>.omc/</code> 실행상태 / 채널↔페인 매핑)와 cli-jaw 비교 시사점 4항목 포함.</li>
</ul>
25:["$","$L30","20-axis-06-surface",{"id":"20-axis-06-surface","order":23,"tier":"deep","title":"Axis 06: App surfaces","description":"006_app-server-client-surfaces/06_omc_surface.md","lang":"en","badge":"AXIS","children":["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$48"}}]}]
49:T1315a,<h2>Overview</h2>
<p><strong>Axis 07: Sandbox &#x26; policy</strong> — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:</p>
<ul>
<li>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>170_oh-my-claudecode/</code> — sandbox and execution policy.</p>
</blockquote>
</li>
<li>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 대상</strong>: <code>Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-claudecode</code> v4.14.4 (Claude Code <strong>플러그인</strong>)</p>
</blockquote>
</li>
<li>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>결론 한 줄</strong>: OMC는 OS-레벨 샌드박스(seatbelt/bwrap/seccomp)를 <strong>스스로 구현하지 않는다</strong>. 프로세스 격리·네트워크 차단·파일시스템 접근 제어는 전적으로 호스트인 [[07_cc_sandbox|Claude Code]]에 위임하고, OMC가 더하는 것은 (1) 호스트 권한 결정을 자동화하는 <code>PermissionRequest</code> 핸들러, (2) 애플리케이션-레벨 보안 토글(`OMC_SECURITY</p>
</blockquote>
</li>
<li>OMC가 [[00_omc_overview]]에서 본 바와 같이 자체 에이전트 런타임이 아니라 플러그인이라는 사실은 이 차원에서 가장 결정적이다. 바닐라 Claude Code의 <code>MA</code>(sandbox manager) 객체, <code>sandbox-exec -p</code> 프로파일, <code>bwrap --unshare-net</code>, <code>dangerouslyDisableSandbox</code> 도구 플래그([[07_cc_sandbox]] §1~§8)는 **호스트 코어</li>
<li>근거 경로: <code>SECURITY.md</code>, <code>src/lib/security-config.ts</code>, <code>src/hooks/permission-handler/index.ts</code>, <code>src/tools/ast-tools.ts</code>, <code>bridge/gyoshu_bridge.py</code>, <code>src/team/permissions.ts</code>, <code>src/team/git-worktree.ts</code>, <code>src/team/tmux-session.ts</code>, `src/team/m</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<ul>
<li>grep -riE "sandbox-exec|seatbelt|bwrap|bubblewrap|seccomp|landlock|</li>
<li>sandbox-runtime|--unshare|dangerouslyDisableSandbox"</li>
<li>src bridge scripts hooks   →  (결과 없음)</li>
<li><code>package.json</code> 의존성에 <code>@anthropic-ai/sandbox-runtime</code>(호스트가 seccomp BPF/<code>unix-block.bpf</code>를 로드하는 패키지, [[07_cc_sandbox]] §3.4)이 <strong>없다</strong>. OMC는 <code>@anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk</code>와 <code>@anthropic-ai/sdk</code>에만 의존한다(<code>package.json</code>).</li>
<li><code>SECURITY.md:124</code>가 이를 자인한다: <strong>"No OS-level process sandbox · Severity: Medium · Python blocklist provides defense-in-depth; recommend OS-level isolation for untrusted code"</strong>.</li>
<li><code>SECURITY.md:66</code>: "OS-level process isolation is recommended for untrusted code execution." — 즉 OMC 자신은 OS 격리를 제공하지 않으며 사용자/호스트에게 위임한다고 명시.</li>
</ul>
<h2>Topics covered</h2>
<ul>
<li>

</li>

</ul>

<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h1>oh-my-claudecode (omc) sandbox / execution policy</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>Analysis snapshot</strong>: <code>170_oh-my-claudecode/</code> — sandbox and execution policy.</p>
</blockquote>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>Analysis target</strong>: <code>Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-claudecode</code> v4.14.4 (Claude Code <strong>plugin</strong>)
<strong>One line of conclusion</strong>: OMC <strong>does not implement</strong> an OS-level sandbox (seatbelt/bwrap/seccomp) itself. Process isolation, network blocking, and file system access control are entirely delegated to the host [[07_cc_sandbox|Claude Code]], and what OMC adds is (1) a <code>PermissionRequest</code> handler that automates host permission determination, (2) an application-level security toggle (<code>OMC_SECURITY</code>), (3) git worktree + tmux-based worker <strong>task isolation</strong>, (4) Python REPL language-level blocklist, (5) It is only <strong>prompt-type advisory permission</strong>.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>The fact that OMC is a plug-in rather than its own agent runtime, as seen in [[00_omc_overview]], is most critical at this level. Vanilla Claude Code's <code>MA</code> (sandbox manager) object, <code>sandbox-exec -p</code> profile, <code>bwrap --unshare-net</code>, and <code>dangerouslyDisableSandbox</code> tool flags ([[07_cc_sandbox]] §1 through §8) are <strong>properties of the host core</strong> and have no counterparts in the OMC source tree.</p>
<p>Base path: <code>SECURITY.md</code>, <code>src/lib/security-config.ts</code>, <code>src/hooks/permission-handler/index.ts</code>, <code>src/tools/ast-tools.ts</code>, <code>bridge/gyoshu_bridge.py</code>, <code>src/team/permissions.ts</code>, <code>src/team/git-worktree.ts</code>, <code>src/team/tmux-session.ts</code>, <code>src/team/model-contract.ts</code>, <code>bridge/runtime-cli.cjs</code>, <code>src/cli/launch.ts</code>, <code>scripts/pre-tool-enforcer.mjs</code>, <code>package.json</code>, <code>CLAUDE.md</code>.</p>
<hr>
<h2>0. Intentional absence — evidence of “host delegation”</h2>
<p>The absence of an OS sandbox is verified as a source, not as an estimate.</p>
<pre><code>grep -riE "sandbox-exec|seatbelt|bwrap|bubblewrap|seccomp|landlock|
          sandbox-runtime|--unshare|dangerouslyDisableSandbox"
          src bridge scripts hooks   →  (결과 없음)
</code></pre>
<ul>
<li><code>@anthropic-ai/sandbox-runtime</code> (a package that the host loads seccomp BPF/<code>unix-block.bpf</code>, [[07_cc_sandbox]] §3.4) is **missing} in the <code>package.json</code> dependency. OMC relies only on <code>@anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk</code> and <code>@anthropic-ai/sdk</code> (<code>package.json</code>).</li>
<li><code>SECURITY.md:124</code> acknowledges this: <strong>"No OS-level process sandbox · Severity: Medium · Python blocklist provides defense-in-depth; recommend OS-level isolation for untrusted code"</strong>.</li>
<li><code>SECURITY.md:66</code>: "OS-level process isolation is recommended for untrusted code execution." — that is, the OMC itself states that it does not provide OS isolation and delegates it to the user/host.</li>
</ul>
<p>Therefore, this document does not redundantly describe the host level ([[07_cc_sandbox]]), but deals only with the execution policy that OMC actually implements on the plug-in surface** on a source basis.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    subgraph Host["Claude Code 코어 (OS 샌드박스 소유자)"]
        MA["MA sandbox manager&#x3C;br/>sandbox-exec / bwrap / seccomp&#x3C;br/>(07_cc_sandbox)"]
        PermFlow["네이티브 permission 흐름&#x3C;br/>allow/deny/ask"]
    end
    subgraph OMC["OMC 플러그인 (실행 정책 레이어)"]
        PH["PermissionRequest Hook&#x3C;br/>permission-handler/index.ts"]
        PTE["PreToolUse enforcer&#x3C;br/>pre-tool-enforcer.mjs"]
        SEC["security-config.ts&#x3C;br/>OMC_SECURITY=strict"]
        PY["gyoshu_bridge.py&#x3C;br/>Python 언어-레벨 블록"]
        AST["ast-tools.ts&#x3C;br/>restrictToolPaths"]
        TP["team/permissions.ts&#x3C;br/>advisory(프롬프트) 권한"]
    end
    subgraph Iso["작업 격리 백엔드 (OS격리 아님)"]
        WT["git worktree&#x3C;br/>.omc/team/{t}/worktrees/{w}"]
        TMUX["tmux 세션&#x3C;br/>omc-team-{t}-{w}"]
        CLI["외부 CLI 워커&#x3C;br/>--dangerously-skip-permissions 등"]
    end
    PermFlow -.PermissionRequest.-> PH
    Host -.PreToolUse.-> PTE
    PH -->|allow safe cmd| PermFlow
    PTE -->|deny 라우팅 위반| PermFlow
    SEC --> PY
    SEC --> AST
    SEC --> CLI
    TP --> WT
    WT --> TMUX
    TMUX --> CLI
    MA -.실제 격리는 여기.-> Host
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>1. Permission automation — <code>PermissionRequest</code> Hook (satellite of host permission flow)</h2>
<p>The OMC's closest intervention in "execution policy" is not in the OS sandbox, but in automating the host's permission decisions. <code>hooks/hooks.json</code> matches <code>scripts/permission-handler.mjs</code> to <code>PermissionRequest</code> (matcher <code>Bash</code>) (build output; source is <code>src/hooks/permission-handler/index.ts</code>).</p>
<h3>1.1 Behavior — "Automatically allow only safe commands"</h3>
<p><code>processPermissionRequest()</code> (<code>permission-handler/index.ts:640</code>) only targets Bash tools. If the command passes a <strong>safe check</strong>, it returns a <code>behavior: 'allow'</code> decision to the host, otherwise it <strong>delegates</strong> to the host native permission flow with <code>{ continue: true }</code>. OMC never arbitrarily allows dangerous commands — it only <em>approves</em> them automatically based on a whitelist.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// permission-handler/index.ts:653-674 (요지)
const shouldAsk = hasClaudePermissionAsk(cwd, 'Bash', command);
if (!shouldAsk &#x26;&#x26; isSafeAutoApprovedCommand(command, cwd)) {
  return { hookSpecificOutput: { decision: { behavior: 'allow', reason } } };
}
return { continue: true };   // 호스트 권한 흐름이 처리
</code></pre>
<h3>1.2 Multi-layer structure of safety judgment</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Judgment function</th>
<th>Allowed for</th>
<th>Evidence</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>isSafeCommand</code></td>
<td><code>SAFE_PATTERNS</code> regular expressions (<code>git status/diff/log</code>, <code>npm run lint/build</code>, <code>tsc</code>, <code>eslint</code>, <code>cargo check</code>, <code>ls</code>, etc.)</td>
<td><code>index.ts:33-45,554</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>isSafeRepoInspectionCommand</code></td>
<td><code>cat</code>/<code>head</code>/<code>tail</code>/<code>sed -n</code>/<code>rg</code> — <strong>but only within repo boundaries + non-sensitive paths</strong></td>
<td><code>index.ts:511</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>isSafeTargetedLocalTestCommand</code></td>
<td><code>vitest run &#x3C;file></code>, <code>npm/pnpm/yarn test -- --run &#x3C;file></code>, <code>node --test &#x3C;file></code></td>
<td><code>index.ts:528</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>isHeredocWithSafeBase</code></td>
<td><code>git commit</code>/<code>git tag</code> heredoc (so that the body does not pollute <code>settings.local.json</code>)</td>
<td><code>index.ts:61-64,577</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>The key defense mechanism is the <strong><code>DANGEROUS_SHELL_CHARS</code></strong> regular expression:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// index.ts:51 — 셸 메타문자 전면 차단 (GitHub Issue #146)
const DANGEROUS_SHELL_CHARS = /[;&#x26;|`$()&#x3C;>\n\r\t\0\\{}\[\]*?~!#]/;
</code></pre>
<p>If any of these characters are present in the command, <code>isSafeCommand</code> immediately returns <code>false</code> (<code>index.ts:559</code>) to prevent whitelist bypass through command chaining and substitution. According to the comment (<code>index.ts:44</code>), <code>cat</code>/<code>head</code>/<code>tail</code> have been <strong>intentionally removed</strong> from <code>SAFE_PATTERNS</code> due to the risk of arbitrary file reading, and are instead only allowed in the <code>isSafeRepoInspectionCommand</code> path that undergoes path verification.</p>
<h3>1.3 Path sealing — repo border + deny sensitive paths</h3>
<p><code>isSafeRepoPath()</code>(<code>index.ts:338</code>) forces the argument path into <code>getWorktreeRoot(cwd)</code> (blocking symbolic link bypass with <code>realpathSync</code>, checking <code>relativePath.startsWith('..')</code>), and <code>isSensitiveRepoRelativePath()</code>(<code>index.ts:312</code>) always rejects:</p>
<pre><code>.git/**, .ssh/**, secrets/**, .env / .env.*, node_modules/.cache/**
</code></pre>
<p>This is the same set of sensitive paths as team <code>SECURE_DENY_DEFAULTS</code> in §3, and forms a consistent deny policy throughout the OMC.</p>
<h3>1.4 Merge settings — read only host settings</h3>
<p><code>getClaudePermissionAllowEntries()</code>/<code>...AskEntries()</code>(<code>index.ts:107,154</code>) reads layer 3 of the <strong>host</strong> configuration file:</p>
<pre><code>{cwd}/.claude/settings.local.json
{globalConfigDir}/settings.local.json
{globalConfigDir}/settings.json
</code></pre>
<p>The OMC only reads the host's <code>permissions.allow</code>/<code>permissions.ask</code> items and reflects them in automatic approval decisions, and does not maintain its own permission store. If it matches <code>ask</code> (<code>hasClaudePermissionAsk</code>), even if it is a safe command, automatic permission is withheld and the host is asked — user intent takes precedence.</p>
<hr>
<h2>2. <code>OMC_SECURITY</code> — Application-level security toggle</h2>
<p>The OMC's "execution policy" is in the form of an <strong>application function gate</strong> rather than an OS sandbox. <code>src/lib/security-config.ts</code> is the single entry point, and <code>SECURITY.md</code> is the user document.</p>
<h3>2.1 Master switch and priority</h3>
<pre><code>우선순위:  config file (.claude/omc.jsonc / config.jsonc) > OMC_SECURITY 환경변수 > 기본값(전부 off)
</code></pre>
<ul>
<li>If <code>OMC_SECURITY=strict</code>, all <code>STRICT_OVERRIDES</code> are turned on (<code>security-config.ts:49</code>).</li>
<li><strong>In strict mode, config files cannot <em>relax</em> security</strong> (<code>security-config.ts:99-109</code>): booleans concatenated with <code>||</code> (keeps true), <code>hardMaxIterations</code> with <code>Math.min</code> (only decreases). This one-way hardening protocol mimics a policy lock.</li>
</ul>
<h3>2.2 7 security flags</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>flag</th>
<th align="center">Default (off)</th>
<th align="center">strict</th>
<th>implementation branch</th>
<th>Protected object</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>restrictToolPaths</code></td>
<td align="center">false</td>
<td align="center">true</td>
<td><code>ast-tools.ts:60</code> <code>validateToolPath()</code></td>
<td>Prevent AST tools from leaving the project root</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>pythonSandbox</code></td>
<td align="center">false</td>
<td align="center">true</td>
<td><code>bridge-manager.ts:394</code> → <code>OMC_PYTHON_SANDBOX=1</code></td>
<td>(now nonsensical, see §4)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>disableRemoteMcp</code></td>
<td align="center">false</td>
<td align="center">true</td>
<td><code>security-config.ts:155</code></td>
<td>Exa/Context7 Remote MCP not started</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>disableExternalLLM</code></td>
<td align="center">false</td>
<td align="center">true</td>
<td><code>model-contract.ts:267</code> <code>getContract()</code></td>
<td>Block Codex/Gemini workers in team mode</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>disableAutoUpdate</code></td>
<td align="center">false</td>
<td align="center">true</td>
<td><code>isSilentAutoUpdateEnabled()</code> forces false</td>
<td>Prevent automatic installation of unverified npm</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>hardMaxIterations</code></td>
<td align="center"><strong>500</strong></td>
<td align="center"><strong>200</strong></td>
<td><code>persistent-mode.mjs:getHardMaxIterations</code></td>
<td>ralph/autopilot/ultrawork runaway loop upper limit</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<blockquote>
<p>Note: The default value of <code>hardMaxIterations</code> is <strong>non-strict default 500 / strict 200</strong> in the source, unlike the "default 200" written in [[00_omc_overview]] §1.3 (<code>security-config.ts:44,54</code>). 200 is a strict upper limit.</p>
</blockquote>
<h3>2.3 Actual coercion of <code>disableExternalLLM</code></h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// model-contract.ts:262-270
export function getContract(agentType: CliAgentType): CliAgentContract {
  if (agentType !== 'claude' &#x26;&#x26; isExternalLLMDisabled()) {
    throw new Error(
      `External LLM provider "${agentType}" is blocked by security policy (disableExternalLLM). ...`);
  }
  ...
}
</code></pre>
<p>Because it is thrown at the contract inquiry stage when spawning team workers, codex/gemini CLI workers cannot <strong>structurally</strong> be started in strict mode (code gate, not prompt recommendation).</p>
<hr>
<h2>3. <code>PreToolUse</code> enforcer — routing/orchestration policy (not OS policy)</h2>
<p><code>scripts/pre-tool-enforcer.mjs</code> (line 1268) may be caught by <code>PreToolUse</code> (matcher <code>*</code>) and emit <code>permissionDecision: 'deny'</code> just before tool execution. However, what this prevents is not an OS risk, but an <strong>OMC orchestration protocol violation</strong>:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>reason for deny</th>
<th>trigger</th>
<th>Evidence</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>[ULTRAGOAL /GOAL REQUIRED]</code></td>
<td>ultragoal active but matching Claude <code>/goal</code> not set</td>
<td><code>pre-tool-enforcer.mjs:616,1082</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>[MODEL ROUTING]</code></td>
<td>Calling Task/Agent with nonconforming model in Bedrock/Vertex/proxy environment</td>
<td><code>pre-tool-enforcer.mjs:1134,1156,1183</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>force team-routing</td>
<td>issue #1006 Step-by-step agent routing violation</td>
<td><code>pre-tool-enforcer.mjs:773</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>In other words, the enforcer is a <strong>workflow guard</strong> that gates “whether the correct agent/model/mode procedure was followed.” It is a conservative design that never blocks tool execution by passing exceptions to <code>{continue:true}</code> for failure safety (<code>pre-tool-enforcer.mjs:1026</code>) — this is the opposite philosophy of a blocking security gate.</p>
<hr>
<h2>4. Python REPL — language-level blocklist (not bound)</h2>
<p>The <code>python_repl</code> tool (the analysis backend of the scientist agent, [[00_omc_overview]] §8.1) runs in <code>bridge/gyoshu_bridge.py</code>. This is where OMC's unique mechanism called "sandbox" comes into play.</p>
<h3>4.1 Double blocking — built-in allowlist + AST validation</h3>
<pre><code class="language-python"># gyoshu_bridge.py:416 — 절대 노출 금지 빌트인
SANDBOX_BLOCKED_BUILTINS = frozenset({
  "__import__","breakpoint","compile","delattr","dir","eval","exec",
  "getattr","globals","help","input","locals","open","setattr","type","vars"})

# gyoshu_bridge.py:475 — SAFE_EXEC_BUILTINS allowlist만 노출
def get_safe_builtins(): ...   # blocklist 교집합 제거 후 매핑

# gyoshu_bridge.py:495 — 실행 전 AST 정적 검증
def validate_user_code_ast(tree):
    # import/ImportFrom 금지, __dunder__ 속성 접근 금지,
    # str.format/format_map 필드 순회 금지, 차단 빌트인 이름 사용 금지
</code></pre>
<p><code>_SafeBridgeHelper</code>(<code>gyoshu_bridge.py:443</code>) blocks the exposure of the helper function to <code>__globals__</code>, sealing escape through globals, and <code>_blocked_import</code>(<code>:463</code>) blocks all <code>import</code>s as <code>ImportError</code>.</p>
<h3>4.2 <code>OMC_PYTHON_SANDBOX</code> is now <strong>deprecated</strong></h3>
<p>The <code>pythonSandbox</code> flag in <code>security-config.ts</code> is passed to the <code>OMC_PYTHON_SANDBOX=1</code> environment variable in <code>bridge-manager.ts:394</code>, but the bridge no longer uses it as a gate:</p>
<pre><code class="language-python"># gyoshu_bridge.py:545-547
# Always restrict JSON-RPC supplied execution; OMC_PYTHON_SANDBOX no
# longer gates builtin safety.
self._namespace.update(get_sandbox_namespace())
</code></pre>
<p>That is, <strong>built-in constraints are always applied</strong> and are independent of the strict toggle. (The blocking <em>modules</em> listed by <code>SECURITY.md:62</code> in the list of <code>os/subprocess/socket/ctypes/...</code> is highlighted in the user documentation, and the actual blocking is achieved by outright prohibiting <code>import</code>.)</p>
<h3>4.3 Specify that it is not a boundary</h3>
<p>The <code>gyoshu_bridge.py:304</code> comment and <code>SECURITY.md:66</code> consistently state <strong>"This model is not a complete security sandbox"</strong>, <strong>"Python-level blocklist is not a security boundary on its own"</strong>. Host Claude Code's [[07_cc_sandbox]] seccomp/seatbelt is the real boundary, and OMC's Python block is just one layer of defense-in-depth.</p>
<hr>
<h2>5. Isolated backend — git worktree + tmux (task isolation, not OS isolation)</h2>
<p>OMC does not use OS isolation such as docker/ssh, but instead adopts <em>workspace isolation</em> that structurally blocks file conflicts with <strong>git worktree</strong> and <strong>isolates processes with tmux</strong> ([[00_omc_overview]] §6.2).</p>
<h3>5.1 Worktree isolation</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// git-worktree.ts:87,92
getWorktreePath = (repoRoot,team,worker) =>
  join(repoRoot,'.omc','team',sanitize(team),'worktrees',sanitize(worker));
getBranchName    = (team,worker) => `omc-team/${sanitize(team)}/${sanitize(worker)}`;
</code></pre>
<ul>
<li>Each worker receives its own worktree + branch, so there is no conflict even if the same file is edited simultaneously.</li>
<li>Cleanup is <strong>conservative</strong>: dirty worktrees are not forced to be deleted (<code>git-worktree.ts:10-12</code> comment), and are only deleted after passing the dry-run of <code>checkWorkerWorktreeRemovalSafety()</code> (<code>:533</code>).</li>
<li><code>assertCompatibleExistingWorktree()</code>(<code>:422</code>) rejects branch mismatch as <code>worktree_mismatch</code> — prevents worker cross-contamination.</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>Important Limitation</strong>: A worktree is just a directory within the same repo, same user, and same filesystem. Workers still access the same <code>$HOME</code>, same environment variables, and same network — <code>SECURITY.md:125</code> "No security boundary between agents · Agents share filesystem and MCP access."</p>
<h3>5.2 tmux worker + <strong>full-auto permission bypass</strong></h3>
<p>The most notable discovery. External CLI workers in the tmux panel are launched with launch arguments defined in <code>CONTRACTS</code> of <code>bridge/runtime-cli.cjs</code>, <strong>all three providers bypass permissions/authorization/sandboxes entirely</strong>:</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// runtime-cli.cjs:2972  claude  →
buildLaunchArgs() { return ["--dangerously-skip-permissions", ...] }
// runtime-cli.cjs:2995  codex   →
buildLaunchArgs() { return ["--dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox", ...] }
// runtime-cli.cjs:3023  gemini  →
buildLaunchArgs() { return ["--approval-mode","yolo", ...] }
</code></pre>
<p><code>src/team/permissions.ts:6-9</code> specifies the reason:</p>
<blockquote>
<p>"MCP workers run in full-auto mode and cannot be mechanically restricted. Permissions are injected into prompts as instructions for the LLM to follow."</p>
</blockquote>
<p>That is, team workers run <strong>with host sandbox/authorization disabled</strong>, and the only safeguards are worktree isolation (file conflicts) and the prompt recommendation in §6. The codex's <code>--dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox</code> also turns off the codex's seatbelt/landlock as described by [[07_cc_sandbox]]. Even in the user direct execution path (<code>src/cli/launch.ts:368</code>), <code>--madmax</code>/<code>--yolo</code> is mapped to <code>--dangerously-skip-permissions</code>, and on macOS, tmux is only enforced (<code>launch.ts:438</code>) and the OS sandbox is not enforced.</p>
<h3>5.3 Risk of environment variable inheritance</h3>
<p><code>SECURITY.md:113,125</code> warns that MCP/worker processes inherit their parent's environment variables (API keys/tokens) and says "env vars are allowlisted for worker processes." In other words, env exposure is limited by allowlist, but system calls/network/FS of the process itself are not restricted.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph LR
    Lead["TEAM LEAD"] -->|ensureWorkerWorktree| WT["git worktree + branch&#x3C;br/>.omc/team/{t}/worktrees/{w}"]
    Lead -->|spawnWorkerInPane| TM["tmux 세션 omc-team-{t}-{w}"]
    TM --> CLI{"CLI 제공자"}
    CLI -->|claude| C1["--dangerously-skip-permissions"]
    CLI -->|codex| C2["--dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox"]
    CLI -->|gemini| C3["--approval-mode yolo"]
    C1 --> Risk["권한/승인/OS샌드박스 OFF&#x3C;br/>유일 보호 = worktree + 프롬프트 권고"]
    C2 --> Risk
    C3 --> Risk
    SEC["OMC_SECURITY=strict"] -.disableExternalLLM.-> CLI
    SEC -. codex/gemini 차단, claude만 .-> CLI
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>6. team <code>permissions.ts</code> — Prompt-injected "recommended permissions"</h2>
<p>Since OS enforcement is not possible in §5, the OMC <strong>injects</strong> worker permissions as prompt text (<code>src/team/permissions.ts</code>, with the module docstring asserting "advisory layer only").</p>
<h3>6.1 Model</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">interface WorkerPermissions {
  allowedPaths: string[];   // glob (allow)
  deniedPaths: string[];    // glob (deny, allow를 override)
  allowedCommands: string[];// 명령 prefix allowlist
  maxFileSize: number;      // 파일당 최대 바이트
}
</code></pre>
<ul>
<li><code>isPathAllowed()</code>(<code>:109</code>)·<code>isCommandAllowed()</code>(<code>:141</code>) are check <em>functions</em>, but workers are full-auto, so they are effective only when <strong>voluntarily follow</strong>.</li>
<li><code>formatPermissionInstructions()</code>(<code>:156</code>) converts the above rule into <code>"PERMISSION CONSTRAINTS: - You may ONLY modify files matching: ..."</code> natural language and inserts it into the worker prompt.</li>
</ul>
<h3>6.2 One thing that is enforced — <code>SECURE_DENY_DEFAULTS</code></h3>
<p>Although advisory, <code>getEffectivePermissions()</code>(<code>:215</code>) <strong>always prepends</strong> a deny default that cannot be overridden by the caller's settings:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// permissions.ts:202
const SECURE_DENY_DEFAULTS = ['.git/**','.env*','**/.env*',
  '**/secrets/**','**/.ssh/**','**/node_modules/.cache/**'];
</code></pre>
<p><code>findPermissionViolations()</code> (<code>:245</code>) performs a post-check on the list of changed files and reports violations. This is an audit path for <strong>post-detection</strong> when a worker violates a rule, not a proactive blocking (prevention) — it shares the same sensitive path as the deny PermissionRequest path in §1.3, but the enforcement point is different.</p>
<hr>
<h2>7. Summary: OMC execution policy hierarchy comparison table</h2>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>

</tr>

</tr>

</table>
<hr>
<h2>8. Threat model perspective (limitations recognized by the source)</h2>
<p>To summarize the "Known Limitations" + operational guidelines in <code>SECURITY.md:118-126</code>, OMC's execution safety <strong>places trust boundaries between hosts and users</strong>:</p>
<ul>
<li>"Clone repositories only from trusted sources — <code>.mcp.json</code> files are auto-loaded" (<code>SECURITY.md:116</code>): OMC assumes trusted code/MCP.</li>
<li>"Avoid hook commands — they execute with <code>shell: true</code>"(<code>:112</code>): Acknowledging that the Hook itself is an arbitrary shell execution vector.</li>
<li>"Minimize sensitive environment variables — MCP processes inherit them"(<code>:113</code>): Acknowledge env isolation limitations.</li>
<li>Conclusion: If executing untrusted code is necessary, the official recommendation is to <strong>install OS-level isolation</strong> separately (<code>:66,124</code>). OMC is an orchestration layer on top of it, not an isolation layer.</li>
</ul>
<hr>

<hr>
<h2>10. Fork perspective</h2>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> OMC's "sandbox" is not OS isolation, but a combination of <strong>(a) automatic authorization satellite + (b) app-level toggle + (c) worktree</strong> — if OS isolation is necessary, leave it to the host/external.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>PermissionRequest</code> auto-grant is a practical pattern that reduces host permission UX friction by "allowing only safe commands + blocking shell metacharacters entirely + sealing paths" (high reuse value).</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Fixing <code>--dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox</code>/<code>--yolo</code> on team workers is a strong trade-off for throughput <strong>turning off the host sandbox</strong> — note that there is only one layer of worktree isolation when doing security audits.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> One-way hardening of <code>OMC_SECURITY=strict</code> (config cannot relax, <code>Math.min</code>/<code>||</code>) is a neat technique that mimics policy locking with only env.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> The fact that the <code>pythonSandbox</code> flag is effectively rendered meaningless (<code>OMC_PYTHON_SANDBOX no longer gates</code>) is a drift between the document (<code>SECURITY.md</code>) and the code — needs to be checked.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> Worktree isolation only prevents file conflicts and env/network/FS are shared — The absence of a multi-agent trust boundary is a structural limitation.</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<h2>cli-jaw comparison implications</h2>
<ul>
<li>
<p><strong>Contrast isolation philosophy</strong>: cli-jaw is a multi-CLI dispatch meta-harness that calls multiple CLIs under one umbrella. As OMC shows, the moment those workers pop up with <code>--dangerously-skip-permissions</code>/<code>--approval-bypass</code>, the host sandbox is disabled and the only safety comes down to <strong>worktree + prompt advisory</strong>. When cli-jaw dispatches a heterogeneous CLI (employee/employee), the OMC <code>runtime-cli.cjs CONTRACTS</code> clearly shows that “with what permission flags the child CLI is launched” is the effective security boundary — permission arguments must be treated as explicit policies at the dispatcher level.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>Permission automation vs multi-channel dispatch</strong>: OMC's <code>PermissionRequest</code> handler (safety command whitelist + <code>DANGEROUS_SHELL_CHARS</code> blocking + repo border sealing) is an "automatic approval gate" blueprint that can be directly borrowed from cli-jaw's multi-channel command execution. When cli-jaw automatically approves incoming commands by channel, the OMC's "whitelist is invalidated if there is even a single shell metacharacter" rule becomes the minimum line of defense to prevent injection through the channel.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>App-level policy toggle + one-way hardening</strong>: If cli-jaw handles different risks for each PABCD stage, the single <code>OMC_SECURITY</code> switch in OMC <code>security-config.ts</code> + "config cannot be mitigated" (<code>Math.min</code>/<code>||</code>) model can be applied as a pattern to lock the security profile for each PABCD stage into one env. In particular, force points that <em>throw</em> at the worker spawn contract stage, such as <code>disableExternalLLM</code>, are more reliable than prompt recommendations.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>Explicitly delegate trust boundaries</strong>: OMC <code>SECURITY.md</code> stipulates that "OS isolation is not our responsibility, use only trusted sources." Since cli-jaw drags state for a long time with file memory, multi-channel, and PABCD, documenting <strong>what cli-jaw guarantees and what it delegates to the host/user</strong> like an OMC is essential to the honesty of the threat model of the multi-CLI meta-harness. Worktree-style task isolation can be used to prevent file conflicts in cli-jaw employee dispatch, but it must also be specified that it is not OS isolation.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr>

<h2>Change history</h2>
<ul>
<li>2026-05-29: Created oh-my-claudecode v4.14.4 source-based sandbox/execution policy analysis. Intentional absence of OS-level sandbox (host delegation) is verified with grep, dependency, and <code>SECURITY.md</code>, and the five layers actually implemented by OMC (PermissionRequest automatic approval, OMC_SECURITY 7 toggle, Python language-level block, worktree+tmux task isolation, advisory permission) are based on file:line. Includes discovery of full-auto permission bypasses (<code>--dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox</code>, etc.) for team workers. 4 items of cli-jaw comparison implications.</li>
</ul>
<h2>Korean corpus (reference)</h2>
<blockquote>
<p>Verbatim KO corpus <code>007_sandbox-exec-policy/07_omc_sandbox.md</code> for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.</p>
</blockquote>
<h1>oh-my-claudecode (omc) 샌드박스 / 실행 정책</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>170_oh-my-claudecode/</code> — sandbox and execution policy.</p>
</blockquote>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 대상</strong>: <code>Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-claudecode</code> v4.14.4 (Claude Code <strong>플러그인</strong>)
<strong>결론 한 줄</strong>: OMC는 OS-레벨 샌드박스(seatbelt/bwrap/seccomp)를 <strong>스스로 구현하지 않는다</strong>. 프로세스 격리·네트워크 차단·파일시스템 접근 제어는 전적으로 호스트인 [[07_cc_sandbox|Claude Code]]에 위임하고, OMC가 더하는 것은 (1) 호스트 권한 결정을 자동화하는 <code>PermissionRequest</code> 핸들러, (2) 애플리케이션-레벨 보안 토글(<code>OMC_SECURITY</code>), (3) git worktree + tmux 기반 워커 <strong>작업 격리</strong>, (4) Python REPL 언어-레벨 블록리스트, (5) <strong>프롬프트 주입식 권고 권한(advisory permission)</strong> 뿐이다.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>OMC가 [[00_omc_overview]]에서 본 바와 같이 자체 에이전트 런타임이 아니라 플러그인이라는 사실은 이 차원에서 가장 결정적이다. 바닐라 Claude Code의 <code>MA</code>(sandbox manager) 객체, <code>sandbox-exec -p</code> 프로파일, <code>bwrap --unshare-net</code>, <code>dangerouslyDisableSandbox</code> 도구 플래그([[07_cc_sandbox]] §1~§8)는 <strong>호스트 코어의 자산</strong>이며 OMC 소스 트리에는 그 대응물이 존재하지 않는다.</p>
<p>근거 경로: <code>SECURITY.md</code>, <code>src/lib/security-config.ts</code>, <code>src/hooks/permission-handler/index.ts</code>, <code>src/tools/ast-tools.ts</code>, <code>bridge/gyoshu_bridge.py</code>, <code>src/team/permissions.ts</code>, <code>src/team/git-worktree.ts</code>, <code>src/team/tmux-session.ts</code>, <code>src/team/model-contract.ts</code>, <code>bridge/runtime-cli.cjs</code>, <code>src/cli/launch.ts</code>, <code>scripts/pre-tool-enforcer.mjs</code>, <code>package.json</code>, <code>CLAUDE.md</code>.</p>
<hr>
<h2>0. 의도적 부재 — "호스트 위임"의 증거</h2>
<p>OS 샌드박스 부재는 추정이 아니라 소스로 검증된다.</p>
<pre><code>grep -riE "sandbox-exec|seatbelt|bwrap|bubblewrap|seccomp|landlock|
          sandbox-runtime|--unshare|dangerouslyDisableSandbox"
          src bridge scripts hooks   →  (결과 없음)
</code></pre>
<ul>
<li><code>package.json</code> 의존성에 <code>@anthropic-ai/sandbox-runtime</code>(호스트가 seccomp BPF/<code>unix-block.bpf</code>를 로드하는 패키지, [[07_cc_sandbox]] §3.4)이 <strong>없다</strong>. OMC는 <code>@anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk</code>와 <code>@anthropic-ai/sdk</code>에만 의존한다(<code>package.json</code>).</li>
<li><code>SECURITY.md:124</code>가 이를 자인한다: <strong>"No OS-level process sandbox · Severity: Medium · Python blocklist provides defense-in-depth; recommend OS-level isolation for untrusted code"</strong>.</li>
<li><code>SECURITY.md:66</code>: "OS-level process isolation is recommended for untrusted code execution." — 즉 OMC 자신은 OS 격리를 제공하지 않으며 사용자/호스트에게 위임한다고 명시.</li>
</ul>
<p>따라서 본 문서는 호스트 차원([[07_cc_sandbox]])을 중복 서술하지 않고, <strong>OMC가 플러그인 표면에서 실제로 구현한 실행 정책</strong>만 소스 기반으로 다룬다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    subgraph Host["Claude Code 코어 (OS 샌드박스 소유자)"]
        MA["MA sandbox manager&#x3C;br/>sandbox-exec / bwrap / seccomp&#x3C;br/>(07_cc_sandbox)"]
        PermFlow["네이티브 permission 흐름&#x3C;br/>allow/deny/ask"]
    end
    subgraph OMC["OMC 플러그인 (실행 정책 레이어)"]
        PH["PermissionRequest Hook&#x3C;br/>permission-handler/index.ts"]
        PTE["PreToolUse enforcer&#x3C;br/>pre-tool-enforcer.mjs"]
        SEC["security-config.ts&#x3C;br/>OMC_SECURITY=strict"]
        PY["gyoshu_bridge.py&#x3C;br/>Python 언어-레벨 블록"]
        AST["ast-tools.ts&#x3C;br/>restrictToolPaths"]
        TP["team/permissions.ts&#x3C;br/>advisory(프롬프트) 권한"]
    end
    subgraph Iso["작업 격리 백엔드 (OS격리 아님)"]
        WT["git worktree&#x3C;br/>.omc/team/{t}/worktrees/{w}"]
        TMUX["tmux 세션&#x3C;br/>omc-team-{t}-{w}"]
        CLI["외부 CLI 워커&#x3C;br/>--dangerously-skip-permissions 등"]
    end
    PermFlow -.PermissionRequest.-> PH
    Host -.PreToolUse.-> PTE
    PH -->|allow safe cmd| PermFlow
    PTE -->|deny 라우팅 위반| PermFlow
    SEC --> PY
    SEC --> AST
    SEC --> CLI
    TP --> WT
    WT --> TMUX
    TMUX --> CLI
    MA -.실제 격리는 여기.-> Host
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>1. 권한 자동화 — <code>PermissionRequest</code> Hook (호스트 권한 흐름의 위성)</h2>
<p>OMC가 "실행 정책"에 가장 가깝게 개입하는 지점은 OS 샌드박스가 아니라 <strong>호스트의 권한(permission) 결정을 자동화</strong>하는 것이다. <code>hooks/hooks.json</code>은 <code>PermissionRequest</code>(matcher <code>Bash</code>)에 <code>scripts/permission-handler.mjs</code>를 건다(빌드 산출물; 소스는 <code>src/hooks/permission-handler/index.ts</code>).</p>
<h3>1.1 동작 — "안전한 명령만 자동 허용"</h3>
<p><code>processPermissionRequest()</code>(<code>permission-handler/index.ts:640</code>)는 Bash 도구만 대상으로, 명령이 <strong>안전 판정</strong>을 통과하면 호스트에 <code>behavior: 'allow'</code> 결정을 돌려주고, 그렇지 않으면 <code>{ continue: true }</code>로 <strong>호스트 네이티브 권한 흐름에 그대로 위임</strong>한다. OMC는 결코 위험 명령을 임의로 허용하지 않는다 — 화이트리스트 기반 자동 <em>승인</em>만 한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// permission-handler/index.ts:653-674 (요지)
const shouldAsk = hasClaudePermissionAsk(cwd, 'Bash', command);
if (!shouldAsk &#x26;&#x26; isSafeAutoApprovedCommand(command, cwd)) {
  return { hookSpecificOutput: { decision: { behavior: 'allow', reason } } };
}
return { continue: true };   // 호스트 권한 흐름이 처리
</code></pre>
<h3>1.2 안전 판정의 다층 구조</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>판정 함수</th>
<th>허용 대상</th>
<th>근거</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>isSafeCommand</code></td>
<td><code>SAFE_PATTERNS</code> 정규식(<code>git status/diff/log</code>, <code>npm run lint/build</code>, <code>tsc</code>, <code>eslint</code>, <code>cargo check</code>, <code>ls</code> 등)</td>
<td><code>index.ts:33-45,554</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>isSafeRepoInspectionCommand</code></td>
<td><code>cat</code>/<code>head</code>/<code>tail</code>/<code>sed -n</code>/<code>rg</code> — <strong>단, repo 경계 안 + 비민감 경로일 때만</strong></td>
<td><code>index.ts:511</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>isSafeTargetedLocalTestCommand</code></td>
<td><code>vitest run &#x3C;file></code>, <code>npm/pnpm/yarn test -- --run &#x3C;file></code>, <code>node --test &#x3C;file></code></td>
<td><code>index.ts:528</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>isHeredocWithSafeBase</code></td>
<td><code>git commit</code>/<code>git tag</code> heredoc(본문이 <code>settings.local.json</code>을 오염시키지 않도록)</td>
<td><code>index.ts:61-64,577</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>핵심 방어 장치는 <strong><code>DANGEROUS_SHELL_CHARS</code></strong> 정규식이다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// index.ts:51 — 셸 메타문자 전면 차단 (GitHub Issue #146)
const DANGEROUS_SHELL_CHARS = /[;&#x26;|`$()&#x3C;>\n\r\t\0\\{}\[\]*?~!#]/;
</code></pre>
<p>명령에 이 문자들이 하나라도 있으면 <code>isSafeCommand</code>는 즉시 <code>false</code>를 반환해(<code>index.ts:559</code>) 명령 체이닝·치환을 통한 화이트리스트 우회를 막는다. 주석(<code>index.ts:44</code>)에 따르면 <code>cat</code>/<code>head</code>/<code>tail</code>은 임의 파일 읽기 위험으로 <code>SAFE_PATTERNS</code>에서 <strong>의도적으로 제거</strong>되었고, 대신 경로 검증을 거치는 <code>isSafeRepoInspectionCommand</code> 경로로만 허용된다.</p>
<h3>1.3 경로 봉인 — repo 경계 + 민감 경로 deny</h3>
<p><code>isSafeRepoPath()</code>(<code>index.ts:338</code>)는 인자 경로를 <code>getWorktreeRoot(cwd)</code> 안으로 강제하고(<code>realpathSync</code>로 심볼릭링크 우회 차단, <code>relativePath.startsWith('..')</code> 검사), <code>isSensitiveRepoRelativePath()</code>(<code>index.ts:312</code>)로 다음을 항상 거부한다:</p>
<pre><code>.git/**, .ssh/**, secrets/**, .env / .env.*, node_modules/.cache/**
</code></pre>
<p>이는 §3의 team <code>SECURE_DENY_DEFAULTS</code>와 동일한 민감 경로 집합으로, OMC 전반의 일관된 deny 정책을 이룬다.</p>
<h3>1.4 설정 병합 — 호스트 settings를 읽기만</h3>
<p><code>getClaudePermissionAllowEntries()</code>/<code>...AskEntries()</code>(<code>index.ts:107,154</code>)는 <strong>호스트</strong> 설정 파일 3계층을 읽는다:</p>
<pre><code>{cwd}/.claude/settings.local.json
{globalConfigDir}/settings.local.json
{globalConfigDir}/settings.json
</code></pre>
<p>OMC는 호스트의 <code>permissions.allow</code>/<code>permissions.ask</code> 항목을 <strong>읽어 자동 승인 결정에 반영</strong>할 뿐, 자체 권한 저장소를 두지 않는다. <code>ask</code>에 매칭되면(<code>hasClaudePermissionAsk</code>) 안전 명령이라도 자동 허용을 보류하고 호스트에 묻는다 — 사용자 의도 우선.</p>
<hr>
<h2>2. <code>OMC_SECURITY</code> — 애플리케이션-레벨 보안 토글</h2>
<p>OMC의 "실행 정책"은 OS 샌드박스가 아닌 <strong>애플리케이션 기능 게이트</strong> 형태다. <code>src/lib/security-config.ts</code>가 단일 진입점으로, <code>SECURITY.md</code>가 사용자 문서다.</p>
<h3>2.1 마스터 스위치와 우선순위</h3>
<pre><code>우선순위:  config file (.claude/omc.jsonc / config.jsonc) > OMC_SECURITY 환경변수 > 기본값(전부 off)
</code></pre>
<ul>
<li><code>OMC_SECURITY=strict</code>이면 <code>STRICT_OVERRIDES</code> 전부 켜짐(<code>security-config.ts:49</code>).</li>
<li><strong>strict 모드에서는 config 파일이 보안을 <em>완화</em>할 수 없다</strong>(<code>security-config.ts:99-109</code>): boolean은 <code>||</code>로 결합(true 유지), <code>hardMaxIterations</code>는 <code>Math.min</code>(감소만). 이 단방향 강화 규약은 정책 잠금(policy lock)을 흉내 낸다.</li>
</ul>
<h3>2.2 7개 보안 플래그</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>플래그</th>
<th align="center">기본(off)</th>
<th align="center">strict</th>
<th>구현 지점</th>
<th>보호 대상</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>restrictToolPaths</code></td>
<td align="center">false</td>
<td align="center">true</td>
<td><code>ast-tools.ts:60</code> <code>validateToolPath()</code></td>
<td>AST 도구를 project root 밖으로 못 나가게</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>pythonSandbox</code></td>
<td align="center">false</td>
<td align="center">true</td>
<td><code>bridge-manager.ts:394</code> → <code>OMC_PYTHON_SANDBOX=1</code></td>
<td>(현재 무의미화, §4 참조)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>disableRemoteMcp</code></td>
<td align="center">false</td>
<td align="center">true</td>
<td><code>security-config.ts:155</code></td>
<td>Exa/Context7 원격 MCP 미기동</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>disableExternalLLM</code></td>
<td align="center">false</td>
<td align="center">true</td>
<td><code>model-contract.ts:267</code> <code>getContract()</code></td>
<td>team 모드에서 Codex/Gemini 워커 차단</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>disableAutoUpdate</code></td>
<td align="center">false</td>
<td align="center">true</td>
<td><code>isSilentAutoUpdateEnabled()</code> 강제 false</td>
<td>미검증 npm 자동 설치 방지</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>hardMaxIterations</code></td>
<td align="center"><strong>500</strong></td>
<td align="center"><strong>200</strong></td>
<td><code>persistent-mode.mjs:getHardMaxIterations</code></td>
<td>ralph/autopilot/ultrawork 폭주 루프 상한</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<blockquote>
<p>주의: <code>hardMaxIterations</code> 기본값은 [[00_omc_overview]] §1.3에서 "기본 200"으로 적힌 것과 달리 소스상 <strong>비-strict 기본 500 / strict 200</strong>이다(<code>security-config.ts:44,54</code>). 200은 strict 상한이다.</p>
</blockquote>
<h3>2.3 <code>disableExternalLLM</code>의 실제 강제점</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// model-contract.ts:262-270
export function getContract(agentType: CliAgentType): CliAgentContract {
  if (agentType !== 'claude' &#x26;&#x26; isExternalLLMDisabled()) {
    throw new Error(
      `External LLM provider "${agentType}" is blocked by security policy (disableExternalLLM). ...`);
  }
  ...
}
</code></pre>
<p>team 워커 스폰 시 contract 조회 단계에서 던져지므로, strict 모드에서는 codex/gemini CLI 워커가 <strong>구조적으로</strong> 기동되지 못한다(프롬프트 권고가 아닌 코드 게이트).</p>
<hr>
<h2>3. <code>PreToolUse</code> enforcer — 라우팅/오케스트레이션 정책 (OS 정책 아님)</h2>
<p><code>scripts/pre-tool-enforcer.mjs</code>(1268줄)는 <code>PreToolUse</code>(matcher <code>*</code>)에 걸려 도구 실행 직전 <code>permissionDecision: 'deny'</code>를 낼 수 있다. 그러나 이것이 막는 것은 OS 위험이 아니라 <strong>OMC 오케스트레이션 규약 위반</strong>이다:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>deny 사유</th>
<th>트리거</th>
<th>근거</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>[ULTRAGOAL /GOAL REQUIRED]</code></td>
<td>ultragoal 활성인데 매칭되는 Claude <code>/goal</code> 미설정</td>
<td><code>pre-tool-enforcer.mjs:616,1082</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>[MODEL ROUTING]</code></td>
<td>Bedrock/Vertex/proxy 환경에서 부적합 모델로 Task/Agent 호출</td>
<td><code>pre-tool-enforcer.mjs:1134,1156,1183</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>team-routing 강제</td>
<td>issue #1006 단계별 에이전트 라우팅 위반</td>
<td><code>pre-tool-enforcer.mjs:773</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>즉 enforcer는 "올바른 에이전트/모델/모드 절차를 밟았는가"를 게이팅하는 <strong>워크플로 가드</strong>다. 실패 안전(<code>pre-tool-enforcer.mjs:1026</code>)을 위해 예외 시 <code>{continue:true}</code>로 통과시켜 도구 실행을 절대 막지 않는 보수적 설계다 — 이는 차단형 보안 게이트와 정반대 철학이다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>4. Python REPL — 언어-레벨 블록리스트 (경계가 아님을 자인)</h2>
<p><code>python_repl</code> 도구(scientist 에이전트의 분석 백엔드, [[00_omc_overview]] §8.1)는 <code>bridge/gyoshu_bridge.py</code>에서 실행된다. 여기서 OMC가 유일하게 "샌드박스"라 부르는 메커니즘이 나온다.</p>
<h3>4.1 이중 차단 — 빌트인 allowlist + AST 검증</h3>
<pre><code class="language-python"># gyoshu_bridge.py:416 — 절대 노출 금지 빌트인
SANDBOX_BLOCKED_BUILTINS = frozenset({
  "__import__","breakpoint","compile","delattr","dir","eval","exec",
  "getattr","globals","help","input","locals","open","setattr","type","vars"})

# gyoshu_bridge.py:475 — SAFE_EXEC_BUILTINS allowlist만 노출
def get_safe_builtins(): ...   # blocklist 교집합 제거 후 매핑

# gyoshu_bridge.py:495 — 실행 전 AST 정적 검증
def validate_user_code_ast(tree):
    # import/ImportFrom 금지, __dunder__ 속성 접근 금지,
    # str.format/format_map 필드 순회 금지, 차단 빌트인 이름 사용 금지
</code></pre>
<p><code>_SafeBridgeHelper</code>(<code>gyoshu_bridge.py:443</code>)는 헬퍼 함수의 <code>__globals__</code> 노출을 막아 globals를 통한 탈출을 봉인하고, <code>_blocked_import</code>(<code>:463</code>)는 모든 <code>import</code>를 <code>ImportError</code>로 막는다.</p>
<h3>4.2 <code>OMC_PYTHON_SANDBOX</code>는 현재 <strong>무의미화됨</strong></h3>
<p><code>security-config.ts</code>의 <code>pythonSandbox</code> 플래그는 <code>bridge-manager.ts:394</code>에서 <code>OMC_PYTHON_SANDBOX=1</code> 환경변수로 전달되지만, 브리지는 이를 더 이상 게이트로 쓰지 않는다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-python"># gyoshu_bridge.py:545-547
# Always restrict JSON-RPC supplied execution; OMC_PYTHON_SANDBOX no
# longer gates builtin safety.
self._namespace.update(get_sandbox_namespace())
</code></pre>
<p>즉 <strong>빌트인 제약은 항상 적용</strong>되며 strict 토글과 무관하다. (<code>SECURITY.md:62</code>가 나열하는 차단 <em>모듈</em> 목록 <code>os/subprocess/socket/ctypes/...</code>는 사용자 문서상 강조이고, 실질 차단은 <code>import</code> 전면 금지로 달성된다.)</p>
<h3>4.3 경계가 아님을 명시</h3>
<p><code>gyoshu_bridge.py:304</code> 주석과 <code>SECURITY.md:66</code>은 일관되게 <strong>"이 모델은 완전한 보안 샌드박스가 아니다(not a complete security sandbox)"</strong>, **"Python-level blocklist is not a security boundary on its own"**이라고 자인한다. 호스트 Claude Code의 [[07_cc_sandbox]] seccomp/seatbelt가 진짜 경계이고, OMC의 Python 블록은 defense-in-depth 한 겹일 뿐이다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>5. 격리 백엔드 — git worktree + tmux (작업 격리, OS 격리 아님)</h2>
<p>OMC가 docker/ssh 같은 OS 격리를 쓰지 않는 대신 채택한 것은 <strong>git worktree로 파일 충돌을 구조적으로 차단</strong>하고 <strong>tmux로 프로세스를 분리</strong>하는 <em>작업(workspace) 격리</em>다([[00_omc_overview]] §6.2).</p>
<h3>5.1 worktree 격리</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// git-worktree.ts:87,92
getWorktreePath = (repoRoot,team,worker) =>
  join(repoRoot,'.omc','team',sanitize(team),'worktrees',sanitize(worker));
getBranchName    = (team,worker) => `omc-team/${sanitize(team)}/${sanitize(worker)}`;
</code></pre>
<ul>
<li>각 워커는 자기 worktree + 브랜치를 받아 같은 파일을 동시 편집해도 충돌하지 않는다.</li>
<li>정리는 <strong>보수적</strong>: dirty worktree를 강제 삭제하지 않으며(<code>git-worktree.ts:10-12</code> 주석), <code>checkWorkerWorktreeRemovalSafety()</code>(<code>:533</code>)의 dry-run 통과 후에만 삭제.</li>
<li><code>assertCompatibleExistingWorktree()</code>(<code>:422</code>)가 브랜치 불일치 시 <code>worktree_mismatch</code>로 거부 — 워커 교차 오염 방지.</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>중요한 한계</strong>: worktree는 동일 repo·동일 사용자·동일 파일시스템 안의 디렉토리일 뿐이다. 워커는 여전히 같은 <code>$HOME</code>, 같은 환경변수, 같은 네트워크에 접근한다 — <code>SECURITY.md:125</code> "No security boundary between agents · Agents share filesystem and MCP access."</p>
<h3>5.2 tmux 워커 + <strong>full-auto 권한 우회</strong></h3>
<p>가장 주목할 발견. tmux 패널의 외부 CLI 워커는 <code>bridge/runtime-cli.cjs</code>의 <code>CONTRACTS</code>에 정의된 launch 인자로 뜨는데, <strong>세 제공자 모두 권한/승인/샌드박스를 전면 우회</strong>한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-javascript">// runtime-cli.cjs:2972  claude  →
buildLaunchArgs() { return ["--dangerously-skip-permissions", ...] }
// runtime-cli.cjs:2995  codex   →
buildLaunchArgs() { return ["--dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox", ...] }
// runtime-cli.cjs:3023  gemini  →
buildLaunchArgs() { return ["--approval-mode","yolo", ...] }
</code></pre>
<p><code>src/team/permissions.ts:6-9</code>가 그 이유를 명시한다:</p>
<blockquote>
<p>"MCP workers run in full-auto mode and cannot be mechanically restricted. Permissions are injected into prompts as instructions for the LLM to follow."</p>
</blockquote>
<p>즉 team 워커는 <strong>호스트 샌드박스/승인까지 비활성화한 상태로</strong> 실행되며, 유일한 안전장치는 worktree 격리(파일 충돌)와 §6의 프롬프트 권고뿐이다. codex의 <code>--dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox</code>는 [[07_cc_sandbox]]가 설명한 codex의 seatbelt/landlock까지 끈다. 사용자 직접 실행 경로(<code>src/cli/launch.ts:368</code>)에서도 <code>--madmax</code>/<code>--yolo</code>가 <code>--dangerously-skip-permissions</code>로 매핑되며, macOS에서는 tmux를 강제(<code>launch.ts:438</code>)할 뿐 OS 샌드박스를 거는 것은 아니다.</p>
<h3>5.3 환경변수 상속 위험</h3>
<p><code>SECURITY.md:113,125</code>는 MCP/워커 프로세스가 부모의 환경변수(API 키·토큰)를 상속함을 경고하고 "env vars are allowlisted for worker processes"라 한다. 즉 env 노출은 allowlist로 제한하지만, 프로세스 자체의 시스템콜/네트워크/FS는 제한하지 않는다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph LR
    Lead["TEAM LEAD"] -->|ensureWorkerWorktree| WT["git worktree + branch&#x3C;br/>.omc/team/{t}/worktrees/{w}"]
    Lead -->|spawnWorkerInPane| TM["tmux 세션 omc-team-{t}-{w}"]
    TM --> CLI{"CLI 제공자"}
    CLI -->|claude| C1["--dangerously-skip-permissions"]
    CLI -->|codex| C2["--dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox"]
    CLI -->|gemini| C3["--approval-mode yolo"]
    C1 --> Risk["권한/승인/OS샌드박스 OFF&#x3C;br/>유일 보호 = worktree + 프롬프트 권고"]
    C2 --> Risk
    C3 --> Risk
    SEC["OMC_SECURITY=strict"] -.disableExternalLLM.-> CLI
    SEC -. codex/gemini 차단, claude만 .-> CLI
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>6. team <code>permissions.ts</code> — 프롬프트 주입식 "권고 권한"</h2>
<p>§5에서 OS 강제가 불가능하므로, OMC는 워커 권한을 <strong>프롬프트 텍스트로 주입</strong>한다(<code>src/team/permissions.ts</code>, 모듈 docstring이 "advisory layer only"라고 단언).</p>
<h3>6.1 모델</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">interface WorkerPermissions {
  allowedPaths: string[];   // glob (allow)
  deniedPaths: string[];    // glob (deny, allow를 override)
  allowedCommands: string[];// 명령 prefix allowlist
  maxFileSize: number;      // 파일당 최대 바이트
}
</code></pre>
<ul>
<li><code>isPathAllowed()</code>(<code>:109</code>)·<code>isCommandAllowed()</code>(<code>:141</code>)는 검사 <em>함수</em>이지만, 워커는 full-auto라 이를 <strong>자발적으로 따를 때만</strong> 효력이 있다.</li>
<li><code>formatPermissionInstructions()</code>(<code>:156</code>)가 위 규칙을 <code>"PERMISSION CONSTRAINTS: - You may ONLY modify files matching: ..."</code> 자연어로 변환해 워커 프롬프트에 넣는다.</li>
</ul>
<h3>6.2 강제되는 한 가지 — <code>SECURE_DENY_DEFAULTS</code></h3>
<p>advisory임에도 <code>getEffectivePermissions()</code>(<code>:215</code>)는 호출자 설정을 덮어쓸 수 없는 deny 기본값을 <strong>항상 prepend</strong>한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// permissions.ts:202
const SECURE_DENY_DEFAULTS = ['.git/**','.env*','**/.env*',
  '**/secrets/**','**/.ssh/**','**/node_modules/.cache/**'];
</code></pre>
<p><code>findPermissionViolations()</code>(<code>:245</code>)는 변경된 파일 목록을 사후 검사해 위반을 보고한다. 이는 워커가 규칙을 어겼을 때 <strong>사후 탐지</strong>하는 감사 경로이지, 사전 차단(prevention)은 아니다 — §1.3의 PermissionRequest 경로 deny와 동일한 민감 경로를 공유하지만 강제 시점이 다르다.</p>
<hr>

</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<hr>
<h2>8. 위협 모델 관점 (소스가 인정하는 한계)</h2>
<p><code>SECURITY.md:118-126</code>의 "Known Limitations" + 운영 가이드라인을 요약하면 OMC의 실행 안전은 <strong>신뢰 경계를 호스트와 사용자에 둔다</strong>:</p>
<ul>
<li>"Clone repositories only from trusted sources — <code>.mcp.json</code> files are auto-loaded"(<code>SECURITY.md:116</code>): OMC는 신뢰된 코드/MCP를 전제한다.</li>
<li>"Avoid hook commands — they execute with <code>shell: true</code>"(<code>:112</code>): Hook 자체가 임의 셸 실행 벡터임을 인정.</li>
<li>"Minimize sensitive environment variables — MCP processes inherit them"(<code>:113</code>): env 격리 한계 인정.</li>
<li>결론: 신뢰되지 않은 코드 실행이 필요하면 <strong>OS-레벨 격리를 별도로 깔라</strong>는 것이 공식 권고(<code>:66,124</code>). OMC는 그 위에 얹히는 오케스트레이션 레이어이지 격리 레이어가 아니다.</li>
</ul>
<hr>

<hr>
<h2>10. 포크 관점</h2>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> OMC의 "샌드박스"는 OS 격리가 아니라 <strong>(a) 권한 자동승인 위성 + (b) 앱-레벨 토글 + (c) 작업 격리(worktree)</strong> 의 합성이다 — OS 격리가 필요하면 호스트/외부에 맡긴다.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>PermissionRequest</code> 자동 승인은 "안전 명령만 허용 + 셸 메타문자 전면 차단 + 경로 봉인"으로 호스트 권한 UX 마찰을 줄이는 실용 패턴이다(재사용 가치 높음).</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> team 워커의 <code>--dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox</code>/<code>--yolo</code> 고정은 처리량을 위해 <strong>호스트 샌드박스까지 끄는</strong> 강한 트레이드오프 — 격리가 worktree 한 겹뿐이라는 점은 보안 감사 시 주의.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>OMC_SECURITY=strict</code>의 단방향 강화(config가 완화 불가, <code>Math.min</code>/<code>||</code>)는 정책 잠금을 env만으로 흉내 내는 깔끔한 기법.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> <code>pythonSandbox</code> 플래그가 사실상 무의미화(<code>OMC_PYTHON_SANDBOX no longer gates</code>)된 점은 문서(<code>SECURITY.md</code>)와 코드 간 드리프트 — 확인 필요.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> worktree 격리는 파일 충돌만 막고 env/네트워크/FS는 공유 — 멀티에이전트 신뢰 경계 부재는 구조적 한계.</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<h2>cli-jaw 비교 시사점</h2>
<ul>
<li>
<p><strong>격리 철학의 대비</strong>: cli-jaw는 멀티-CLI 디스패치 메타-하니스로서 여러 CLI를 한 우산 아래 호출한다. OMC가 보여주듯, 그 워커들이 <code>--dangerously-skip-permissions</code>/<code>--approval-bypass</code>로 뜨는 순간 호스트 샌드박스는 무력화되고 유일한 안전은 <strong>작업 격리(worktree) + 프롬프트 권고</strong>로 내려앉는다. cli-jaw가 이종 CLI(직원/employee) 디스패치를 할 때, "어떤 권한 플래그로 자식 CLI를 띄우는가"가 곧 실효 보안 경계임을 OMC <code>runtime-cli.cjs CONTRACTS</code>가 명확히 보여준다 — 디스패처 레벨에서 권한 인자를 명시적 정책으로 다뤄야 한다.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>권한 자동화 vs 다채널 dispatch</strong>: OMC의 <code>PermissionRequest</code> 핸들러(안전명령 화이트리스트 + <code>DANGEROUS_SHELL_CHARS</code> 차단 + repo경계 봉인)는 cli-jaw의 다채널 명령 실행에 직접 차용 가능한 "자동승인 게이트" 청사진이다. cli-jaw가 채널별로 들어오는 명령을 자동 승인할 때, OMC의 "셸 메타문자 한 글자라도 있으면 화이트리스트 무효" 규칙은 채널 경유 인젝션을 막는 최소 방어선이 된다.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>앱-레벨 정책 토글 + 단방향 강화</strong>: cli-jaw가 PABCD 단계마다 다른 위험도를 다룬다면, OMC <code>security-config.ts</code>의 단일 <code>OMC_SECURITY</code> 스위치 + "config는 완화 불가"(<code>Math.min</code>/<code>||</code>) 모델은 PABCD 단계별 보안 프로파일을 env 하나로 잠그는 패턴으로 응용할 수 있다. 특히 <code>disableExternalLLM</code>처럼 <em>워커 스폰 contract 단계에서 throw</em>하는 강제점은 프롬프트 권고보다 신뢰성이 높다.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>신뢰 경계를 명시적으로 위임하라</strong>: OMC <code>SECURITY.md</code>는 "OS 격리는 우리 몫이 아니다, 신뢰된 소스만 써라"를 명문화한다. cli-jaw는 파일 메모리·다채널·PABCD로 상태를 길게 끌고 가므로, <strong>무엇을 cli-jaw가 보장하고 무엇을 호스트/사용자에게 위임하는지</strong>를 OMC처럼 문서로 못박는 것이 멀티-CLI 메타-하니스의 위협 모델 정직성에 필수다. worktree식 작업 격리는 cli-jaw 직원 디스패치의 파일 충돌 방지에 차용 가능하되, 그것이 OS 격리가 아님을 함께 명시해야 한다.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr>

4a:T1776f,<h2>Overview</h2>
<p><strong>Axis 08: Config system</strong> — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:</p>
<ul>
<li>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>170_oh-my-claudecode/</code> — configuration system.</p>
</blockquote>
</li>
<li>
<blockquote>
<p>이 문서는 <code>Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-claudecode</code>(OMC) v4.14.4의 <strong>설정 시스템</strong>을 소스 기반으로 분석한다. 핵심은: OMC는 <strong>호스트(Claude Code)의 <code>settings.json</code> 5-레이어 설정([[08_cc_config]])을 그대로 위임</strong>하고, 그 위에 자체적인 <strong>2-레이어 JSONC 설정 + 환경변수 오버레이</strong>(<code>omc.jsonc</code>)를 얹는 <strong>플러그인 설정 계층</strong>이다.</p>
</blockquote>
</li>
<li>관련: [[00_omc_overview]] · [[08_cc_config]]</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<ul>
<li>| 시스템 | 소유자 | 포맷 | 책무 | 근거 |</li>
<li>| <strong>호스트 설정</strong> | Claude Code | JSON (<code>settings.json</code>) | 권한 모드, MDM/policy, 샌드박스, hooks, 인증, env, MCP allowlist, 기본 모델 | [[08_cc_config]] §1~9 |</li>
<li>| <strong>OMC 플러그인 설정</strong> | OMC | JSONC (<code>omc.jsonc</code>) | 에이전트 모델 라우팅, team 역할 라우팅, 외부 모델 기본값, 기능 토글, 보안 모드 | <code>src/config/loader.ts:206</code> |</li>
<li>OMC는 호스트 설정을 <strong>읽기만 하지 쓰지 않는다</strong>. 호스트의 모델 환경변수(<code>ANTHROPIC_MODEL</code>, <code>CLAUDE_CODE_USE_BEDROCK</code> 등)는 OMC 모델 해석의 입력으로 소비되지만, OMC가 호스트의 <code>settings.json</code>을 병합·검증하는 로직은 없다. 즉 OMC 설정 시스템은 호스트 설정의 <strong>부분집합이 아니라 직교(orthogonal) 보강 계층</strong>이다.</li>
<li><code>loadConfig()</code>(<code>src/config/loader.ts:598</code>)가 세 소스를 <strong>낮은 → 높은</strong> 우선순위로 <code>deepMerge</code>한다:</li>
<li>// src/config/loader.ts:598 — 실제 소스</li>
<li>export function loadConfig(): PluginConfig {</li>
<li>const paths = getConfigPaths();</li>
</ul>

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/config/loader.ts:598 — 실제 소스
export function loadConfig(): PluginConfig {
  const paths = getConfigPaths();
  let config = buildDefaultConfig();          // (0) 코드 내장 기본값

  const userConfig = loadJsoncFile(paths.user);     // (1) user JSONC
  if (userConfig) config = deepMerge(config, userConfig);

  const projectConfig = loadJsoncFile(paths.project); // (2) project JSONC (user 오버라이드)
  if (projectConfig) config = deepMerge(config, projectConfig);

  const envConfig = loadEnvConfig();          // (3) 환경변수 (최우선)
  config = deepMerge(config, envConfig);

  // 비표준 provider 자동 forceInherit (§4.4)
  if (config.routing?.forceInherit !== true
      &#x26;&#x26; process.env.OMC_ROUTING_FORCE_INHERIT === undefined
      &#x26;&#x26; shouldAutoForceInherit()) {
    config.routing = { ...config.routing, forceInherit: true };
  }
  warnOnDeprecatedDelegationRouting(config);
  validateTeamConfig(config);                  // post-merge 검증 (§6)
  return config;
}
</code></pre>

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/config/loader.ts:236 — 실제 소스
export function deepMerge&#x3C;T extends object>(target: T, source: Partial&#x3C;T>): T {
  const result = { ...target };
  for (const key of Object.keys(source) as (keyof T)[]) {
    if (key === "__proto__" || key === "constructor" || key === "prototype") continue; // 프로토타입 오염 방지
    const sourceValue = source[key];
    const targetValue = result[key];
    if (sourceValue !== undefined &#x26;&#x26; typeof sourceValue === "object"
        &#x26;&#x26; sourceValue !== null &#x26;&#x26; !Array.isArray(sourceValue)
        &#x26;&#x26; typeof targetValue === "object" &#x26;&#x26; targetValue !== null
        &#x26;&#x26; !Array.isArray(targetValue)) {
      result[key] = deepMerge(targetValue, sourceValue);  // 객체: 재귀
    } else if (sourceValue !== undefined) {
      result[key] = sourceValue;                           // 스칼라/배열: 통째 교체
    }
  }
  return result as T;
}
</code></pre>

export function parseJsonc(content: string): unknown {
  return JSON.parse(stripJsoncComments(content)); // // 와 /* */ 주석 제거 후 JSON.parse
}
</code></pre>

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/config/models.ts:404 — 실제 소스 (요지)
export function shouldAutoForceInherit(): boolean {
  if (process.env.OMC_ROUTING_FORCE_INHERIT === 'true') return true;
  if (process.env.CLAUDE_CODE_USE_BEDROCK === '1') return true;       // AWS Bedrock
  if (process.env.CLAUDE_CODE_USE_VERTEX === '1') return true;        // Google Vertex AI
  // 직접 모델 env(CLAUDE_MODEL/ANTHROPIC_MODEL)에 Bedrock/Vertex/non-Claude ID
  if (hasBedrockModelId(...) || hasVertexModelId(...) || hasNonClaudeModelId(...)) return true;
  // ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL이 anthropic.com이 아니면 (CC Switch/LiteLLM/OneAPI 프록시)
  const baseUrl = process.env.ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL || '';
  if (baseUrl &#x26;&#x26; !baseUrl.includes('anthropic.com')) {
    const v = validateAnthropicBaseUrl(baseUrl);   // SSRF 가드
    if (!v.allowed) return true;                    // 검증 실패는 안전하게 inherit
    return true;
  }
  return false;
}
</code></pre>
