<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h1>oh-my-claudecode (omc) configuration system</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>Analysis Snapshot</strong>: <code>170_oh-my-claudecode/</code> — configuration system.</p>
</blockquote>
<blockquote>
<p>This document analyzes the <strong>configuration system</strong> of <code>Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-claudecode</code>(OMC) v4.14.4 based on the source. The key is: OMC is a <strong>plug-in settings layer</strong> that delegates the 5-layer <code>settings.json</code> settings ([[08_cc_config]]) of the host (Claude Code) as is, and tops it with its own <strong>2-layer JSONC settings + environment variable overlay</strong> (<code>omc.jsonc</code>). The essential responsibilities of OMC settings are (1) <strong>agent model routing</strong> (tier→model interpretation), (2) <strong>provider/model routing by <code>/team</code> role</strong>, (3) <strong>external model (Codex/Gemini) default</strong>, (4) <strong>function toggle/security mode</strong>. Core configuration responsibilities such as privileged modes, MDM policies, sandboxes, and authentication are all hosted and intentionally <strong>absent</strong> from the OMC. Base paths: <code>src/config/loader.ts</code>, <code>src/config/models.ts</code>, <code>src/lib/security-config.ts</code>, <code>src/utils/config-dir.ts</code>, <code>src/utils/paths.ts</code>, <code>src/team/stage-router.ts</code>, <code>src/features/delegation-routing/</code>, <code>.mcp.json</code>, <code>CLAUDE.md</code>, <code>AGENTS.md</code>.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>Related: [[00_omc_overview]] · [[08_cc_config]]</p>
<hr>
<h2>1. Setting hierarchy and priority</h2>
<h3>1.1 Two independent configuration systems</h3>
<p>In the environment in which OMC operates, <strong>two unrelated configuration systems</strong> coexist:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>system</th>
<th>Owner</th>
<th>Format</th>
<th>Responsibilities</th>
<th>Evidence</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><strong>Host Settings</strong></td>
<td>Claude Code</td>
<td>JSON (<code>settings.json</code>)</td>
<td>permission mode, MDM/policy, sandbox, hooks, authentication, env, MCP allowlist, base model</td>
<td>[[08_cc_config]] §1~9</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>OMC plugin settings</strong></td>
<td>OMC</td>
<td>JSONC (<code>omc.jsonc</code>)</td>
<td>Agent model routing, team role routing, external model defaults, feature toggles, security modes</td>
<td><code>src/config/loader.ts:206</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>OMC <strong>does not read</strong> host settings. The host's model environment variables (<code>ANTHROPIC_MODEL</code>, <code>CLAUDE_CODE_USE_BEDROCK</code>, etc.) are consumed as input for OMC model interpretation, but there is no logic for the OMC to merge and verify the host's <code>settings.json</code>. In other words, the OMC configuration system is not a subset of the host configuration, but an orthogonal reinforcement layer.</p>
<h3>1.2 3-layer priority in OMC settings</h3>
<p><code>loadConfig()</code>(<code>src/config/loader.ts:598</code>) <code>deepMerge</code>s three sources from <strong>low → high</strong> priority:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/config/loader.ts:598 — 실제 소스
export function loadConfig(): PluginConfig {
  const paths = getConfigPaths();
  let config = buildDefaultConfig();          // (0) 코드 내장 기본값

  const userConfig = loadJsoncFile(paths.user);     // (1) user JSONC
  if (userConfig) config = deepMerge(config, userConfig);

  const projectConfig = loadJsoncFile(paths.project); // (2) project JSONC (user 오버라이드)
  if (projectConfig) config = deepMerge(config, projectConfig);

  const envConfig = loadEnvConfig();          // (3) 환경변수 (최우선)
  config = deepMerge(config, envConfig);

  // 비표준 provider 자동 forceInherit (§4.4)
  if (config.routing?.forceInherit !== true
      &#x26;&#x26; process.env.OMC_ROUTING_FORCE_INHERIT === undefined
      &#x26;&#x26; shouldAutoForceInherit()) {
    config.routing = { ...config.routing, forceInherit: true };
  }
  warnOnDeprecatedDelegationRouting(config);
  validateTeamConfig(config);                  // post-merge 검증 (§6)
  return config;
}
</code></pre>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>order</th>
<th>layer</th>
<th>path/source</th>
<th>Priority</th>
<th>Evidence</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>0</td>
<td><strong>Built-in default</strong></td>
<td><code>buildDefaultConfig()</code></td>
<td>Bottom</td>
<td><code>loader.ts:43</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><strong>User config</strong></td>
<td><code>{XDG_CONFIG_HOME|~/.config}/claude-omc/config.jsonc</code></td>
<td>↑</td>
<td><code>loader.ts:206</code>, <code>paths.ts:getConfigDir</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td><strong>Project config</strong></td>
<td><code>{cwd}/.claude/omc.jsonc</code></td>
<td>↑</td>
<td><code>loader.ts:211</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td><strong>Environment Variables</strong></td>
<td><code>OMC_*</code> (loadEnvConfig)</td>
<td><strong>Top</strong></td>
<td><code>loader.ts:270</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>Compared to the 5-layer ([[08_cc_config]] §1: user→project→local→flag→policy) of the host Claude Code, OMC is <strong>simplified to 3-layer</strong>, and <strong>there is no layer corresponding to local/flag/policy(MDM)</strong>. That is, the OMC has no <code>settings.local.json</code> (gitignore layer), no CLI <code>--settings</code> argument, and no MDM/managed-settings drop-in — these are treated as "intentional absences" in §9.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    subgraph Host["호스트 Claude Code 설정 (OMC가 위임 — [[08_cc_config]])"]
        H1["settings.json 5-레이어&#x3C;br/>user→project→local→flag→policy"]
        H2["권한 모드 / MDM / 샌드박스 / hooks / 인증"]
    end
    subgraph OMC["OMC 플러그인 설정 (직교 보강)"]
        D0["buildDefaultConfig()&#x3C;br/>코드 내장 기본값"]
        D1["user: ~/.config/claude-omc/config.jsonc"]
        D2["project: .claude/omc.jsonc"]
        D3["env: OMC_* 환경변수"]
        D0 --> MERGE["deepMerge (재귀, 후순위 승)"]
        D1 --> MERGE
        D2 --> MERGE
        D3 --> MERGE
        MERGE --> VAL["validateTeamConfig() 검증"]
        VAL --> CFG["PluginConfig (effective)"]
    end
    H1 -. "ANTHROPIC_MODEL / USE_BEDROCK 등 읽기" .-> D3
    CFG --> RT["런타임: 에이전트/team 스폰 모델 결정"]
</code></pre>
<h3>1.3 deep-merge implementation</h3>
<p><code>deepMerge</code>(<code>loader.ts:236</code>) is similar to the host's <code>cQ()</code> ([[08_cc_config]] §1.2), but <strong>array handling is different</strong>:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/config/loader.ts:236 — 실제 소스
export function deepMerge&#x3C;T extends object>(target: T, source: Partial&#x3C;T>): T {
  const result = { ...target };
  for (const key of Object.keys(source) as (keyof T)[]) {
    if (key === "__proto__" || key === "constructor" || key === "prototype") continue; // 프로토타입 오염 방지
    const sourceValue = source[key];
    const targetValue = result[key];
    if (sourceValue !== undefined &#x26;&#x26; typeof sourceValue === "object"
        &#x26;&#x26; sourceValue !== null &#x26;&#x26; !Array.isArray(sourceValue)
        &#x26;&#x26; typeof targetValue === "object" &#x26;&#x26; targetValue !== null
        &#x26;&#x26; !Array.isArray(targetValue)) {
      result[key] = deepMerge(targetValue, sourceValue);  // 객체: 재귀
    } else if (sourceValue !== undefined) {
      result[key] = sourceValue;                           // 스칼라/배열: 통째 교체
    }
  }
  return result as T;
}
</code></pre>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>side</th>
<th>OMC <code>deepMerge</code></th>
<th>host <code>cQ()</code> ([[08_cc_config]] §1.2)</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>object</td>
<td>recursive merge</td>
<td>recursive merge</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Array</strong></td>
<td><strong>Replace whole</strong> (subsequent order replaces previous array)</td>
<td><strong>Set union</strong> (duplicate removal union)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>scalar</td>
<td>junior win</td>
<td>junior win</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Security</td>
<td>Block <code>__proto__/constructor/prototype</code> key</td>
<td>(no applicable protection)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>The choice to replace rather than unionize an array allows the user to <strong>completely redefine</strong> a trigger list like <code>magicKeywords.ultrawork</code> (replace, not accumulate).</p>
<hr>
<h2>2. Configuration file format (JSONC)</h2>
<p>OMC adopts <strong>JSONC (annotated JSON)</strong>, unlike the host's pure JSON. Have your own parser without a separate library:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/utils/jsonc.ts — 실제 소스 (요지)
export function parseJsonc(content: string): unknown {
  return JSON.parse(stripJsoncComments(content)); // // 와 /* */ 주석 제거 후 JSON.parse
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>loadJsoncFile</code>(<code>loader.ts:218</code>) returns <code>null</code> if there is no file, and <code>null</code> after <code>console.error</code> if parsing fails, so <strong>parsing failure does not break the entire load</strong> (graceful degradation). This is much lighter processing, as opposed to host <code>tengu_config_parse_error</code> telemetry + Zod verification ([[08_cc_config]] §11).</p>
<p><strong>JSON Schema for editor auto-completion is generated by code</strong> — <code>generateConfigSchema()</code>(<code>loader.ts:775</code>) returns draft-07 schema. There are no external schema URLs exposed to the schemastore like hosts, and there is no runtime Zod validation. Instead, <code>validateTeamConfig()</code> (§6) only imperatively validates the <code>team</code> section.</p>
<hr>

<h3>3.1 Agent basic tier mapping</h3>
<p>The <code>agents</code> section maps 19 agents to 3 tiers (LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH) (consistent with the [[00_omc_overview]] §3 catalog):</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/config/loader.ts:47 — 실제 소스 (발췌)
agents: {
  omc:        { model: defaultTierModels.HIGH },   // 오케스트레이터
  explore:    { model: defaultTierModels.LOW },    // haiku급
  analyst:    { model: defaultTierModels.HIGH },
  planner:    { model: defaultTierModels.HIGH },
  architect:  { model: defaultTierModels.HIGH },
  critic:     { model: defaultTierModels.HIGH },
  codeReviewer:{ model: defaultTierModels.HIGH },
  codeSimplifier:{ model: defaultTierModels.HIGH },
  executor:   { model: defaultTierModels.MEDIUM }, // sonnet급 기본 일꾼
  debugger:   { model: defaultTierModels.MEDIUM },
  verifier:   { model: defaultTierModels.MEDIUM },
  writer:     { model: defaultTierModels.LOW },
  // ... (securityReviewer/testEngineer/designer/qaTester/scientist/tracer/gitMaster/documentSpecialist)
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>defaultTierModels</code> is populated with a call to <code>getDefaultTierModels()</code>(<code>models.ts:174</code>), which <strong>rereads environment variables at each call</strong> (prevents capturing stale values ​​at module load time — <code>loader.ts:38</code> comment). Therefore, <code>DEFAULT_CONFIG</code> (<code>loader.ts:201</code>) is static, but <code>loadConfig()</code> always makes a new call to <code>buildDefaultConfig()</code> (<code>loader.ts:602</code>) to reflect the latest env.</p>
<hr>
<h2>4. Model routing settings (<code>routing</code>)</h2>
<p>This is the most core responsibility of setting up OMC. The host determines a single session model ([[08_cc_config]] §6), but the OMC adds a routing layer that gives each agent a different model tier.</p>
<h3>4.1 routing defaults</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/config/loader.ts:96 — 실제 소스
routing: {
  enabled: true,
  defaultTier: "MEDIUM",
  forceInherit: false,
  escalationEnabled: true,
  maxEscalations: 2,
  tierModels: { ...defaultTierModels },     // {LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH} → 모델 ID
  agentOverrides: {
    architect: { tier: "HIGH", reason: "Advisory agent requires deep reasoning" },
    planner:   { tier: "HIGH", reason: "Strategic planning requires deep reasoning" },
    critic:    { tier: "HIGH", reason: "Critical review requires deep reasoning" },
    analyst:   { tier: "HIGH", reason: "Pre-planning analysis requires deep reasoning" },
    explore:   { tier: "LOW",  reason: "Exploration is search-focused" },
    writer:    { tier: "LOW",  reason: "Documentation is straightforward" },
  },
  escalationKeywords: ["critical","production","urgent","security","breaking",
                       "architecture","refactor","redesign","root cause"],
  simplificationKeywords: ["find","list","show","where","search","locate","grep"],
}
</code></pre>
<h3>4.2 tier → Model ID interpretation (<code>models.ts</code>)</h3>
<p><code>getDefaultTierModels()</code> interprets each tier with <strong>4 levels of priority</strong> (<code>models.ts:90</code>, <code>TIER_ENV_KEYS</code>):</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/config/models.ts:10 — 실제 소스
const TIER_ENV_KEYS = {
  LOW:    ['OMC_MODEL_LOW',    'CLAUDE_CODE_BEDROCK_HAIKU_MODEL',  'ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_HAIKU_MODEL'],
  MEDIUM: ['OMC_MODEL_MEDIUM', 'CLAUDE_CODE_BEDROCK_SONNET_MODEL', 'ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_SONNET_MODEL'],
  HIGH:   ['OMC_MODEL_HIGH',   'CLAUDE_CODE_BEDROCK_OPUS_MODEL',   'ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_OPUS_MODEL'],
};
export const CLAUDE_FAMILY_DEFAULTS = {     // 날짜 없는 정본 — 버전업이 1줄 수정 (models.ts:32)
  HAIKU: 'claude-haiku-4-5', SONNET: 'claude-sonnet-4-6', OPUS: 'claude-opus-4-7',
};
export const BUILTIN_TIER_MODEL_DEFAULTS = {
  LOW: CLAUDE_FAMILY_DEFAULTS.HAIKU, MEDIUM: CLAUDE_FAMILY_DEFAULTS.SONNET, HIGH: CLAUDE_FAMILY_DEFAULTS.OPUS,
};
</code></pre>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>tier</th>
<th>1. OMC env</th>
<th>2. CC Bedrock env</th>
<th>3. Anthropic family env</th>
<th>4. Built-in fallback</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>LOW</td>
<td><code>OMC_MODEL_LOW</code></td>
<td><code>CLAUDE_CODE_BEDROCK_HAIKU_MODEL</code></td>
<td><code>ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_HAIKU_MODEL</code></td>
<td><code>claude-haiku-4-5</code></td>
</tr>

<td>MEDIUM</td>
<td><code>OMC_MODEL_MEDIUM</code></td>
<td><code>CLAUDE_CODE_BEDROCK_SONNET_MODEL</code></td>
<td><code>ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_SONNET_MODEL</code></td>
<td><code>claude-sonnet-4-6</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>HIGH</td>
<td><code>OMC_MODEL_HIGH</code></td>
<td><code>CLAUDE_CODE_BEDROCK_OPUS_MODEL</code></td>
<td><code>ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_OPUS_MODEL</code></td>
<td><code>claude-opus-4-7</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>While the host's <code>Pt</code> mapping table ([[08_cc_config]] §6.2) <strong>hardcodes</strong> the logical key → provider-specific ID, the OMC flexibly externalizes the model ID in a <strong>tier → env → fallback chain</strong>. Additional overrides possible with <code>routing.tierModels[tier]</code> or <code>agents.&#x3C;name>.model</code> in user config (<code>models.ts:71</code> comment).</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    START["에이전트 스폰 요청 (role)"] --> FI{"routing.forceInherit?"}
    FI -->|"true"| INH["model 파라미터 미전달&#x3C;br/>→ 부모 세션 모델 상속"]
    FI -->|"false"| OV{"agentOverrides[role]?"}
    OV -->|"있음"| T1["tier = override.tier"]
    OV -->|"없음"| T2["tier = routing.defaultTier (MEDIUM)"]
    T1 --> RES["resolveTierToModelId(tier)"]
    T2 --> RES
    RES --> E1{"OMC_MODEL_&#x26;lt;TIER&#x26;gt;?"}
    E1 -->|"있음"| FINAL["모델 ID"]
    E1 -->|"없음"| E2{"CC Bedrock env?"}
    E2 -->|"있음"| FINAL
    E2 -->|"없음"| E3{"Anthropic family env?"}
    E3 -->|"있음"| FINAL
    E3 -->|"없음"| FB["내장 fallback&#x3C;br/>(haiku-4-5/sonnet-4-6/opus-4-7)"]
    FB --> FINAL
    INH --> DONE["Task/Agent 스폰"]
    FINAL --> DONE
</code></pre>
<h3>4.3 Model alias override</h3>
<p>When the <code>OMC_MODEL_ALIAS_{HAIKU,SONNET,OPUS}</code> env is set, it is injected into <code>routing.modelAliases</code> (<code>loader.ts:332</code>, issue #1211). The value is normalized to one of <code>haiku|sonnet|opus|inherit</code> — e.g. <code>OMC_MODEL_ALIAS_OPUS=sonnet</code> to demote an opus request to sonnet.</p>
<h3>4.4 forceInherit — Automatic detection of non-standard providers</h3>
<p>This is the most sophisticated part of OMC model routing. If you pass the Claude tier alias (<code>sonnet/opus/haiku</code>) as is to Bedrock/Vertex/proxy, a <strong>400 error</strong> will occur, so when the OMC detects a non-standard provider, it inherits the parent session model without passing any model parameters.</p>
<p>Conditions for which <code>shouldAutoForceInherit()</code>(<code>models.ts:404</code>) returns <code>true</code>:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/config/models.ts:404 — 실제 소스 (요지)
export function shouldAutoForceInherit(): boolean {
  if (process.env.OMC_ROUTING_FORCE_INHERIT === 'true') return true;
  if (process.env.CLAUDE_CODE_USE_BEDROCK === '1') return true;       // AWS Bedrock
  if (process.env.CLAUDE_CODE_USE_VERTEX === '1') return true;        // Google Vertex AI
  // 직접 모델 env(CLAUDE_MODEL/ANTHROPIC_MODEL)에 Bedrock/Vertex/non-Claude ID
  if (hasBedrockModelId(...) || hasVertexModelId(...) || hasNonClaudeModelId(...)) return true;
  // ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL이 anthropic.com이 아니면 (CC Switch/LiteLLM/OneAPI 프록시)
  const baseUrl = process.env.ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL || '';
  if (baseUrl &#x26;&#x26; !baseUrl.includes('anthropic.com')) {
    const v = validateAnthropicBaseUrl(baseUrl);   // SSRF 가드
    if (!v.allowed) return true;                    // 검증 실패는 안전하게 inherit
    return true;
  }
  return false;
}
</code></pre>
<p>Additionally, <code>isProviderSpecificModelId()</code>/<code>isSubagentSafeModelId()</code>(<code>models.ts:270,307</code>) identifies Bedrock prefixed(<code>us.anthropic.claude-*</code>), Bedrock ARN(<code>arn:aws:bedrock:...</code>), Vertex(<code>vertex_ai/...</code>) ID, Extended context suffix (<code>hasExtendedContextSuffix</code>, <code>models.ts:295</code>) such as <code>[1m]</code>/<code>[200k]</code> are rejected by the subagent runtime and are therefore excluded from the safety model judgment. This is the OMC's reinterpretation of the host's <code>mA()</code> provider branch ([[08_cc_config]] §6.1) from the perspective of <strong>subagent spawning safety</strong>.</p>
<hr>
<h2>5. External model/team role routing</h2>
<h3>5.1 externalModels (Codex/Gemini default)</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/config/loader.ts:146 — 실제 소스
externalModels: {
  defaults: {
    codexModel:  BUILTIN_EXTERNAL_MODEL_DEFAULTS.codexModel,   // 'gpt-5.3-codex' (models.ts:53)
    geminiModel: BUILTIN_EXTERNAL_MODEL_DEFAULTS.geminiModel,  // 'gemini-3.1-pro-preview'
  },
  fallbackPolicy: {
    onModelFailure: "provider_chain",
    allowCrossProvider: false,
    crossProviderOrder: ["codex", "gemini"],
  },
}
</code></pre>
<p>env overrides: <code>OMC_EXTERNAL_MODELS_DEFAULT_PROVIDER</code>, <code>OMC_EXTERNAL_MODELS_DEFAULT_CODEX_MODEL</code> (legacy <code>OMC_CODEX_DEFAULT_MODEL</code>), <code>OMC_EXTERNAL_MODELS_DEFAULT_GEMINI_MODEL</code> (legacy <code>OMC_GEMINI_DEFAULT_MODEL</code>), <code>OMC_EXTERNAL_MODELS_FALLBACK_POLICY</code>(<code>provider_chain|cross_provider|claude_only</code>)(<code>loader.ts:358~408</code>).</p>
<h3>5.2 team.roleRouting — canonical role-specific provider/model</h3>
<p>Opt-in feature to route <code>/team</code> workers to <strong>different providers by role</strong> (claude/codex/gemini). The default is an empty object (<code>team:{ops:{},roleRouting:{}}</code>, <code>loader.ts:165</code>) with <strong>action change 0</strong> until set.</p>
<p>Resolving order of <code>resolveRoleAssignment()</code>(<code>stage-router.ts:155</code>):</p>
<ol>
<li><strong>canonical role normalization</strong>: Normalize aliases such as <code>reviewer</code>→<code>code-reviewer</code> (<code>normalizeDelegationRole</code>, <code>delegation-routing/types.ts:84</code>, alias table <code>DEPRECATED_ROLE_ALIASES</code>).</li>
<li>Search spec in <code>cfg.team.roleRouting[role]</code>.</li>
<li><strong>orchestrator is always pinned by provider to <code>claude</code></strong> — User can only adjust <code>model</code> (enforced in <code>loader.ts:530</code> validation).</li>
<li>Fill in the default: <code>provider='claude'</code>, <code>model</code>=role basic tier, <code>agent</code>=<code>ROLE_TO_AGENT[role]</code>.</li>
</ol>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/team/stage-router.ts:155~183 — 실제 소스 (요지)
const provider = isOrchestrator ? 'claude' : (spec?.provider ?? 'claude');
const model = provider === 'claude'
  ? resolveClaudeModel(canonical, spec?.model, cfg)       // tier→ID 확장
  : resolveExternalModel(provider, spec?.model, cfg);     // codex/gemini는 tier 무의미 → builtin default
const agent = spec?.agent ?? ROLE_TO_AGENT[canonical];
return { provider, model, agent };
</code></pre>
<p>Tier analysis is processed by <code>resolveTierToModelId()</code>(<code>stage-router.ts:105</code>) in the order <code>cfg.routing.tierModels[tier]</code> → <code>getDefaultTierModels()[tier]</code>. Since codex/gemini does not have a Claude tier concept, the tier input is the builtin default, and only the explicit model ID is passed (<code>stage-router.ts:128</code>).</p>
<p><strong>fallback pre-interpretation</strong>: <code>buildResolvedRoutingSnapshot()</code> (<code>stage-router.ts:198</code>) pre-interprets all canonical roles as <code>{primary, fallback}</code> pairs when creating a team and persists them in <code>TeamConfig.resolved_routing</code>. The fallback is <strong>always the claude worker</strong> (when the primary's CLI binary is not present at spawn time — AC-8). If the external primary is an explicit non-tier model ID, the ID is dropped in the fallback so that the external model ID is not sent to the claude (<code>stage-router.ts:216</code>).</p>
<p>env override: <code>OMC_TEAM_ROLE_OVERRIDES</code> (single JSON object, warn and ignore if parsing fails — <code>loader.ts:578</code>).</p>
<h3>5.3 delegationRouting (deprecated)</h3>
<p><code>delegationRouting</code> was an MCP delegation to Codex/Gemini, but was <strong>deprecated</strong> and fell back to Claude Task (<code>loader.ts:447</code> <code>warnOnDeprecatedDelegationRouting</code>, <code>resolver.ts:24</code>). External models are now directed to use the <code>/team</code> CLI worker. Default <code>enabled:false</code>.</p>
<hr>
<h2>6. Validate team configuration (validateTeamConfig)</h2>
<p>The only section in the OMC that has imperative schema validation** is <code>team</code> (<code>loader.ts:483</code>). In post-merge, we traverse the raw parsing object and even bypass deepMerge:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>verification key</th>
<th>Allowed values ​​</th>
<th>In case of violation</th>
<th>Evidence</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>team.ops.defaultAgentType</code></td>
<td><code>claude|codex|gemini</code></td>
<td><code>throw Error</code></td>
<td><code>loader.ts:491</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>team.ops.worktreeMode</code></td>
<td><code>disabled|off|detached|branch|named</code></td>
<td><code>throw Error</code></td>
<td><code>loader.ts:501</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>team.roleRouting.&#x3C;role></code> key</td>
<td>15 <code>CANONICAL_TEAM_ROLES</code> (after alias normalization)</td>
<td><code>throw "unknown role"</code></td>
<td><code>loader.ts:516</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>roleRouting.orchestrator</code></td>
<td>Only <code>model</code> is allowed (provider cannot be changed)</td>
<td><code>throw</code></td>
<td><code>loader.ts:530</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>&#x3C;role>.provider</code></td>
<td><code>claude|codex|gemini</code></td>
<td><code>throw</code></td>
<td><code>loader.ts:547</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>

<td><code>throw</code></td>
<td><code>loader.ts:554</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>&#x3C;role>.agent</code></td>
<td><code>KNOWN_AGENT_NAMES</code> member</td>
<td><code>throw "unknown agent"</code></td>
<td><code>loader.ts:561</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>Unlike the host's Zod full validation ([[08_cc_config]] §4), OMC only strongly validates the team section with throws and leaves the rest lenient — an optional hardening intended to prevent incorrect model routing from silently breaking at runtime.</p>
<hr>
<h2>7. Security settings (security-config.ts)</h2>
<p>OMC has a separate security configuration interpreter (<code>src/lib/security-config.ts</code>). Priority: <strong>config file > <code>OMC_SECURITY</code> env > defaults</strong> (in strict mode, config <strong>cannot relax security, can only harden it</strong>).</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/lib/security-config.ts:39 — 실제 소스
const DEFAULTS = {
  restrictToolPaths:false, pythonSandbox:false, disableProjectSkills:false,
  disableAutoUpdate:false, hardMaxIterations:500, disableRemoteMcp:false, disableExternalLLM:false,
};
const STRICT_OVERRIDES = {   // OMC_SECURITY=strict 시
  restrictToolPaths:true, pythonSandbox:true, disableProjectSkills:true,
  disableAutoUpdate:true, hardMaxIterations:200, disableRemoteMcp:true, disableExternalLLM:true,
};
</code></pre>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>key</th>
<th align="center">Basic</th>
<th align="center">strict</th>
<th>effect</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>restrictToolPaths</code></td>
<td align="center">false</td>
<td align="center">true</td>
<td>Restrict <code>ast_grep</code> path to project root</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>pythonSandbox</code></td>
<td align="center">false</td>
<td align="center">true</td>
<td>Block <code>python_repl</code> module/builtin</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>disableProjectSkills</code></td>
<td align="center">false</td>
<td align="center">true</td>
<td>Block <code>.omc/skills/</code> project skill loading</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>disableAutoUpdate</code></td>
<td align="center">false</td>
<td align="center">true</td>
<td>Block silent automatic updates</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>hardMaxIterations</code></td>
<td align="center">500</td>
<td align="center">200</td>
<td>persistent loop hard upper bound ([[00_omc_overview]] §7.1)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>disableRemoteMcp</code></td>
<td align="center">false</td>
<td align="center">true</td>
<td>Exa/Context7 remote MCP blocking</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>disableExternalLLM</code></td>
<td align="center">false</td>
<td align="center">true</td>
<td>Block Codex/Gemini from team</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>Strict merging is handled as OR(boolean)·MIN(iteration), so <strong>config cannot be looser than strict</strong>(<code>security-config.ts:99</code>). This has the same philosophy as the host's policy layer enforcement key ([[08_cc_config]] §2.3), but in a lighter form: <strong>single env master switch + config one-way enforcement</strong> rather than MDM.</p>
<hr>

<h3>8.4 Configuration directory resolution</h3>
<p>OMC uses two types of directory standards:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>OMC config file</strong> (<code>omc.jsonc</code>): <code>getConfigDir()</code>(<code>paths.ts</code>) — <code>%APPDATA%</code> on Windows, <code>$XDG_CONFIG_HOME</code> or <code>~/.config</code> otherwise. The user path is <code>{configDir}/claude-omc/config.jsonc</code>.</li>
<li><strong>OMC Cache/State</strong>(<code>.omc/</code>): <code>getOmcConfigDir()</code>(<code>config-dir.ts:60</code>) = <code>{getClaudeConfigDir()}/.omc</code> — **Follow the host's <code>CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR</code> and align it to <code>~/.claude/.omc</code>. This logic is mirrored on the three surfaces <code>scripts/lib/config-dir.{mjs,cjs,sh}</code> (<code>config-dir.ts:9</code> comment).</li>
</ul>
<pre><code>{XDG_CONFIG_HOME|~/.config}/claude-omc/config.jsonc   # OMC user 설정
{cwd}/.claude/omc.jsonc                                # OMC project 설정
{CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR|~/.claude}/.omc/                    # OMC 캐시/상태 (호스트 추종)
{cwd}/.omc/                                            # 프로젝트 영속 상태 ([[00_omc_overview]] §8.2)
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>9. Intentional Absence / Host Delegation</h2>
<p>Because OMC is a plugin, it intentionally delegates much of its configuration system to the host. The following items are <strong>not</strong> in the OMC source and are the responsibility of the host:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Absent items</th>
<th>host location ([[08_cc_config]])</th>
<th>Basis for delegation</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><strong>Privilege mode (6 types)</strong></td>
<td>§3.1 permission-mode-enum</td>
<td>OMC <code>permissions</code> are only allowBash/Edit/Write toggles. The actual permission gate is host PreToolUse/PermissionRequest hook([[00_omc_overview]] §7)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>MDM / policy layer</strong></td>
<td>§2 (plist/registry/managed-settings.d)</td>
<td>No policy enforcement source in OMC. Enterprise policy is entirely hosted</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Sandbox Settings</strong></td>
<td>§4 sandbox key</td>
<td>OMC only <code>pythonSandbox</code> (python_repl only). OS Sandbox is host</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>local/flag layer</strong></td>
<td>§1 localSettings/flagSettings</td>
<td>OMC only has 2 layers: user+project. gitignore layer·CLI <code>--settings</code> None</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Zod Runtime Verification/Public JSON Schema</strong></td>
<td>§4 vX() / schemastore</td>
<td>OMC only performs imperative verification for <code>team</code>, schema generates code (private)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Manage authentication/provider env directly</strong></td>
<td>§9.1 (API key, base URL)</td>
<td>The OMC only detects providers by reading them (<code>models.ts</code>). The authentication itself is hosted on</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>shadow inspection·telemetry</strong></td>
<td>§3.2, §11</td>
<td>No rule conflict checking·<code>tengu_config_*</code> events in OMC</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>This delegation is consistent with the big picture of [[00_omc_overview]] §1.1 — the OMC does not reimplement the core loop, authentication, and authorization, but puts <strong>only the settings necessary for orchestration (model routing, team, feature toggles)</strong> in its own layer.</p>
<hr>
<h2>10. Comparison with host Claude Code settings</h2>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>side</th>
<th>OMC (omc.jsonc)</th>
<th>Claude Code ([[08_cc_config]])</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><strong>Format</strong></td>
<td>JSONC (allows comments) + own parser</td>
<td>JSON + Zod</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Number of Layers</strong></td>
<td>3 (default→user→project→env)</td>
<td>5 (user→project→local→flag→policy)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Array Merge</strong></td>
<td>Whole replacement</td>
<td>Set union</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Prototype Protection</strong></td>
<td>Block <code>__proto__</code> etc.</td>
<td>(none)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Verification</strong></td>
<td><code>team</code> section only imperative throw</td>
<td>Full Zod + Revalidation after editing</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Model Decision</strong></td>
<td>tier→envchain→fallback, routing by agent</td>
<td><code>Pt</code> hardcoded table, single session model</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>provider branch</strong></td>
<td>forceInherit auto-detection (Bedrock/Vertex/proxy)</td>
<td><code>mA()</code> env branch</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>External Model</strong></td>
<td>Codex/Gemini CLI(externalModels + team.roleRouting)</td>
<td>(none)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Policy Enforcement</strong></td>
<td><code>OMC_SECURITY=strict</code> one-way hardening</td>
<td>MDM policy 4-source</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>per-key origin</strong></td>
<td>(none)</td>
<td><code>T1(source)</code> manual search</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Settings Directory</strong></td>
<td><code>~/.config/claude-omc/</code> + <code>CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR/.omc</code></td>
<td><code>CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR|~/.claude</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<hr>
<h2>cli-jaw comparison implications</h2>
<ul>
<li><strong>Orthogonality of configuration vs. unified dispatch</strong>: While OMC delegates host configuration and places its own JSONC as an <strong>orthogonal reinforcement layer</strong>, cli-jaw is in the opposite position as a meta-harness that dispatches multi-CLIs and must <strong>coordinate and unify the settings of multiple CLIs</strong>. OMC's principle of "the core only holds its own delegation and orchestration settings" is a reference model for the design in which cli-jaw separately holds only the dispatch layer settings without breaking the native settings of each CLI.</li>
<li><strong>tier→envchain→fallback model interpretation</strong>: OMC's <code>TIER_ENV_KEYS</code> 4-level chain (<code>models.ts:10</code>) and <code>forceInherit</code> automatic detection (Bedrock/Vertex/proxy → model parameters not delivered) allow cli-jaw to borrow the robustness pattern of "if provider is non-standard, safely inherit" when routing a heterogeneous model worker pool (different CLI for each PABCD step). You can. In particular, edge processing such as <code>[1m]</code> suffix·ARN format identification reduces model ID compatibility bugs in a multi-CLI environment.</li>
<li><strong>One-way security hardening (OMC_SECURITY=strict)</strong>: OR/MIN merge (<code>security-config.ts:99</code>), where config cannot be looser than strict, is a neat teardown that gives cli-jaw a safe default of "environment master switch always wins, project settings can only be tightened" when dealing with multi-channel, file memory, and automatic dispatch. A lightweight pattern that mimics policy enforcement with a single env without MDM.</li>
<li><strong>Validation selectivity</strong>: If routing is quietly broken, OMC strongly verifies only the critical <code>team</code> section by throwing and leaves the rest graceful (<code>validateTeamConfig</code> vs null when JSONC parsing fails). Like the dispatch routing table (which channel → which CLI), cli-jaw is also worthy of applying a differential verification strategy that strongly verifies only dangerous parts and handles memory and preference settings leniently if errors spread quietly.</li>
</ul>
<hr>

<table>
<thead>

</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>

<td>APIs/flags evolve per release — re-verify on upgrade</td>

<h2>Change history</h2>
<ul>
<li>2026-05-29: Created OMC v4.14.4 configuration system in 10 sections based on source. Host delegation + own 3-layer JSONC (default→user→project→env) structure, deepMerge (array replacement/prototype protection), JSONC's own parser, buildDefaultConfig 12 sections, routing tier→envchain→fallback interpretation and forceInherit non-standard provider automatic detection, externalModels/team.roleRouting (orchestrator pin fixation/fallback dictionary interpretation), validateTeamConfig imperative verification, Security-config one-way strengthening, environment variable system, intentional absence (authority mode/MDM/sandbox/local/flag layer/Zod) organized, host comparison table, and 4 items of cli-jaw implications included.</li>
</ul>
<h2>Korean corpus (reference)</h2>
<blockquote>
<p>Verbatim KO corpus <code>008_config-system/08_omc_config.md</code> for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.</p>
</blockquote>
<h1>oh-my-claudecode (omc) 설정 시스템</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>170_oh-my-claudecode/</code> — configuration system.</p>
</blockquote>
<blockquote>
<p>이 문서는 <code>Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-claudecode</code>(OMC) v4.14.4의 <strong>설정 시스템</strong>을 소스 기반으로 분석한다. 핵심은: OMC는 <strong>호스트(Claude Code)의 <code>settings.json</code> 5-레이어 설정([[08_cc_config]])을 그대로 위임</strong>하고, 그 위에 자체적인 <strong>2-레이어 JSONC 설정 + 환경변수 오버레이</strong>(<code>omc.jsonc</code>)를 얹는 <strong>플러그인 설정 계층</strong>이다. OMC 설정의 본질적 책무는 (1) <strong>에이전트 모델 라우팅</strong>(tier→model 해석), (2) <strong><code>/team</code> 역할별 provider/model 라우팅</strong>, (3) <strong>외부 모델(Codex/Gemini) 기본값</strong>, (4) <strong>기능 토글·보안 모드</strong>다. 권한 모드·MDM 정책·샌드박스·인증 같은 코어 설정 책무는 전부 호스트 것이며 OMC에는 의도적으로 <strong>부재</strong>한다. 근거 경로: <code>src/config/loader.ts</code>, <code>src/config/models.ts</code>, <code>src/lib/security-config.ts</code>, <code>src/utils/config-dir.ts</code>, <code>src/utils/paths.ts</code>, <code>src/team/stage-router.ts</code>, <code>src/features/delegation-routing/</code>, <code>.mcp.json</code>, <code>CLAUDE.md</code>, <code>AGENTS.md</code>.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>관련: [[00_omc_overview]] · [[08_cc_config]]</p>
<hr>
<h2>1. 설정 계층과 우선순위</h2>
<h3>1.1 두 개의 독립 설정 시스템</h3>
<p>OMC가 동작하는 환경에는 <strong>서로 무관한 두 개의 설정 시스템</strong>이 공존한다:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>시스템</th>
<th>소유자</th>
<th>포맷</th>
<th>책무</th>
<th>근거</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><strong>호스트 설정</strong></td>
<td>Claude Code</td>
<td>JSON (<code>settings.json</code>)</td>
<td>권한 모드, MDM/policy, 샌드박스, hooks, 인증, env, MCP allowlist, 기본 모델</td>
<td>[[08_cc_config]] §1~9</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>OMC 플러그인 설정</strong></td>
<td>OMC</td>
<td>JSONC (<code>omc.jsonc</code>)</td>
<td>에이전트 모델 라우팅, team 역할 라우팅, 외부 모델 기본값, 기능 토글, 보안 모드</td>
<td><code>src/config/loader.ts:206</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>OMC는 호스트 설정을 <strong>읽기만 하지 쓰지 않는다</strong>. 호스트의 모델 환경변수(<code>ANTHROPIC_MODEL</code>, <code>CLAUDE_CODE_USE_BEDROCK</code> 등)는 OMC 모델 해석의 입력으로 소비되지만, OMC가 호스트의 <code>settings.json</code>을 병합·검증하는 로직은 없다. 즉 OMC 설정 시스템은 호스트 설정의 <strong>부분집합이 아니라 직교(orthogonal) 보강 계층</strong>이다.</p>
<h3>1.2 OMC 설정의 3-레이어 우선순위</h3>
<p><code>loadConfig()</code>(<code>src/config/loader.ts:598</code>)가 세 소스를 <strong>낮은 → 높은</strong> 우선순위로 <code>deepMerge</code>한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/config/loader.ts:598 — 실제 소스
export function loadConfig(): PluginConfig {
  const paths = getConfigPaths();
  let config = buildDefaultConfig();          // (0) 코드 내장 기본값

  const userConfig = loadJsoncFile(paths.user);     // (1) user JSONC
  if (userConfig) config = deepMerge(config, userConfig);

  const projectConfig = loadJsoncFile(paths.project); // (2) project JSONC (user 오버라이드)
  if (projectConfig) config = deepMerge(config, projectConfig);

  const envConfig = loadEnvConfig();          // (3) 환경변수 (최우선)
  config = deepMerge(config, envConfig);

  // 비표준 provider 자동 forceInherit (§4.4)
  if (config.routing?.forceInherit !== true
      &#x26;&#x26; process.env.OMC_ROUTING_FORCE_INHERIT === undefined
      &#x26;&#x26; shouldAutoForceInherit()) {
    config.routing = { ...config.routing, forceInherit: true };
  }
  warnOnDeprecatedDelegationRouting(config);
  validateTeamConfig(config);                  // post-merge 검증 (§6)
  return config;
}
</code></pre>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>순서</th>
<th>레이어</th>
<th>경로/소스</th>
<th>우선순위</th>
<th>근거</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>0</td>
<td><strong>내장 기본값</strong></td>
<td><code>buildDefaultConfig()</code></td>
<td>최하위</td>
<td><code>loader.ts:43</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><strong>User config</strong></td>
<td><code>{XDG_CONFIG_HOME|~/.config}/claude-omc/config.jsonc</code></td>
<td>↑</td>
<td><code>loader.ts:206</code>, <code>paths.ts:getConfigDir</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td><strong>Project config</strong></td>
<td><code>{cwd}/.claude/omc.jsonc</code></td>
<td>↑</td>
<td><code>loader.ts:211</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td><strong>환경변수</strong></td>
<td><code>OMC_*</code> (loadEnvConfig)</td>
<td><strong>최상위</strong></td>
<td><code>loader.ts:270</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>호스트 Claude Code의 5-레이어([[08_cc_config]] §1: user→project→local→flag→policy)와 비교하면 OMC는 <strong>3-레이어로 단순화</strong>되어 있고, <strong>local/flag/policy(MDM)에 대응하는 레이어가 없다</strong>. 즉 OMC에는 <code>settings.local.json</code>(gitignore 계층)도, CLI <code>--settings</code> 인자도, MDM/managed-settings drop-in도 없다 — 이는 §9에서 "의도적 부재"로 다룬다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    subgraph Host["호스트 Claude Code 설정 (OMC가 위임 — [[08_cc_config]])"]
        H1["settings.json 5-레이어&#x3C;br/>user→project→local→flag→policy"]
        H2["권한 모드 / MDM / 샌드박스 / hooks / 인증"]
    end
    subgraph OMC["OMC 플러그인 설정 (직교 보강)"]
        D0["buildDefaultConfig()&#x3C;br/>코드 내장 기본값"]
        D1["user: ~/.config/claude-omc/config.jsonc"]
        D2["project: .claude/omc.jsonc"]
        D3["env: OMC_* 환경변수"]
        D0 --> MERGE["deepMerge (재귀, 후순위 승)"]
        D1 --> MERGE
        D2 --> MERGE
        D3 --> MERGE
        MERGE --> VAL["validateTeamConfig() 검증"]
        VAL --> CFG["PluginConfig (effective)"]
    end
    H1 -. "ANTHROPIC_MODEL / USE_BEDROCK 등 읽기" .-> D3
    CFG --> RT["런타임: 에이전트/team 스폰 모델 결정"]
</code></pre>
<h3>1.3 deep-merge 구현</h3>
<p><code>deepMerge</code>(<code>loader.ts:236</code>)는 호스트의 <code>cQ()</code>([[08_cc_config]] §1.2)와 유사하지만 <strong>배열 처리가 다르다</strong>:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/config/loader.ts:236 — 실제 소스
export function deepMerge&#x3C;T extends object>(target: T, source: Partial&#x3C;T>): T {
  const result = { ...target };
  for (const key of Object.keys(source) as (keyof T)[]) {
    if (key === "__proto__" || key === "constructor" || key === "prototype") continue; // 프로토타입 오염 방지
    const sourceValue = source[key];
    const targetValue = result[key];
    if (sourceValue !== undefined &#x26;&#x26; typeof sourceValue === "object"
        &#x26;&#x26; sourceValue !== null &#x26;&#x26; !Array.isArray(sourceValue)
        &#x26;&#x26; typeof targetValue === "object" &#x26;&#x26; targetValue !== null
        &#x26;&#x26; !Array.isArray(targetValue)) {
      result[key] = deepMerge(targetValue, sourceValue);  // 객체: 재귀
    } else if (sourceValue !== undefined) {
      result[key] = sourceValue;                           // 스칼라/배열: 통째 교체
    }
  }
  return result as T;
}
</code></pre>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>측면</th>
<th>OMC <code>deepMerge</code></th>
<th>호스트 <code>cQ()</code> ([[08_cc_config]] §1.2)</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>객체</td>
<td>재귀 병합</td>
<td>재귀 병합</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>배열</strong></td>
<td><strong>통째 교체</strong>(후순위가 이전 배열 대체)</td>
<td><strong>Set union</strong>(중복 제거 합집합)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>스칼라</td>
<td>후순위 승</td>
<td>후순위 승</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>보안</td>
<td><code>__proto__/constructor/prototype</code> 키 차단</td>
<td>(해당 보호 없음)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>배열을 union하지 않고 교체하는 선택은 <code>magicKeywords.ultrawork</code> 같은 트리거 리스트를 사용자가 <strong>완전히 재정의</strong>할 수 있게 한다(누적이 아니라 대체).</p>
<hr>
<h2>2. 설정 파일 포맷 (JSONC)</h2>
<p>OMC는 호스트의 순수 JSON과 달리 **JSONC(주석 허용 JSON)**를 채택한다. 별도 라이브러리 없이 자체 파서를 둔다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/utils/jsonc.ts — 실제 소스 (요지)
export function parseJsonc(content: string): unknown {
  return JSON.parse(stripJsoncComments(content)); // // 와 /* */ 주석 제거 후 JSON.parse
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>loadJsoncFile</code>(<code>loader.ts:218</code>)은 파일이 없으면 <code>null</code>, 파싱 실패 시 <code>console.error</code> 후 <code>null</code>을 반환하여 <strong>파싱 실패가 전체 로드를 깨지 않는다</strong>(graceful degradation). 이는 호스트의 <code>tengu_config_parse_error</code> 텔레메트리 + Zod 검증([[08_cc_config]] §11)과 대비되는, 훨씬 가벼운 처리다.</p>
<p>에디터 자동완성을 위한 <strong>JSON Schema는 코드로 생성</strong>된다 — <code>generateConfigSchema()</code>(<code>loader.ts:775</code>)가 draft-07 스키마를 반환한다. 호스트처럼 schemastore에 공개된 외부 스키마 URL은 없고, 런타임 Zod 검증도 없다. 대신 <code>validateTeamConfig()</code>(§6)가 <code>team</code> 섹션만 명령형으로 검증한다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>3. 기본 설정 (buildDefaultConfig)</h2>
<p><code>buildDefaultConfig()</code>(<code>loader.ts:43</code>)가 반환하는 <code>PluginConfig</code>의 최상위 섹션:</p>
<table>

<h3>3.1 에이전트 기본 tier 매핑</h3>
<p><code>agents</code> 섹션은 19개 에이전트를 3개 tier(LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH)에 매핑한다([[00_omc_overview]] §3 카탈로그와 일치):</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/config/loader.ts:47 — 실제 소스 (발췌)
agents: {
  omc:        { model: defaultTierModels.HIGH },   // 오케스트레이터
  explore:    { model: defaultTierModels.LOW },    // haiku급
  analyst:    { model: defaultTierModels.HIGH },
  planner:    { model: defaultTierModels.HIGH },
  architect:  { model: defaultTierModels.HIGH },
  critic:     { model: defaultTierModels.HIGH },
  codeReviewer:{ model: defaultTierModels.HIGH },
  codeSimplifier:{ model: defaultTierModels.HIGH },
  executor:   { model: defaultTierModels.MEDIUM }, // sonnet급 기본 일꾼
  debugger:   { model: defaultTierModels.MEDIUM },
  verifier:   { model: defaultTierModels.MEDIUM },
  writer:     { model: defaultTierModels.LOW },
  // ... (securityReviewer/testEngineer/designer/qaTester/scientist/tracer/gitMaster/documentSpecialist)
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>defaultTierModels</code>는 <code>getDefaultTierModels()</code>(<code>models.ts:174</code>) 호출로 채워지며, 이는 <strong>호출 시점마다 환경변수를 다시 읽는다</strong>(모듈 로드 시점 stale 값 캡처 방지 — <code>loader.ts:38</code> 주석). 따라서 <code>DEFAULT_CONFIG</code>(<code>loader.ts:201</code>)는 정적이지만 <code>loadConfig()</code>는 항상 <code>buildDefaultConfig()</code>를 새로 호출(<code>loader.ts:602</code>)해 최신 env를 반영한다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>4. 모델 라우팅 설정 (<code>routing</code>)</h2>
<p>OMC 설정의 가장 핵심적인 책무다. 호스트는 단일 세션 모델을 결정([[08_cc_config]] §6)하지만, OMC는 <strong>에이전트마다 다른 모델 tier</strong>를 부여하는 라우팅 계층을 추가한다.</p>
<h3>4.1 routing 기본값</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/config/loader.ts:96 — 실제 소스
routing: {
  enabled: true,
  defaultTier: "MEDIUM",
  forceInherit: false,
  escalationEnabled: true,
  maxEscalations: 2,
  tierModels: { ...defaultTierModels },     // {LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH} → 모델 ID
  agentOverrides: {
    architect: { tier: "HIGH", reason: "Advisory agent requires deep reasoning" },
    planner:   { tier: "HIGH", reason: "Strategic planning requires deep reasoning" },
    critic:    { tier: "HIGH", reason: "Critical review requires deep reasoning" },
    analyst:   { tier: "HIGH", reason: "Pre-planning analysis requires deep reasoning" },
    explore:   { tier: "LOW",  reason: "Exploration is search-focused" },
    writer:    { tier: "LOW",  reason: "Documentation is straightforward" },
  },
  escalationKeywords: ["critical","production","urgent","security","breaking",
                       "architecture","refactor","redesign","root cause"],
  simplificationKeywords: ["find","list","show","where","search","locate","grep"],
}
</code></pre>
<h3>4.2 tier → 모델 ID 해석 (<code>models.ts</code>)</h3>
<p><code>getDefaultTierModels()</code>는 각 tier를 <strong>4단계 우선순위</strong>로 해석한다(<code>models.ts:90</code>, <code>TIER_ENV_KEYS</code>):</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/config/models.ts:10 — 실제 소스
const TIER_ENV_KEYS = {
  LOW:    ['OMC_MODEL_LOW',    'CLAUDE_CODE_BEDROCK_HAIKU_MODEL',  'ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_HAIKU_MODEL'],
  MEDIUM: ['OMC_MODEL_MEDIUM', 'CLAUDE_CODE_BEDROCK_SONNET_MODEL', 'ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_SONNET_MODEL'],
  HIGH:   ['OMC_MODEL_HIGH',   'CLAUDE_CODE_BEDROCK_OPUS_MODEL',   'ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_OPUS_MODEL'],
};
export const CLAUDE_FAMILY_DEFAULTS = {     // 날짜 없는 정본 — 버전업이 1줄 수정 (models.ts:32)
  HAIKU: 'claude-haiku-4-5', SONNET: 'claude-sonnet-4-6', OPUS: 'claude-opus-4-7',
};
export const BUILTIN_TIER_MODEL_DEFAULTS = {
  LOW: CLAUDE_FAMILY_DEFAULTS.HAIKU, MEDIUM: CLAUDE_FAMILY_DEFAULTS.SONNET, HIGH: CLAUDE_FAMILY_DEFAULTS.OPUS,
};
</code></pre>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>tier</th>
<th>1. OMC env</th>
<th>2. CC Bedrock env</th>
<th>3. Anthropic family env</th>
<th>4. 내장 fallback</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>LOW</td>
<td><code>OMC_MODEL_LOW</code></td>
<td><code>CLAUDE_CODE_BEDROCK_HAIKU_MODEL</code></td>
<td><code>ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_HAIKU_MODEL</code></td>
<td><code>claude-haiku-4-5</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>MEDIUM</td>
<td><code>OMC_MODEL_MEDIUM</code></td>
<td><code>CLAUDE_CODE_BEDROCK_SONNET_MODEL</code></td>
<td><code>ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_SONNET_MODEL</code></td>
<td><code>claude-sonnet-4-6</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>HIGH</td>
<td><code>OMC_MODEL_HIGH</code></td>
<td><code>CLAUDE_CODE_BEDROCK_OPUS_MODEL</code></td>
<td><code>ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_OPUS_MODEL</code></td>
<td><code>claude-opus-4-7</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>호스트의 <code>Pt</code> 매핑 테이블([[08_cc_config]] §6.2)이 논리 키→프로바이더별 ID를 <strong>하드코딩</strong>하는 데 반해, OMC는 <strong>tier→env→fallback 체인</strong>으로 모델 ID를 유연하게 외부화한다. 사용자 config의 <code>routing.tierModels[tier]</code>나 <code>agents.&#x3C;name>.model</code>로 추가 오버라이드 가능(<code>models.ts:71</code> 주석).</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    START["에이전트 스폰 요청 (role)"] --> FI{"routing.forceInherit?"}
    FI -->|"true"| INH["model 파라미터 미전달&#x3C;br/>→ 부모 세션 모델 상속"]
    FI -->|"false"| OV{"agentOverrides[role]?"}
    OV -->|"있음"| T1["tier = override.tier"]
    OV -->|"없음"| T2["tier = routing.defaultTier (MEDIUM)"]
    T1 --> RES["resolveTierToModelId(tier)"]
    T2 --> RES
    RES --> E1{"OMC_MODEL_&#x26;lt;TIER&#x26;gt;?"}
    E1 -->|"있음"| FINAL["모델 ID"]
    E1 -->|"없음"| E2{"CC Bedrock env?"}
    E2 -->|"있음"| FINAL
    E2 -->|"없음"| E3{"Anthropic family env?"}
    E3 -->|"있음"| FINAL
    E3 -->|"없음"| FB["내장 fallback&#x3C;br/>(haiku-4-5/sonnet-4-6/opus-4-7)"]
    FB --> FINAL
    INH --> DONE["Task/Agent 스폰"]
    FINAL --> DONE
</code></pre>
<h3>4.3 모델 별칭 오버라이드</h3>
<p><code>OMC_MODEL_ALIAS_{HAIKU,SONNET,OPUS}</code> env가 설정되면 <code>routing.modelAliases</code>로 주입된다(<code>loader.ts:332</code>, issue #1211). 값은 <code>haiku|sonnet|opus|inherit</code> 중 하나로 정규화된다 — 예: <code>OMC_MODEL_ALIAS_OPUS=sonnet</code>으로 opus 요청을 sonnet으로 강등.</p>
<h3>4.4 forceInherit — 비표준 프로바이더 자동 감지</h3>
<p>이것이 OMC 모델 라우팅의 가장 정교한 부분이다. Claude tier 별칭(<code>sonnet/opus/haiku</code>)을 Bedrock/Vertex/프록시에 그대로 넘기면 <strong>400 에러</strong>가 나므로, OMC는 비표준 프로바이더를 감지하면 <strong>모델 파라미터를 아예 넘기지 않고 부모 세션 모델을 상속</strong>시킨다.</p>
<p><code>shouldAutoForceInherit()</code>(<code>models.ts:404</code>)가 <code>true</code>를 반환하는 조건:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/config/models.ts:404 — 실제 소스 (요지)
export function shouldAutoForceInherit(): boolean {
  if (process.env.OMC_ROUTING_FORCE_INHERIT === 'true') return true;
  if (process.env.CLAUDE_CODE_USE_BEDROCK === '1') return true;       // AWS Bedrock
  if (process.env.CLAUDE_CODE_USE_VERTEX === '1') return true;        // Google Vertex AI
  // 직접 모델 env(CLAUDE_MODEL/ANTHROPIC_MODEL)에 Bedrock/Vertex/non-Claude ID
  if (hasBedrockModelId(...) || hasVertexModelId(...) || hasNonClaudeModelId(...)) return true;
  // ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL이 anthropic.com이 아니면 (CC Switch/LiteLLM/OneAPI 프록시)
  const baseUrl = process.env.ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL || '';
  if (baseUrl &#x26;&#x26; !baseUrl.includes('anthropic.com')) {
    const v = validateAnthropicBaseUrl(baseUrl);   // SSRF 가드
    if (!v.allowed) return true;                    // 검증 실패는 안전하게 inherit
    return true;
  }
  return false;
}
</code></pre>
<p>부가로 <code>isProviderSpecificModelId()</code>/<code>isSubagentSafeModelId()</code>(<code>models.ts:270,307</code>)는 Bedrock prefixed(<code>us.anthropic.claude-*</code>), Bedrock ARN(<code>arn:aws:bedrock:...</code>), Vertex(<code>vertex_ai/...</code>) ID를 식별하고, <code>[1m]</code>/<code>[200k]</code> 같은 확장 컨텍스트 suffix(<code>hasExtendedContextSuffix</code>, <code>models.ts:295</code>)는 서브에이전트 런타임에서 거부되므로 안전 모델 판정에서 제외한다. 이는 호스트의 <code>mA()</code> provider 분기([[08_cc_config]] §6.1)를 OMC가 <strong>서브에이전트 스폰 안전성</strong> 관점에서 재해석한 것이다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>5. 외부 모델 / team 역할 라우팅</h2>
<h3>5.1 externalModels (Codex/Gemini 기본값)</h3>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/config/loader.ts:146 — 실제 소스
externalModels: {
  defaults: {
    codexModel:  BUILTIN_EXTERNAL_MODEL_DEFAULTS.codexModel,   // 'gpt-5.3-codex' (models.ts:53)
    geminiModel: BUILTIN_EXTERNAL_MODEL_DEFAULTS.geminiModel,  // 'gemini-3.1-pro-preview'
  },
  fallbackPolicy: {
    onModelFailure: "provider_chain",
    allowCrossProvider: false,
    crossProviderOrder: ["codex", "gemini"],
  },
}
</code></pre>
<p>env 오버라이드: <code>OMC_EXTERNAL_MODELS_DEFAULT_PROVIDER</code>, <code>OMC_EXTERNAL_MODELS_DEFAULT_CODEX_MODEL</code>(레거시 <code>OMC_CODEX_DEFAULT_MODEL</code>), <code>OMC_EXTERNAL_MODELS_DEFAULT_GEMINI_MODEL</code>(레거시 <code>OMC_GEMINI_DEFAULT_MODEL</code>), <code>OMC_EXTERNAL_MODELS_FALLBACK_POLICY</code>(<code>provider_chain|cross_provider|claude_only</code>)(<code>loader.ts:358~408</code>).</p>
<h3>5.2 team.roleRouting — 정본 역할별 provider/model</h3>
<p><code>/team</code> 워커를 <strong>역할별로 다른 프로바이더</strong>(claude/codex/gemini)에 라우팅하는 옵트인 기능. 기본값은 빈 객체(<code>team:{ops:{},roleRouting:{}}</code>, <code>loader.ts:165</code>)로 <strong>설정 전까지 동작 변화 0</strong>이다.</p>
<p><code>resolveRoleAssignment()</code>(<code>stage-router.ts:155</code>)의 해석 순서:</p>
<ol>
<li><strong>canonical role 정규화</strong>: <code>reviewer</code>→<code>code-reviewer</code> 등 별칭 정규화(<code>normalizeDelegationRole</code>, <code>delegation-routing/types.ts:84</code>, 별칭표는 <code>DEPRECATED_ROLE_ALIASES</code>).</li>
<li><code>cfg.team.roleRouting[role]</code>에서 spec 조회.</li>
<li><strong>orchestrator는 provider가 항상 <code>claude</code>로 핀 고정</strong> — 사용자는 <code>model</code>만 조정 가능(<code>loader.ts:530</code> 검증에서 강제).</li>
<li>기본 채움: <code>provider='claude'</code>, <code>model</code>=역할 기본 tier, <code>agent</code>=<code>ROLE_TO_AGENT[role]</code>.</li>
</ol>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/team/stage-router.ts:155~183 — 실제 소스 (요지)
const provider = isOrchestrator ? 'claude' : (spec?.provider ?? 'claude');
const model = provider === 'claude'
  ? resolveClaudeModel(canonical, spec?.model, cfg)       // tier→ID 확장
  : resolveExternalModel(provider, spec?.model, cfg);     // codex/gemini는 tier 무의미 → builtin default
const agent = spec?.agent ?? ROLE_TO_AGENT[canonical];
return { provider, model, agent };
</code></pre>
<p>tier 해석은 <code>resolveTierToModelId()</code>(<code>stage-router.ts:105</code>)가 <code>cfg.routing.tierModels[tier]</code> → <code>getDefaultTierModels()[tier]</code> 순으로 처리한다. codex/gemini는 Claude tier 개념이 없으므로 tier 입력은 builtin default로, 명시적 모델 ID만 통과(<code>stage-router.ts:128</code>).</p>
<p><strong>fallback 사전 해석</strong>: <code>buildResolvedRoutingSnapshot()</code>(<code>stage-router.ts:198</code>)이 팀 생성 시 모든 canonical role을 <code>{primary, fallback}</code> 쌍으로 미리 해석해 <code>TeamConfig.resolved_routing</code>에 영속한다. fallback은 <strong>항상 claude 워커</strong>(primary의 CLI 바이너리가 스폰 시점에 없을 때 — AC-8). 외부 primary가 명시적 비-tier 모델 ID면 fallback에는 그 ID를 떨어뜨려 claude에 외부 모델 ID가 가지 않게 한다(<code>stage-router.ts:216</code>).</p>
<p>env 오버라이드: <code>OMC_TEAM_ROLE_OVERRIDES</code>(단일 JSON 객체, 파싱 실패 시 경고 후 무시 — <code>loader.ts:578</code>).</p>
<h3>5.3 delegationRouting (deprecated)</h3>
<p><code>delegationRouting</code>은 Codex/Gemini로의 MCP 위임이었으나 <strong>deprecated</strong>되어 Claude Task로 fallback한다(<code>loader.ts:447</code> <code>warnOnDeprecatedDelegationRouting</code>, <code>resolver.ts:24</code>). 외부 모델은 이제 <code>/team</code> CLI 워커로 쓰도록 안내된다. 기본 <code>enabled:false</code>.</p>
<hr>
<h2>6. team 설정 검증 (validateTeamConfig)</h2>
<p>OMC에서 <strong>유일하게 명령형 스키마 검증</strong>이 있는 섹션이 <code>team</code>이다(<code>loader.ts:483</code>). post-merge에서 raw 파싱 객체를 순회해 deepMerge 우회까지 잡는다:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>검증 키</th>
<th>허용 값</th>

</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>team.ops.defaultAgentType</code></td>
<td><code>claude|codex|gemini</code></td>
<td><code>throw Error</code></td>
<td><code>loader.ts:491</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>team.ops.worktreeMode</code></td>
<td><code>disabled|off|detached|branch|named</code></td>
<td><code>throw Error</code></td>
<td><code>loader.ts:501</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>team.roleRouting.&#x3C;role></code> 키</td>

</tr>
<tr>

<p>호스트의 Zod 전면 검증([[08_cc_config]] §4)과 달리 OMC는 <strong>team 섹션만 throw로 강하게 검증</strong>하고 나머지는 관대하게 둔다 — 잘못된 모델 라우팅이 런타임에 조용히 깨지는 것을 막으려는 선택적 강건화다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>7. 보안 설정 (security-config.ts)</h2>
<p>OMC는 별도의 보안 설정 해석기를 둔다(<code>src/lib/security-config.ts</code>). 우선순위: <strong>config file > <code>OMC_SECURITY</code> env > defaults</strong>(strict 모드에서는 config가 보안을 <strong>완화 불가, 강화만 가능</strong>).</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/lib/security-config.ts:39 — 실제 소스
const DEFAULTS = {
  restrictToolPaths:false, pythonSandbox:false, disableProjectSkills:false,
  disableAutoUpdate:false, hardMaxIterations:500, disableRemoteMcp:false, disableExternalLLM:false,
};
const STRICT_OVERRIDES = {   // OMC_SECURITY=strict 시
  restrictToolPaths:true, pythonSandbox:true, disableProjectSkills:true,
  disableAutoUpdate:true, hardMaxIterations:200, disableRemoteMcp:true, disableExternalLLM:true,
};
</code></pre>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>키</th>
<th align="center">기본</th>
<th align="center">strict</th>
<th>효과</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>restrictToolPaths</code></td>
<td align="center">false</td>
<td align="center">true</td>
<td><code>ast_grep</code> 경로를 프로젝트 루트로 제한</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>pythonSandbox</code></td>
<td align="center">false</td>
<td align="center">true</td>
<td><code>python_repl</code> 모듈/빌트인 차단</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>disableProjectSkills</code></td>
<td align="center">false</td>
<td align="center">true</td>
<td><code>.omc/skills/</code> 프로젝트 스킬 로드 차단</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>disableAutoUpdate</code></td>
<td align="center">false</td>
<td align="center">true</td>
<td>무성 자동 업데이트 차단</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>hardMaxIterations</code></td>
<td align="center">500</td>
<td align="center">200</td>
<td>영속 루프 하드 상한([[00_omc_overview]] §7.1)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>disableRemoteMcp</code></td>
<td align="center">false</td>
<td align="center">true</td>
<td>Exa/Context7 원격 MCP 차단</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>disableExternalLLM</code></td>
<td align="center">false</td>
<td align="center">true</td>
<td>team에서 Codex/Gemini 차단</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>strict 병합은 OR(boolean)·MIN(iteration)로 처리해 <strong>config가 strict보다 느슨해질 수 없다</strong>(<code>security-config.ts:99</code>). 이는 호스트의 policy 레이어 강제 키([[08_cc_config]] §2.3)와 철학이 같지만, MDM이 아니라 <strong>단일 env 마스터 스위치 + config 단방향 강화</strong>라는 더 가벼운 형태다.</p>
<hr>

<h3>8.4 설정 디렉터리 해석</h3>
<p>OMC는 두 종류의 디렉터리 기준을 쓴다:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>OMC config 파일</strong>(<code>omc.jsonc</code>): <code>getConfigDir()</code>(<code>paths.ts</code>) — Windows는 <code>%APPDATA%</code>, 그 외 <code>$XDG_CONFIG_HOME</code> 또는 <code>~/.config</code>. user 경로는 <code>{configDir}/claude-omc/config.jsonc</code>.</li>
<li><strong>OMC 캐시/상태</strong>(<code>.omc/</code>): <code>getOmcConfigDir()</code>(<code>config-dir.ts:60</code>) = <code>{getClaudeConfigDir()}/.omc</code> — <strong>호스트의 <code>CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR</code>을 추종</strong>해 <code>~/.claude/.omc</code>에 정렬. 이 로직은 <code>scripts/lib/config-dir.{mjs,cjs,sh}</code> 3개 표면에 미러링된다(<code>config-dir.ts:9</code> 주석).</li>
</ul>
<pre><code>{XDG_CONFIG_HOME|~/.config}/claude-omc/config.jsonc   # OMC user 설정
{cwd}/.claude/omc.jsonc                                # OMC project 설정
{CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR|~/.claude}/.omc/                    # OMC 캐시/상태 (호스트 추종)
{cwd}/.omc/                                            # 프로젝트 영속 상태 ([[00_omc_overview]] §8.2)
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>9. 의도적 부재 / 호스트 위임</h2>
<p>OMC는 플러그인이므로 설정 시스템의 상당 부분을 <strong>의도적으로 호스트에 위임</strong>한다. 다음은 OMC 소스에 <strong>없으며</strong> 호스트가 책임지는 항목이다:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>부재 항목</th>
<th>호스트 위치 ([[08_cc_config]])</th>
<th>위임 근거</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><strong>권한 모드(6종)</strong></td>
<td>§3.1 permission-mode-enum</td>
<td>OMC <code>permissions</code>는 allowBash/Edit/Write 토글뿐. 실제 권한 게이트는 호스트 PreToolUse/PermissionRequest hook([[00_omc_overview]] §7)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>MDM / policy 레이어</strong></td>
<td>§2 (plist/registry/managed-settings.d)</td>
<td>OMC에 정책 강제 소스 없음. 엔터프라이즈 정책은 전적으로 호스트</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>샌드박스 설정</strong></td>
<td>§4 sandbox 키</td>
<td>OMC는 <code>pythonSandbox</code>만(python_repl 한정). OS 샌드박스는 호스트</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>local/flag 레이어</strong></td>
<td>§1 localSettings/flagSettings</td>
<td>OMC는 user+project 2계층만. gitignore 계층·CLI <code>--settings</code> 없음</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Zod 런타임 검증·공개 JSON Schema</strong></td>
<td>§4 vX() / schemastore</td>
<td>OMC는 <code>team</code>만 명령형 검증, 스키마는 코드 생성(비공개)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>인증/프로바이더 env 직접 관리</strong></td>
<td>§9.1 (API 키, base URL)</td>
<td>OMC는 이들을 <strong>읽어 provider 감지</strong>만(<code>models.ts</code>). 인증 자체는 호스트</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>shadow 검사·텔레메트리</strong></td>
<td>§3.2, §11</td>
<td>OMC에 규칙 충돌 검사·<code>tengu_config_*</code> 이벤트 없음</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>이 위임은 [[00_omc_overview]] §1.1의 큰 그림과 일치한다 — OMC는 코어 루프·인증·권한을 재구현하지 않고 <strong>오케스트레이션에 필요한 설정(모델 라우팅·team·기능 토글)만</strong> 자체 계층으로 둔다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>10. 호스트 Claude Code 설정과의 비교</h2>
<table>

<tr>
<td><strong>포맷</strong></td>

<td><strong>설정 디렉터리</strong></td>

</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<hr>
<h2>cli-jaw 비교 시사점</h2>
<ul>
<li><strong>설정의 직교성 vs 통합 디스패치</strong>: OMC는 호스트 설정을 위임하고 자체 JSONC를 <strong>직교 보강 계층</strong>으로 두는 반면, cli-jaw는 멀티-CLI를 디스패치하는 메타-하니스로서 <strong>여러 CLI의 설정을 조정·통일</strong>해야 하는 정반대 위치다. OMC의 "코어는 위임, 오케스트레이션 설정만 자체 보유" 원칙은 cli-jaw가 각 CLI의 네이티브 설정을 깨지 않으면서 dispatch 레이어 설정만 분리 보유하는 설계의 참고 모델이다.</li>
<li><strong>tier→env체인→fallback 모델 해석</strong>: OMC의 <code>TIER_ENV_KEYS</code> 4단계 체인(<code>models.ts:10</code>)과 <code>forceInherit</code> 자동 감지(Bedrock/Vertex/프록시 → 모델 파라미터 미전달)는 cli-jaw가 이종 모델 워커 풀(PABCD 단계별 다른 CLI)을 라우팅할 때 "프로바이더가 비표준이면 안전하게 상속"이라는 강건성 패턴을 그대로 차용할 수 있다. 특히 <code>[1m]</code> suffix·ARN 형식 식별 같은 엣지 처리는 멀티-CLI 환경에서 모델 ID 호환성 버그를 줄인다.</li>
<li><strong>단방향 보안 강화(OMC_SECURITY=strict)</strong>: config가 strict보다 느슨해질 수 없는 OR/MIN 병합(<code>security-config.ts:99</code>)은 cli-jaw가 다채널·파일 메모리·자동 디스패치를 다룰 때 "환경 마스터 스위치는 항상 이기고, 프로젝트 설정은 조이기만 가능"이라는 안전 기본값을 주는 깔끔한 분해다. MDM 없이 단일 env로 정책 강제를 흉내내는 경량 패턴.</li>
<li><strong>검증 선택성</strong>: OMC는 라우팅이 조용히 깨지면 치명적인 <code>team</code> 섹션만 throw로 강하게 검증하고 나머지는 graceful하게 둔다(<code>validateTeamConfig</code> vs JSONC 파싱 실패 시 null). cli-jaw도 디스패치 라우팅 테이블(어느 채널→어느 CLI)처럼 오류가 조용히 번지면 위험한 부분만 강검증하고, 메모리·선호 설정 등은 관대하게 처리하는 차등 검증 전략을 적용할 만하다.</li>
</ul>
<hr>

<table>

<h2>변경 기록</h2>
<ul>
<li>2026-05-29: OMC v4.14.4 설정 시스템을 소스 기반 10개 섹션으로 작성. 호스트 위임 + 자체 3-레이어 JSONC(default→user→project→env) 구조, deepMerge(배열 교체·프로토타입 보호), JSONC 자체 파서, buildDefaultConfig 12개 섹션, routing tier→env체인→fallback 해석과 forceInherit 비표준 프로바이더 자동 감지, externalModels/team.roleRouting(orchestrator 핀 고정·fallback 사전 해석), validateTeamConfig 명령형 검증, security-config 단방향 강화, 환경변수 체계, 의도적 부재(권한모드/MDM/샌드박스/local·flag 레이어/Zod) 정리, 호스트 비교표 및 cli-jaw 시사점 4항목 포함.</li>
</ul>
27:["$","$L30","20-axis-08-config",{"id":"20-axis-08-config","order":25,"tier":"deep","title":"Axis 08: Config system","description":"008_config-system/08_omc_config.md","lang":"en","badge":"AXIS","children":["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$4a"}}]}]
4b:T12f8e,<h2>Overview</h2>
<p><strong>Axis 09: MCP orchestration</strong> — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:</p>
<ul>
<li>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>170_oh-my-claudecode/</code> — MCP orchestration.</p>
</blockquote>
</li>
<li>oh-my-claudecode(OMC)는 Claude Code 위에 얹히는 플러그인이므로, MCP에 관한 한 [[09_cc_mcp]]에서 분석한 호스트의 4층 구조(설정 병합 → 연결 → 도구 노출 → 리소스)를 <strong>그대로 빌린다</strong>. OMC가 추가하는 것은 두 개의 자체 MCP 서버를 플러그인 매니페스트로 <strong>중앙 주입</strong>한다는 점이다. 첫째는 <code>t</code> 서버로, 상태/노트패드/프로젝트메모리/공유메모리/세션이력/LSP/AST/p</li>
<li>핵심은 <strong>주입 경로의 차이</strong>다. <code>t</code> 서버는 <code>.claude-plugin/plugin.json</code>의 <code>mcpServers</code> 키 → <code>.mcp.json</code> → stdio <code>node bridge/mcp-server.cjs</code>로 <strong>플러그인 설치 즉시 정적 등록</strong>된다. <code>team</code> 서버(<code>bridge/team-mcp.cjs</code>)는 정적 등록되지 않고 런타임에서 <code>omc team</code> CLI가 동적으로 기동한다. 즉 OMC는 "모든 세션</li>
<li>분석 기준 버전은 <code>plugin.json</code> v4.14.4다.</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<ul>
<li><code>.claude-plugin/plugin.json</code>은 <code>"mcpServers": "./.mcp.json"</code>로 MCP 서버 설정 파일을 가리킨다. Claude Code는 플러그인 manifest의 <code>mcpServers</code>를 6개 설정 소스 중 하나로 병합한다([[09_cc_mcp]] §6, plugin manifest 항목). <code>.mcp.json</code> 전문은 다음과 같다:</li>
<li>{</li>
<li>"mcpServers": {</li>
<li>"t": {</li>
<li>"command": "node",</li>
<li>"args": ["${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/bridge/mcp-server.cjs"]</li>
<li>}</li>
</ul>
<h2>Topics covered</h2>
<ul>
<li>
<ol>
<li>Plugin 매니페스트를 통한 중앙 MCP 주입</li>
</ol>
</li>
<li>1.1 <code>.mcp.json</code> — <code>t</code> 서버 단일 정적 등록</li>
<li>1.2 <code>t</code> 서버 Bootstrap (<code>bridge/mcp-server.cjs</code>)</li>
<li>1.3 Zod → JSON Schema 변환 (wire 포맷)</li>
<li>
<ol start="2">
<li>코드 인텔리전스: LSP + AST를 MCP로 노출</li>
</ol>
</li>
<li>2.1 12개 LSP Tool (<code>src/tools/lsp-tools.ts</code>)</li>
<li>2.2 언어서버 매핑 (<code>src/tools/lsp/servers.ts</code>)</li>
<li>2.3 AST Tool (<code>src/tools/ast-tools.ts</code>)</li>
<li>
<ol start="3">
<li><code>team</code> MCP 서버 — tmux + worktree 워커 Runtime</li>
</ol>
</li>
<li>3.1 4개 Tool와 동적 기동</li>
<li>3.2 정적 등록이 아닌 이유 — CLI-only로 마이그레이션 중</li>
<li>3.3 워커 격리 (worktree)</li>
<li>
<ol start="4">
<li><code>OMC_SECURITY=strict</code> — 원격 MCP·외부 LLM 차단</li>
</ol>
</li>
<li>4.1 7개 보안 플래그와 strict 오버라이드</li>
</ul>

<pre><code class="language-typescript">export interface SecurityConfig {
  restrictToolPaths: boolean;     // ast_grep_* 경로를 프로젝트 루트로 제한
  pythonSandbox: boolean;         // python_repl 샌드박스(모듈/builtin 차단)
  disableProjectSkills: boolean;  // .omc/skills/ 로딩 차단
  disableAutoUpdate: boolean;     // 무음 자동 업데이트 차단
  hardMaxIterations: number;      // 영속 루프 하드 상한(0=무제한)
  disableRemoteMcp: boolean;      // 원격 MCP 서버(Exa, Context7) 차단
  disableExternalLLM: boolean;    // 외부 LLM(Codex, Gemini) 차단 (team mode)
}
</code></pre>

  restrictToolPaths: true,
  pythonSandbox: true,
  disableProjectSkills: true,
  disableAutoUpdate: true,
  hardMaxIterations: 200,         // 500 → 200으로 축소
  disableRemoteMcp: true,         // ← 원격 MCP 차단
  disableExternalLLM: true,       // ← 외부 LLM 차단

        Py["python_repl"]
        State["state/notepad/project-memory/shared-memory"]
        Wiki["wiki_* / skills_* / trace_* / deepinit"]
    end

    subgraph TeamServer["team MCP 서버 (CLI-only, 동적)"]
        TeamTools["omc_run_team_start/status/wait/cleanup"]
        Runtime["runtime-cli.cjs → tmux + worktree 워커"]
    end

    subgraph Remote["원격/외부 (코드 경로, OMC_SECURITY로 차단)"]
        Exa["Exa / Context7 / Playwright MCP"]
        Ext["Codex / Gemini CLI"]
    end

    Plugin --> McpJson
    McpJson -->|정적 주입| Merge
    Merge --> Surface
    Surface -->|mcp__t__*| TServer
    OmcCli["omc team CLI"] -->|동적 spawn| TeamServer
    TeamTools --> Runtime
    Sec["OMC_SECURITY=strict&#x3C;br/>(src/lib/security-config.ts)"] -.->|disableRemoteMcp| Exa

    Sec -.->|hardMaxIterations 200| Runtime

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant Inst as 플러그인 설치
    participant CC as Claude Code 코어
    participant Mcp as .mcp.json
    participant T as t 서버 (bridge/mcp-server.cjs)
    participant Reg as tool-registry.ts
    participant Surf as 도구 표면

    Inst->>CC: plugin.json mcpServers 등록
    CC->>Mcp: ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} 치환
    CC->>T: stdio spawn (node mcp-server.cjs)
    T->>T: new Server({name:'t'})
    CC->>T: initialize
    T-->>CC: capabilities {tools:{}}
    CC->>T: tools/list
    T->>Reg: buildListToolsResponse()
    Reg-->>T: lsp(12)+ast(2)+python+state+notepad+memory+wiki+skills+trace+deepinit
    T-->>CC: ListTools (Zod→JSON Schema)
    CC->>Surf: mcp__t__lsp_diagnostics, mcp__t__ast_grep_search, ...
    Note over Surf: 모든 세션이 동일한 코드인텔/상태 도구 표면 획득
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-text">LSP(12):    lsp_hover, lsp_goto_definition, lsp_find_references, lsp_document_symbols,
            lsp_workspace_symbols, lsp_diagnostics, lsp_servers, lsp_prepare_rename,
            lsp_rename, lsp_code_actions, lsp_code_action_resolve, lsp_diagnostics_directory
AST(2):     ast_grep_search, ast_grep_replace
실행(1):    python_repl
상태(5):    state_read, state_write, state_clear, state_list_active, state_get_status
노트패드(6): notepad_read, notepad_write_priority, notepad_write_working,
            notepad_write_manual, notepad_prune, notepad_stats
프로젝트메모리(4): project_memory_read, project_memory_write,
            project_memory_add_note, project_memory_add_directive
trace(2):   trace_timeline, trace_summary
공유메모리(5): shared_memory_write, shared_memory_read, shared_memory_list,
            shared_memory_delete, shared_memory_cleanup
deepinit(1): deepinit_manifest
wiki(7):    wiki_ingest, wiki_query, wiki_lint, wiki_add, wiki_list, wiki_read, wiki_delete
skills(3):  load_omc_skills_local, load_omc_skills_global, list_omc_skills
</code></pre>
<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h1>oh-my-claudecode (omc) MCP Orchestration</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>Analysis Snapshot</strong>: <code>170_oh-my-claudecode/</code> — MCP orchestration.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>Since oh-my-claudecode (OMC) is a plugin that sits on top of Claude Code, as far as MCP is concerned, it <strong>borrows</strong> the four-layer structure of the host analyzed in [[09_cc_mcp]] (configuration merge → connection → tool exposure → resource). What OMC adds is <strong>central injection</strong> of two of its own MCP servers into the plugin manifest. The first is the <code>t</code> server, which aggregates status/notepad/project memory/shared memory/session history/LSP/AST/python_repl/wiki/skills/trace/deepinit tools into a single stdio server. The second is the <code>team</code> server, which launches a tmux panel + git worktree-based external CLI worker (claude/codex/gemini).</p>
<p>The key is <strong>the difference in injection path</strong>. The <code>t</code> server is <strong>statically registered</strong> as soon as the plugin is installed with the <code>mcpServers</code> key of <code>.claude-plugin/plugin.json</code> → <code>.mcp.json</code> → stdio <code>node bridge/mcp-server.cjs</code>. The <code>team</code> server (<code>bridge/team-mcp.cjs</code>) is not statically registered and the <code>omc team</code> CLI is started dynamically at runtime. In other words, the OMC injects the MCP into the host with just one lever: the plugin manifest "so that all sessions have the same code intelligence/state tooling surface." This is an <strong>organization-wide uniformity</strong> design, in contrast to the vanilla Claude Code that relies on user-specific <code>.mcp.json</code>/CLI/claude.ai settings to merge servers ([[09_cc_mcp]] §6).</p>
<p>The analysis standard version is <code>plugin.json</code> v4.14.4.</p>
<hr>
<h2>1. Central MCP injection via plugin manifest</h2>
<h3>1.1 <code>.mcp.json</code> — <code>t</code> server single static registration</h3>
<p><code>.claude-plugin/plugin.json</code> points to the MCP server configuration file as <code>"mcpServers": "./.mcp.json"</code>. Claude Code merges <code>mcpServers</code> from the plugin manifest into one of six configuration sources ([[09_cc_mcp]] §6, plugin manifest entry). The full text of <code>.mcp.json</code> is as follows:</p>
<pre><code class="language-json">{
  "mcpServers": {
    "t": {
      "command": "node",
      "args": ["${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/bridge/mcp-server.cjs"]
    }
  }
}
</code></pre>
<p>Design decisions identified here:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>Server name <code>t</code></strong> — One letter. Like <code>mcp__t__lsp_diagnostics</code>, the tool namespace is shortened to save prompt tokens (the <code>mcp__server__tool</code> namespace combinator from [[09_cc_mcp]] still applies).</li>
<li><strong>Transport only has one stdio</strong> — Create an absolute path with <code>${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}</code> (an environment variable that Claude Code replaces with the plugin root) and launch <code>bridge/mcp-server.cjs</code> as a child process.</li>
<li><strong>Register only one server</strong> — LSP, AST, python, wiki, and state are concentrated in one <code>t</code> rather than scattered across separate servers. Claude Code spawns this server upon health check, receives the entire tool as <code>tools/list</code>, and merges it into the tool surface as <code>mcp__t__*</code>.</li>
</ul>
<p><code>run-mcp-server.sh</code> is a wrapper that adds the global npm root to <code>NODE_PATH</code> to resolve native modules (<code>@ast-grep/napi</code>), but <code>.mcp.json</code> bypasses this and calls <code>node</code> directly (AST tools gracefully degrade at runtime when native modules are absent — <code>tool-registry.ts</code> annotation).</p>
<h3>1.2 <code>t</code> server bootstrap (<code>bridge/mcp-server.cjs</code>)</h3>
<p><code>bridge/mcp-server.cjs</code> is the output (28,000 lines+) of <code>src/mcp/standalone-server.ts</code> bundled with esbuild. The server identity is specified in the source:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// src/mcp/standalone-server.ts
const server = new Server(
  { name: 't', version: '1.0.0' },
  { capabilities: { tools: {} } }
);
server.setRequestHandler(ListToolsRequestSchema, async () => buildListToolsResponse());
</code></pre>
<p>Tool surfaces are gathered into a single source of truth by <code>src/mcp/tool-registry.ts</code>. In registration order:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">export const allTools: ToolDef[] = [
  ...lspTools,            // 12 LSP 도구
  ...astTools,            // ast_grep_search, ast_grep_replace
  pythonReplTool,         // python_repl
  ...stateTools,          // state_read/write/clear/list_active/get_status
  ...notepadTools,        // notepad_*
  ...memoryTools,         // project_memory_*
  ...traceTools,          // trace_summary/timeline
  ...sharedMemoryTools,   // shared_memory_*
  deepinitManifestTool,   // deepinit_manifest
  ...wikiTools,           // wiki_*
  ...skillsTools,         // list_omc_skills, load_omc_skills_*
];
</code></pre>
<p>Of note is the explicit comment in <code>tool-registry.ts</code>:</p>
<blockquote>
<p>Team runtime tools (omc_run_team_start, omc_run_team_status) are intentionally excluded: they live in the separate "team" MCP server (bridge/team-mcp.cjs).</p>
</blockquote>
<p>In other words, OMC intentionally split the tool surface into two servers: <strong><code>t</code> (code intel/state) vs <code>team</code> (Walker runtime)</strong>. This is where the difference in injection path comes from: static registration for <code>t</code> and dynamic startup for <code>team</code>.</p>
<h3>1.3 Zod → JSON Schema conversion (wire format)</h3>
<p>The <code>t</code> server defines the tool schema as Zod, and <code>zodToJsonSchema()</code> in <code>tool-registry.ts</code> converts it to MCP wire format (<code>{ type: 'object', properties, required }</code>). <code>ZodOptional</code>/<code>ZodDefault</code>/<code>ZodEnum</code>/<code>ZodArray</code>/<code>ZodRecord</code> are recursively processed, and only fields for which <code>isOptional()</code> is false are placed in <code>required</code>. <code>buildListToolsResponse()</code> is designed so that the live server and tests take the <strong>same code path</strong>, so the <code>ListToolsRequestSchema</code> handler calls this function directly.</p>
<p>Each tool can declare <code>readOnlyHint</code>/<code>destructiveHint</code>/<code>idempotentHint</code>/<code>openWorldHint</code> as <code>annotations</code> — these are the MCP standard annotation channels, corresponding to the <code>isReadOnly</code>/<code>isConcurrencySafe</code> flags of [[09_cc_mcp]].</p>
<hr>
<h2>2. Code Intelligence: Exposing LSP + AST as MCP</h2>
<p>Vanilla Claude Code only performs <strong>text matching</strong> searches with <code>Grep</code> (ripgrep)/<code>Glob</code> ([[09_cc_mcp]] does not have a separate search tool, but uses the host's built-in tool). OMC's <code>t</code> server puts <strong>semantic</strong> code tools on top of it as MCP. Interestingly, this has the same direction as the <code>DiagnosticsManager</code> of [[09_cc_mcp]] §5 (a pattern in which Claude Code uses MCP as an IDE diagnostic bridge) — however, Claude Code <strong>reads</strong> the LSP from an external IDE into the MCP, and the OMC <strong>embeds</strong> its own LSP client into the MCP server.</p>
<h3>2.1 12 LSP tools (<code>src/tools/lsp-tools.ts</code>)</h3>
<p>The <code>lspTools</code> array exposes exactly 12 tools:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>tools</th>
<th>Role</th>

It accurately handles type errors and symbol relationships that cannot be caught with text grep.</p>

<p>The <code>LSP_SERVERS</code> record maps 20 languages to an external language-server binary (including <code>installHint</code>):</p>
