<h2>Change history</h2>
<ul>
<li>2026-05-29: Write oh-my-claudecode (OMC) memory pipeline in 11 sections based on source. <code>.omc/</code> single disk root (worktree boundary enforcement + atomic write/file lock), 3-layer state persistence (Stop hook turn-survival·SessionStart restore·PreCompact checkpoint), early escape defense of stop hook (<code>persistent-mode.mjs</code>)·reading session scope state·9 mode priority blocking·iteration/reinforcement counter·stale 2-hour defense·previous tool error injection, Notepad 3 sections (priority replace / working 7 days prune / manual permanent), project-memory directive (compaction survival), wiki 7 tools + keyword search without embedding (hard constraint, CJK bi-gram), shared-memory (TTL · setting gate), state-tools (state_write/clear + cancel-signal race prevention) are covered. Includes 4 items of cli-jaw comparison implications.</li>
</ul>
<h2>Korean corpus (reference)</h2>
<blockquote>
<p>Verbatim KO corpus <code>010_memory-pipeline/10_omc_memory.md</code> for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.</p>
</blockquote>
<h1>oh-my-claudecode (omc) 메모리 파이프라인</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>170_oh-my-claudecode/</code> — memory pipeline.</p>
</blockquote>
<blockquote>
<p>이 문서는 <code>Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-claudecode</code>(OMC) 플러그인이 <strong>Claude Code 호스트의 Hook 라이프사이클만으로</strong> 어떻게 "기억"을 턴·세션·압축 경계를 가로질러 유지하는지 소스 기반으로 분석한다. [[10_cc_memory]](바닐라 Claude Code 메모리)가 <strong>CLAUDE.md + agent-memory + auto-compact + Dream</strong>의 4계층이었다면, OMC는 모델/하니스를 건드리지 않고 <strong><code>.omc/</code> 디스크 상태 + Hook</strong>만으로 별도의 메모리·영속 계층을 얹는다.</p>
<p>⚠️ <strong>소스 기반</strong>: <code>scripts/persistent-mode.mjs</code>(Stop 훅 재차단 루프), <code>scripts/session-start.mjs</code>(SessionStart 복원), <code>scripts/pre-compact.mjs</code> + <code>src/hooks/pre-compact/index.ts</code> + <code>src/hooks/project-memory/pre-compact.ts</code>(PreCompact 체크포인트), <code>src/tools/state-tools.ts</code>(state_read/write/clear), <code>src/tools/notepad-tools.ts</code>, <code>src/tools/memory-tools.ts</code>(project-memory), <code>src/tools/shared-memory-tools.ts</code>, <code>src/tools/wiki-tools.ts</code> + <code>src/hooks/wiki/query.ts</code>, <code>src/lib/atomic-write.ts</code>, <code>src/lib/file-lock.ts</code>, <code>src/lib/worktree-paths.ts</code>, <code>hooks/hooks.json</code>에 기반한다. 상위 동작 원리는 [[00_omc_overview]] §7~§8 참조.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>OMC의 메모리 시스템은 바닐라처럼 "LLM이 무엇을 기억할지 요약·정제"하는 파이프라인이 아니다. OMC의 본질은 <strong>상태 영속(state persistence)</strong> 이다. 즉 (1) 작업의 <em>진행 상태</em>를 <code>.omc/state/*.json</code>에 원자적으로 쓰고, (2) 턴이 끝나려 할 때마다 Stop 훅이 그 디스크 상태를 다시 읽어 "아직 안 끝났다"고 판정하면 턴을 재기동하고, (3) 세션이 새로 뜨거나 컨텍스트가 압축될 때 SessionStart/PreCompact 훅이 그 상태와 사용자 메모리를 새 컨텍스트에 재주입하는 구조다. 메모리의 <em>내용</em>(노트패드/프로젝트메모리/wiki)과 실행의 <em>연속성</em>(state)이 모두 같은 <code>.omc/</code> 디스크 트리에 얹혀 있고, 둘 다 동일한 Hook 라이프사이클로 복원된다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    subgraph Disk[".omc/ 디스크 영속 계층 (atomic write + file lock)"]
        ST["state/*-state.json&#x3C;br/>(ralph/ultrawork/autopilot/...)"]
        SS["state/sessions/{sessionId}/&#x3C;br/>(세션 격리 상태)"]
        NP["notepad.md&#x3C;br/>(priority/working/manual)"]
        PM["project-memory.json&#x3C;br/>(directives/notes/techStack)"]
        WK["wiki/*.md&#x3C;br/>(키워드 검색 KB, NO 임베딩)"]
        SM["state/shared-memory/{ns}/{key}.json&#x3C;br/>(에이전트 간 핸드오프, TTL)"]
        CP["state/checkpoints/&#x3C;br/>(PreCompact 체크포인트)"]
    end

    subgraph Turn["① 턴 경계 (Stop 훅)"]
        Stop["persistent-mode.mjs&#x3C;br/>디스크 state 읽기 → decision:block / continue"]
    end
    subgraph Session["② 세션 경계 (SessionStart 훅)"]
        Restore["session-start.mjs +&#x3C;br/>project-memory-session.mjs +&#x3C;br/>wiki-session-start.mjs"]
    end
    subgraph Compact["③ 압축 경계 (PreCompact 훅)"]
        Ckpt["pre-compact.mjs +&#x3C;br/>project-memory-precompact.mjs +&#x3C;br/>wiki-pre-compact.mjs"]
    end

    ST --> Stop
    SS --> Stop
    Stop -->|"미완 → block → 턴 재진입"| ST
    ST --> Restore
    PM --> Restore
    NP --> Restore
    Restore -->|"&#x3C;session-restore> 주입"| Session
    PM --> Ckpt
    NP --> Ckpt
    ST --> Ckpt
    Ckpt -->|"systemMessage 재주입 + checkpoint 기록"| CP
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>1. <code>.omc/</code> 디스크 레이아웃 — 모든 영속의 단일 루트</h2>
<p>OMC의 모든 영속 데이터는 <code>.omc/</code> 트리 한 곳에 모인다. 경로 상수는 <code>src/lib/worktree-paths.ts</code>의 <code>OmcPaths</code>에 선언된다:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>경로 상수</th>
<th>실제 경로</th>
<th>용도</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>ROOT</code></td>
<td><code>.omc/</code></td>
<td>영속 루트</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>STATE</code></td>
<td><code>.omc/state/</code></td>
<td>모드 상태(<code>{mode}-state.json</code>)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>SESSIONS</code></td>
<td><code>.omc/state/sessions/{sessionId}/</code></td>
<td>세션별 격리 상태</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>NOTEPAD</code></td>
<td><code>.omc/notepad.md</code></td>
<td>세션 간 작업 노트</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>PROJECT_MEMORY</code></td>
<td><code>.omc/project-memory.json</code></td>
<td>프로젝트 메모리</td>
</tr>
<tr>

<td>에이전트 간 핸드오프</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>PLANS</code> / <code>RESEARCH</code> / <code>LOGS</code> / <code>NOTEPADS</code></td>
<td><code>.omc/plans/</code> 등</td>
<td>계획·리서치·로그·플랜별 노트패드</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>(wiki)</td>
<td><code>.omc/wiki/*.md</code></td>
<td>LLM 위키 지식 베이스</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>(checkpoints)</td>
<td><code>.omc/state/checkpoints/</code></td>
<td>PreCompact 체크포인트</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>1.1 worktree 경계 안으로 강제 — 경로 탈출 방어</h3>
<p><code>getOmcRoot()</code>는 기본적으로 <code>{worktreeRoot}/.omc</code>를 반환한다. <code>OMC_STATE_DIR</code> 환경변수가 있으면 <code>{OMC_STATE_DIR}/{projectId}</code>로 <strong>중앙집중 저장</strong>으로 전환하며, 레거시 <code>.omc/</code>와 중앙 디렉토리가 동시에 존재하면 경고를 한 번 출력한다(<code>worktree-paths.ts:getOmcRoot</code>). <code>resolveOmcPath()</code>는 해석된 절대경로가 omc 루트 밖으로 나가면(<code>relativeToOmc.startsWith('..')</code>) <code>Path escapes omc boundary</code> 예외를 던져 경로 주입을 봉인한다. 모든 MCP 도구(state/notepad/memory/wiki)는 <code>validateWorkingDirectory()</code>를 거쳐 이 경계 안에서만 동작한다.</p>
<h3>1.2 원자적 쓰기 + 파일 락 — 동시성 안전</h3>
<p>상태 파일 손상은 곧 "기억 손실"이므로, OMC는 두 가지 동시성 안전장치를 둔다:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>원자적 쓰기</strong>(<code>src/lib/atomic-write.ts</code>): <code>atomicWriteJson()</code>/<code>atomicWriteSync()</code>는 <code>.{base}.tmp.{uuid}</code> 임시파일에 <code>O_CREAT|O_EXCL</code>(wx, mode <code>0o600</code>)로 배타 생성 → <code>fd.sync()</code>(fsync) → <code>rename()</code>(원자적 교체) → 디렉토리 fsync 순으로 쓴다. 실패 시 임시파일을 정리한다. <code>state_write</code>/cancel-signal/mission-state가 이를 쓴다(<code>state-tools.ts</code>의 <code>atomicWriteJsonSync</code>).</li>
<li><strong>파일 락</strong>(<code>src/lib/file-lock.ts</code>): <code>withFileLockSync</code>/<code>withFileLock</code>는 인접 lock 파일을 <code>O_CREAT|O_EXCL</code>로 만들어 커널이 보장하는 "최대 한 프로세스만 생성 성공" 의미론을 쓴다. lock 페이로드에 PID를 기록하고, <code>staleLockMs</code>(기본 30,000ms) 초과 + 소유 PID 사망(<code>isProcessAlive</code>)이면 stale lock으로 보고 자동 회수(reap)한다. 재시도 간격 <code>retryDelayMs</code>(기본 50ms). notepad(<code>readFileSync</code> 기반)·project-memory·shared-memory가 사용한다.</li>
<li>단, <code>persistent-mode.mjs</code>(Stop 훅)는 신뢰성을 위해 lib import 없이 자체 <code>writeJsonFile</code>을 쓰며, 이 역시 <code>.{pid}.{time}.tmp</code> → <code>rename</code>의 원자적 쓰기 패턴을 따른다(<code>persistent-mode.mjs:88</code>).</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<h2>2. 3계층 상태 영속 — 턴 / 세션 / 압축</h2>
<p>OMC의 핵심 주장은 <em>"바닐라 Claude Code는 <code>stop_reason=end_turn</code>이면 턴을 끝내지만, OMC는 디스크 상태가 미완인 동안 턴 경계를 넘어 스스로를 재기동한다"</em>([[00_omc_overview]] §7.1)이며, 이를 세 Hook이 분담한다. <code>hooks/hooks.json</code>의 매핑:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>경계</th>
<th>Hook</th>
<th>스크립트</th>
<th>역할</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><strong>① 턴</strong></td>
<td><code>Stop</code></td>
<td><code>context-guard-stop.mjs</code>, <strong><code>persistent-mode.mjs</code></strong>, <code>code-simplifier.mjs</code></td>
<td>디스크 state 읽어 미완이면 <code>decision:block</code>으로 턴 재진입</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>② 세션</strong></td>
<td><code>SessionStart</code></td>
<td><code>session-start.mjs</code>, <code>project-memory-session.mjs</code>, <code>wiki-session-start.mjs</code></td>
<td>active 모드 상태·프로젝트 메모리·wiki를 새 세션에 재주입</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>③ 압축</strong></td>
<td><code>PreCompact</code></td>
<td><code>pre-compact.mjs</code>, <code>project-memory-precompact.mjs</code>, <code>wiki-pre-compact.mjs</code></td>
<td>압축 전 모드 상태·directive·노트패드 wisdom 체크포인트 + post-compaction 재주입</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>추가로 <code>PostToolUse</code>(<code>project-memory-posttool.mjs</code>)가 매 도구 실행 후 프로젝트 메모리를 갱신하고, <code>SessionEnd</code>(<code>session-end.mjs</code>)가 세션 정리를 맡는다. 세 경계가 같은 <code>.omc/</code> 디스크를 공유하므로, "어디서 끊겨도 디스크에서 복원"이라는 단일 불변식이 성립한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant CC as Claude Code 코어 루프
    participant Stop as Stop 훅 (persistent-mode.mjs)
    participant SS as SessionStart 훅
    participant PC as PreCompact 훅
    participant Disk as .omc/state/*.json + memory

    Note over CC,Disk: 스킬 활성 시 state_write로 {mode}-state.json{active:true} 기록
    loop 매 턴 종료
        CC->>Stop: stop_reason=end_turn (+ transcript_path)
        Stop->>Disk: 모드 상태 읽기 (세션 스코프 우선)
        alt 컨텍스트≥95% / 컨텍스트한계 / 401·403 / user abort / cancel
            Stop-->>CC: {continue:true, suppressOutput:true}
        else 미완 &#x26; iteration&#x3C;max &#x26; 신선 &#x26; 현재 프로젝트·세션
            Stop->>Disk: iteration++ / reinforcement_count++ 기록
            Stop-->>CC: {decision:"block", reason:"[RALPH LOOP #n/max] continue..."}
            CC->>CC: 같은 세션에서 턴 재진입
        end
    end
    Note over CC,PC: 컨텍스트 압축 직전
    CC->>PC: PreCompact(trigger=auto/manual)
    PC->>Disk: 체크포인트 기록 + directive/notepad 재주입(systemMessage)
    Note over CC,SS: 새 세션 시작
    CC->>SS: SessionStart(session_id, cwd)
    SS->>Disk: active 모드·project-memory·notepad priority 읽기
    SS-->>CC: &#x3C;session-restore> additionalContext 주입 (6000자 예산)
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>3. 계층 ① — Stop 훅 turn-survival (<code>scripts/persistent-mode.mjs</code>)</h2>
<p>이것이 OMC가 바닐라에 더하는 <strong>가장 본질적인 메모리 메커니즘</strong>이다: 실행 상태를 디스크에 남기고, 턴이 끝날 때마다 그 상태를 다시 읽어 루프를 잇는다.</p>
<h3>3.1 입력 파싱과 상태 디렉토리 해석</h3>
<p>훅은 stdin으로 <code>{cwd, session_id, stop_reason, transcript_path, ...}</code>를 받는다(<code>main()</code>, <code>persistent-mode.mjs:880</code>). <code>sanitizeSessionId()</code>가 <code>^[a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9_-]{0,255}$</code> 허용리스트로 세션 ID를 검증하고, <code>resolveOmcStateRoot(directory)</code>로 omc 루트를 잡은 뒤 <code>stateDir = {omcRoot}/state</code>, <code>globalStateDir = ~/.omc/state</code>를 정한다.</p>
<h3>3.2 절대 차단하지 않는 조기 탈출 — 데드락·재인증 보존</h3>
<p>블로킹 전, 다음이면 무조건 <code>{continue:true, suppressOutput:true}</code>로 통과시켜 호스트의 압축·재인증·취소 흐름을 보존한다(우선순위 순):</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>조건</th>
<th>함수</th>
<th>근거</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>컨텍스트 한계 stop</td>
<td><code>isContextLimitStop</code></td>
<td>block 시 "압축 못 함 → 멈출 수도 없음" 데드락(issue #213)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>트랜스크립트 컨텍스트 ≥95%</td>
<td><code>estimateContextPercent</code> ≥ <code>CRITICAL_CONTEXT_STOP_PERCENT(95)</code></td>
<td>마지막 4KB만 읽어 <code>input_tokens/context_window</code> 추정(대용량 트랜스크립트 OOM 방지)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>사용자 중단(Ctrl+C/cancel)</td>
<td><code>isUserAbort</code></td>
<td>사용자 의도 존중</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>인증 오류(401/403/OAuth 만료)</td>
<td><code>isAuthenticationError</code></td>
<td>재인증 흐름 보존</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>예약 wakeup stop</td>
<td><code>isScheduledWakeupStop</code></td>
<td>ScheduleWakeup/loop resume 통과</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>보류 중 비동기 작업</td>
<td><code>hasPendingOwnedAsyncWork</code></td>
<td>백그라운드 task/scheduled-wakeup state가 살아있으면 턴 살림</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>세션 취소 진행 중</td>
<td><code>isSessionCancelInProgress</code></td>
<td><code>cancel-signal-state.json</code> TTL 30초 내면 통과</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>이 방어층은 "기억을 지키려다 호스트를 망가뜨리지 않는다"는 안전 원칙의 코드화다.</p>
<h3>3.3 모드 상태 읽기 — 세션 스코프 우선, 레거시 폴백</h3>
<p>훅은 9개 모드 상태를 <code>readStateFileWithSession()</code>으로 읽는다: <code>ralph / ultragoal / autopilot / ultrapilot / ultrawork / ultraqa / pipeline / team / omc-teams</code>(+ marker 기반 swarm). 이 함수의 탐색 순서(<code>persistent-mode.mjs:451</code>):</p>
<ol>
<li><code>{stateDir}/sessions/{sessionId}/{mode}-state.json</code> (정확한 세션 스코프)</li>
<li><code>{stateDir}/sessions/*/</code> 전수 스캔하여 <code>state.session_id === sessionId</code>인 후보</li>
<li>레거시 <code>{stateDir}/{mode}-state.json</code> (단, <code>session_id</code> 일치할 때만)</li>
</ol>
<p>세션 격리는 issue #311(병렬 세션 상태 누수)의 대응이다. 다른 세션·프로젝트의 상태가 새 세션을 잘못 차단하지 못하게 한다.</p>
<h3>3.4 차단 판정 — 우선순위 + iteration/reinforcement 카운터</h3>
<p>각 모드를 우선순위 순으로 평가한다. 한 모드가 차단을 결정하면 즉시 <code>return</code>한다.</p>
<p><strong>Priority 1 — Ralph</strong>(<code>persistent-mode.mjs:1004</code>): <code>isAuthoritativeModeActive</code> &#x26;&#x26; !<code>isAwaitingConfirmation</code> &#x26;&#x26; !<code>isStaleState</code> &#x26;&#x26; <code>isStateForCurrentProject</code> &#x26;&#x26; 세션 일치이면:</p>
<ul>
<li><code>iteration &#x3C; max_iterations</code>이면 <code>iteration++</code> 기록 후
<pre><code class="language-js">console.log(JSON.stringify({
  decision: "block",
  reason: `[RALPH LOOP - ITERATION ${iteration+1}/${maxIter}] Work is NOT done. Continue working.
When FULLY complete (after Architect verification), run /oh-my-claudecode:cancel to cleanly exit ralph mode...
Task: ${ralph.state.prompt}`
}));
</code></pre>
</li>
<li><code>iteration >= max</code>면: 하드 상한(<code>getHardMaxIterations()</code>) 도달 시 <code>active:false</code>로 자동 비활성화(<code>[RALPH LOOP - HARD LIMIT]</code>), 아니면 <code>max_iterations += 10</code>로 확장(<code>[RALPH LOOP - EXTENDED]</code>).</li>
</ul>
<p>나머지 모드의 카운터·reason 템플릿:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>모드</th>
<th>카운터 필드</th>
<th>상한</th>
<th>reason 머리표지</th>
<th>비고</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>ralph</td>
<td><code>iteration</code></td>
<td><code>max_iterations</code>(기본 100) → +10 확장</td>
<td><code>[RALPH LOOP - ITERATION n/max]</code></td>
<td>하드 상한은 <code>OMC_SECURITY=strict</code>로 기본 200</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>ultragoal</td>

</tr>
<tr>

<tr>
<td>ultrapilot</td>

</tr>

<td>15</td>

<tr>

</tr>
<tr>
<td>ultrawork</td>
<td><code>reinforcement_count</code></td>
<td><code>max_reinforcements</code>(기본 50)</td>
<td><code>[ULTRAWORK #n/max]</code></td>
<td><strong>active인 한 항상 계속</strong>(transient 실패로 인한 false stop 방지)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>각 차단 시 <code>last_checked_at</code>를 갱신하고 카운터를 디스크에 다시 쓴다 → 다음 Stop 훅이 그 증가분을 본다. 이 <em>디스크에 적힌 카운터</em>가 OMC의 "반복 횟수 기억"이다.</p>
<h3>3.5 stale-state 방어 + 직전 도구 오류 가이던스</h3>
<ul>
<li><strong>stale 방어</strong>(<code>isStaleState</code>, <code>persistent-mode.mjs:227</code>): <code>last_checked_at</code>/<code>updated_at</code>/<code>started_at</code> 중 가장 최근 값이 <strong>2시간(<code>STALE_STATE_THRESHOLD_MS</code>)</strong> 초과면 비활성으로 간주. 이전 세션의 죽은 상태가 새 세션을 무한 차단하는 사고를 막는다. <code>isStateForCurrentProject</code>는 <code>project_path</code>를 정규화 비교해 다른 프로젝트 오염을 차단한다.</li>
<li><strong>워크플로 슬롯 tombstone</strong>(<code>isWorkflowSlotTombstonedForMode</code>): <code>skill-active-state.json</code>의 슬롯에 <code>completed_at</code>이 찍혀 있고 24시간 이내면, 그 모드는 이미 완료된 것으로 보아 재차단하지 않는다.</li>
<li><strong>직전 도구 오류 주입</strong>(<code>readLastToolError</code>/<code>getToolErrorRetryGuidance</code>): <code>last-tool-error.json</code>을 읽어 <strong>60초 이내</strong>의 신선한 실패면 reason 앞에 <code>[TOOL ERROR - RETRY REQUIRED]</code>(또는 5회 이상 시 <code>[TOOL ERROR - ALTERNATIVE APPROACH NEEDED]</code>)를 덧붙인다. 즉 "직전 실패의 기억"을 다음 턴 프롬프트로 운반한다.</li>
</ul>
<p><code>PostToolUseFailure</code> 훅(<code>post-tool-use-failure.mjs</code>)이 이 <code>last-tool-error.json</code>을 쓰고, Stop 훅이 소비하는 송수신 쌍이다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>4. 계층 ② — SessionStart 복원 (<code>scripts/session-start.mjs</code>)</h2>
<p>새 세션(또는 <code>--resume</code>/<code>--continue</code>)이 뜰 때 디스크에 남은 "기억"을 새 컨텍스트에 재주입한다.</p>
<h3>4.1 복원 항목과 <code>&#x3C;session-restore></code> 채널</h3>
<p><code>main()</code>(<code>session-start.mjs:708</code>)은 <code>messages[]</code>를 모은 뒤 <code>hookSpecificOutput.additionalContext</code>로 한 번에 주입한다. 주요 항목:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>모드 상태 복원</strong>: <code>ultrawork-state.json</code>·<code>ralph-state.json</code>을 세션 스코프 우선으로 읽고, <code>shouldRestoreModeState</code>(active &#x26;&#x26; tombstone 아님)이면 <code>[ULTRAWORK MODE RESTORED]</code>/<code>[RALPH LOOP RESTORED]</code>를 주입. 단 문구는 *"prior-session context only. 사용자의 최신 요청을 우선하고, 명시적으로 이어가라고 할 때만 재개"*로, 자동 폭주를 막는 <strong>soft 복원</strong>이다(Stop 훅의 hard block과 대비).</li>
<li><strong>미완 todo 감지</strong>: 프로젝트 로컬 <code>.omc/todos.json</code>·<code>.claude/todos.json</code>만 스캔(글로벌 todos는 의도적으로 제외 — issue #354 phantom count 방지) → <code>[PENDING TASKS DETECTED]</code>.</li>
<li><strong>프로젝트 메모리</strong>: <code>project-memory-session.mjs</code>(또는 인라인 <code>resolveProjectMemorySummary</code>)가 <code>project-memory.json</code>을 로드, 필요 시 <code>detectProjectEnvironment</code>로 재스캔하고 <code>[PROJECT MEMORY]</code>로 주입(§6).</li>
<li><strong>노트패드 Priority Context</strong>: <code>.omc/notepad.md</code>의 <code>## Priority Context</code> 섹션을 정규식으로 추출, 주석 제거 후 비어있지 않으면 <code>[NOTEPAD - Priority Context]</code>로 주입(§5).</li>
<li>부가: 버전 드리프트(<code>detectVersionDrift</code>), npm 업데이트(24h 캐시), HUD 설치 점검, 모델 라우팅 오버라이드(Bedrock/Vertex/비-Claude 감지).</li>
</ul>
<h3>4.2 6000자 예산 + 우선순위 정렬</h3>
<p>주입 컨텍스트는 <code>SESSION_START_CONTEXT_BUDGET = 6000</code>자로 제한된다(<code>buildSessionStartAdditionalContext</code>). <code>MODEL ROUTING OVERRIDE → MODE RESTORED → PROJECT MEMORY → NOTEPAD Priority → PENDING TASKS</code> 순의 우선순위 배열로 정렬한 뒤, 예산 초과 직전 항목은 <code>compactBudgetedText</code>로 잘라내고 남으면 누락 공지를 넣는다. 즉 "무엇을 가장 먼저 기억으로 복원할지"가 명시적으로 우선순위화돼 있다.</p>
<h3>4.3 세션 마커와 고아 정리</h3>
<p>SessionStart는 <code>state/sessions/{sessionId}/session-started.json</code>에 <code>{session_id, started_at, cwd, pid, boot_id}</code>(mode <code>0o600</code>)를 기록한다. <code>reconcileAbandonedSessionStarts</code>는 다른 세션의 마커를 훑되, <strong>동일 부팅(boot_id) 내 PID 생존 검사는 신뢰할 수 없다</strong>는 이유로(설치형 훅의 부모 PID는 <code>scripts/run.cjs</code>의 단명 프로세스) <code>hasDurableAbandonmentEvidence</code>가 <strong>부팅 ID가 다를 때만</strong> 고아로 판정해 정리한다. 같은 부팅의 정리는 SessionEnd가 주 경로다 — 보수적 정리로 살아있는 세션 상태 오삭제를 피한다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>5. 노트패드 (<code>notepad.md</code> / <code>src/tools/notepad-tools.ts</code>)</h2>
<p>세션 간 작업 노트. <code>t</code> MCP 서버가 6개 도구로 노출하며, 단일 <code>.omc/notepad.md</code>의 세 섹션을 다룬다:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>섹션</th>
<th>도구</th>
<th>의미론</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><strong>Priority Context</strong></td>
<td><code>notepad_write_priority</code></td>
<td><strong>REPLACE</strong>. SessionStart에 항상 로드되므로 500자 이하 권장(상한 2000).</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Working Memory</strong></td>
<td><code>notepad_write_working</code></td>
<td><strong>APPEND</strong>(타임스탬프). 7일 후 자동 prune. 상한 4000자/엔트리.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>MANUAL</strong></td>
<td><code>notepad_write_manual</code></td>
<td><strong>APPEND</strong>. <strong>절대 자동 prune되지 않음</strong>. 상한 4000자.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>(읽기/관리)</td>
<td><code>notepad_read</code>(section: all/priority/working/manual), <code>notepad_prune</code>(daysOld 1~365, 기본 7), <code>notepad_stats</code></td>
<td></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>핵심 상수는 <code>src/hooks/notepad/index.ts</code>의 <code>DEFAULT_CONFIG = { workingMemoryDays: 7, ... }</code>와 <code>PRIORITY_HEADER = "## Priority Context"</code>. SessionStart가 바로 이 <code>## Priority Context</code> 헤더를 정규식으로 떠서 새 세션에 주입하므로, Priority Context는 사실상 "세션을 넘기는 가장 가벼운 메모리 채널"이다. Working Memory는 7일 휘발, MANUAL은 영구 — TTL 차등으로 신호 대 잡음을 관리한다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>6. 프로젝트 메모리 (<code>project-memory.json</code> / <code>src/tools/memory-tools.ts</code>)</h2>
<p>프로젝트 단위의 구조화 메모리. <code>t</code> MCP 서버 도구 4종:</p>
<ul>
<li><code>project_memory_read</code>(section: all/techStack/build/conventions/structure/notes/directives)</li>
<li><code>project_memory_write</code>(merge 옵션 — <code>mergeProjectMemory</code>로 기존과 병합 가능, <code>version</code>/<code>lastScanned</code>/<code>projectRoot</code> 보강)</li>
<li><code>project_memory_add_note</code>(category + content, 1000자)</li>
<li><code>project_memory_add_directive</code>(directive 500자 + context + priority <code>high|normal</code>)</li>
</ul>
<p><code>ProjectMemory</code> 구조에는 <code>techStack</code>(languages/frameworks), <code>build</code>(buildCommand/testCommand), <code>conventions</code>, <code>structure</code>, <code>hotPaths</code>, <code>customNotes</code>, <code>userDirectives</code>가 있다. 환경은 SessionStart 시 <code>detectProjectEnvironment</code>로 자동 감지·저장된다.</p>
<h3>6.1 directive — 압축을 견디는 사용자 지시</h3>
<p><code>project_memory_add_directive</code>의 도구 설명이 명시한다: <em>"Directives are instructions that persist across sessions <strong>and survive compaction</strong>."</em> 이것이 PreCompact 훅과 직접 맞물린다(§7). <code>addDirective</code>로 누적, <code>PostToolUse</code>(<code>project-memory-posttool.mjs</code>)가 세션 중 메모리를 갱신한다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>7. 계층 ③ — PreCompact 체크포인트 (<code>src/hooks/pre-compact/</code>)</h2>
<p>컨텍스트 압축으로 인한 정보 손실을 막는다. <code>pre-compact.mjs</code>는 stdin을 받아 <code>dist/hooks/pre-compact/index.js</code>의 <code>processPreCompact(data)</code>를 호출한다.</p>
<h3>7.1 체크포인트 내용</h3>
<p><code>src/hooks/pre-compact/index.ts</code>의 <code>CompactCheckpoint</code>는 <code>.omc/state/checkpoints/</code>에 다음을 기록한다:</p>
<ul>
<li><code>active_modes</code>: autopilot(phase/originalIdea) · ralph(iteration/prompt) · ultrawork(original_prompt) · ultraqa(cycle/prompt)</li>
<li><code>todo_summary</code>: pending/in_progress/completed 카운트</li>
<li><code>wisdom_exported</code>: <code>.omc/notepads/{plan}/</code>의 <code>learnings.md</code>/<code>decisions.md</code>/<code>issues.md</code>/<code>problems.md</code>를 모은 "Plan Wisdom"(<code>exportWisdomToNotepad</code>)</li>
<li><code>background_jobs</code>: 활성/최근 백그라운드 잡 + 통계(<code>job-state-db</code>)</li>
</ul>
<p><code>trigger</code>는 <code>"manual" | "auto"</code>(바닐라 [[10_cc_memory]] §3.3의 PreCompact 트리거와 동일 스키마). 동시 압축 경쟁을 막기 위해 디렉토리별 in-flight 압축 promise(<code>inflightCompactions</code>)와 큐 깊이 카운터(<code>compactionQueueDepth</code>)로 <strong>압축 뮤텍스</strong>를 둔다 — ultrawork/team에서 서브에이전트 결과가 동시 도착해도 한 번만 압축한다.</p>
<h3>7.2 directive·메모리 post-compaction 재주입</h3>
<p>별도 훅 <code>project-memory-precompact.mjs</code> → <code>src/hooks/project-memory/pre-compact.ts</code>의 <code>processPreCompact</code>는 <code>project-memory.json</code>을 로드해 <code>userDirectives</code>/<code>hotPaths</code>/<code>techStack</code>/<code>customNotes</code> 중 임계 정보가 있으면 <code>systemMessage</code>로 재주입한다:</p>
<pre><code># Project Memory (Post-Compaction Recovery)
... contextSummary ...
**IMPORTANT:** These user directives must be followed throughout the session, even after compaction.
</code></pre>
<p><code>wiki-pre-compact.mjs</code>도 wiki 컨텍스트를 동일하게 체크포인트한다. 즉 압축이 일어나도 사용자 directive·프로젝트 컨텍스트·wiki 지식은 압축 후 컨텍스트에 다시 살아난다 — 바닐라의 PreCompact 훅 커스텀 지시 주입([[10_cc_memory]] §3.3)을 OMC가 자기 메모리 계층에 특화시킨 형태다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>8. wiki — 세션 간 지식 베이스 (NO 벡터 임베딩)</h2>
<p><code>.omc/wiki/*.md</code>에 누적되는 markdown 지식 베이스. <code>t</code> MCP 서버가 7개 도구로 노출한다(<code>src/tools/wiki-tools.ts</code>):</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>도구</th>
<th>역할</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>wiki_ingest</code></td>
<td>지식을 페이지로 처리. <strong>append 전략</strong>(절대 replace 안 함), 교차참조로 여러 페이지 동시 갱신 가능</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>wiki_add</code></td>
<td>단일 페이지 빠른 생성(존재하면 거부 → ingest로 머지 유도)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>wiki_query</code></td>
<td>키워드+태그 검색, 관련도 스니펫 반환</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>wiki_read</code> / <code>wiki_list</code> / <code>wiki_delete</code></td>
<td>페이지 읽기 / 인덱스 목록 / 삭제</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>wiki_lint</code></td>
<td>orphan·stale·broken-ref·oversized·contradiction 헬스체크</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>페이지 카테고리는 <code>architecture / decision / pattern / debugging / environment / session-log / reference / convention</code> 8종, 신뢰도 <code>high|medium|low</code>, 콘텐츠 상한 50KB.</p>
<h3>8.1 임베딩 없는 키워드 검색 — 하드 제약</h3>
<p><code>wiki_query</code>의 도구 설명과 <code>src/hooks/wiki/query.ts</code> 헤더가 명시적으로 못박는다: <strong>"NO vector embeddings — search is keyword-based only (hard constraint). The LLM caller synthesizes answers from returned matches."</strong> (리포 전체에서 wiki의 임베딩/벡터 언급은 이 "없음" 선언 두 곳뿐이다.) 매칭 전략은 (1) 태그 교집합(최고 가중) → (2) 제목 포함 → (3) 콘텐츠 포함 순의 스코어링이며, <code>tokenize()</code>는 <strong>CJK bi-gram + 단일 문자</strong>까지 처리해 한국어/일본어/중국어 검색을 지원한다. 도구는 raw 매치만 돌려주고, <em>답변 합성과 인용은 LLM이 직접</em> 한다 — 이는 [[10_cc_memory]] §4의 Dream consolidation(LLM이 백그라운드로 메모리를 정제)과 대비되는, "검색은 결정적, 종합은 LLM"의 분업이다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>9. 공유 메모리 — 에이전트 간 핸드오프 (<code>shared-memory-tools.ts</code>)</h2>
<p><code>/team</code>·<code>/pipeline</code>에서 여러 에이전트가 세션 그룹/파이프라인 런 단위로 key-value를 주고받는 계층. 저장소는 <code>.omc/state/shared-memory/{namespace}/{key}.json</code>.</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>도구</th>
<th>역할</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>shared_memory_write</code></td>
<td>namespace·key·value 쓰기, 선택적 <code>ttl</code>(초, 최대 604800=7일) → <code>expiresAt</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>shared_memory_read</code></td>
<td>namespace+key 읽기(만료 시 null)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>shared_memory_list</code></td>
<td>namespace 내 key 또는 전체 namespace 목록</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>shared_memory_delete</code> / <code>shared_memory_cleanup</code></td>
<td>삭제 / 만료 엔트리 정리</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p><strong>설정 게이트</strong>: <code>agents.sharedMemory.enabled = true</code>(<code>~/.claude/.omc-config.json</code>)가 아니면 모든 도구가 <code>DISABLED_MSG</code>를 반환한다(<code>isSharedMemoryEnabled</code>). 파일 락(<code>src/lib/file-lock.ts</code>)으로 동시 쓰기를 보호한다. project-memory가 <em>한 프로젝트의 영속 사실</em>이라면, shared-memory는 <em>한 팀 런 동안의 휘발적 협응 상태</em>다(TTL로 자동 소멸).</p>
<hr>
<h2>10. 모드 레지스트리와 상태 정리 (<code>state-tools.ts</code>)</h2>
<p><code>t</code> MCP 서버는 상태 CRUD 도구 5종을 노출한다: <code>state_read / state_write / state_clear / state_list_active / state_get_status</code>. 정본 실행 모드는 <code>EXECUTION_MODES = autopilot, autoresearch, team, ralph, ultrawork, ultraqa, deep-interview, self-improve</code>이고, 상태 전용 모드(<code>ralplan, omc-teams, skill-active</code>)가 더해진다(<code>STATE_TOOL_MODES</code>).</p>
<ul>
<li><strong><code>state_write</code></strong>: 명시 파라미터(active/iteration/max_iterations/current_phase/...)와 자유형 <code>state</code> 레코드를 병합, <code>_meta</code>(mode/sessionId/updatedAt/updatedBy) 부착, <code>validatePayload</code>로 크기 검증 후 <code>atomicWriteJsonSync</code>로 기록. <code>session_id</code> 미제공 시 레거시 공유 경로에 쓰며 누수 경고를 낸다.</li>
<li><strong><code>state_clear</code></strong>: 세션 스코프·레거시·완료세션 고아·로컬 폴백·런타임 아티팩트(<code>{mode}-stop-breaker.json</code> 등)를 모두 정리하고, <strong>삭제 전에</strong> <code>cancel-signal-state.json</code>(TTL 30초)을 써서 Stop 훅의 <code>isSessionCancelInProgress</code>가 삭제 윈도우 동안 신호를 보게 한다(레이스 방지). team 모드는 worktree 런타임 루트·HUD mission 엔트리까지 정리한다.</li>
</ul>
<p>영속 루프의 모든 reason 문자열이 <em>"완료·검증 후 <code>/oh-my-claudecode:cancel</code>로 깨끗이 종료(실패 시 <code>--force</code>)"</em> 를 안내하는데, 이 cancel이 곧 <code>state_clear</code>를 호출해 디스크 상태를 지우고 루프의 출구를 보장한다. iteration/reinforcement 상한과 cancel 안내가 함께 무한 루프를 끊는 이중 안전장치다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>11. 정리 — OMC 메모리 파이프라인의 본질</h2>
<ul>
<li>OMC는 <strong>메모리의 내용(notepad/project-memory/wiki/shared-memory)</strong> 과 <strong>실행의 연속성(<code>.omc/state/</code>)</strong> 을 같은 디스크 트리에 두고, <strong>원자적 쓰기 + 파일 락</strong>으로 손상·경쟁을 막는다.</li>
<li>세 Hook이 세 경계를 분담한다: <strong>Stop</strong>(턴 — hard block 재진입), <strong>SessionStart</strong>(세션 — soft 복원 + 6000자 예산), <strong>PreCompact</strong>(압축 — directive·wisdom 체크포인트 + post-compaction 재주입).</li>
<li>카운터(iteration/reinforcement/cycle)·타임스탬프(<code>last_checked_at</code>)·stale 2시간 임계·세션/프로젝트 격리·tombstone이 "어디까지 했는지"의 기억을 디스크에 정직하게 남긴다.</li>
<li>wiki는 <strong>임베딩 없는 키워드 검색</strong>(하드 제약)으로 결정적 검색만 제공하고 종합은 LLM이 맡는다 — 바닐라의 LLM 기반 Dream consolidation과 정반대 분업.</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<h2>cli-jaw 비교 시사점</h2>
<ul>
<li>
<p><strong>턴 생존 메커니즘의 차이 — Stop 훅 재차단 vs. 목표 재주입</strong>: OMC는 <code>persistent-mode.mjs</code>가 매 턴 종료 시 디스크 state를 읽고 <code>decision:"block"</code>으로 턴을 <em>물리적으로 재진입</em>시킨다(모델/하니스 무변경). cli-jaw는 같은 "절대 죽지 않고 폴링"(MEMORY.md의 <em>Use poll for waiting</em>) 철학을 갖되 외부 이벤트 대기에 ScheduleWakeup/poll을 쓴다. OMC의 강점은 <strong>외부 cron 없이 호스트 Stop 훅만으로 내부 작업 완료 루프</strong>를 도는 것이고, cli-jaw는 외부 이벤트 대기에 강하다. cli-jaw의 goal-continuation 재주입을 OMC식 "디스크 state + Stop 차단"으로 보강하면 모델 토큰을 쓰지 않고 연속성을 얻을 수 있다.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>3계층 복원 분해는 직접 차용 가능</strong>: "턴 간(Stop) / 세션 간(SessionStart) / 압축 간(PreCompact)"의 명확한 3-경계 분해와, 각 경계가 같은 <code>.omc/</code> 디스크를 단일 진실로 공유하는 설계는 cli-jaw의 인스턴스/대시보드 메모리 영속에 그대로 옮길 수 있는 청사진이다. 특히 SessionStart의 <strong>6000자 예산 + 우선순위 정렬</strong>(routing > restored mode > project memory > notepad > pending tasks)은 재주입 컨텍스트가 비대해지는 문제의 구체적 해법이다.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>재주입의 강도 차등 (hard block vs. soft restore)</strong>: 같은 상태라도 Stop 훅은 hard block(즉시 재진입), SessionStart는 *"prior-session context only, 명시적 재개 요청 시에만"*의 soft 복원으로 다르게 주입한다. cli-jaw가 goal을 재주입할 때 "지금 강제 계속"인지 "참고용 이전 맥락"인지를 경계별로 구분하면, 새 사용자 요청을 깔아뭉개는 폭주를 막을 수 있다.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>결정적 검색 + LLM 종합, 그리고 출구 보장</strong>: wiki의 임베딩 없는 키워드 검색(<code>wiki_query</code>)은 인프라 부담 없이 세션 간 지식을 쌓는 저비용 모델이며, cli-jaw가 메모리 검색을 붙일 때 벡터 DB 없이 시작하는 참고가 된다. 또한 모든 영속 루프 reason이 <code>/cancel</code>(→ <code>state_clear</code> + cancel-signal TTL) 출구를 안내하고 iteration/reinforcement 상한·stale 2시간 임계·60초 도구오류 신선도를 두는 점은, cli-jaw의 <code>/loop</code>·poll 설계에 필수적인 "무한 루프 방지 + 죽은 상태 자동 무시" 안전장치 세트다.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<p>이전 문서: [[10_cc_memory]]
관련 문서: [[00_omc_overview]]</p>

<h2>변경 기록</h2>
<ul>
<li>2026-05-29: oh-my-claudecode(OMC) 메모리 파이프라인을 소스 기반 11개 섹션으로 작성. <code>.omc/</code> 단일 디스크 루트(worktree 경계 강제 + 원자적 쓰기/파일 락), 3계층 상태 영속(Stop 훅 turn-survival·SessionStart 복원·PreCompact 체크포인트), Stop 훅(<code>persistent-mode.mjs</code>)의 조기탈출 방어·세션 스코프 상태 읽기·9개 모드 우선순위 차단·iteration/reinforcement 카운터·stale 2시간 방어·직전 도구오류 주입, notepad 3섹션(priority replace / working 7일 prune / manual 영구), project-memory directive(compaction 생존), wiki 7도구 + 임베딩 없는 키워드 검색(하드 제약, CJK bi-gram), shared-memory(TTL·설정 게이트), state-tools(state_write/clear + cancel-signal 레이스 방지)를 다룸. cli-jaw 비교 시사점 4항목 포함.</li>
</ul>
29:["$","$L30","20-axis-10-memory",{"id":"20-axis-10-memory","order":27,"tier":"deep","title":"Axis 10: Memory pipeline","description":"010_memory-pipeline/10_omc_memory.md","lang":"en","badge":"AXIS","children":["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$4c"}}]}]
4d:T15275,<h2>Overview</h2>
<p><strong>Axis 11: Plugin system</strong> — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:</p>
<ul>
<li>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>170_oh-my-claudecode/</code> — plugin system.</p>
</blockquote>
</li>
<li>
<blockquote>
<p>이 문서는 OMC가 "플러그인 호스트"가 아니라 <strong>그 자체로 Claude Code 플러그인</strong>이라는 사실을 출발점으로 한다. OMC는 자체 플러그인 매니페스트/마켓플레이스/훅 엔진을 새로 구현하지 않는다. 대신 [[11_cc_plugin]]에서 분석한 <strong>Claude Code의 플러그인 확장점</strong>(plugin.json 매니페스트, hooks.json, MCP 서버 등록, skills/commands 자동 발견, agent</p>
</blockquote>
</li>
<li>근거 경로: <code>.claude-plugin/plugin.json</code>, <code>.claude-plugin/marketplace.json</code>, <code>.mcp.json</code>, <code>hooks/hooks.json</code>, <code>scripts/run.cjs</code>, <code>scripts/keyword-detector.mjs</code>, <code>scripts/persistent-mode.mjs</code>, <code>src/mcp/tool-registry.ts</code>, `src/mcp/standalone-serve</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<ul>
<li>OMC에는 <strong>자체 플러그인 시스템이 없다</strong>. 이것은 결함이 아니라 설계 선택이다. OMC가 더하는 모든 능력(19개 에이전트, 38개 스킬, 10개 라이프사이클 훅, <code>t</code>/<code>team</code> MCP 서버, <code>.omc/</code> 영속 계층)은 전부 <strong>Claude Code 호스트가 정의한 5개 확장점</strong>의 선언적 사용으로 구현된다.</li>
<li>| 19개 서브에이전트 | <code>agents/*.md</code> (YAML frontmatter + 프롬프트) | agents 자동 발견 | <code>agents/</code> 디렉토리 |</li>
<li>| 38개 스킬 | <code>skills/*/SKILL.md</code> | <code>plugin.json:"skills"</code> 배열 | <code>.claude-plugin/plugin.json</code> |</li>
<li>| 슬래시 명령 | <code>commands/*.md</code> (얇은 디스패처) | <code>plugin.json:"commands"</code> | <code>.claude-plugin/plugin.json</code> |</li>
<li>| 10개 라이프사이클 훅 | <code>hooks/hooks.json</code> → <code>scripts/*.mjs</code> | Claude Code hooks 엔진 | <code>hooks/hooks.json</code> |</li>
<li>| <code>t</code> MCP 서버 (state/LSP/AST/wiki/...) | stdio MCP 서버 | <code>plugin.json:"mcpServers"</code> → <code>.mcp.json</code> | <code>.mcp.json</code> |</li>
<li>| <code>team</code> MCP 서버 | 런타임 동적 기동 | (호스트 MCP, 매니페스트 외) | <code>bridge/team-mcp.cjs</code> |</li>
<li>따라서 OMC는 [[11_cc_plugin]]이 분석한 호스트 훅 엔진의 <strong>"플러그인 manifest hooksConfig"</strong> 경로(<code>loadPluginHooks</code>)와 <strong>MCP 서버 등록</strong> 경로의 **실증 사례(reference implementation)**다. 호스트는 25개 라이프사이클 이벤트와 6가지 훅 타입을 제공하지만, OMC는 그중 <strong>10개 이벤트 / <code>command</code> 훅 타입 1개만</strong> 사용한다.</li>
</ul>

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph LR
    subgraph CC["Claude Code 확장점 (11_cc_plugin)"]

    end
    subgraph OMC["OMC 사용 강도"]
        U1["10/25 이벤트만 사용&#x3C;br/>(핵심 골격)"]
        U2["command 1종만&#x3C;br/>(prompt/agent/http/callback 미사용)"]
        U3["hooks.json → 16 스크립트"]
        U4["t(정적)+team(동적)+in-process"]
        U5["39 skills / N commands / 19 agents"]
        U6["OMC:START 마커 비파괴 주입"]
    end
    E1 --> U1
    E2 --> U2
    E3 --> U3
    E4 --> U4
    E5 --> U5
    E6 --> U6
</code></pre>
<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h1>oh-my-claudecode (omc) plugin system</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>Analysis Snapshot</strong>: <code>170_oh-my-claudecode/</code> — plugin system.</p>
</blockquote>
<blockquote>
<p>The starting point of this document is that OMC is not a "plugin host" but <strong>itself a Claude Code plugin</strong>. OMC does not implement a new plugin manifest/marketplace/hook engine of its own. Instead, <strong>Claude Code's plugin extension points</strong> (plugin.json manifest, hooks.json, MCP server registration, skills/commands automatic discovery, agents/*.md automatic discovery) analyzed in [[11_cc_plugin]] are utilized as much as possible <strong>from the consumer's perspective</strong>. In other words, the key question of OMC at this level is not “What plug-in system does OMC provide?” but <strong>“How does OMC use the host’s extension points?”</strong> The analysis standard version is <code>.claude-plugin/plugin.json</code> v4.14.4.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>Base path: <code>.claude-plugin/plugin.json</code>, <code>.claude-plugin/marketplace.json</code>, <code>.mcp.json</code>, <code>hooks/hooks.json</code>, <code>scripts/run.cjs</code>, <code>scripts/keyword-detector.mjs</code>, <code>scripts/persistent-mode.mjs</code>, <code>src/mcp/tool-registry.ts</code>, <code>src/mcp/standalone-server.ts</code>, <code>src/mcp/omc-tools-server.ts</code>, <code>CLAUDE.md</code>, <code>README.md</code>, <code>package.json</code>. See [[00_omc_overview]] for higher context.</p>
<hr>
<h2>0. Conclusions first: “intentional absence” of own plugin system and host delegation</h2>
<p>OMC <strong>does not have its own plugin system</strong>. This is not a defect, but a design choice. All the capabilities that OMC adds (19 agents, 38 skills, 10 lifecycle hooks, <code>t</code>/<code>team</code> MCP servers, <code>.omc/</code> persistence layer) are all implemented through declarative use of <strong>five extension points</strong> defined by the Claude Code host.</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>What OMC Offers</th>
<th>Implementation method</th>
<th>host extension point</th>
<th>Evidence</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>19 sub-agents</td>
<td><code>agents/*.md</code> (YAML frontmatter + prompt)</td>
<td>agents automatic discovery</td>
<td><code>agents/</code> directory</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>38 skills</td>
<td><code>skills/*/SKILL.md</code></td>
<td><code>plugin.json:"skills"</code> array</td>
<td><code>.claude-plugin/plugin.json</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>slash command</td>
<td><code>commands/*.md</code> (thin dispatcher)</td>
<td><code>plugin.json:"commands"</code></td>
<td><code>.claude-plugin/plugin.json</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>10 life cycle hooks</td>
<td><code>hooks/hooks.json</code> → <code>scripts/*.mjs</code></td>
<td>Claude Code hooks engine</td>
<td><code>hooks/hooks.json</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>t</code> MCP server (state/LSP/AST/wiki/...)</td>
<td>stdio MCP server</td>
<td><code>plugin.json:"mcpServers"</code> → <code>.mcp.json</code></td>
<td><code>.mcp.json</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>team</code> MCP server</td>
<td>Runtime dynamic startup</td>
<td>(host MCP, manifest, etc.)</td>
<td><code>bridge/team-mcp.cjs</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>Therefore, OMC is a <strong>reference implementation</strong> of the <strong>"plugin manifest hooksConfig"</strong> path (<code>loadPluginHooks</code>) and the <strong>MCP server registration</strong> path of the host hook engine analyzed by [[11_cc_plugin]]. The host provides 25 lifecycle events and 6 hook types, but OMC uses only 10 events / 1 <code>command</code> hook type among them.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    subgraph Host["Claude Code 호스트 (플러그인 시스템 제공자)"]
        Manifest["plugin manifest 로더&#x3C;br/>plugin.json 파싱"]
        HookEngine["hooks 엔진&#x3C;br/>25 이벤트 / 6 훅타입&#x3C;br/>(11_cc_plugin §훅엔진)"]
        McpReg["MCP 서버 레지스트리"]
        AgentDisc["agents/*.md 자동 발견"]
        SkillDisc["skills/*/SKILL.md 발견"]
    end
    subgraph OMC["OMC (플러그인 = 확장점 소비자)"]
        PJ[".claude-plugin/plugin.json&#x3C;br/>skills[] / mcpServers / commands"]
        MP[".claude-plugin/marketplace.json&#x3C;br/>카탈로그 엔트리"]
        HJ["hooks/hooks.json&#x3C;br/>10 이벤트, command 훅만"]
        MCPJSON[".mcp.json → bridge/mcp-server.cjs (t)"]
        RUN["scripts/run.cjs (크로스플랫폼 런처)"]
        SCRIPTS["scripts/*.mjs (훅 본체)"]
    end
    MP -->|/plugin install| Manifest
    PJ --> Manifest
    Manifest --> SkillDisc
    Manifest --> McpReg
    Manifest --> AgentDisc
    HJ --> HookEngine
    MCPJSON --> McpReg
    HookEngine -->|spawn command| RUN
    RUN -->|execPath spawn| SCRIPTS
    McpReg -->|stdio| MCPJSON
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>1. Manifest and Marketplace (distribution surface)</h2>
<h3>1.1 plugin.json — Single entry point</h3>
<p><code>.claude-plugin/plugin.json</code> is the manifest that declares OMC as a Claude Code plugin. Only three types of extension points are directly declared, along with metadata (<code>name</code>, <code>version: "4.14.4"</code>, <code>license: "MIT"</code>, <code>keywords: ["claude-code", "plugin", "multi-agent", ...]</code>):</p>
<pre><code class="language-jsonc">// .claude-plugin/plugin.json
{
  "name": "oh-my-claudecode",
  "version": "4.14.4",
  "skills": [ "./skills/ai-slop-cleaner/", "./skills/ask/", ... 39개 디렉토리 ],
  "mcpServers": "./.mcp.json",   // 문자열 참조 → 외부 파일로 위임
  "commands": "./commands/"      // 디렉토리 참조 → 자동 발견
}
</code></pre>
<p>Things to note:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong><code>hooks</code> is not in the manifest.</strong> Hooks are separated into a separate file <code>hooks/hooks.json</code> (the host loads this file separately from the plugin root). [[11_cc_plugin]] §The <code>hooksConfig</code> slot distribution of plugin hook loading corresponds to this.</li>
<li><strong><code>agents</code> is also not in the manifest.</strong> <code>agents/*.md</code> is absorbed into the host's subagent auto-discovery protocol.</li>
<li><code>mcpServers</code> is <strong>string path reference</strong> (<code>./.mcp.json</code>). It reuses the same format as the general MCP setup by delegating it to an external file rather than an inline object.</li>
</ul>
<p>The <code>plugin.json:"skills"</code> array explicitly lists 39 items (README/marketplace counts as "32 skills"·"~38" depending on the version). The decision to place it in an array instead of leaving it to automatic directory discovery like commands appears to be an intention to fix the skill discovery order/existence in the manifest.</p>
<h3>1.2 marketplace.json — Catalog entry</h3>
<p><code>.claude-plugin/marketplace.json</code> is a catalog entry that follows the host's <strong>Marketplace Schema</strong> (<code>$schema: "https://anthropic.com/claude-code/marketplace.schema.json"</code>). The marketplace name is <code>omc</code>, and a single plugin <code>oh-my-claudecode</code> is registered within it (<code>source: "./"</code>, <code>category: "productivity"</code>). The description is "Claude Code native multi-agent orchestration - intelligent model routing, 28 agents, 32 skills" (the difference from the 39 skills arrangement in the manifest is version drift).</p>
<p>This file is <strong>OMC's distribution mechanism</strong>, which corresponds to "Codex marketplace + git sync" in [[11_cc_plugin]]. README.md:54-64 specifies the installation path:</p>
<pre><code>/plugin marketplace add https://github.com/Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-claudecode
/plugin install oh-my-claudecode
</code></pre>
<p>In other words, the OMC does not create its own package manager, but rides directly on the host's <code>/plugin marketplace add</code> + <code>/plugin install</code>** flow. There is also an npm path (<code>omc setup</code>, <code>npm i -g oh-my-claude-sisyphus</code>), but that is a CLI/runtime installation and the marketplace path for the plugin surface is authentic.</p>
<h3>1.3 Duality of npm packages vs plugins</h3>
<p><code>package.json</code> shows a separate identity: the package name is <code>oh-my-claude-sisyphus</code> (different from the plugin name), <code>bin</code> exposes <code>omc</code>/<code>oh-my-claudecode</code>/<code>omc-cli</code> CLI, and <code>files</code> contains <code>dist</code>, <code>bridge</code>, <code>agents</code>, <code>commands</code>, <code>hooks</code>, <code>skills</code>, Includes both <code>.claude-plugin</code> and <code>.mcp.json</code>. That is, **one repo is deployed simultaneously as both (a) the Claude Code plugin and (b) the independent npm CLI. Among the dependencies directly related to the plugin surface are <code>@modelcontextprotocol/sdk</code> (MCP server implementation), <code>@ast-grep/napi</code> (AST tool), <code>vscode-languageserver-protocol</code> (LSP tool), and <code>@anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk</code> (in-process MCP for subagents).</p>
<hr>
<h2>2. Use host hook extension point (hooks.json)</h2>
<h3>2.1 Declaration structure — command hook single type</h3>
<p><code>hooks/hooks.json</code> uses only <strong><code>command</code> type</strong> out of the six [[11_cc_plugin]] § hook types. <code>prompt</code>/<code>agent</code>/<code>http</code>/<code>callback</code>/<code>function</code> are not used at all. All hooks have the same pattern:</p>
<pre><code class="language-jsonc">{
  "type": "command",
  "command": "node \"$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT\"/scripts/run.cjs \"$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT\"/scripts/&#x3C;hook>.mjs",
  "timeout": &#x3C;n>
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT</code> is an environment variable injected by the host, which allows the plugin to point to its own script independently of the installation path. OMC hooks 16 scripts on 10 events (multiple hooks per event allowed):</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Host Event</th>
<th>matcher</th>
<th>OMC script</th>
<th align="right">timeout(s)</th>
<th>dimension role</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>UserPromptSubmit</code></td>
<td><code>*</code></td>
<td>keyword-detector.mjs, skill-injector.mjs</td>
<td align="right">5/3</td>
<td>Magic Keyword → Skill Trigger, Learning Skill Injection</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>SessionStart</code></td>
<td><code>*</code></td>
<td>session-start, project-memory-session, wiki-session-start</td>
<td align="right">5/5/5</td>
<td>mode state restoration, memory/wiki injection</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>SessionStart</code></td>
<td><code>init</code></td>
<td>setup-init.mjs</td>
<td align="right">30</td>
<td>Repo initialization (host source=init matcher)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>SessionStart</code></td>
<td><code>maintenance</code></td>
<td>setup-maintenance.mjs</td>
<td align="right">60</td>
<td>Maintenance</td>
</tr>
<tr>

<td>Result verification/memory/rule re-injection</td>

<td><code>*</code></td>
<td>post-tool-use-failure.mjs</td>
<td align="right">3</td>
<td>failure record</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>SubagentStart</code>/<code>SubagentStop</code></td>
<td><code>*</code></td>
<td>subagent-tracker.mjs (start/stop), verify-deliverables.mjs</td>
<td align="right">3/5/5</td>
<td>Subagent tracking and output verification</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>PreCompact</code></td>
<td><code>*</code></td>
<td>pre-compact, project-memory-precompact, wiki-pre-compact</td>
<td align="right">10/5/3</td>
<td>Checkpoint before compression</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>Stop</code></td>
<td><code>*</code></td>
<td>context-guard-stop, persistent-mode, code-simplifier</td>
<td align="right">5/10/5</td>
<td><strong>Turn end blocking/re-entry (perpetual loop)</strong></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>SessionEnd</code></td>
<td><code>*</code></td>
<td>session-end, wiki-session-end</td>
<td align="right">30/30</td>
<td>Session summary/recap</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>Among the 25 events provided by the host ([[11_cc_plugin]] §25 events), the OMC does not use: <code>Notification</code>, <code>StopFailure</code>, <code>PostCompact</code>, <code>Setup</code> (replaced by separate init/maintenance matchers), <code>TeammateIdle</code>, <code>TaskCompleted</code>, <code>Elicitation</code>/<code>ElicitationResult</code>, <code>ConfigChange</code>, <code>Worktree*</code>, <code>InstructionsLoaded</code>, <code>CwdChanged</code>, <code>FileChanged</code>. In other words, the OMC selectively occupies only the core framework (prompt, session, tool, subagent, compression, termination) of the host life cycle.</p>
<h3>2.2 Using matcher — Source branch of SessionStart</h3>
<p>The place where OMC uses the host matcher most elaborately is <code>SessionStart</code>. According to [[11_cc_plugin]], the matcher target of <code>SessionStart</code> is <code>source</code> (startup/resume/clear/compact, etc.). The OMC registers the three matchers <code>*</code>, <code>init</code>, and <code>maintenance</code> as separate entries, allowing the host to route the same event to different scripts for each source (<code>hooks/hooks.json:21-62</code>). <code>PermissionRequest</code> matches a permission handler only to Bash tools with <code>matcher: "Bash"</code>.</p>
<h3>2.3 Hook output convention — Complies with host hookSpecificOutput API</h3>
<p>The OMC hook exactly follows the host JSON output schema of [[11_cc_plugin]] §Output parsing. <code>keyword-detector.mjs</code> explicitly guards against invalid field usage (comment <code>scripts/keyword-detector.mjs:1040</code>: "The 'message' field is NOT a valid hook output - use hookSpecificOutput.additionalContext"):</p>
<pre><code class="language-js">// scripts/keyword-detector.mjs:1042
function createHookOutput(additionalContext) {
  return {
    continue: true,
    hookSpecificOutput: { hookEventName: 'UserPromptSubmit', additionalContext }
  };
}
</code></pre>
<p>That is, when the <code>UserPromptSubmit</code> hook injects trigger text such as <code>[MAGIC KEYWORD: RALPH]</code> into the context as <code>hookSpecificOutput.additionalContext</code>, the host synthesizes it into the user prompt. This is the basis of OMC’s keyword auto-trigger UX. The output fields for each event (<code>additionalContext</code> of <code>UserPromptSubmit</code>, <code>decision</code>/<code>reason</code> of <code>Stop</code>) correspond 1:1 to the host schema defined by [[11_cc_plugin]].</p>
<h3>2.3.1 Two-stage pipeline of UserPromptSubmit hook</h3>
<p>For one <code>UserPromptSubmit</code> event, the OMC sequentially throws two hooks (<code>hooks/hooks.json:4-20</code>), each utilizing the host's <code>additionalContext</code> injection path differently:</p>
<ol>
<li><strong><code>keyword-detector.mjs</code></strong>(timeout 5s): Scans user input with regular expressions and converts magic keywords into skill triggers. The output is loaded with the text <code>[MAGIC KEYWORD: &#x3C;SKILL>]</code> in <code>hookSpecificOutput.additionalContext</code>, which the host synthesizes into the prompt (<code>keyword-detector.mjs:959</code>). This hook also writes the disk state at the same time — when detecting a mode such as <code>ralph</code>/<code>team</code>, it records <code>.omc/state/ralph-state.json</code> as <code>mode: 0o600</code> (<code>keyword-detector.mjs:903-913</code>), pre-planting the state to be read by the later <code>Stop</code> hook (§2.4). To prevent infinite spawning, keyword detection is skipped if the environment is <code>OMC_TEAM_WORKER</code>.</li>
<li><strong><code>skill-injector.mjs</code></strong>(timeout 3s): Injects the <strong>learning skill</strong> created by learner/skillify into the context. It recursively searches three locations — user (<code>{configDir}/skills/omc-learned</code>), global (<code>~/.omc/skills</code>), and project (<code>.omc/skills</code>) (<code>skill-injector.mjs:31-33</code>). Up to 5 per session (<code>MAX_SKILLS_PER_SESSION</code>), with a context limit of 3000 characters (<code>MAX_LEARNED_SKILLS_CONTEXT_CHARS</code>). If possible, use the compiled <code>dist/hooks/skill-bridge.cjs</code>, otherwise fallback inline (<code>skill-injector.mjs:20-27</code>).</li>
</ol>
<p><code>UserPromptSubmit</code> pops up as a <strong>new Node process</strong> every turn, so in-memory dedup is not possible. <code>skill-injector.mjs</code> prevents re-injection of the same skill by persisting the injection history as a file in <code>{cwd}/.omc/state/skill-sessions-fallback.json</code> (TTL 1 hour) (<code>skill-injector.mjs:43-58</code>, issue #2577). This is an example of a plug-in using disk state to compensate for the “limitation of the host hook being a stateless process model.”</p>
<h3>2.3.2 commands = Skill Dispatcher (reduces prompt cost)</h3>
<p><code>commands/*.md</code> is almost entirely a <strong>thin dispatcher</strong>. The host automatically discovers this directory as a slash command with <code>plugin.json:"commands": "./commands/"</code>, but this tells the OMC to lazy load SKILL.md without putting any actual logic in the body of the command. <code>commands/ccg.md</code> is a sample:</p>
<blockquote>
<p>This compatibility command keeps <code>/oh-my-claudecode:ccg</code> available without loading the full <code>ccg</code> skill description in every Claude Code session. ... Read the full bundled skill instructions ... <code>skills/ccg/SKILL.md</code>. Follow that SKILL.md exactly, treating the user's arguments as <code>$ARGUMENTS</code>.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>That is, the command is just an entry point for the host's slash exposure, and the action is in SKILL.md. This saves <strong>context costs</strong> by not requiring the host to load all skill descriptions in every session prompt — this is an optimization that uses host extension points (commands discovery) but is conscious of their cost characteristics.</p>
<h3>2.4 Stop hook = "turn survival" ability created by host extension</h3>
<p>OMC's most essential capabilities (ralph/autopilot/ultragoal autonomous loops) are implemented with a single output: <code>decision: "block"</code>** from the host <code>Stop</code> hook. <code>scripts/persistent-mode.mjs</code> prints <code>decision: "block"</code> in 12 places (<code>grep</code> result: lines 1035, 1055, 1074, 1118, 1160, ...). Core pattern:</p>
<pre><code class="language-js">// scripts/persistent-mode.mjs:1118
console.log(JSON.stringify({ decision: "block", reason }));
// reason 예: "[RALPH LOOP - ITERATION n/max] Work is NOT done. Continue working. ... run /oh-my-claudecode:cancel"
</code></pre>
<p>According to [[11_cc_plugin]], the <code>Stop</code> event is a blocking event that can request to "continue the conversation" with exit 2 or <code>decision: block</code>. The OMC will trigger this extension point repeatedly while the disk state (<code>.omc/state/*-state.json</code>) is "incomplete", <strong>preventing the host from finishing its turn</strong>. Safeguards are also implemented on top of the host protocol:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>Does not block context/authentication failures</strong>: When <code>contextPatterns</code> (<code>context_limit</code>, <code>context_window</code>, <code>context_exceeded</code>, <code>max_context</code>, etc.) of <code>persistent-mode.mjs:749</code> or 401/403/OAuth expiration is detected, it passes through <code>{ continue: true, suppressOutput: true }</code> to recompress/reauthenticate the host. Preserve the flow.</li>
<li><strong>hard upper limit</strong>: <code>getHardMaxIterations</code>(<code>persistent-mode.mjs:52</code>) turns on the default 200 iteration upper limit when <code>OMC_SECURITY=strict</code> (overridden by <code>security.hardMaxIterations</code> in <code>.claude/omc.jsonc</code>).</li>
</ul>
<p>This is the exact mechanism of what [[00_omc_overview]] §7.1 refers to as "turn-crossing execution with only host lifecycle hooks and no external cron."</p>
<p>In the <code>Stop</code> event, three hooks are hung in order to cooperate (<code>hooks/hooks.json:172-192</code>):</p>
<ol>
<li><strong><code>context-guard-stop.mjs</code></strong>(timeout 5s): Fires first <strong>before</strong> persistent mode processing, and recommends session refresh when context usage (default 75%, <code>OMC_CONTEXT_GUARD_THRESHOLD</code>) exceeds the threshold. The output protocol is the same as persistent-mode (<code>{decision:"block"}</code> or <code>{continue:true, suppressOutput:true}</code>), but as a safeguard, (a) <code>context_limit</code> stops are never blocked (to prevent compression deadlocks), (b) user request stops (Ctrl+C) are respected, and (c) blocks are blocked up to twice per transcript (<code>MAX_BLOCKS</code>, infinite loop guard). Put (<code>context-guard-stop.mjs:14-32</code>).</li>
<li><strong><code>persistent-mode.mjs</code></strong>(timeout 10s): Autonomous loop body of §2.4 body.</li>
<li><strong><code>code-simplifier.mjs</code></strong>(timeout 5s): Trigger a simplification pass for the most recent changes at the end of the turn.</li>
</ol>
<p>As the three hooks fire on the same <code>Stop</code> event one after another, the following sequence is expressed only in the host hook arrangement order: <strong>context-guard checks context hygiene first → persistent-mode re-enters unfinished work → code-simplifier completes</strong>. This is how OMC utilizes the “parallel/sequential summation of multiple hooks per event” of [[11_cc_plugin]] §hook execution.</p>
<h3>2.5 Cross-platform launcher run.cjs — Hook robustness layer</h3>
<p>The OMC inserts a <strong>thin launcher <code>scripts/run.cjs</code></strong> between the host hook engine and its own script. The reason all commands in hooks.json are called as <code>node run.cjs &#x3C;hook>.mjs</code> is due to three robustness requirements:</p>
<ol>
<li><strong>Windows compatible</strong>: Runs without <code>/bin/sh</code> by spawning target <code>.mjs</code> with <code>process.execPath</code> (Node binary already running) (<code>run.cjs:6-16</code>, issues #909/#899/#892/#869).</li>
<li><strong>stale <code>CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT</code> recovery</strong>: When a plugin update changes the version directory and causes <code>MODULE_NOT_FOUND</code>, <code>resolveTarget</code> remains (a) → (b) <code>realpathSync</code> → (c) <strong>latest in the plugin cache (<code>~/.claude/plugins/cache/omc/170_oh-my-claudecode/&#x3C;ver></code>) Scan</strong> the semver version directory to find the same script (<code>run.cjs:44-91</code>, issue #1007).</li>
<li><strong>fail-open</strong>: If the target is not found or times out, it exits cleanly with <code>process.exit(0)</code> and <strong>never blocks the host hook</strong> (<code>run.cjs:131-159</code>). The timeout value is applied by deparsing the <code>timeout</code> field of hooks.json (<code>resolveHookTimeoutMs</code>).</li>
</ol>
<p>This launcher is a good example of “when a plugin uses a host extension point, it directly places a defense layer against version drift and platform differences.” As [[11_cc_plugin]] pointed out silent-failure on the host side (invalid JSON fails silently), OMC balances the plug-in side with fail-open defense.</p>
<hr>
<h2>3. Using host MCP extension point (.mcp.json + two servers)</h2>
<h3>3.1 Manifest Registration Server — <code>t</code></h3>
<p><code>.mcp.json</code> directly registers only one stdio MCP server:</p>
<pre><code class="language-jsonc">// .mcp.json
{ "mcpServers": { "t": { "command": "node", "args": ["${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/bridge/mcp-server.cjs"] } } }
</code></pre>
<p>In the comparison table of [[11_cc_plugin]], it is said that "Codex exposes MCP tools, but Claude Code hooks do not expose tools," but OMC achieves "adding tools" that hooks cannot do by <strong>borrowing the host's MCP extension point to expose tools</strong>. The <code>allTools</code> array in <code>src/mcp/tool-registry.ts</code> aggregates a family of tools into a single source of truth:</p>
<pre><code class="language-ts">// src/mcp/tool-registry.ts:50
export const allTools: ToolDef[] = [
  ...lspTools, ...astTools, pythonReplTool,
  ...stateTools, ...notepadTools, ...memoryTools,
  ...traceTools, ...sharedMemoryTools, deepinitManifestTool,
  ...wikiTools, ...skillsTools,
];
</code></pre>
<p>Registration is the same as the host MCP protocol — <code>src/mcp/standalone-server.ts</code> launches <code>new Server(...)</code> + <code>StdioServerTransport</code> and responds with a list of tools with <code>setRequestHandler(ListToolsRequestSchema, ...)</code> (<code>standalone-server.ts:33-112</code>). Each <code>ToolDef</code> fills in the host MCP's <strong>annotations</strong>(<code>readOnlyHint</code>, <code>destructiveHint</code>, <code>idempotentHint</code>, <code>openWorldHint</code>) along with <code>name</code>/<code>description</code>/<code>schema</code>(zod)/<code>handler</code> (<code>tool-registry.ts:36</code>) — This is an example of a plugin faithfully providing metadata that the host uses to determine permissions and safety.</p>
<h3>3.2 Non-manifest servers — <code>team</code></h3>
<p>The <code>team</code> MCP server (<code>bridge/team-mcp.cjs</code>, <code>omc_run_team_start/status/wait/cleanup</code>) is not in <code>.mcp.json</code>. Dynamically launched at runtime (comment in <code>tool-registry.ts:11</code>: "Team runtime tools ... are intentionally excluded: they live in the separate 'team' MCP server"). That is, OMC intentionally separates manifest static registration (<code>t</code>) and runtime dynamic registration (<code>team</code>). Static servers are divided into code intel/state tools that are always on, and dynamic servers are heavy tmux worker controls that are only needed when using <code>/team</code>.</p>
<h3>3.3 In-process server for subagent</h3>
<p>The third variant is <code>src/mcp/omc-tools-server.ts</code>. <code>createSdkMcpServer</code> of <code>@anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk</code> exposes the same set of tools (comment: "18 custom tools (12 LSP, 2 AST, 1 python_repl, 3 skills)") as an <strong>in-process MCP server</strong> — This is a path that allows subagents to use tools without spawning a separate process. Group-level (lsp/ast/python/trace/state/notepad/memory) deactivation is also supported with the <code>OMC_DISABLE_TOOLS</code> environment variable (<code>omc-tools-server.ts:DISABLE_TOOLS_GROUP_MAP</code>).</p>
<p>This allows the OMC's tool surface to ride on the host MCP extension point through three channels: <strong>(1) a <code>.mcp.json</code> static stdio server <code>t</code>, (2) a runtime dynamic <code>team</code> server, and (3) an in-process server for subagents</strong>.</p>
<hr>
<h2>4. Host subagent discovery extension point (agents/*.md)</h2>
<p>OMC's 19 agents are not declared in neither <code>plugin.json</code> nor <code>marketplace.json</code>. It relies entirely on the host's convention of <strong>auto-discovering</strong> the <code>agents/</code> directory in the plugin root (<code>agents/</code> 19 <code>.md</code> files). Each file passes metadata to the host subagent (Task) mechanism as a YAML frontmatter:</p>
<pre><code class="language-yaml"># agents/architect.md
---
name: architect
description: Strategic Architecture &#x26; Debugging Advisor (Opus, READ-ONLY)
model: opus            # 호스트 모델 라우팅
level: 3               # OMC 자체 무게 표시 (호스트는 무시)
disallowedTools: Write, Edit   # 호스트 권한 박탈
---
</code></pre>
<p>Here, the key from the plug-in system perspective is <strong><code>disallowedTools</code></strong>. By reading this frontmatter key, the host **effectively strips away Write/Edit from that subagent's toolset — a "covenant+privilege double seal" that seals it once more in the host permission hierarchy, apart from the OMC indicating "READ-ONLY" with the prompt text (<code>&#x3C;Constraints></code>) (read-only agent: architect/analyst/critic/explore/code-reviewer/security-reviewer/document-specialist/scientist). <code>model</code>/<code>level</code> is divided into host model routing (opus/sonnet/haiku) and OMC own weight metadata. For detailed catalog, see [[00_omc_overview]] §3.</p>
<p>This organizes the host discovery extension points used by OMC into three branches: (1) <code>plugin.json:skills</code> explicit array, (2) <code>plugin.json:commands</code> directory discovery, and (3) <code>agents/</code> directory discovery. It is characterized by an asymmetry in which only skills are nailed to the manifest, and commands/agents are left to the directory convention.</p>
<h2>5. System Prompt Extension Point (CLAUDE.md marker injection)</h2>
<p>The OMC uses the host's prompt assembly extension point (the <code>CLAUDE.md</code> project directive layer) for <strong>marker boundary non-destructive injection</strong>. <code>CLAUDE.md:1-2</code>:</p>
<pre><code>&#x3C;!-- OMC:START -->
&#x3C;!-- OMC:VERSION:4.9.1 -->
</code></pre>
<p>When installing/updating, only the blocks between these <code>OMC:START</code>/<code>OMC:END</code> markers are replaced, preserving the user's existing <code>CLAUDE.md</code> contents. This block contains delegation rules (<code>&#x3C;delegation_rules></code>), model routing, agent catalog, and hook conventions. Hook and prompt interfaces are also specified here (<code>CLAUDE.md:99</code>):</p>
<blockquote>
<p>Hooks inject <code>&#x3C;system-reminder></code> tags. Key patterns: <code>hook success: Success</code> (proceed), <code>[MAGIC KEYWORD: ...]</code> (invoke skill), <code>The boulder never stops</code> (ralph/ultrawork active).</p>
</blockquote>
<p>In other words, the text that the hook injects through the host extension point and the protocol by which the prompt interprets that text are paired in another host extension point called <code>CLAUDE.md</code>.</p>
<hr>
<h2>6. Kill Switch and Graceful Degrade</h2>
<p>As a plugin, OMC places a multi-layer turnoff path (<code>CLAUDE.md:101</code>, <code>keyword-detector.mjs:main</code>) to avoid burdening the host:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>switch</th>
<th>range</th>
<th>Action</th>
<th>Evidence</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>DISABLE_OMC=1</code></td>
<td>All</td>
<td>All hooks immediately pass with no action as <code>{continue:true}</code></td>
<td><code>keyword-detector.mjs</code> main guard</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>OMC_SKIP_HOOKS</code> (comma separated)</td>
<td>By hook</td>
<td>Skip only specified hooks (<code>keyword-detector</code>, etc.)</td>
<td>issue #838</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>OMC_DISABLE_TOOLS</code> (group)</td>
<td>By MCP Tools</td>
<td>lsp/ast/python/... group inactive</td>
<td><code>omc-tools-server.ts</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>OMC_TEAM_WORKER</code></td>
<td>Inside Tim Walker</td>
<td>Block keyword detection (prevent infinite spawning)</td>
<td><code>keyword-detector.mjs</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>OMC_SECURITY=strict</code></td>
<td>persistent loop</td>
<td>Hard iteration upper limit 200</td>
<td><code>persistent-mode.mjs:53</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>Combined with the fail-open of the launcher <code>run.cjs</code>, OMC consistently adheres to the good plugin citizen principle of "borrowing host extension points, but not allowing your own failure to block the host." [[11_cc_plugin]] §If <code>disableAllHooks</code>/<code>allowManagedHooksOnly</code> in the management policy is turned off <strong>on the host side</strong>, the OMC's switch is symmetrical to turn off <strong>on the plugin itself</strong>.</p>
<hr>
<h2>7. Mapping usage intensity by host extension point</h2>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph LR
    subgraph CC["Claude Code 확장점 (11_cc_plugin)"]
        E1["25 라이프사이클 이벤트"]
        E2["6 훅 타입"]
        E3["plugin manifest hooksConfig"]
        E4["MCP 서버 등록"]
        E5["skills/commands/agents 발견"]
        E6["CLAUDE.md 프롬프트 계층"]
    end
    subgraph OMC["OMC 사용 강도"]
        U1["10/25 이벤트만 사용&#x3C;br/>(핵심 골격)"]
        U2["command 1종만&#x3C;br/>(prompt/agent/http/callback 미사용)"]
        U3["hooks.json → 16 스크립트"]
        U4["t(정적)+team(동적)+in-process"]
        U5["39 skills / N commands / 19 agents"]
        U6["OMC:START 마커 비파괴 주입"]
    end
    E1 --> U1
    E2 --> U2
    E3 --> U3
    E4 --> U4
    E5 --> U5
    E6 --> U6
</code></pre>
<p>Key observation: OMC chose depth, not breadth, of its hosted plug-in system. Of the 6 hook types, only one <code>command</code> and 10 out of 25 events are used, but 16 Node scripts and a disk state machine are stacked within the <code>command</code> hook, resulting in a level of autonomous orchestration that the host may not have intended. A concise example is the creation of a “turn survival loop” with a single <code>Stop</code> hook.</p>
<hr>
<h2>8. Limits and fork perspective</h2>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <strong>Focus on single hook type</strong>: Simple debugging/porting by using only <code>command</code>. Host <code>prompt</code>/<code>agent</code>/<code>http</code> hooks are not used, so only decisions without LLM call cost are processed in the hook.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <strong>fail-open launcher</strong>: stale-path recovery and fail-open in <code>run.cjs</code> are exemplary of plugin robustness. Borrowed value intact when forking.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <strong>MCP 3-channel separation</strong> (static/dynamic/in-process) is a good pattern for dividing the tool surface by weight.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> <strong>Version drift</strong>: Manifest consistency verification is weak because <code>plugin.json</code>(39 skills)·<code>marketplace.json</code>("32 skills"·"28 agents")·<code>CLAUDE.md</code>(<code>OMC:VERSION:4.9.1</code>)·<code>plugin.json version</code>(4.14.4) are different versions.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> <strong>Depends on host hook output schema</strong>: The <code>hookSpecificOutput</code>/<code>decision:block</code> protocol is an internal host contract for which public documentation is lacking, as pointed out by [[11_cc_plugin]]. Risk of OMC breaking when changing hosts.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> <strong>Name duality</strong>: The plugin name (<code>oh-my-claudecode</code>) and the npm package name (<code>oh-my-claude-sisyphus</code>) are different, making tracking confusing.</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<h2>9. Implications of cli-jaw comparison</h2>
<ul>
<li><strong>Extension point consumer vs dispatch host</strong>: OMC is a consumer that digs deep into the <em>plugin extension point of a single host (Claude Code)</em>. cli-jaw, on the other hand, is a <em>meta harness</em> that dispatches multiple CLIs, making it more of a host itself. OMC's "host extension point depth priority" strategy (using only 1 out of 6 hook types and 10 out of 25 events, but building a state machine within it) is a reference point for design judgment in which cli-jaw uses the extension points of each target CLI (e.g. Claude Code hooks) <em>a few cores deeply</em> rather than <em>all thinly</em>.</li>
<li><strong>Hook-based turn survival vs poll/Wakeup</strong>: OMC achieves a "never-dying loop" with a single host <code>Stop</code> hook <code>decision:block</code>, without an external cron. The goal is the same as cli-jaw's MEMORY protocol (<code>feedback_use_poll_for_waiting</code>: "never terminate when waiting, poll/ScheduleWakeup") — the difference is that OMC achieves it <em>inside the host lifecycle hook</em>, while cli-jaw achieves it <em>in the harness scheduler</em>. When delegating a task to a specific CLI during multi-CLI dispatch, the polling burden of cli-jaw can be distributed to the delegation target by planting OMC-style hook-based self-reentrance within the CLI.</li>
<li><strong>fail-open launcher = multichannel robustness model</strong>: stale-path recovery in <code>run.cjs</code> + fail-open(<code>exit 0</code>) is an implementation of the principle "do not block the host if the extension code fails". When cli-jaw orchestrates multiple channels/CLI, it is a direct blueprint for a fail-open adapter layer that ensures that one channel/CLI adapter failure does not block the entire dispatch.</li>
<li><strong>MCP 3-channel separation + manifest consistency lesson</strong>: OMC's static (<code>.mcp.json</code>)/dynamic (<code>team</code>)/in-process MCP separation is the same "split tool surface by weight" philosophy as cli-jaw's lazy loading of tools (<code>ToolSearch</code>). At the same time, OMC's manifest version drift (39 vs 32 skills, 4.14.4 vs 4.9.1) means that cli-jaw with multi-channel, file memory, and PABCD must <em>generate the catalog/manifest from a single source of truth</em>.</li>
</ul>
<hr>

<h2>Change history</h2>
<ul>
<li>2026-05-29: Created plug-in system dimension for OMC v4.14.4 based on source. The key finding is that "OMC does not have its own plugin system, and deeply uses five extension points of the Claude Code host (plugin.json manifest, hooks.json, MCP registration, skills/commands/agents discovery, and CLAUDE.md prompt layer) as a consumer." plugin.json/marketplace.json/.mcp.json manifest surface, command-hook single type in hooks.json and 10/25 event occupancy, stop hook decision:block based turn survival, run.cjs fail-open launcher, MCP 3 channels (static t / dynamic team / in-process), kill switch multilayer, manifest version drift limit, cli-jaw comparison 4 items included.</li>
</ul>
<h2>Korean corpus (reference)</h2>
<blockquote>
<p>Verbatim KO corpus <code>011_plugin-system/11_omc_plugin.md</code> for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.</p>
</blockquote>
<h1>oh-my-claudecode (omc) 플러그인 시스템</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>170_oh-my-claudecode/</code> — plugin system.</p>
</blockquote>
<blockquote>
<p>이 문서는 OMC가 "플러그인 호스트"가 아니라 <strong>그 자체로 Claude Code 플러그인</strong>이라는 사실을 출발점으로 한다. OMC는 자체 플러그인 매니페스트/마켓플레이스/훅 엔진을 새로 구현하지 않는다. 대신 [[11_cc_plugin]]에서 분석한 <strong>Claude Code의 플러그인 확장점</strong>(plugin.json 매니페스트, hooks.json, MCP 서버 등록, skills/commands 자동 발견, agents/*.md 자동 발견)을 <strong>소비자(consumer) 입장에서</strong> 최대한 활용한다. 즉 이 차원에서 OMC의 핵심 질문은 "OMC는 어떤 플러그인 시스템을 제공하는가"가 아니라 **"OMC는 호스트의 확장점을 어떻게 쓰는가"**이다. 분석 기준 버전은 <code>.claude-plugin/plugin.json</code> v4.14.4이다.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>근거 경로: <code>.claude-plugin/plugin.json</code>, <code>.claude-plugin/marketplace.json</code>, <code>.mcp.json</code>, <code>hooks/hooks.json</code>, <code>scripts/run.cjs</code>, <code>scripts/keyword-detector.mjs</code>, <code>scripts/persistent-mode.mjs</code>, <code>src/mcp/tool-registry.ts</code>, <code>src/mcp/standalone-server.ts</code>, <code>src/mcp/omc-tools-server.ts</code>, <code>CLAUDE.md</code>, <code>README.md</code>, <code>package.json</code>. 상위 맥락은 [[00_omc_overview]] 참조.</p>
<hr>
<h2>0. 결론 먼저: 자체 플러그인 시스템의 "의도적 부재"와 호스트 위임</h2>
<p>OMC에는 <strong>자체 플러그인 시스템이 없다</strong>. 이것은 결함이 아니라 설계 선택이다. OMC가 더하는 모든 능력(19개 에이전트, 38개 스킬, 10개 라이프사이클 훅, <code>t</code>/<code>team</code> MCP 서버, <code>.omc/</code> 영속 계층)은 전부 <strong>Claude Code 호스트가 정의한 5개 확장점</strong>의 선언적 사용으로 구현된다.</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>OMC가 제공하는 것</th>
<th>구현 방식</th>
<th>호스트 확장점</th>
<th>근거</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>19개 서브에이전트</td>
<td><code>agents/*.md</code> (YAML frontmatter + 프롬프트)</td>
<td>agents 자동 발견</td>
<td><code>agents/</code> 디렉토리</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>38개 스킬</td>
<td><code>skills/*/SKILL.md</code></td>
<td><code>plugin.json:"skills"</code> 배열</td>
<td><code>.claude-plugin/plugin.json</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>슬래시 명령</td>
<td><code>commands/*.md</code> (얇은 디스패처)</td>
<td><code>plugin.json:"commands"</code></td>
<td><code>.claude-plugin/plugin.json</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>10개 라이프사이클 훅</td>
<td><code>hooks/hooks.json</code> → <code>scripts/*.mjs</code></td>
<td>Claude Code hooks 엔진</td>
<td><code>hooks/hooks.json</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>t</code> MCP 서버 (state/LSP/AST/wiki/...)</td>
<td>stdio MCP 서버</td>
<td><code>plugin.json:"mcpServers"</code> → <code>.mcp.json</code></td>
<td><code>.mcp.json</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>team</code> MCP 서버</td>
<td>런타임 동적 기동</td>
<td>(호스트 MCP, 매니페스트 외)</td>
<td><code>bridge/team-mcp.cjs</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>따라서 OMC는 [[11_cc_plugin]]이 분석한 호스트 훅 엔진의 <strong>"플러그인 manifest hooksConfig"</strong> 경로(<code>loadPluginHooks</code>)와 <strong>MCP 서버 등록</strong> 경로의 **실증 사례(reference implementation)**다. 호스트는 25개 라이프사이클 이벤트와 6가지 훅 타입을 제공하지만, OMC는 그중 <strong>10개 이벤트 / <code>command</code> 훅 타입 1개만</strong> 사용한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    subgraph Host["Claude Code 호스트 (플러그인 시스템 제공자)"]
        Manifest["plugin manifest 로더&#x3C;br/>plugin.json 파싱"]
        HookEngine["hooks 엔진&#x3C;br/>25 이벤트 / 6 훅타입&#x3C;br/>(11_cc_plugin §훅엔진)"]
        McpReg["MCP 서버 레지스트리"]
        AgentDisc["agents/*.md 자동 발견"]
        SkillDisc["skills/*/SKILL.md 발견"]
    end
    subgraph OMC["OMC (플러그인 = 확장점 소비자)"]
        PJ[".claude-plugin/plugin.json&#x3C;br/>skills[] / mcpServers / commands"]
        MP[".claude-plugin/marketplace.json&#x3C;br/>카탈로그 엔트리"]
        HJ["hooks/hooks.json&#x3C;br/>10 이벤트, command 훅만"]
        MCPJSON[".mcp.json → bridge/mcp-server.cjs (t)"]
        RUN["scripts/run.cjs (크로스플랫폼 런처)"]
        SCRIPTS["scripts/*.mjs (훅 본체)"]
    end
    MP -->|/plugin install| Manifest
    PJ --> Manifest
    Manifest --> SkillDisc
    Manifest --> McpReg
    Manifest --> AgentDisc
    HJ --> HookEngine
    MCPJSON --> McpReg
    HookEngine -->|spawn command| RUN
    RUN -->|execPath spawn| SCRIPTS
    McpReg -->|stdio| MCPJSON
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>1. 매니페스트와 마켓플레이스 (배포 표면)</h2>
<h3>1.1 plugin.json — 단일 진입점</h3>
<p><code>.claude-plugin/plugin.json</code>이 OMC를 Claude Code 플러그인으로 선언하는 매니페스트다. 메타데이터(<code>name</code>, <code>version: "4.14.4"</code>, <code>license: "MIT"</code>, <code>keywords: ["claude-code", "plugin", "multi-agent", ...]</code>)와 함께 <strong>세 종류의 확장점</strong>만 직접 선언한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-jsonc">// .claude-plugin/plugin.json
{
  "name": "oh-my-claudecode",
  "version": "4.14.4",
  "skills": [ "./skills/ai-slop-cleaner/", "./skills/ask/", ... 39개 디렉토리 ],
  "mcpServers": "./.mcp.json",   // 문자열 참조 → 외부 파일로 위임
  "commands": "./commands/"      // 디렉토리 참조 → 자동 발견
}
</code></pre>
<p>주목할 점:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong><code>hooks</code>는 매니페스트에 없다.</strong> 훅은 별도 파일 <code>hooks/hooks.json</code>으로 분리된다(호스트가 이 파일을 플러그인 루트에서 별도로 로드). [[11_cc_plugin]] §플러그인 훅 로딩의 <code>hooksConfig</code> 슬롯 분배가 여기에 대응한다.</li>
<li><strong><code>agents</code>도 매니페스트에 없다.</strong> <code>agents/*.md</code>는 호스트의 서브에이전트 자동 발견 규약으로 흡수된다.</li>
<li><code>mcpServers</code>는 <strong>문자열 경로 참조</strong>(<code>./.mcp.json</code>)다. 인라인 객체가 아니라 외부 파일로 위임해 일반 MCP 설정과 동일 포맷을 재사용한다.</li>
</ul>
<p><code>plugin.json:"skills"</code> 배열은 39개 항목(README/marketplace는 버전별로 "32 skills"·"~38"로 셈이 다름)을 명시적으로 나열한다. commands처럼 디렉토리 자동 발견에 맡기지 않고 배열로 못박은 것은, 스킬 발견 순서/존재를 매니페스트로 고정하려는 의도로 보인다.</p>
<h3>1.2 marketplace.json — 카탈로그 엔트리</h3>
<p><code>.claude-plugin/marketplace.json</code>은 호스트의 <strong>마켓플레이스 스키마</strong>(<code>$schema: "https://anthropic.com/claude-code/marketplace.schema.json"</code>)를 따르는 카탈로그 엔트리다. 마켓플레이스 이름은 <code>omc</code>이고, 그 안에 단일 플러그인 <code>oh-my-claudecode</code>를 등록한다(<code>source: "./"</code>, <code>category: "productivity"</code>). 설명은 "Claude Code native multi-agent orchestration - intelligent model routing, 28 agents, 32 skills"이다(매니페스트의 39 skills 배열과 셈이 다른 것은 버전 드리프트).</p>
<p>이 파일이 [[11_cc_plugin]]의 "Codex marketplace + git sync"에 해당하는 <strong>OMC의 배포 메커니즘</strong>이다. README.md:54-64가 설치 경로를 명시한다:</p>
<pre><code>/plugin marketplace add https://github.com/Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-claudecode
/plugin install oh-my-claudecode
</code></pre>
<p>즉 OMC는 자체 패키지 매니저를 만들지 않고 <strong>호스트의 <code>/plugin marketplace add</code> + <code>/plugin install</code></strong> 흐름에 그대로 올라탄다. npm 경로(<code>omc setup</code>, <code>npm i -g oh-my-claude-sisyphus</code>)도 있으나, 그쪽은 CLI/런타임 설치이고 플러그인 표면은 마켓플레이스 경로가 정본이다.</p>
<h3>1.3 npm 패키지 vs 플러그인의 이원성</h3>
<p><code>package.json</code>은 별개의 정체성을 보인다: 패키지명은 <code>oh-my-claude-sisyphus</code>(플러그인명과 다름), <code>bin</code>으로 <code>omc</code>/<code>oh-my-claudecode</code>/<code>omc-cli</code> CLI를 노출하고, <code>files</code>에 <code>dist</code>, <code>bridge</code>, <code>agents</code>, <code>commands</code>, <code>hooks</code>, <code>skills</code>, <code>.claude-plugin</code>, <code>.mcp.json</code>을 모두 포함한다. 즉 <strong>하나의 레포가 (a) Claude Code 플러그인과 (b) 독립 npm CLI 두 가지로 동시에 배포</strong>된다. 의존성 중 플러그인 표면과 직접 관련된 것은 <code>@modelcontextprotocol/sdk</code>(MCP 서버 구현), <code>@ast-grep/napi</code>(AST 도구), <code>vscode-languageserver-protocol</code>(LSP 도구), <code>@anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk</code>(서브에이전트용 in-process MCP)다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>2. 호스트 훅 확장점 사용 (hooks.json)</h2>
<h3>2.1 선언 구조 — command 훅 단일 타입</h3>
<p><code>hooks/hooks.json</code>은 [[11_cc_plugin]] §훅 타입 6가지 중 <strong><code>command</code> 타입 단 하나만</strong> 쓴다. <code>prompt</code>/<code>agent</code>/<code>http</code>/<code>callback</code>/<code>function</code>은 전혀 사용하지 않는다. 모든 훅은 동일 패턴이다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-jsonc">{
  "type": "command",
  "command": "node \"$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT\"/scripts/run.cjs \"$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT\"/scripts/&#x3C;hook>.mjs",
  "timeout": &#x3C;n>
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT</code>는 호스트가 주입하는 환경변수로, 플러그인이 설치 경로에 독립적으로 자기 스크립트를 가리키게 해준다. OMC는 10개 이벤트에 16개 스크립트를 건다(이벤트당 다중 훅 허용):</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>호스트 이벤트</th>
<th>matcher</th>
<th>OMC 스크립트</th>
<th align="right">timeout(s)</th>
<th>차원 역할</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>UserPromptSubmit</code></td>
<td><code>*</code></td>
<td>keyword-detector.mjs, skill-injector.mjs</td>
<td align="right">5/3</td>
<td>매직 키워드 → 스킬 트리거, 학습 스킬 주입</td>
</tr>
<tr>

</tr>
<tr>

<td><code>*</code></td>

<td align="right">3</td>
<td>실패 기록</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>SubagentStart</code>/<code>SubagentStop</code></td>
<td><code>*</code></td>
<td>subagent-tracker.mjs (start/stop), verify-deliverables.mjs</td>
<td align="right">3/5/5</td>

</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>PreCompact</code></td>
<td><code>*</code></td>
<td>pre-compact, project-memory-precompact, wiki-pre-compact</td>
<td align="right">10/5/3</td>
<td>압축 전 체크포인트</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>Stop</code></td>
<td><code>*</code></td>
<td>context-guard-stop, persistent-mode, code-simplifier</td>
<td align="right">5/10/5</td>
<td><strong>턴 종료 차단·재진입(영속 루프)</strong></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>SessionEnd</code></td>
<td><code>*</code></td>
<td>session-end, wiki-session-end</td>
<td align="right">30/30</td>
