<h2>Korean corpus (reference)</h2>
<blockquote>
<p>Verbatim KO corpus <code>012_guardian-approval/12_omc_guardian.md</code> for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.</p>
</blockquote>
<h1>oh-my-claudecode (omc) 가디언 / 승인</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>170_oh-my-claudecode/</code> — guardian and approval.</p>
</blockquote>
<blockquote>
<p>이 문서는 <code>Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-claudecode</code>(OMC) 플러그인의 <strong>승인·가디언 계층</strong>을 소스 기반으로 분석한다. OMC는 자체 권한 엔진을 갖지 않는다 — [[12_cc_guardian]]에서 본 Claude Code의 규칙 기반 5-mode × 3-tier(allow/deny/ask) 퍼미션 시스템과 Tengu Bash 보안 체인을 <strong>호스트로 그대로 위임</strong>하고, 그 위에 (1) <code>PermissionRequest</code> Hook으로 Bash 안전 명령을 <strong>자동승인</strong>하는 화이트리스트, (2) <code>PreToolUse</code> Hook(<code>pre-tool-enforcer.mjs</code>)으로 모델 라우팅·ultragoal·team을 <strong>deny</strong>하는 정책 강제, (3) <code>OMC_SECURITY=strict</code> 마스터 스위치로 켜지는 7-feature 보안 정책표(<code>security-config.ts</code>)를 얹는다. 분석 기준 버전은 <code>plugin.json</code> v4.14.4다.</p>
<p>근거 경로: <code>src/hooks/permission-handler/index.ts</code>, <code>scripts/permission-handler.mjs</code>, <code>scripts/pre-tool-enforcer.mjs</code>, <code>src/lib/security-config.ts</code>, <code>hooks/hooks.json</code>, <code>SECURITY.md</code>, 그리고 정책 소비처 <code>src/tools/ast-tools.ts</code>, <code>src/tools/python-repl/bridge-manager.ts</code>, <code>src/team/model-contract.ts</code>, <code>src/hooks/persistent-mode/index.ts</code>, <code>src/utils/ssrf-guard.ts</code>, <code>src/features/delegation-enforcer.ts</code>.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>OMC의 승인 모델을 한 문장으로 요약하면 이렇다: <strong>거부와 최종 판정은 Claude Code의 Tengu/규칙 엔진에 맡기고, OMC는 "안전한 것을 자동으로 통과시키는 화이트리스트"와 "위험·잘못된 호출을 사전 차단하는 deny Hook"의 두 방향으로만 개입한다.</strong> Codex의 AI risk-scoring guardian([[12_cc_guardian]] §9)도, Claude Code의 19개 Tengu 체크도 재구현하지 않는다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>1. 가디언 계층 전체 구조</h2>
<p>OMC가 호스트 권한 시스템에 거는 훅은 <code>hooks/hooks.json</code>에 단 두 개다 — <code>PreToolUse</code>(모든 도구, <code>matcher:"*"</code>, timeout 3s)와 <code>PermissionRequest</code>(Bash 전용, <code>matcher:"Bash"</code>, timeout 5s). 둘 다 <code>scripts/run.cjs</code> 런처를 통해 <code>.mjs</code>를 띄운다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    A["도구 호출 요청"] --> B{"PreToolUse Hook&#x3C;br/>pre-tool-enforcer.mjs"}
    B -->|"ultragoal /goal 불일치"| D1["permissionDecision: deny"]
    B -->|"forceInherit + 잘못된 model"| D2["permissionDecision: deny"]
    B -->|"team 활성 + team_name 없음"| W1["additionalContext 경고(차단 아님)"]
    B -->|"fallback/workaround 언어"| W2["[SLOP WARNING] 경고"]
    B -->|"통과"| C{"도구 = Bash?"}
    C -->|"아니오"| H["Claude Code 규칙 엔진&#x3C;br/>(checkPermissions)"]
    C -->|"예"| P{"PermissionRequest Hook&#x3C;br/>permission-handler.mjs"}
    P -->|"ask 규칙 매칭"| H
    P -->|"SAFE_PATTERNS / repo-inspection /&#x3C;br/>targeted-test / safe-heredoc"| AL["behavior: allow (자동승인)"]
    P -->|"그 외"| H
    H --> T["Tengu 보안 체인 + allow/deny/ask"]
    T --> R["실행 / 사용자 프롬프트"]
</code></pre>
<p>핵심 비대칭: <strong>PermissionRequest Hook은 오직 <code>allow</code>만 반환</strong>한다(자동승인 또는 패스스루). 명령을 직접 deny하지 않고, 안전하지 않으면 <code>{continue:true}</code>로 그냥 흘려보내 호스트의 native 권한 흐름이 판정하게 한다(<code>processPermissionRequest</code>의 마지막 <code>return { continue: true }</code>, <code>index.ts:672</code>). 반대로 <strong>deny는 전부 PreToolUse Hook</strong>(<code>pre-tool-enforcer.mjs</code>)에서만 나오며, 그 대상은 Bash 위험성이 아니라 모델 라우팅·ultragoal 게이팅이다.</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Hook</th>
<th>매처</th>
<th>스크립트</th>
<th>반환 가능 결정</th>
<th>목적</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>PreToolUse</code></td>
<td><code>*</code></td>
<td><code>pre-tool-enforcer.mjs</code></td>
<td><code>deny</code> / <code>additionalContext</code> 경고 / <code>continue</code></td>
<td>모델 라우팅 강제, ultragoal·team 게이팅, SLOP 경고</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>PermissionRequest</code></td>
<td><code>Bash</code></td>
<td><code>permission-handler.mjs</code> → <code>permission-handler/index.ts</code></td>
<td><code>allow</code> / <code>continue</code>(패스스루)</td>
<td>안전 Bash 명령 자동승인</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<hr>
<h2>2. Bash 자동승인 화이트리스트 (<code>permission-handler/index.ts</code>)</h2>
<p><code>PermissionRequest</code> Hook의 본체는 <code>src/hooks/permission-handler/index.ts</code>의 <code>processPermissionRequest()</code>다(빌드 산출물 <code>dist/hooks/permission-handler/index.js</code>를 <code>permission-handler.mjs:12</code>가 동적 import). 흐름은 <code>index.ts:640~674</code>:</p>
<ol>
<li><code>tool_name</code>을 <code>proxy_</code> 접두사 제거 후 정규화 — <code>Bash</code>가 아니면 <code>{continue:true}</code>로 즉시 통과(<code>index.ts:643~645</code>).</li>
<li><code>hasClaudePermissionAsk(cwd, 'Bash', command)</code>로 사용자가 <strong>명시적으로 ask로 지정한 명령</strong>인지 확인. ask 규칙에 걸리면 자동승인하지 않는다(사용자 의도 존중, <code>index.ts:653</code>).</li>
<li>ask가 아니고 <code>isSafeAutoApprovedCommand(command, cwd)</code>가 참이면 <code>behavior:'allow'</code>로 자동승인(<code>index.ts:656~670</code>).</li>
<li>그 외에는 <code>{continue:true}</code> — 호스트 native 권한 흐름으로 패스스루.</li>
</ol>
<h3>2.1 4-갈래 안전 판정 (<code>isSafeAutoApprovedCommand</code>)</h3>
<p><code>index.ts:544~549</code>는 네 종류의 안전 명령을 OR로 묶는다:</p>
<pre><code>isSafeCommand              → SAFE_PATTERNS 화이트리스트 (메타문자 0)
isSafeRepoInspectionCommand → cat/head/tail/sed -n/rg, repo 내부 경로만
isSafeTargetedLocalTestCommand → vitest run / npm·pnpm·yarn test --run / node --test, 단일 repo 경로
isHeredocWithSafeBase      → git commit/git tag heredoc
</code></pre>
<p><strong>(a) SAFE_PATTERNS (<code>index.ts:33~45</code>)</strong> — 읽기 전용·빌드·린트 명령의 정규식 화이트리스트:</p>
<pre><code>^git (status|diff|log|branch|show|fetch)
^npm run (lint|build|check|typecheck)
^pnpm|yarn (lint|build|check|typecheck|run …)
^tsc / ^eslint / ^prettier / ^cargo (check|clippy|build) / ^ls / ^gh (issue|pr) (view|list|status)
</code></pre>
<p>주석이 명시하듯 <code>cat/head/tail</code>은 SAFE_PATTERNS에서 <strong>의도적으로 제거</strong>됐다("they allow reading arbitrary files", <code>index.ts:44</code>) — 임의 파일 노출을 막기 위해 별도의 경로 검증 경로(2.2)로 분리한 것.</p>
<p><strong>(b) DANGEROUS_SHELL_CHARS 가드 (<code>index.ts:51</code>)</strong> — <code>isSafeCommand</code>(<code>index.ts:554~564</code>)는 SAFE_PATTERN 매칭 <strong>전에</strong> 셸 메타문자를 전수 거부한다:</p>
<pre><code>/[;&#x26;|`$()&#x3C;>\n\r\t\0\\{}\[\]*?~!#]/
</code></pre>
<p>이 한 줄이 명령 체이닝·치환·리다이렉션·글로빙·홈 확장을 모두 차단한다. <code>git status; rm -rf /</code>는 <code>;</code> 때문에 거부되고(테스트 <code>index.test.ts:184</code>로 검증), 따옴표(<code>"'</code>)는 공백 포함 경로를 위해 <strong>의도적으로 제외</strong>(치환은 <code>$</code>가 이미 잡음, <code>index.ts:49</code>). GitHub Issue #146이 근거.</p>
<h3>2.2 repo 경로 검증 (<code>isSafeRepoInspectionCommand</code>)</h3>
<p><code>cat/head/tail/sed -n/rg</code>는 화이트리스트에서 빠졌지만, <strong>읽는 대상이 worktree 내부의 비민감 파일임을 검증</strong>하면 자동승인한다(<code>index.ts:511~526</code>). 핵심은 <code>isSafeRepoPath</code>(<code>index.ts:338~391</code>):</p>
<ul>
<li><code>getWorktreeRoot(cwd)</code>로 worktree 경계를 얻고, <code>fs.realpathSync</code>로 심볼릭 링크를 <strong>canonical 경로로 해소</strong>한 뒤 worktree 밖(<code>..</code> 또는 절대경로)이면 거부 — 심링크 탈출 방어.</li>
<li><code>isSensitiveRepoRelativePath</code>(<code>index.ts:312~336</code>)로 <code>.git/</code>, <code>.ssh/</code>, <code>secrets/</code>, <code>.env*</code>, <code>node_modules/.cache/</code>를 차단. <code>cat .env.local</code>·<code>rg -n value .git</code>은 거부(테스트 <code>index.test.ts:211~216</code>).</li>
<li>디렉토리 전체 검색 금지(<code>allowDirectory:false</code>) — <code>rg -n value src</code>처럼 디렉토리를 주면 거부, 단일 파일만 허용.</li>
<li><code>rg</code>는 <code>SAFE_RIPGREP_FLAGS</code>(<code>-n/-S/-F/-i/--no-heading</code> 등, <code>index.ts:66~76</code>)만 허용 — <code>--hidden</code>은 거부.</li>
</ul>
<p>명령 토크나이저(<code>tokenizeShellCommand</code>, <code>index.ts:270~310</code>)는 따옴표를 인식해 인자를 분해하되, 닫히지 않은 따옴표는 <code>null</code>을 반환해 거부한다.</p>
<h3>2.3 heredoc 가드 (<code>isHeredocWithSafeBase</code>, Issue #608)</h3>
<p>heredoc 명령은 <code>&#x3C;&#x3C;</code>, 개행, <code>$</code> 같은 메타문자를 포함해 <code>isSafeCommand</code>에서 무조건 거부된다. 그러면 사용자가 native 권한 흐름에서 "Always allow"를 누를 때 <strong>heredoc 본문 전체(수백 줄)가 <code>settings.local.json</code>에 저장</strong>되는 오염이 발생한다. 이를 막기 위해 <code>index.ts:577~595</code>는:</p>
<ol>
<li>멀티라인 + <code>HEREDOC_PATTERN</code>(<code>&#x3C;&#x3C;[-~]?\s*['"]?\w+['"]?</code>, <code>index.ts:54</code>) 매칭 확인.</li>
<li><strong>첫 줄</strong>(heredoc 본문 제외)을 base 명령으로 추출.</li>
<li>첫 줄이 <code>SAFE_HEREDOC_PATTERNS</code>(<code>^git commit</code>, <code>^git tag</code>, <code>index.ts:61~64</code>)면 자동승인 → <code>settings.local.json</code> 오염 없이 통과.</li>
</ol>
<h3>2.4 타깃 테스트 자동승인</h3>
<p><code>isSafeTargetedLocalTestCommand</code>(<code>index.ts:528~542</code>)는 <code>vitest run &#x3C;file></code>, <code>npm/pnpm/yarn test -- --run &#x3C;file></code>, <code>node --test &#x3C;file></code>을 <strong>단일 repo 경로 인자 하나</strong>일 때만 허용(<code>index.ts:464~509</code>). 메타문자가 있으면 즉시 거부. 영속 모드(ralph/autopilot)가 테스트를 반복 실행할 때 매번 권한 프롬프트가 뜨지 않게 하는 실용적 화이트리스트다.</p>
<h3>2.5 백그라운드 폴백 (<code>getBackgroundBashPermissionFallback</code>)</h3>
<p><code>BACKGROUND_MUTATION_SUBAGENTS</code>(executor/designer/writer/debugger/git-master/test-engineer/qa-tester/document-specialist, <code>index.ts:78~87</code>)가 백그라운드로 돌 때, Edit/Write/Bash 승인이 없으면 폴백을 트리거한다(<code>index.ts:230~268</code>). Bash의 경우 ask 규칙 매칭이면 폴백, 안전 자동승인 명령이면 폴백 불필요로 판정한다. 폴백은 백그라운드 서브에이전트가 권한 프롬프트에 응답할 사람이 없어 <strong>무한 대기로 멈추는 것</strong>을 막는 안전장치다 — 승인이 없으면 차라리 포그라운드로 떨어뜨려 사용자가 응답하게 한다.</p>
<h3>2.6 자동승인 계약의 테스트 봉인</h3>
<p>자동승인 화이트리스트는 회귀에 매우 민감하므로(한 줄만 느슨해져도 임의 명령 실행 가능) <code>src/hooks/permission-handler/__tests__/index.test.ts</code>가 계약을 고정한다. 안전 케이스(<code>git status</code>, <code>npm run build</code>, <code>tsc --noEmit</code>, <code>gh pr list --state open</code>, 따옴표 경로 <code>ls "my folder"</code> 등)와 거부 케이스가 표로 나열돼 있다. 거부 케이스(<code>index.test.ts:60~120</code>)는 OMC가 차단하려는 공격 표면을 그대로 드러낸다:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>공격 유형</th>
<th>예시</th>
<th>차단 근거</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>세미콜론 체이닝</td>
<td><code>git status; rm -rf /</code></td>
<td><code>;</code> ∈ DANGEROUS_SHELL_CHARS</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>파이프 체이닝</td>
<td><code>git status | sh</code></td>
<td><code>|</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>AND/OR 체이닝</td>
<td><code>git status &#x26;&#x26; rm -rf /</code></td>
<td><code>&#x26;</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>명령 치환</td>
<td><code>git status $(whoami)</code>, <code>`whoami`</code></td>
<td><code>$</code>, <code>()</code>, <code>`</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>리다이렉션</td>
<td><code>git status > /etc/passwd</code>, <code>&#x3C; /etc/shadow</code></td>
<td><code>&#x3C;</code>, <code>></code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>서브셸</td>
<td><code>(git status)</code>, <code>git status()</code></td>
<td><code>()</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>개행/탭/CR 주입</td>
<td><code>git status\nrm -rf /</code>, <code>\t</code>, <code>\r\n</code></td>
<td><code>\n\r\t</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>brace/bracket 확장</td>
<td><code>echo {a,b}</code>, <code>ls [a-z]*</code></td>
<td><code>{}</code>, <code>[]</code>, <code>*</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>이 테이블이 본질적으로 OMC 자동승인의 "안티-패턴 명세"다 — Tengu의 19개 체크([[12_cc_guardian]] §5)와 목적은 같지만, OMC는 단 하나의 정규식(<code>DANGEROUS_SHELL_CHARS</code>)으로 전부 거부하는 보수적 접근을 택했다.</p>
<h3>2.7 fail-open 런처와 타임아웃</h3>
<p>두 Hook 모두 <code>scripts/run.cjs</code>(crossplatform 런처)를 거친다. 설계가 일관되게 <strong>fail-open</strong>이다:</p>
<ul>
<li><code>run.cjs</code>는 타깃 스크립트가 없으면 <code>process.exit(0)</code>로 깨끗이 종료해 Hook이 절대 도구를 막지 않는다. 플러그인 버전 디렉토리가 심링크로 교체/삭제돼 <code>CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT</code>가 stale이어도 캐시를 스캔해 최신 버전 스크립트를 찾는다(issue #1007).</li>
<li><code>permission-handler.mjs</code>는 import/parse 실패 시 <code>{continue:true, suppressOutput:true}</code>로 통과(<code>permission-handler.mjs:15~18</code>).</li>
<li><code>pre-tool-enforcer.mjs</code>는 최상위 try/catch가 모든 예외를 <code>{continue:true}</code>로 흡수(<code>pre-tool-enforcer.mjs:1262~1265</code>).</li>
<li>hooks.json의 timeout은 각각 3s/5s — 초과 시 Hook 결과 없이 도구가 진행된다.</li>
</ul>
<p>즉 <strong>OMC 가디언이 죽으면 호스트의 native 권한 흐름이 그대로 작동</strong>한다(가디언 부재 시에도 안전성은 호스트가 보장). 단 fail-open이므로 OMC의 자동승인·deny가 "추가 안전망"이지 "유일한 방어선"이 아님을 분명히 한다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>3. PreToolUse deny 규칙 (<code>pre-tool-enforcer.mjs</code>)</h2>
<p><code>scripts/pre-tool-enforcer.mjs</code>(약 1,269줄)는 이름과 달리 대부분 <strong>컨텍스트 리마인더 주입기</strong>지만, 세 갈래의 실제 <strong>deny 게이트</strong>를 갖는다. 모두 <code>permissionDecision:"deny"</code>를 출력한다. 시작부에서 <code>DISABLE_OMC=1</code> 또는 <code>OMC_SKIP_HOOKS</code>에 <code>pre-tool-use</code>가 있으면 무조건 <code>{continue:true}</code>로 통과(<code>pre-tool-enforcer.mjs:1030~1035</code>).</p>
<h3>3.1 ultragoal /goal 게이트 (deny)</h3>
<p><code>evaluateUltragoalPreToolEnforcement</code>(<code>pre-tool-enforcer.mjs:591~617</code>): ultragoal 모드가 활성인데 Claude의 native <code>/goal</code> 스냅샷이 ultragoal objective와 <strong>불일치</strong>하면 모든 도구를 deny한다(<code>:1078~1089</code>). 안전장치:</p>
<ul>
<li>bootstrap 도구(<code>omc ultragoal create/complete/next</code> 또는 <code>Skill:ultragoal</code>)는 예외(<code>isUltragoalBootstrapTool</code>, <code>:584~589</code>).</li>
<li>stale 상태(2시간 초과, <code>STATE_STALE_MS</code>, <code>:469</code>)·다른 프로젝트·terminal 상태(<code>:500~517</code>)는 deny하지 않음.</li>
<li><code>ALLOW_ULTRAGOAL_WITHOUT_GOAL=1</code>로 명시 우회 가능(<code>:592</code>).</li>
</ul>
<p>목적은 영속 목표 모드에서 모델이 엉뚱한 목표로 도구를 쓰는 것을 막는 <strong>목표 정합성 게이트</strong>다.</p>
<h3>3.2 모델 라우팅 deny (forceInherit)</h3>
<p>Bedrock/Vertex/프록시 환경(<code>isForceInheritEnabled</code>, <code>:891~895</code>)에서 <code>Task</code>/<code>Agent</code> 호출의 <code>model</code> 파라미터를 검증한다(<code>:1100~1193</code>, issues #1135/#1201/#1767/#1868):</p>
<ul>
<li><code>model</code>이 tier alias(sonnet/opus/haiku)인데 안전 모델로 해소 가능하면 통과; 해소 불가하거나 <code>[1m]</code> suffix가 붙으면 <strong>deny</strong>(<code>:1124~1139</code>).</li>
<li><code>model</code> 없이 세션 모델이 <code>[1m]</code> suffix를 가지면, 서브에이전트가 그것을 상속해 Bedrock에서 400을 받으므로 deny하고 tier alias를 쓰라고 안내(<code>:1141~1161</code>).</li>
<li><code>model</code> 없이 <code>subagent_type</code>만 있을 때, 에이전트 정의(<code>agents/&#x3C;name>.md</code> frontmatter의 <code>model:</code>)가 Bedrock 비호환 ID면 deny — 단 안전 라우팅 타깃이 존재할 때만(무한 재시도 루프 방지, <code>:1167~1189</code>).</li>
</ul>
<p>이건 보안이라기보다 <strong>잘못된 라우팅으로 인한 런타임 실패를 사전 차단</strong>하는 가디언이다. 보조적으로 <code>src/features/delegation-enforcer.ts</code>가 Task/Agent 호출에 model 파라미터를 주입/제거한다.</p>
<h3>3.3 team 라우팅 경고 (deny 아님)</h3>
<p>team이 활성인데 <code>Task</code>를 <code>team_name</code> 없이 호출하면 <code>[TEAM ROUTING REQUIRED]</code> <code>additionalContext</code>를 주입한다(<code>generateAgentSpawnMessage</code>, <code>:776~785</code>, issue #1006). 이건 <strong>차단이 아니라 강한 경고</strong>다 — TeamCreate 후 <code>team_name</code>을 붙이라고 유도하되 실행은 막지 않는다.</p>
<h3>3.4 SLOP 경고 (deny 아님)</h3>
<p><code>generateSlopWarning</code>(<code>:286~303</code>): Task/Bash/Edit/Write 등 위험 도구 입력에 fallback/workaround 언어가 보이면 <code>[SLOP WARNING]</code>를 주입한다. 단순 키워드가 아니라 동작 의도 패턴(<code>SLOP_FALLBACK_ACTION_PATTERNS</code>)을 보고, 문서 컨텍스트(<code>.md</code>)·자기참조(enforcer 자신)·기술적 양성 표현(<code>fallback value</code>, <code>sqlite workaround</code>)은 제외(<code>:185~284</code>). 임시방편 코드 양산을 억제하는 품질 가디언이다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>4. <code>OMC_SECURITY=strict</code> 보안 정책표 (<code>security-config.ts</code>)</h2>
<p><code>src/lib/security-config.ts</code>는 OMC 보안의 <strong>단일 진입점</strong>이다. 두 계층으로 구성된다: <code>OMC_SECURITY</code> 환경변수(마스터 스위치)와 config 파일(<code>.claude/omc.jsonc</code> 또는 <code>~/.config/claude-omc/config.jsonc</code>)의 <code>security</code> 섹션. 우선순위는 <strong>config 파일 > OMC_SECURITY env > defaults</strong>(<code>security-config.ts:14</code>).</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>기능</th>
<th>인터페이스 키</th>
<th align="center">default</th>
<th align="center">strict</th>
<th>강제 지점</th>
<th>효과</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>AST 경로 제한</td>
<td><code>restrictToolPaths</code></td>
<td align="center">false</td>
<td align="center"><strong>true</strong></td>
<td><code>ast-tools.ts:63~76</code></td>
<td><code>ast_grep_search/replace</code>를 worktree root 안으로 제한, 밖이면 <code>throw</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>python 샌드박스</td>
<td><code>pythonSandbox</code></td>
<td align="center">false</td>
<td align="center"><strong>true</strong></td>
<td><code>python-repl/bridge-manager.ts:394</code></td>
<td><code>OMC_PYTHON_SANDBOX=1</code> 주입 → os/subprocess/socket… + exec/eval/open 차단</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>프로젝트 스킬 비활성</td>
<td><code>disableProjectSkills</code></td>
<td align="center">false</td>
<td align="center"><strong>true</strong></td>
<td>skill 로더</td>
<td><code>.omc/skills/</code> 로딩 차단(신뢰 안 된 학습 스킬 주입 방지)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>자동 업데이트 비활성</td>
<td><code>disableAutoUpdate</code></td>
<td align="center">false</td>
<td align="center"><strong>true</strong></td>
<td><code>features/auto-update.ts</code></td>
<td><code>isSilentAutoUpdateEnabled()</code> 강제 false → 미검증 npm 설치 차단</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>영속 루프 하드 상한</td>
<td><code>hardMaxIterations</code></td>
<td align="center">500</td>
<td align="center"><strong>200</strong></td>
<td><code>persistent-mode/index.ts:1166,1770</code></td>
<td>도달 시 모드 자동 비활성(<code>[RALPH/ULTRAWORK - HARD LIMIT]</code>)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>remote MCP 비활성</td>
<td><code>disableRemoteMcp</code></td>
<td align="center">false</td>
<td align="center"><strong>true</strong></td>
<td><code>index.ts:306~307</code>(Exa/Context7 enable)</td>
<td>Exa(웹검색)·Context7(외부 문서) MCP 서버 미기동</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>external LLM 비활성</td>
<td><code>disableExternalLLM</code></td>
<td align="center">false</td>
<td align="center"><strong>true</strong></td>
<td><code>team/model-contract.ts:267~272</code></td>
<td>team 워커에서 Codex/Gemini CLI 차단, Claude만 허용</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>근거는 <code>DEFAULTS</code>(<code>security-config.ts:39~47</code>)와 <code>STRICT_OVERRIDES</code>(<code>:49~57</code>)다.</p>
<h3>4.1 strict의 단방향성: config는 조이기만 가능</h3>
<p><code>getSecurityConfig()</code>(<code>:92~123</code>)의 핵심 설계: <strong>strict 모드에서 config 파일은 보안을 풀 수 없고 더 조이기만 할 수 있다.</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>boolean 플래그는 <code>base.X || (fileOverrides.X ?? false)</code> — true는 절대 false로 못 내린다(<code>:102~107</code>).</li>
<li><code>hardMaxIterations</code>는 <code>Math.min(base, fileOverride)</code> — 상한은 줄어들기만 한다(<code>:108</code>). strict의 200을 config로 500으로 올릴 수 없다.</li>
</ul>
<p>비-strict 모드에서만 config가 자유롭게 default를 오버라이드한다(<code>:111~119</code>). 결과 config는 <code>cachedConfig</code>로 캐싱(<code>:60</code>, <code>:93</code>).</p>
<h3>4.2 강제 지점 코드 확인</h3>
<pre><code class="language-ts">// ast-tools.ts:63~76 — 경로 탈출 시 즉시 throw
if (!isToolPathRestricted()) return;          // 비활성이면 패스
const projectRoot = getWorktreeRoot() || process.cwd();
if (!normalize(resolved).startsWith(normalizedRoot))
  throw new Error(`Path restricted: '${inputPath}' is outside the project root …`);

// team/model-contract.ts:267~272 — getContract() 레벨에서 거부
if (agentType !== 'claude' &#x26;&#x26; isExternalLLMDisabled())
  throw new Error(`External LLM provider "${agentType}" is blocked by security policy (disableExternalLLM). …`);

// persistent-mode/index.ts:1166~1180 — 하드 상한 도달 시 모드 자동 비활성
const hardMax = getHardMaxIterations();
if (hardMax > 0 &#x26;&#x26; state.iteration >= hardMax) { /* disable + [RALPH - HARD LIMIT] */ }
</code></pre>
<p>python 샌드박스는 env 플래그(<code>OMC_PYTHON_SANDBOX=1</code>)를 자식 프로세스 spawn 시 주입하는 방식이라(<code>bridge-manager.ts:394</code>), 실제 차단은 파이썬 브리지(<code>gyoshu_bridge.py</code>) 쪽에서 일어난다. <code>SECURITY.md</code>가 명시하는 블록 목록:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>차단 모듈</strong>: <code>os</code>, <code>subprocess</code>, <code>shutil</code>, <code>socket</code>, <code>ctypes</code>, <code>multiprocessing</code>, <code>webbrowser</code>, <code>http.server</code>, <code>xmlrpc.server</code>, <code>importlib</code>, <code>sys</code>, <code>io</code>, <code>pathlib</code>, <code>signal</code></li>
<li><strong>차단 builtin</strong>: <code>exec</code>, <code>eval</code>, <code>compile</code>, <code>__import__</code>, <code>open</code>, <code>breakpoint</code></li>
</ul>
<p><code>sys</code>/<code>io</code>/<code>pathlib</code>은 정상 REPL 사용을 일부 제약하더라도 의도적으로 차단(defense-in-depth 트레이드오프). <code>SECURITY.md</code>가 명시하듯 이 블록리스트는 <strong>단독 보안 경계가 아니라 defense-in-depth</strong>이며, 신뢰 안 된 코드엔 OS 레벨 격리를 권장한다.</p>
<h3>4.4 강제 지점별 동작 정리</h3>
<p>7개 기능이 각각 어디서 어떻게 강제되는지 분류하면:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>throw로 거부(하드 실패)</strong>: <code>restrictToolPaths</code>(AST 경로 탈출 → <code>ast-tools.ts:74</code> throw), <code>disableExternalLLM</code>(<code>model-contract.ts:268</code> getContract throw). 호출이 예외로 중단된다.</li>
<li><strong>env 주입으로 위임</strong>: <code>pythonSandbox</code>(자식 프로세스에 <code>OMC_PYTHON_SANDBOX=1</code>). 차단은 하위 런타임에서.</li>
<li><strong>설정 강제 오버라이드</strong>: <code>disableAutoUpdate</code>(<code>isSilentAutoUpdateEnabled()</code> 강제 false), <code>disableProjectSkills</code>(<code>isProjectSkillsDisabled()</code>로 <code>.omc/skills/</code> 로딩 스킵).</li>
<li><strong>서버 미기동</strong>: <code>disableRemoteMcp</code>(<code>src/index.ts:306~307</code>에서 Exa/Context7 enable 플래그를 끔 → 서버 자체가 안 뜸).</li>
<li><strong>상한 후 자동 비활성</strong>: <code>hardMaxIterations</code>(<code>persistent-mode/index.ts:1166,1770</code>에서 iteration·reinforcement_count가 상한 도달 시 모드 disable + <code>[HARD LIMIT]</code> 메시지).</li>
</ul>
<p><code>disableProjectSkills</code>가 보안 기능인 이유: OMC의 <code>skill-injector.mjs</code>(UserPromptSubmit Hook, [[00_omc_overview]] §4.4)가 프로젝트 <code>.omc/skills/</code>의 학습 스킬을 컨텍스트에 자동 주입하는데, 신뢰 안 된 repo를 클론하면 악성 프롬프트가 주입될 수 있다. strict 모드는 이 채널을 닫는다.</p>
<h3>4.5 보조 가디언: SSRF guard</h3>
<p><code>src/utils/ssrf-guard.ts</code>는 URL을 검증해 내부망 요청을 차단한다(<code>BLOCKED_HOST_PATTERNS</code>):</p>
<ul>
<li>사설 IP: <code>10.x</code>, <code>172.(16-31).x</code>, <code>192.168.x</code>, link-local <code>169.254.x</code></li>
<li>loopback: <code>127.x</code>, <code>localhost</code>, IPv6 <code>::1</code></li>
<li>IPv6 unique-local <code>fc00:</code>, link-local <code>fe80:</code>, <strong>IPv6-mapped IPv4</strong> <code>::ffff:</code>(모든 사설 범위가 이 prefix로 접근 가능하므로 명시 차단)</li>
<li>multicast/reserved <code>224-239.x</code>, <code>0.x</code></li>
</ul>
<p><code>ALLOWED_SCHEMES</code>는 <code>http(s)</code>만 — <code>file:</code>/<code>gopher:</code> 등은 거부. 위 strict 정책표와 독립적으로 <strong>항상</strong> 작동하며, 웹 페치·외부 컨텍스트 도구의 SSRF 방어선이다.</p>
<h3>4.6 team 워커 권한 (advisory only)</h3>
<p><code>src/team/permissions.ts</code>는 워커별 RBAC 스코핑(<code>WorkerPermissions</code>: <code>allowedPaths</code>/<code>deniedPaths</code>/<code>allowedCommands</code>/<code>maxFileSize</code>)을 제공하지만, 파일 헤더가 명확히 경고한다 — <strong>"advisory layer only. MCP workers run in full-auto mode and cannot be mechanically restricted. Permissions are injected into prompts as instructions for the LLM to follow."</strong> 즉 tmux CLI 워커(codex/gemini)는 기계적으로 막을 수 없고, 권한은 프롬프트에 지시로 주입될 뿐이다. glob 매칭은 ReDoS를 피하려 정규식 대신 문자 단위 반복으로 구현(<code>matchGlob</code>, <code>permissions.ts:27</code>). 이것이 <code>SECURITY.md</code>의 "에이전트 간 보안 경계 부재" 한계의 구체적 근거다 — 워커 격리는 git worktree(파일 충돌 방지)일 뿐 보안 샌드박스가 아니다.</p>
<h3>4.7 OMC가 읽는 호스트 규칙</h3>
<p>OMC는 자체 규칙 저장소를 갖지 않고 <strong>호스트의 <code>settings.local.json</code>/<code>settings.json</code>을 읽어</strong> 자동승인 판정에 반영한다(<code>index.ts:107~223</code>):</p>
<ul>
<li><code>getClaudePermissionAllowEntries</code>/<code>getClaudePermissionAskEntries</code>가 프로젝트 <code>.claude/settings.local.json</code> → 글로벌 <code>settings.local.json</code> → 글로벌 <code>settings.json</code> 순으로 allow/ask 엔트리를 수집(<code>index.ts:110~114</code>).</li>
<li><code>Bash</code> 엔트리는 정확 매칭 또는 <code>Bash(pattern)</code> 형식을 지원하며, <code>*</code> 와일드카드는 접두사 매칭으로 해석하되 다음 문자가 공백/구분자일 때만 매칭해 부분단어 오매칭을 방지(<code>commandMatchesPermissionPattern</code>, <code>index.ts:173~194</code>).</li>
<li><strong>핵심</strong>: 사용자가 ask로 지정한 명령은 OMC가 자동승인하지 않는다(<code>processPermissionRequest</code>의 <code>shouldAskBashPermission</code> 체크, <code>index.ts:653</code>). 사용자 의도가 OMC 화이트리스트보다 우선한다.</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<h2>5. 호스트 위임 vs OMC 자체 — 경계선</h2>
<p>[[12_cc_guardian]]에서 분석한 Claude Code 권한 시스템 대비 OMC가 <strong>무엇을 위임하고 무엇을 더하는지</strong>:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>항목</th>
<th>Claude Code (호스트, [[12_cc_guardian]])</th>
<th>OMC가 위임/추가</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>권한 모드</td>
<td>5-mode(default/plan/acceptEdits/dontAsk/auto)</td>
<td><strong>위임</strong> — OMC는 모드를 만들지 않음</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3-tier 판정</td>
<td>allow/deny/ask + passthrough</td>
<td><strong>위임</strong> — 최종 판정은 호스트 <code>checkPermissions</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Bash 위험성 검사</td>
<td>Tengu 19개 보안 체인</td>
<td><strong>위임</strong> — OMC는 위험 명령을 deny하지 않고 패스스루</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>규칙 소스</td>
<td>user/project/local/session/enterprise</td>
<td><strong>읽기만</strong> — <code>settings.local.json</code>의 allow/ask를 참조(<code>index.ts:107~171</code>)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Bash 자동승인</td>
<td>사용자 규칙·classifier</td>
<td><strong>추가</strong> — SAFE_PATTERNS + repo-inspection + targeted-test 화이트리스트로 안전 명령 즉시 allow</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>도구 사전 차단</td>
<td>PreToolUse hook(decision)</td>
<td><strong>추가</strong> — 모델 라우팅·ultragoal 정합성·SLOP을 deny/경고</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>정책 마스터 스위치</td>
<td>(없음, 규칙 누적)</td>
<td><strong>추가</strong> — <code>OMC_SECURITY=strict</code> 7-feature 일괄 정책</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>AST/python/MCP 경계</td>
<td>(호스트 도구 없음)</td>
<td><strong>추가</strong> — OMC 자체 도구에 경로 제한·샌드박스·원격 차단</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>영속 루프 상한</td>
<td>(영속 루프 없음)</td>
<td><strong>추가</strong> — <code>hardMaxIterations</code>로 runaway 방지</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>요지: <strong>OMC는 "거부 권한"을 거의 호스트에 위임한다.</strong> Bash 위험 명령에 대해 OMC는 deny를 내리지 않고(자동승인 화이트리스트에 안 들면 그냥 패스스루), 위험성 판정은 Tengu에 맡긴다. OMC가 직접 deny하는 것은 (1) 자신이 도입한 영속 모드의 정합성(ultragoal), (2) 자신의 라우팅 메커니즘 실패 예방(forceInherit model), (3) 자신의 도구 표면(AST/python/외부 LLM)뿐이다. 즉 <strong>OMC 가디언은 "호스트가 모르는 OMC 고유 위험"만 책임진다.</strong></p>
<h3>5.1 방향성의 대칭: Tengu는 거부, OMC는 허가</h3>
<p>호스트(Tengu)와 OMC 가디언은 같은 Bash 명령을 정반대 방향에서 다룬다:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>관점</th>
<th>Tengu (호스트, [[12_cc_guardian]] §5)</th>
<th>OMC PermissionRequest Hook</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>기본 입장</td>
<td>"안전 증명될 때까지 ask"</td>
<td>"위험 신호 없으면 allow"</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>출력</td>
<td>allow→passthrough, 위반→ask</td>
<td>allow 또는 패스스루(deny 없음)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>검사 방식</td>
<td>19개 세분화 체크(AST 파싱 포함)</td>
<td>단일 메타문자 정규식 + 화이트리스트</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>목적</td>
<td>prompt injection·은닉 명령 방어</td>
<td>권한 프롬프트 피로 감소(자동화 마찰 제거)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>실패 시</td>
<td>fail-closed(ask로 폴백)</td>
<td>fail-open(호스트로 패스스루)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>두 계층은 충돌하지 않는다 — OMC가 allow를 내면 호스트는 그것을 존중하고, OMC가 침묵하면(패스스루) Tengu가 자기 판정을 한다. 즉 <strong>OMC는 Tengu가 "ask"로 떨어뜨릴 안전 명령을 미리 "allow"로 끌어올려 자동화 마찰을 줄이는 역할</strong>이고, 실제 위험 차단은 여전히 Tengu의 몫이다. 이 분업이 영속 모드(ralph/autopilot)에서 수백 번의 읽기·테스트 명령에 매번 권한 프롬프트가 뜨지 않게 하면서도 위험 명령은 호스트가 잡게 하는 핵심이다.</p>
<p><code>SECURITY.md</code>의 운영 가이드도 이 위임 철학을 반영한다 — "Claude Code 설정에서 <code>{"*":"allow"}</code>를 쓰지 말고 <code>ask</code> 모드를 선호", "<code>hook.command</code>는 <code>shell:true</code>로 실행되니 피하라", "MCP 프로세스는 env를 상속하니 민감 변수를 최소화" 등 호스트 측 권한 위생을 강조한다. 알려진 한계로 <strong>에이전트 간 보안 경계 부재</strong>(파일시스템·MCP 공유)와 <strong>OS 레벨 샌드박스 부재</strong>를 명시(<code>SECURITY.md</code> Known Limitations).</p>
<hr>
<h2>6. end-to-end 추적: ralph가 <code>cat src/foo.ts</code>를 실행할 때</h2>
<ol>
<li>ralph 루프가 <code>Bash(cat src/foo.ts)</code>를 호출 → <code>PreToolUse</code>의 <code>pre-tool-enforcer.mjs</code> 진입.</li>
<li><code>DISABLE_OMC</code>/<code>OMC_SKIP_HOOKS</code> 미설정 → ultragoal 게이트 비활성(ralph 모드) → Bash는 모델 라우팅 deny 대상 아님 → SLOP 언어 없음 → <code>additionalContext</code> 리마인더만 붙이고 <code>{continue:true}</code>(<code>:1255~1261</code>).</li>
<li>Bash 도구이므로 <code>PermissionRequest</code>의 <code>permission-handler.mjs</code> → <code>processPermissionRequest</code> 진입.</li>
<li><code>hasClaudePermissionAsk('Bash','cat src/foo.ts')</code> = false → <code>isSafeAutoApprovedCommand</code> 평가.</li>
<li><code>cat</code>은 SAFE_PATTERNS에 없지만 <code>isSafeRepoInspectionCommand</code>가 평가: 메타문자 없음 → 토큰화 → <code>src/foo.ts</code>가 worktree 내부·비민감·단일파일 → <strong>true</strong>.</li>
<li><code>behavior:'allow'</code>, reason <code>"Safe read-only or test command"</code> 반환 → 사용자 프롬프트 없이 즉시 실행.</li>
<li>만약 명령이 <code>cat .env</code>였다면? <code>isSensitiveRepoRelativePath</code>가 <code>.env</code>를 거부 → <code>isSafeAutoApprovedCommand</code> false → <code>{continue:true}</code> 패스스루 → <strong>Claude Code native 권한 흐름 + Tengu</strong>가 판정(OMC는 관여 안 함).</li>
</ol>
<p>이 흐름이 OMC 가디언의 본질을 보여준다 — 안전한 것은 빠르게 통과시키고, 애매한 것은 호스트에 떠넘긴다.</p>
<h3>6.1 두 번째 예: forceInherit 환경에서 잘못된 Task model deny</h3>
<p>Bedrock 환경(<code>isForceInheritEnabled</code>=true)에서 <code>Task(subagent_type="executor", model="claude-sonnet-4-6")</code>를 호출하면:</p>
<ol>
<li><code>PreToolUse</code>의 <code>pre-tool-enforcer.mjs</code> 진입 → toolName=<code>Task</code> → forceInherit 분기(<code>:1100</code>).</li>
<li><code>model="claude-sonnet-4-6"</code>은 tier alias 아님 + <code>isSubagentSafeModelId</code> 실패(provider-specific 포맷 아님) → <strong>deny</strong>(<code>:1124~1139</code>).</li>
<li><code>permissionDecisionReason</code>에 <code>[MODEL ROUTING]</code>과 함께 "Set ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_SONNET_MODEL=… 또는 model='sonnet' tier alias 사용" 안내.</li>
<li>모델은 안내대로 재시도 → 이번엔 <code>model="sonnet"</code> tier alias → <code>resolveTierAliasToSafeModel</code>이 안전 모델로 해소 → 통과(<code>:1122</code>).</li>
</ol>
<p>이 deny는 보안이 아니라 <strong>런타임 400 에러 사전 차단</strong>이지만, "잘못된 호출을 도구 실행 전에 막고 교정 경로를 제시"하는 가디언 패턴은 동일하다.</p>
<h3>6.2 가디언의 모드 인식: <code>isActiveModeRunning</code></h3>
<p><code>index.ts:600~635</code>의 <code>isActiveModeRunning</code>은 <code>.omc/state/</code>의 autopilot/ralph/ultrawork/team/omc-teams <code>-state.json</code>을 읽어 <code>active===true</code> 또는 <code>status===running|active</code>인지 확인한다. 이는 영속 모드가 도는 동안 권한 정책을 모드-aware하게 조정하기 위한 헬퍼로, 자동승인 화이트리스트(2.4의 타깃 테스트 등)가 영속 루프의 반복 실행에서 권한 프롬프트 폭주를 막는 근거가 된다. PreToolUse 쪽의 <code>hasActiveMode</code>(<code>pre-tool-enforcer.mjs:640~653</code>)는 세션-스코프 상태까지 보며 동일한 모드 인식을 수행한다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>cli-jaw 비교 시사점</h2>
<ul>
<li><strong>자동승인 화이트리스트 vs 도구 스키마 지연 로딩</strong>: OMC는 <code>SAFE_PATTERNS</code> + <code>DANGEROUS_SHELL_CHARS</code> 단일 정규식으로 "안전 Bash"를 정의하고, 메타문자가 하나라도 있으면 화이트리스트를 무효화한다. cli-jaw가 권한 프롬프트를 줄이려 할 때(예: <code>fewer-permission-prompts</code> 스킬의 allowlist 생성), OMC의 "메타문자 0 + 접두사 정규식 + repo-경로 검증(realpath 심링크 해소·민감경로 블랙리스트)" 3중 조건은 <strong>읽기 명령 자동승인을 안전하게 좁히는</strong> 검증된 레시피다. 특히 <code>cat/head/tail</code>을 화이트리스트에서 빼고 경로 검증 경로로 분리한 결정(임의 파일 노출 방지)은 그대로 차용 가능.</li>
<li><strong>deny 책임의 위임 경계</strong>: OMC는 "호스트가 이미 검사하는 것(Bash 위험성)"은 절대 재구현하지 않고, "자신이 도입한 메커니즘 고유의 위험(영속 모드 정합성·라우팅 실패·자체 도구 경계)"만 deny한다. cli-jaw가 자체 가디언을 설계할 때, <strong>호스트/하니스가 이미 책임지는 영역과 cli-jaw 고유 위험을 명확히 분리</strong>하면 중복 검사와 충돌을 피할 수 있다.</li>
<li><strong>단일 마스터 스위치 + 단방향 조이기</strong>: <code>OMC_SECURITY=strict</code> 하나로 7개 기능을 일괄 활성화하고, config 파일은 boolean <code>||</code>·<code>Math.min</code>으로 <strong>풀 수는 없고 조일 수만</strong> 있게 한 설계는 엔터프라이즈 배포에 이상적이다. cli-jaw의 settings.json 정책에 "strict 프로파일에서 사용자 override는 단방향(tighten-only)" 규칙을 도입하면, 권한 완화 우회를 구조적으로 차단할 수 있다.</li>
<li><strong>runaway 안전장치의 이중화</strong>: OMC는 영속 루프를 reason 문자열의 <code>/cancel</code> 안내(소프트 출구)와 <code>hardMaxIterations</code>(하드 상한, strict=200)로 이중 방어한다. cli-jaw의 <code>/loop</code>·poll·ScheduleWakeup 기반 무한 대기 설계에도 "명시적 종료 안내 + 카운터 하드캡 + 도달 시 자동 비활성"의 3중 안전장치는 필수적이다 — OMC의 <code>[HARD LIMIT]</code> 자동 비활성 패턴을 그대로 참고할 수 있다.</li>
</ul>
<hr>

  try { console.warn(`[omc] ${context}: ${formatSwallowedError(error)}`); }
  catch { /* Never let logging a swallowed error throw. */ }
}
export function createSwallowedErrorLogger(context) { return (error) => logSwallowedError(context, error); }

<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h1>oh-my-claudecode (omc) Residual Cross-Concerns</h1>
<h2>Overview</h2>
<p>This document provides a source-based analysis of <strong>remaining cross-cutting concerns</strong> that are not included in the core dimensions of [[00_omc_overview]] (agent, skill, hook, team, state persistence) in the <code>oh-my-claudecode</code> (OMC) plugin codebase. The analysis targets are <code>src/</code> (TypeScript original), <code>scripts/*.mjs</code> (Hook launcher), <code>.github/workflows/</code>, <code>.claude-plugin/</code>, and 12 <code>README.*.md</code>.</p>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>Core premise</strong>: OMC is a <strong>Claude Code plugin</strong>, not a standalone CLI runtime ([[00_omc_overview]] §1). Therefore, much of the remaining concern — Messages API authentication, OAuth flows, multimodal image decoding, Bedrock/Vertex provider abstraction, OTLP telemetry — is <strong>delegated</strong> to the host (Claude Code) (see [[13_cc_etc]] §2·§4·§8·§9). What OMC actually implements is (1) <strong>git hosting provider abstraction</strong>, (2) <strong>own model tier routing</strong>, (3) <strong>notification channel dispatch</strong>, (4) <strong>team event log</strong>, (5) <strong>secret redaction/SSRF guard</strong>, (6) <strong>security feature switch</strong>, (7) <strong>vast vitest testing infrastructure</strong>, (8) <strong>12 language README It is i18n</strong>. This document specifies “OMC presence” vs. “host delegation” in each item.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>Base path (all absolute paths): <code>/Users/jun/developer/codex/170_oh-my-claudecode/</code> sub. Expressed as a relative path below.</p>
<hr>
<h2>1. Git/VCS integration</h2>
<p>OMC's git concerns are divided into <strong>two layers</strong>: (A) git <strong>hosting provider abstraction</strong> (GitHub/GitLab/...), and (B) <strong>git worktree management</strong> for team worker isolation. Commit writing safety protocols live as text in the agent prompt (<code>git-master</code>).</p>
<h3>1.1 Automatic detection of hosting provider</h3>
<p><code>src/providers/index.ts</code> is a registry that automatically detects hosting providers from git remote URLs. Run <code>git remote get-url origin</code> (<code>timeout: 3000</code>) and keep the result in a <strong>60 second TTL cache</strong> (<code>REMOTE_URL_CACHE_TTL_MS = 60_000</code>) — also cache <code>null</code>, which is "not a git repo":</p>
<pre><code class="language-ts">// src/providers/index.ts
const REMOTE_URL_CACHE_TTL_MS = 60_000;
export function detectProvider(remoteUrl: string): ProviderName {
  const url = remoteUrl.toLowerCase();
  const hostMatch = url.match(/^(?:https?:\/\/|ssh:\/\/[^@]*@|[^@]+@)([^/:]+)/);
  // rawHost로 github.com / gitlab.com / bitbucket / dev.azure.com / gitea 매칭
}
</code></pre>
<p>There are five supported providers, each implementing the <code>GitProvider</code> interface (<code>src/providers/types.ts</code>):</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Provider</th>
<th>file</th>
<th>CLI</th>
<th>PR terminology</th>
<th>detection</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>GitHub</td>
<td><code>src/providers/github.ts</code></td>
<td><code>gh</code></td>
<td>PR</td>
<td><code>url.includes('github.com')</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>GitLab</td>
<td><code>src/providers/gitlab.ts</code></td>
<td><code>glab</code></td>
<td>MR</td>
<td>gitlab host</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Bitbucket</td>
<td><code>src/providers/bitbucket.ts</code></td>
<td>—</td>
<td>PR</td>
<td>bitbucket host</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Azure DevOps</td>
<td><code>src/providers/azure-devops.ts</code></td>
<td><code>az</code></td>
<td>PR</td>
<td>dev.azure.com</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Gitea</td>
<td><code>src/providers/gitea.ts</code></td>
<td><code>tea</code></td>
<td>PR</td>
<td>gitea host</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p><code>GitHubProvider</code> (<code>src/providers/github.ts</code>) **calls the local <code>gh</code> CLI with <code>execFileSync</code> instead of an API key (<code>viewPR</code>/<code>viewIssue</code>/<code>checkAuth</code>). In other words, the OMC does not manage authentication directly, but delegates it to <code>gh auth status</code> where the user is already logged in — this is consistent with the OMC-wide "no direct API key, local CLI call" principle ([[00_omc_overview]] §5).</p>
<pre><code class="language-ts">// src/providers/github.ts — gh CLI 위임, 입력 검증 포함
viewPR(number, owner?, repo?): PRInfo | null {
  if (!Number.isInteger(number) || number &#x3C; 1) return null;     // 정수 가드
  const args = ['pr', 'view', String(number)];
  if (owner &#x26;&#x26; repo) args.push('--repo', `${owner}/${repo}`);
  args.push('--json', 'title,headRefName,baseRefName,body,url,author');
  const raw = execFileSync('gh', args, { timeout: 10000, stdio: ['pipe','pipe','pipe'] });
  // ...
}
checkAuth(): boolean { try { execFileSync('gh', ['auth','status'], {...}); return true; } catch { return false; } }
</code></pre>
<p><code>execFileSync</code> (not via shell) + structurally blocks command injection with integer validation — Host Claude Code achieves the same goal as detecting prefix injection used in Bash tools ([[13_cc_etc]] §1.5) with a different mechanism.</p>
<h3>1.2 git worktree worker isolation</h3>
<p><code>src/team/git-worktree.ts</code> isolates the git worktree to prevent file conflicts for each worker in team mode. The path convention is <code>{repoRoot}/.omc/team/{team}/worktrees/{worker}</code>, branch <code>omc-team/{teamName}/{workerName}</code>. There are 3 modes (<code>'disabled' | 'detached' | 'named'</code>). It is stated that the policy is <strong>conservative</strong>:</p>
<pre><code class="language-ts">// src/team/git-worktree.ts (헤더 주석)
// compatible clean worktrees are reused,
// dirty team worktrees are preserved, and cleanup never force-removes dirty
// worker changes.
</code></pre>
<p>Deletion safety is verified with <code>validateWorktreeRemovalTarget</code> in a separate module <code>src/lib/worktree-cleanup-safety.ts</code>, and concurrency is protected with <code>withFileLockSync</code> (<code>src/lib/file-lock.ts</code>). Merges are coordinated by <code>src/team/merge-coordinator.ts</code>/<code>merge-orchestrator.ts</code>. This shows that beyond the host Claude Code's worktree <strong>detection</strong> ([[13_cc_etc]] §1.4), the OMC actively manages worktree <strong>creation, isolation, and merging</strong>.</p>
<h3>1.3 Commit safety protocol (prompt layer)</h3>
<p>Just as the host Claude Code injects the Git Safety Protocol into the prompt ([[13_cc_etc]] §1.2), the OMC places its own protocol in the <code>git-master</code> agent prompt (<code>agents/git-master.md</code>):</p>
<pre><code># agents/git-master.md &#x3C;Constraints>
- Rebase operations use --force-with-lease (never --force)
- Never rebase main/master.
- Stash dirty files before rebasing.
- Plan files (.omc/plans/*.md) are READ-ONLY.
# &#x3C;Success_Criteria>: 3+ files = 2+ commits, 5+ files = 3+, 10+ files = 5+ (원자적 분할)
# &#x3C;Investigation_Protocol>: git log -30 --pretty=format:"%s" 로 커밋 스타일(언어/포맷) 자동 탐지
</code></pre>
<p>Although it overlaps with the host protocol, OMC adds <strong>atomic commit splitting quantitative rules</strong> and <strong>automatic detection of commit style</strong> (English/Korean, semantic/plain distinction).</p>
<hr>
<h2>2. Model routing / provider abstraction</h2>
<p>Host Claude Code abstracts <strong>backend providers</strong> such as Bedrock/Vertex/Foundry ([[13_cc_etc]] §2). OMC puts <strong>two types of routing</strong> on top of it: (A) task complexity → model <strong>tier</strong> (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW), (B) authentic role → <strong>external provider</strong> (claude/codex/gemini CLI).</p>
<h3>2.1 Tier model analysis (3-tier abstraction)</h3>
<p><code>src/config/models.ts</code> is the source of the tier → model mapping. Setting the family default to no date makes version bumping a one-line edit:</p>
<pre><code class="language-ts">// src/config/models.ts
export const CLAUDE_FAMILY_DEFAULTS = { HAIKU: 'claude-haiku-4-5', SONNET: 'claude-sonnet-4-6', OPUS: 'claude-opus-4-7' };
export const BUILTIN_TIER_MODEL_DEFAULTS = { LOW: HAIKU, MEDIUM: SONNET, HIGH: OPUS };
export const BUILTIN_EXTERNAL_MODEL_DEFAULTS = { codexModel: 'gpt-5.3-codex', geminiModel: 'gemini-3.1-pro-preview' };
</code></pre>
<p>Tier analysis goes through <strong>multi-level environment variable fallback</strong> (<code>TIER_ENV_KEYS</code>). Interestingly, it respects not only the OMC's own keys, but also the host Claude Code's Bedrock/Anthropic environment variables:</p>
<pre><code class="language-ts">// src/config/models.ts — HIGH 티어 해석 순서
HIGH: ['OMC_MODEL_HIGH', 'CLAUDE_CODE_BEDROCK_OPUS_MODEL', 'ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_OPUS_MODEL']
</code></pre>
<p>Interpretation priority: ① OMC tier env (<code>OMC_MODEL_HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW</code>) → ② Claude Code provider env (Bedrock app-profile model ID) → ③ Anthropic family default env → ④ Built-in fallback. In other words, the OMC is <strong>parasitic</strong> on the host's provider abstraction and only adds its own tier vocabulary.</p>
<h3>2.2 Complexity-based automatic tier routing</h3>
<p><code>routeTask()</code> in <code>src/features/model-routing/router.ts</code> determines the tier by extracting task signals (<code>signals.ts</code>) → complexity scoring (<code>scorer.ts</code>) → rule evaluation (<code>rules.ts</code>). The priority guard is clear:</p>
<pre><code class="language-ts">// src/features/model-routing/router.ts
if (mergedConfig.forceInherit)  return { model:'inherit', ... };   // issue #1135: 부모 모델 상속
if (!mergedConfig.enabled)      return createDecision(defaultTier, ...);
if (context.explicitModel)      return createDecision(explicitTier, ..., '사용자 명시 모델 존중');
if (agentOverrides?.[agentType]) ...                              // 에이전트별 오버라이드
</code></pre>
<p><code>forceInherit</code> (parent context model inheritance) is a safety valve that prevents cost explosion.</p>
<h3>2.3 Role → Provider Delegated Routing</h3>
<p><code>resolveDelegation()</code> in <code>src/features/delegation-routing/resolver.ts</code> maps the canonical role to provider/tool. <strong>Notable change</strong>: The method of delegating codex/gemini to MCP has been <strong>deprecated</strong> and unified as a <code>/team</code> CLI worker:</p>
<pre><code class="language-ts">// src/features/delegation-routing/resolver.ts
const DEPRECATED_MCP_PROVIDERS = new Set(['codex', 'gemini']);
export const DEPRECATED_MCP_PROVIDER_WARNING =
  '[OMC] Codex/Gemini MCP delegation is deprecated. Use /team to coordinate CLI workers instead.';
</code></pre>
<p>Interpretation priority: ① Explicit tool (always claude <code>Task</code>) → ② Configured routing (<code>config.roles[role]</code>, requeried after canonicalization) → ③ Role category heuristic → ④ <code>defaultProvider</code>(<code>'claude'</code>). The configuration comes from <code>team.roleRouting</code> ([[00_omc_overview]] §2.3) in <code>.claude/omc.jsonc</code>.</p>
<h3>2.4 Running external CLI workers</h3>
<p>When a team worker launches codex/gemini, <code>src/team/mcp-team-bridge.ts</code> <code>spawns</code> a local CLI without **API key. For security reasons, filter the environment variables and add the yolo mode flag:</p>
<pre><code class="language-ts">// src/team/mcp-team-bridge.ts
cmd = "gemini"; args = ["--approval-mode", "yolo"]; if (model) args.push("--model", model);
// Security: filter environment variables to prevent credential leakage
const child = spawn(cmd, args, { stdio: ["pipe","pipe","pipe"], cwd });
// MAX_BUFFER_SIZE 상한, timeoutMs 후 SIGTERM
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>3. Error handling/recovery pattern</h2>
<p>Host Claude Code's adaptive retry/exponential backoff ([[13_cc_etc]] §3) is not present in OMC — this is because the host makes the API call itself. OMC's error handling focuses on <strong>(A) logging swallowed-error that never throws, (B) detecting usage-API 429 degradation, and (C) passing Stop Hook's authentication/context failure</strong>.</p>
<h3>3.1 Swallowed Error pattern</h3>
<p><code>src/lib/swallowed-error.ts</code> stuffs the "log but never propagate errors in background tasks" convention into a function — used where failure should not kill the main flow, such as hooks, daemons, and event logs:</p>
<pre><code class="language-ts">// src/lib/swallowed-error.ts
export function logSwallowedError(context, error) {
  try { console.warn(`[omc] ${context}: ${formatSwallowedError(error)}`); }
  catch { /* Never let logging a swallowed error throw. */ }
}
export function createSwallowedErrorLogger(context) { return (error) => logSwallowedError(context, error); }
</code></pre>
<p>The team event log (<code>src/team/events.ts</code>) imports this logger, so event append failures do not kill the worker.</p>
<h3>3.2 Rate-Limit Degradation Detection</h3>
<p><code>src/features/rate-limit-wait/rate-limit-monitor.ts</code> detects <strong>429</strong> of OAuth usage API, not the host, and notifies the user. At 429, create a degrade message specifying the stale cache usage:</p>
<pre><code class="language-ts">// src/features/rate-limit-wait/rate-limit-monitor.ts
const usingStaleData = result.error === 'rate_limited' &#x26;&#x26; !!result.rateLimits;
// "Usage API rate limited; showing stale cached usage (...)"
// "[usage API 429; cached data]"
</code></pre>
<p><code>src/features/rate-limit-wait/daemon.ts</code> is a background daemon that polls until the rate-limit is released, and implements the OMC's persistence philosophy of "polling without dying" ([[00_omc_overview]] §11) even in the error domain.</p>
<h3>3.3 Passing Failure of Stop Hook (Host Delegation + OMC Augmentation)</h3>
<p><code>scripts/persistent-mode.mjs</code>, the core of the persistent loop, never blocks <strong>context limits·401/403·OAuth expiration</strong> and preserves the host's re-authentication/compression flow by passing it as <code>{continue:true, suppressOutput:true}</code> ([[00_omc_overview]] §7.1). In other words, authentication and context error recovery are delegated to the host, but the OMC defends against blocking the flow.</p>
<h3>3.4 Payload size guard</h3>
<p><code>src/lib/payload-limits.ts</code> prevents OOM of memory/state write payloads (<code>validatePayloadSize</code>). If exceeded, an error message in MB is returned:</p>
<pre><code class="language-ts">// src/lib/payload-limits.ts
error: `Payload size ${sizeMB}MB exceeds maximum of ${limitMB}MB`
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>4. Telemetry / Observability</h2>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>Host Delegation</strong>: 1P <code>tengu_*</code> event logging of host Claude Code and 3P OpenTelemetry (OTLP) ([[13_cc_etc]] §4) are not in OMC. OMC <strong>does not</strong> send usage to external telemetry backends. Instead, we have local file-based observability (JSONL event logs) and user notifications.</p>
</blockquote>
<h3>4.1 Team Event Log (append-only JSONL)</h3>
<p><code>src/team/events.ts</code> is an <strong>append-only event log</strong> that mirrors OMX's <code>appendTeamEvent</code> semantics. All team meaningful actions (task completion/failure, worker state changes, exit gates) are stacked as structured events in <code>.omc/state/team/{teamName}/events.jsonl</code>:</p>
<pre><code class="language-ts">// src/team/events.ts — O_WRONLY|O_APPEND|O_CREAT atomic append
const full: TeamEvent = { event_id: randomUUID(), team: teamName, created_at: new Date().toISOString(), ...event };
await appendFile(absPath(cwd, TeamPaths.events(teamName)), `${JSON.stringify(full)}\n`, 'utf8');
</code></pre>
<p>Along with <code>src/team/audit-log.ts</code> (governance audit), this is an OMC-specific design that ensures observability through <strong>replayable local event sourcing</strong> rather than the host's OTEL metrics.</p>
<h3>4.2 Notification dispatch (user-facing telemetry)</h3>
<p><code>src/notifications/</code> (18 modules) sends task completion/approval requests to external channels. Platforms supported by <code>src/notifications/dispatcher.ts</code>:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>platform</th>
<th>method</th>
<th>URL validation</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>Discord (webhook)</td>
<td>webhook POST</td>
<td>Force <code>discord.com</code>/<code>discordapp.com</code> HTTPS</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Discord Bot</td>
<td><code>/api/v10/channels/{id}/messages</code></td>
<td>bot token</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Telegram</td>
<td>Bot API</td>
<td>chat ID authorization</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Slack (webhooks)</td>
<td>webhook POST</td>
<td>Force HTTPS for <code>hooks.slack.com</code> subdomain</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Slack Bot</td>
<td>Socket Mode</td>
<td><code>src/notifications/slack-socket.ts</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Generic webhook</td>
<td>curl/fetch POST</td>
<td>Force HTTPS</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<pre><code class="language-ts">// src/notifications/dispatcher.ts — 채널별 호스트 화이트리스트
function validateSlackUrl(url) { return new URL(url).hostname === "hooks.slack.com" || hostname.endsWith(".hooks.slack.com"); }
</code></pre>
<p>Presets (<code>src/notifications/presets.ts</code>) catalog webhook integrations such as n8n and ClawdBot. <strong>Supports both directions</strong>: <code>src/notifications/reply-listener.ts</code> is a background daemon that polls Discord/Telegram replies, Slack receives them in Socket Mode, and injects the reply text into the tmux pane (0600 permissions, double input sanitization, user ID authorization, rate limiting).</p>
<hr>
<h2>5. Authentication / Secret Management</h2>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>Host Delegation</strong>: API key source priority, OAuth flow ([[13_cc_etc]] §8.1–8.2) is entirely up to host Claude Code. OMC does not <strong>store or exchange</strong> keys. OMC's authentication concerns are (A) reuse of existing sessions from external CLI, (B) secret <strong>redaction</strong>, and (C) safe storage of notification tokens.</p>
</blockquote>
<h3>5.1 CLI session delegation</h3>
<p>The authentication of team workers is owned by each CLI. <code>src/team/model-contract.ts</code> passes API-key authentication if <code>ANTHROPIC_API_KEY</code> exists in the parent environment, and if not, passes the interactive OAuth/session login path to the worker pane:</p>
<pre><code class="language-ts">// src/team/model-contract.ts
// Detect parent launch env for Claude Code API-key auth.
return typeof env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY === 'string' &#x26;&#x26; env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.trim().length > 0;
// cursor-agent owns its own session/auth state (별도 워커 타입)
</code></pre>
<p>GitHub PR viewing is also delegated to <code>gh auth status</code> (§1.1). In other words, the OMC <strong>only reads</strong> the authentication status and does not create it.</p>
<h3>5.2 Secret Redaction</h3>
<p>Apart from detecting the host's 25 secret patterns ([[13_cc_etc]] §8.3), the OMC masks tokens in log, error, and persistent states with its own <code>src/notifications/redact.ts</code> (issue #1162):</p>
<pre><code class="language-ts">// src/notifications/redact.ts — 패턴별 마스킹
.replace(/\b(xox[bpae]-)[A-Za-z0-9-]+/g, '$1****')        // Slack
.replace(/\/bot(\d+):[A-Za-z0-9_-]+/g, '/bot$1:****')       // Telegram URL
.replace(/(Bearer\s+)\S+/gi, '$1****')                       // Bearer
.replace(/\b(sk-ant-api)[A-Za-z0-9_-]+/g, '$1****')          // Anthropic
.replace(/\b(ghp_|gho_|ghs_|github_pat_)[A-Za-z0-9_]+/g, '$1****')  // GitHub
.replace(/\b(AKIA)[A-Z0-9]{16}\b/g, '$1****')               // AWS
</code></pre>
<p>Redaction is especially important for notification domains because notification channels send messages outward (§4.2). <code>reply-listener.ts</code> specifies that bot tokens are stored in <strong>0600 status file</strong> and not in environment variables.</p>
<h3>5.3 SSRF Guard</h3>
<p>For notification webhook and <code>ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL</code> validation, <code>src/utils/ssrf-guard.ts</code> blocks requests to private/internal IPs:</p>
<pre><code class="language-ts">// src/utils/ssrf-guard.ts — 차단 패턴
/^127\./, /^10\./, /^172\.(1[6-9]|2[0-9]|3[01])\./, /^192\.168\./,  // 사설
/^169\.254\./,                                                       // link-local
/^\[?::1\]?$/, /^\[?fc00:/i, /^\[?::ffff:/i,                        // IPv6 + 매핑 우회
// ALLOWED_SCHEMES = ['https:', 'http:']
</code></pre>
<p><code>src/config/models.ts</code> imports <code>validateAnthropicBaseUrl</code> (SSRF guard) to also validate custom base URLs.</p>
<hr>
<h2>6. Multimodal / Vision</h2>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>Host delegation</strong>: Image decoding, sharp resizing, and clipboard screenshots ([[13_cc_etc]] §9) are handled by host Claude Code. OMC does not decode images directly.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>OMC's multimodal focus is narrow to one <strong>visual-verdict</strong>. <code>skills/visual-verdict/SKILL.md</code> (level 2) is a skill that compares a generated UI screenshot against a reference image and returns a <strong>deterministic JSON verdict</strong>:</p>
<pre><code class="language-json">// skills/visual-verdict/SKILL.md &#x3C;Output_Contract>
{ "score": 0, "verdict": "revise", "category_match": false,
  "differences": ["..."], "suggestions": ["..."], "reasoning": "short explanation" }
</code></pre>
<p>The actual image comparison is delegated to the host model's vision capabilities, and the OMC only enforces the <strong>output schema contract and repetition gate</strong> (pass/revise/fail). The <code>designer</code> agent's iterative edit loop consumes this roll.</p>
<hr>
<h2>7. Event/Messaging System</h2>
<p>The OMC has a <strong>multi-layer messaging infrastructure</strong> for team mode (<code>src/team/</code>). These are OMC-specific surfaces that do not exist on the host:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>tier</th>
<th>module</th>
<th>Role</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>Event Sourcing</td>
<td><code>events.ts</code>, <code>audit-log.ts</code></td>
<td>append-only JSONL event/audit log</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Messaging</td>
<td><code>inbox-outbox.ts</code>, <code>message-router.ts</code>, <code>leader-inbox.ts</code>, <code>conflict-mailbox.ts</code></td>
<td>Worker↔Lead message, conflict mailbox</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>routing</td>
<td><code>stage-router.ts</code>, <code>role-router.ts</code>, <code>task-router.ts</code></td>
<td>Dispatch Step/Role/Task</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Distribution</td>
<td><code>dispatch-queue.ts</code></td>
<td>job queue</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>survivability</td>
<td><code>heartbeat.ts</code></td>
<td>Walker Heartbeat</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>External Channel</td>
<td><code>notifications/reply-listener.ts</code></td>
<td>Discord/Telegram/Slack two-way</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>Events are <strong>file-based</strong> (JSONL append) so they can be replayed across process boundaries and restarts. The reason it's not an in-memory event bus is because the <code>UserPromptSubmit</code>/<code>Stop</code> Hooks spawn a new Node process each turn ([[00_omc_overview]] §4.4) — disk must be the source of truth for persistence.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    subgraph Host["Claude Code 호스트 (위임 영역)"]
        Auth["인증/OAuth/API키"]
        Vision["이미지 디코딩/sharp"]
        Provider["Bedrock/Vertex/Foundry 추상화"]
        Tengu["1P/3P 텔레메트리(tengu_/OTEL)"]
    end
    subgraph OMC["OMC 실재 구현"]
        GitProv["git 호스팅 프로바이더 5종 (gh/glab/...)"]
        Worktree["worktree 격리/머지"]
        Tier["티어 라우팅 HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW + forceInherit"]
        Deleg["역할→provider 위임 (codex/gemini deprecated→/team)"]
        Notif["알림 디스패치 6채널 + reply-listener"]
        Events["team 이벤트 JSONL + audit-log"]
        Redact["시크릿 레다크션 / SSRF 가드"]
        Sec["보안 피처 스위치 (OMC_SECURITY)"]
        Test["vitest 552 테스트 + 7 CI 워크플로"]
        I18n["README 12개 언어"]
    end
    OMC -.기생/위임.-> Host
    Tier --> Provider
    Auth -.재사용.-> Deleg
    Vision -.판정만.-> Notif
    Notif --> Redact
    Events --> Redact
    Redact --> SSRF["ssrf-guard"]
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>8. Feature flags/security switches</h2>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>Host Delegation</strong>: GrowthBook/Statsig based remote feature gates ([[13_cc_etc]] §4.5) are not present in OMC. OMC's "flags" are <strong>local environment variables + security switches based on JSONC settings</strong>.</p>
</blockquote>
<p><code>src/lib/security-config.ts</code> is the single entry point for integrated security configuration. Layer 2 priorities (<code>config file > OMC_SECURITY env > defaults</code>):</p>
<pre><code class="language-ts">// src/lib/security-config.ts
// OMC_SECURITY="strict" → 전 기능 ON, 미설정 → 기능별 기본(전부 OFF)
interface SecurityConfig {
  restrictToolPaths: boolean;     // ast_grep을 프로젝트 루트로 제한
  pythonSandbox: boolean;         // python_repl 모듈/빌트인 차단
  disableProjectSkills: boolean;  // .omc/skills/ 로딩 차단
  disableAutoUpdate: boolean;     // 무음 자동 업데이트 차단
  hardMaxIterations: number;      // 영속 모드 하드 상한 (0=무제한)
  disableRemoteMcp: boolean;      // Exa/Context7 원격 MCP 차단
  disableExternalLLM: boolean;    // team의 Codex/Gemini 차단
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>hardMaxIterations</code> is an infinite loop prevention upper limit for persistent loops (ralph/autopilot) ([[00_omc_overview]] §7.1), and <code>disableExternalLLM</code> turns off external CLI workers in §2.4. Other global kill switches: <code>DISABLE_OMC</code> (all), <code>OMC_SKIP_HOOKS</code> (specific Hooks comma separated). Model routing flags are controlled at the code level with <code>forceInherit</code>(§2.2)·<code>enabled</code>(<code>src/features/model-routing/router.ts</code>).</p>
<hr>
<h2>9. Packaging/Distribution</h2>
<p>OMC is a <strong>normal npm package</strong> as opposed to the host Claude Code (zero dependency bundle, [[13_cc_etc]] §6) — but its output surface is unique.</p>
<h3>9.1 Dual Manifest + Satellite File Sync</h3>
<p>The npm name of <code>package.json</code> is <code>oh-my-claude-sisyphus</code> (v4.14.4), but the plugin name of <code>.claude-plugin/plugin.json</code> is <code>oh-my-claudecode</code>. All three entry point bins (<code>omc</code>/<code>oh-my-claudecode</code>/<code>omc-cli</code>) point to <code>bridge/cli.cjs</code>. The version is propagated to satellite files by <code>scripts/sync-version.sh</code> (npm <code>version</code> lifecycle hook):</p>
<pre><code class="language-bash"># scripts/sync-version.sh — package.json → satellite files
#   .claude-plugin/plugin.json, .claude-plugin/marketplace.json (2곳), docs/CLAUDE.md (OMC:VERSION 마커)
perl -i -pe "s/\"version\": \"[^\"]*\"/\"version\": \"$VERSION\"/" "$PLUGIN"
</code></pre>
<p>The build creates <code>bridge/</code>·<code>dist/</code> with esbuild after <code>tsc</code> (step 7 build script, <code>package.json</code> <code>build</code>). <code>.npmignore</code> distributes only compiled output, excluding <code>src/</code>·<code>*.ts</code> (but <code>*.d.ts</code> is preserved)·<code>examples/</code>.</p>
<h3>9.2 Dependencies (as opposed to host)</h3>
<p>The host has <code>dependencies: {}</code>, but the OMC has the actual runtime dependencies: <code>@anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk</code>, <code>@modelcontextprotocol/sdk</code>, <code>@ast-grep/napi</code> (AST tool), <code>better-sqlite3</code> (job-state-db), <code>ajv</code> (schema validation), <code>commander</code>, <code>jsonc-parser</code>, <code>safe-regex</code>. Requires Node <code>>=20.0.0</code>.</p>
<h3>9.3 Release Automation</h3>
<p><code>scripts/release.ts</code>(tsx) <strong>derives the number of changelogs, contributors, and PRs from the merged PR metadata into a single dataset</strong>. <code>npm run release -- patch|minor|major|&#x3C;version></code>, <code>--dry-run</code> support. The logic can be tested separately in <code>src/lib/release-generation.ts</code> (<code>extractPullRequestNumbers</code>/<code>generateChangelog</code>/<code>generateReleaseBody</code>).</p>
<hr>
<h2>10. Test infrastructure</h2>
<p>Host Claude Code was unable to verify the tests in the bundle ([[13_cc_etc]] §7), but OMC is <strong>open source and has an extensive test suite</strong>.</p>
<h3>10.1 vitest suite</h3>
<p><code>vitest.config.ts</code>: Node environment, <code>globals: true</code>, <code>testTimeout: 30000</code>, v8 coverage (text/json/html). Tests are colocated in the pattern <code>src/**/*.{test,spec}.ts</code>. A <code>__tests__</code> directory exists for each module:</p>
<pre><code>src/__tests__, src/config/__tests__, src/tools/__tests__, src/team/(여러),
src/ultragoal/__tests__, src/901_autoresearch/__tests__, src/features/__tests__,
src/planning/__tests__, src/openclaw/__tests__, src/interop/__tests__, src/goal-workflows/__tests__ ...
</code></pre>
<p>The number of <code>*.test.ts</code> files is <strong>552</strong> (<code>find ... -name '*.test.ts' | wc -l</code>). A separate <code>tests/fixtures/</code> places the fixtures. Of particular note is <code>scripts/test-mutual-exclusion.ts</code> in [[00_omc_overview]] §9 — mode mutual exclusion (ralph⊃ultrawork collision prevention) is verified with a dedicated test.</p>
<h3>10.2 CI workflow (7 types)</h3>
<p><code>.github/workflows/</code>: <code>ci.yml</code> (lint+typecheck / test / build 3 jobs, Node 20, <code>npm test -- --run</code>), <code>pr-check.yml</code>, <code>release.yml</code>, <code>auto-label.yml</code>, <code>stale.yml</code>, <code>cleanup.yml</code>, and <strong><code>upgrade-test.yml</code></strong> — <code>omc update</code> + Actually run the session-start hook to catch upgrade regression (timeout 20 minutes). This is a plugin-specific test that verifies that plugin updates do not break the existing user environment.</p>
<p>There are also two benchmarks: <code>benchmarks/run-all.ts</code> (<code>npm run bench:prompts</code>, prompt regression comparison <code>--compare</code>/<code>--save-baseline</code>) and the <code>benchmark/</code>·<code>benchmarks/</code> directory.</p>
<hr>
<h2>11. Internationalization / Accessibility</h2>
<p>Host Claude Code does not have the i18n framework ([[13_cc_etc]] §12). OMC also <strong>doesn't have a runtime i18n</strong> (hard-coding user-facing strings in English), but <strong>document i18n is real</strong>.</p>
<h3>11.1 README in 12 languages</h3>
<p>There are 12 translated READMEs in the repo root: <code>README.md</code> (English original) + <code>de/es/fr/it/ja/ko/pt/ru/tr/vi/zh</code>. At the top of each file there is a language selection navigation and a translation quality marker:</p>
<pre><code># README.ko.md
[English](README.md) | 한국어 | [中文](README.zh.md) | [日本語](README.ja.md) | ...
&#x3C;!-- TODO(i18n): verify translation -->     ← 검증 대기 표지 (여러 위치)
</code></pre>
<p>The <code>&#x3C;!-- TODO(i18n): verify translation --></code> marker indicates that the translation is automatic/unverified. In other words, OMC's i18n is <strong>marketing document level</strong>, and the runtime message, agent prompt, and skill SKILL.md are in English. However, <code>git-master</code> automatically detects Korean/English (§1.3) in commit messages and <strong>adapts the output language</strong>.</p>
<h3>11.2 Accessibility</h3>
<p>Due to the nature of CLI/plug-in, GUI accessibility is not applicable. The fact that the notification channel (§4.2) delivers progress through a non-visual channel (text message) is an indirect accessibility element.</p>
<hr>
